12d2d047.title: Technical Program Manager, Data Center, Risk and Compliance
12d2d047.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Gurgaon, Haryana, India; New Delhi, Delhi, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience in program management.
* Experience working directly in or with risk management, compliance, or audit functions.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Professional certification related to audit, risk, or compliance (e.g., CISA, CRISC, CIA, PMP).
* 2 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* 2 years of experience managing or leading internal or external audit engagements.
* Experience interpreting and adapting global policies to meet India's regulatory requirements e.g. MeitY, DPDP etc.
* Experience with data centers or other industrial spaces.


**About The Job**
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Drive the tactical and strategic evolution of the Data Center compliance program, transforming, enhancing, or deprecating processes to meet the evolving needs of the organization. Serve as the primary subject matter expert on DC policies and procedures.
* Lead the execution of localized external audits. Synthesize control evidence, identify vulnerabilities, prepare site leads for external interviews, coordinate the regional assurance calendar and facilitate proactive testing.
* Drive specialized risk and compliance programs dedicated to specific country\-level mandates, ensuring precise local execution. Translate master global policies into steps, ensuring testing rubrics are physically executable for sites facing bespoke local mandates.
* Collaborate with internal stakeholders to navigate ongoing regulations and provide perspective on compliance impacts.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

ec5ff081.title: Technical Program Manager - India
ec5ff081.description:
**About Juniper Square**
 Private markets are one of the largest, most complex, and most underserved corners of global finance. Our mission at Juniper Square is to unlock their full potential. We’re the Operations Partner trusted by 2,300\+ GPs, unifying technology, data, and fund administration services into a single platform that helps GPs move faster, make better decisions, and scale with precision. With $300B\+ under administration and 700,000\+ LPs on platform, we’ve built the scale to match our ambition. And with JunieAI, our purpose\-built AI platform, we’re reimagining how private markets operate, embedding intelligence across every workflow. Founder\-led since 2014, backed by $350M\+ in funding, and now 1,000\+ employees strong, we’re building a company designed to shape the future of private markets for decades to come.
   

  

 Our culture is built for people who want to do ambitious, meaningful work alongside exceptionally talented teammates. We think like owners, move with urgency, and take pride in solving hard problems that truly matter to our customers and the future of private markets. We believe the best ideas come from open debate, deep collaboration, and diverse perspectives, which is why we believe transparency is the default and feedback makes us stronger. If you’re energized by high standards, rapid growth, and the opportunity to help define a category at a pivotal moment, come join us!
   

  

*Juniper Square offers employees a variety of ways to work, ranging from a fully remote experience to working full\-time in one of our physical offices. We invest heavily in* 
*digital\-first* 
*operations, allowing our teams to collaborate effectively across 27 U.S. states, 2 Canadian Provinces, India, Luxembourg, and England. We also have physical offices in San Francisco, New York City, Mumbai and Bangalore for employees who prefer to work in an office some or all of the time.*
**About Your Role**
 As a Technical Program Manager, you will be responsible for program management of large software initiatives of the company. You will collaborate closely with partners across our engineering, product, design, quality assurance, operations and platform teams to establish program plans and drive all stages of the software development and release. You will be responsible for ensuring alignment among the cross\-functional teams and ensure that the project plans are executed effectively meeting customer commitments. You will collaborate with the development team and product managers and drive program planning taking cross functional, internal and external dependencies into consideration.
   

  

 You will also support the PMO's efforts to standardize processes and tools for continuous improvement, including contributing to governance, metrics, process adherence, and status reporting as part of the PMO charter.
   

  

 You will demonstrate a good understanding of AI concepts, knowledge of tools and techniques in the AI space, ability to adopt AI tools for day\-to\-day program management by automating, scripting, customizing artifacts for quick turnaround when needed. Working knowledge and hands\-on experience of writing scripts or using AI software and tools to extract data from internal tools including Jira and Confluence, into spreadsheets to analyze and generate metrics for R\&D department. In short, you will be the AI thought leader for the PMO organization.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Work closely with cross\-functional partners across engineering, product, Design and platform teams to gather requirements and dependencies, drive estimation and schedule discussions with engineering and establish the program plan
* Along with engineering, work closely with stakeholders in other teams and departments including site reliability engineering, user experience, customer support, customer success and leadership teams if required for program planning
* Work closely with third party software teams to identify engineering dependencies of the program and document them. Set clear expectations and track the dependencies closely with third parties where applicable.
* Create artifacts and establish the execution framework, say agile scrum ceremonies for day to day program management.
* Providing regular and timely updates to stakeholders including senior leadership on program status; ensure risks are monitored, managed and mitigated from time to time. Demonstrate ability to apply processes where needed. e.g. use change management process for changing scope or timelines
* Ensure that products are delivered on time meeting the relevant metrics criteria established by the group.
* Ensure project documentation is taken up on a regular basis
* Contribute to roadmap planning exercise and use prior experience to help identify potential challenges


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent educational qualification
* 8 to 10 years of total experience in the industry, and 5\+ years of experience in technical program management of complex and large programs spanning multiple cross\-functional teams
* Deep understanding of the product development process, the product lifecycle, and technical program management
* Experience with project management tools like Atlassian suite, Microsoft Project Plan, Smart Sheets, or equivalent
* Experience with scripting (Python basics) for analyzing data in spreadsheets
* Experience with using AI tools to gain efficiency
* Experience with automation of data extraction from Jira via scripts and further analysis
* Experience in Agile SCRUM framework and understanding of SAFe concepts
* Experience in working cross\-functionally with product management, user experience, customer success, customer support, operations teams and any cross\-functional partners (e.g. sales, marketing, legal, etc.) within the company
* Experience with program and project governance concepts and tools for budgeting, vendor management, compliance and metrics
* Professional credentials like PMI PMP, ACP, CSM will be a plus
* You must be self\-driven, flexible with working with counterparts in other geographies, and adaptable

c527eb00.title: Technical Program Manager, Workspace Monetization
c527eb00.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* 5 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience working in SaaS or subscription\-based business models, with a deep understanding of recurring revenue streams or enterprise customer lifecycles.
* Experience in software development workflows (code review, testing) and define quality metrics for automated systems.
* Experience managing end\-to\-end product lifecycles and large\-scale rollouts.


**About The Job**
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 Google Workspace is home to billions of users and millions of businesses. The Workspace Monetization (Commerce and Admin Experience) team is at the heart of our commercial strategy and enterprise customer lifecycle.
   

  

 As a Technical Program Manager on this team, you will lead complex, cross\-functional programs that define how we monetize the next generation of AI\-powered productivity.
   

  

 Our team is responsible for the end\-to\-end customer lifecycle journey in Workspace. We focus on developing value\-capture strategies, managing usage limits, mitigating abuse, optimizing purchase flows, and minimizing customer churn for millions of global businesses. Building core infrastructure for metering, billing, and invoicing based on SKUs and resource consumption. Modernizing our enterprise administration platforms, advancing mobile administration tools, and deploying AI agents and assistants to streamline IT operations. Building robust auditing and reporting platforms, deploying AI\-driven diagnostics, and designing seamless migration and onboarding pathways for enterprise and small business customers.
   

  

 Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with team members and stakeholders to understand or identify defined work problems and program goals, obtain prioritized deliverables, and discuss program impact.
* Prioritize program goals, understand and translate other stakeholders’ needs into program goals and prioritized deliverables with minimal assistance, and contribute to decisions on prioritizing goals and deliverables.
* Define the scope of projects and develop, execute, or manage project plans for supported programs.
* Review key metrics pertaining to a program, monitor potential metric deviations, and define corrective actions for critical deviations.
* Identify, communicate, and collaborate with relevant stakeholders within one or more teams to drive impact and work toward mutual goals. Build, maintain and enhance business, operational, and management dashboards. Build relationships and manage complex dependencies across core product teams, Payments, Risk, Legal, and Privacy departments.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

f8788376.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
f8788376.description:
**Company Overview** 




  





 Trianz is an
 **applied AI solutions company** 
 that accelerates customer business transformation through AI powered
 **"Transformation Services as a Software Model"** 
 . With 25\+ years of transforming enterprises, we've evolved to a product\-led, platform\-driven organization serving global enterprises across Financial Services, Insurance, Healthcare, Hi\-Tech, Manufacturing, and other industries.
 



 With global presence across 4 continents, our platform portfolio under the unified
 **Concierto brand** 
 delivers end\-to\-end transformations including solutions for
 **Migrate, Manage, Maximize, Modernize, Insights \& Agentic AI, and SecOps** 
 \- delivered through strategic partnerships with leading hyperscalers.
 



 We're building the premier innovation\-led organization in the digital transformation space through AI\-first methodologies and data\-driven excellence \-
 **RevolutionAIzing Transformations.** 




  





**Role Overview** 




  





 Trianz is scaling its AI\-first transformation platform under the Concierto brand. As the Senior TPM for CTO Delivery, you own the master delivery map for the entire CTO Office — every commitment to the executive team, sales, and peer teams flows through you.
 



 You're not a project administrator. You're a strategic delivery owner who understands AI product development intimately. You'll know why a model release differs from a software release, why an architecture sign\-off cannot be rushed, and how to distinguish a real blocker from noise. You coordinate cross\-team dependencies, surface risks before they escalate, and deliver monthly executive reports that inform CEO and board decisions.
 



 This is a high\-ownership, high\-impact role where your delivery discipline directly enables enterprise transformation at scale.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**Delivery Ownership \& Visibility** 



* Own and maintain the master CTO Office delivery map: all workstreams, all commitments, all dependencies across six verticals
* Track weekly, monthly, and quarterly deliverables; map every CTO commitment explicitly to its stakeholder and deadline
* Run the weekly CTO Office delivery standup: surface blockers and risks before they escalate to leadership
* Produce the monthly CTO delivery report for the CEO: what shipped, what is at risk, what is coming
* Manage the dependency map between CTO Office output and implementation team schedules



**Cross\-Team Coordination** 



* Drive cross\-team alignment meetings between CTO Office and peer engineering functions
* Flag blockers to the CTO with enough lead time to course\-correct
* Manage critical path dependencies across architecture, infrastructure, product, and delivery teams
* Ensure clear communication of commitments and their status across all stakeholders



**Programme\-Level Delivery** 



* Manage delivery at the programme level, not individual projects
* Balance multiple concurrent delivery streams with competing priorities
* Translate CTO Office strategy into executable delivery roadmaps
* Establish delivery standards, gates, and review cadences
* Monitor delivery health metrics and proactively address slippage



**Executive Communication** 



* Communicate delivery status clearly to executive stakeholders
* Identify and escalate risks and dependencies early
* Support CEO/board reporting with accurate, timely delivery data
* Influence executive decision\-making through clear programme visibility



  





**Ideal Candidate Profile** 




**Experience** 
 : 15\+ Years
 



  





**AI/ML Product Delivery (Non\-Negotiable):** 



* Shipped AI or ML products to production in a TPM or programme management capacity
* NOT IT project management, services, or ITSM background
* Managed cross\-team delivery programmes where CTO\-office\-type output fed into engineering team implementation (3\+ years)
* Deep understanding of AI/ML development cycles: what makes model releases different from software releases
* Produced executive\-level delivery reports used for CEO or board\-level decisions



**Programme Management Track Record:** 



* 8\+ years in TPM or programme management roles
* At least 3 years in AI or ML product companies
* Demonstrated ability to own delivery outcomes, not just track tickets
* Experience managing multiple concurrent delivery streams at scale



**Delivery Mastery** 



* Programme\-level JIRA, Linear, or equivalent experience
* Skilled at dependency mapping and critical path management
* Understanding of technical release gates and architectural review processes
* Experience with staged rollouts, promotion strategies, and rollback procedures



**Technical Fluency** 



* Understands AI/ML development lifecycles (model training, evaluation, deployment)
* Knows why model releases are fundamentally different from software releases
* Comfortable discussing inference optimization, model quantization, and serving frameworks
* Can assess technical feasibility and timeline implications



**Stakeholder Management** 



* Experienced communicating with C\-suite and board\-level stakeholders
* Comfortable with executive reporting and high\-visibility communication
* Skilled at aligning competing priorities across multiple teams
* Comfortable challenging technical teams to meet commitments



**Mindset \& Fit** 



* Strategic thinker: sees delivery as a lever for business outcomes
* Bias toward transparency and early escalation of risks
* Ownership mentality: delivery outcomes are your responsibility
* Comfortable with ambiguity in emerging AI/sovereign landscape
* Collaborative: influence without authority across engineering, product, and business



  





**Nice to Have** 




  




* Experience with capital raise or investor reporting in a technical context
* Hardware\-plus\-software delivery programme experience
* Background at hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) managing AI/ML delivery
* Experience in regulated industries (healthcare, finance, defense)
* Familiarity with open\-source model deployment and infrastructure
* Experience with GPU/CPU cluster operations and optimization



  





**Why Join Trianz?** 




  





**Strategic Impact** 




 Own the delivery map for Fortune 500 AI transformations. Your delivery discipline directly enables global enterprises to accelerate digital transformation. You'll report status to CEOs and boards, influencing multi\-million\-dollar decisions.
 



**AI Product Fluency** 




 Work with cutting\-edge AI infrastructure and models. Coordinate delivery across sovereign AI systems, model serving optimization, and enterprise transformation programmes. Understand deeply why AI product delivery is different.
 



**Enterprise Scale** 




 Manage delivery for transformations across continents, industries, and mission\-critical use cases. See your programmes deployed at Fortune 500 organizations with real business impact.
 



**Zero Bureaucracy** 




 Pure IC role with ownership authority. Your delivery decisions move fast — no slow approval cycles, no micromanagement. You own the outcomes.
 



**Growth Through Complexity** 




 Thrive in the emerging sovereign AI space where delivery is complex, timelines are uncertain, and your expertise will define how AI organizations scale.

3951860e.title: Manager - IT Applications (Digital Solutions & Technical Project Management)
3951860e.description:
**JOB PURPOSE:** 




 The Manager – IT Applications (Digital Solutions \& Technical Project Management) is responsible for the strategy, implementation, enhancement, and lifecycle management of business\-critical applications supporting guest experience, ticketing, food \& beverage, customer relationship management (CRM), loyalty, marketing, digital engagement, and enterprise operations at Jio World Centre. The role partners closely with business stakeholders to deliver innovative technology solutions, lead digital transformation initiatives, manage application modernization projects (including AI enabled automations), and ensure secure, scalable, and highly available application ecosystems that enhance operational efficiency and customer experience.
 



  





**JOB ACCOUNTABILITIES:** 



* Manage the complete lifecycle of enterprise applications, including implementation, enhancements, upgrades, integrations, maintenance, and end\-of\-life planning.
* Lead the delivery of digital transformation initiatives and technical projects using Agile, Scrum, or Waterfall methodologies, ensuring delivery within approved scope, budget, quality, and timelines.
* Partner with business stakeholders across Marketing, Events, Ticketing, Food \& Beverage, Guest Experience, Finance, and Operations to understand business needs and translate them into technology solutions.
* Develop application roadmaps, modernization strategies, and technology improvement plans aligned with organizational objectives.
* Ensure high availability, scalability, reliability, disaster recovery readiness, and business continuity of all business\-critical applications.
* Drive enterprise integration between applications such as POS, Ticketing, CRM, Loyalty, Payment Gateways, ERP, Mobile Applications, Digital Platforms, Marketing Automation, and third\-party systems.
* Manage application releases, patch management, change requests, version control, and deployment activities while minimizing operational disruption.
* Establish and monitor application support governance through defined SLAs, KPIs, SOPs, dashboards, and service improvement initiatives.
* Lead incident, problem, change, release, and root cause analysis (RCA) activities to improve application stability and service quality.
* Manage technology vendors, implementation partners, OEMs, and managed service providers, ensuring contractual compliance, service excellence, and SLA adherence.
* Monitor application performance using Application Performance Monitoring (APM) and observability tools, proactively identifying performance bottlenecks and implementing preventive measures.
* Ensure compliance with cybersecurity standards, PCI\-DSS, ISO 27001, enterprise information security policies, data privacy regulations, and secure application development practices.
* Maintain application architecture documents, integration specifications, technical documentation, disaster recovery procedures, and audit records.
* Identify opportunities to improve operational efficiency through automation, AI\-enabled solutions, workflow optimization, and emerging digital technologies.
* Support capacity planning, infrastructure readiness, and technology preparedness for major events, exhibitions, performances, and business\-critical operations.
* Conduct stakeholder reviews, governance meetings, vendor performance reviews, and project status updates to ensure alignment with business objectives.
* Provide technical guidance, mentoring, and knowledge sharing to application support teams while promoting continuous improvement and innovation.
* Deliver functional and technical training to business users to maximize adoption and effective utilization of enterprise applications.
* Stay abreast of emerging technologies, digital platforms, AI capabilities, cloud services, and industry best practices, recommending technology innovations that enhance business value and guest experience.



  





**COMPETENCIES \& SKILLS:** 



* Strong understanding of enterprise application architecture, application lifecycle management, system integrations, and modern digital platforms.
* Hands\-on knowledge of enterprise applications and technologies such as POS, CRM, Loyalty, Ticketing, Payment Gateways, along with REST APIs, SOAP, OAuth/SSO, and enterprise integration methodologies.
* Good understanding of cloud platforms (Microsoft Azure, AWS, or GCP), DevOps practices, CI/CD, and application monitoring tools such as Dynatrace, Splunk, Grafana, or AppDynamics.
* Sound knowledge of IT service management, application support, release management, governance, cybersecurity best practices, and application modernization initiatives.
* Strong technical project management capabilities with experience in delivering multiple concurrent technology and digital transformation initiatives.
* Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, stakeholder management, vendor management, communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a dynamic, event\-driven environment while demonstrating strong leadership, planning, documentation, and governance capabilities.
* Exposure to AI usage and integration.



  





**QUALIFICATIONS:** 



* Bachelor's or Postgraduate Degree in Computer Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related discipline.
* Certifications in Application Development technologies, Project Management (PMP, PRINCE2, Agile/Scrum), or IT Service Management (ITIL) will be an added advantage.
* Cloud certifications (Microsoft Azure, AWS, Google Cloud) and AI or Digital Transformation certifications are desirable.



  





**EXPERIENCE:** 



* 9–12 years of relevant experience in enterprise application development and management, digital solutions, and technical project management.
* Experience in managing enterprise applications, system integrations, vendors, and digital transformation initiatives within large organizations.
* Experience in hospitality, convention centres, entertainment venues, retail, airports, or other customer\-centric environments will be preferred.

95a6455c.title: Sr. Program Manager, JWO, JWO, Launch
95a6455c.description:
**Description**
 As part of the AWS Applied AI Solutions organization, we have a vision to provide business applications, leveraging Amazon’s unique experience and expertise, that are used by millions of companies worldwide to manage day\-to\-day operations. We will accomplish this by accelerating our customers’ businesses through delivery of intuitive and differentiated technology solutions that solve enduring business challenges. We blend vision with curiosity and Amazon’s real\-world experience to build opinionated, turnkey solutions. Where customers prefer to buy over build, we become their trusted partner with solutions that are no\-brainers to buy and easy to use.
   

  

 We are optimizing the shopping experience for Amazon’s Customers in the Physical retail space. This role will be a key member of the program team located in Hyderabad supporting Just Walk Out (JWO) tech and business teams. The successful candidate will be a self\-starter comfortable with ambiguity, with strong attention to detail, an ability to work in a fast\-paced, high\-energy and ever\-changing environment. The drive and capability to shape the business group strategy is a must.
   

  

**A Successful Candidate Will**
* Have the ability to work independently in a broad array of environments.
* Manage cross\-functional project teams, planning and organizing, and executing complex projects across multiple organizations and stakeholders to enable the launch of new sites at scale.
* Build strong partnerships with operations leaders to understand improvement opportunities.
* Have the ability to work in fast\-paced environment.
* Confidence operating in a highly ambiguous and iterative business space.
* High attention to detail including proven ability to manage multiple, competing priorities simultaneously.
* Willingness to challenge and influence senior leaders.
* Able to work in a diverse team


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Bachelor's degree
* 5\+ years’ experience in a program management role or experience in managing projects in a large scale, multi\-geographical, high growth organization. Ideally in fast\-paced production/manufacturing/logistics environment.
* Demonstrated ability to build strong working relationships and work cross\-functionally to align and solve shared problems
* Ability to innovate in a start\-up Ops environment
* High level of written, verbal and interpersonal skills
* Comfortable and competent to provide metrics inputs to various reporting decks; communicate key performance indicators to stakeholders/sr. leaders


**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in business, operations, human resources, adult education, organizational development, instructional design or related field


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI HYD 13 SEZ
   

  

 Job ID: A3186086

835e8e43.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, AP TPM Team
835e8e43.description:
**Description**
 Interested to build the next generation Financial Systems that can handle billions of dollars in transactions? Interested to build highly scalable next generation systems that could utilize Amazon Cloud?
   

  

 Massive data volume \+ complex business rules in a highly distributed and service oriented architecture, a world class information collection and delivery challenge. Our challenge is to deliver the software systems which accurately capture, process, and report on the huge volume of financial transactions that are generated each day as millions of customers make purchases, as thousands of Vendors and Partners are paid, as inventory moves in and out of warehouses, as commissions are calculated, and as taxes are collected in hundreds of jurisdictions worldwide.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 The right candidate will possess a strong program management skills, has experience leading large projects, and has a well\-rounded technical background in current technologies. As a Technical Program Manager, your responsibilities will include writing specifications, driving project schedules from design to release, and managing the production launch. You will lead design and implementation efforts, coordinating across multiple teams to develop optimal solutions. You will anticipate bottlenecks, provide escalation management, anticipate and make trade\-offs, and balance the business needs versus technical constraints. You must be able to thrive and succeed in an entrepreneurial environment, destroy limits to scale, and not be hindered by ambiguity or competing priorities. This means you are able to develop and drive high\-level strategic initiatives while rolling up your sleeves to get the job done. You will need to partner with customers in Tech and Finance, and influence the direction of multiple engineering teams within the org to deliver complex/cross\-functional projects.
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 Build strategic roadmaps by driving consensus among Product and Tech teams, be a catalyst in multiple feature prioritization and fast\-track decision making, that impact the different stages of product lifecycle.
   

  

 Establish mechanisms that promote agility and engineering excellence through continuous iterations.
   

  

 Coordinate the resource planning, execution and delivery of projects on the roadmap.
   

  

 Help develop, improve and share operational best practices across the teams and with peers globally.

This candidate will work cross\-functionally to deliver operational improvements and drive profitability for the businesses. This role will own several PnL cost line items across 7 categories of Amazon Fashion \& Beauty. This role requires performing dive deeps to ambiguous problems, identifying and scoping large programs, managing program timelines, and communicating to senior management on status, risks, and process/product changes. Cross\-team coordination, program management and executive presentation skills are essential.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Drive cross\-functional strategic initiatives to continuously improve profitability and customer experience.
* Performing dive deeps into the multiple elements that govern the decision making to launch or expand programs.
* Working closely with the central program teams and operation stakeholders, understanding their strategies and processes for reducing cost and adopting for own category.
* Working closely with product teams to see through the product interventions needed for the program to scale and have a substantial impact on cost reduction.
* Working closely with operations, finance and category teams to manage short term commitments to overall goals, and making sure they stay on track.
* Benchmarking programs/practices with the best in class (internal and external), and using it to own and influence the long\-term vision.

1bb98fcf.title: GCP Presales Architect
1bb98fcf.description:
We are proud winners of the Best Place to Work awards in 2025 and 2026\. Aviato Consulting, founded by ex\-Googlers, specializes in Google Cloud solutions. We combine deep technical expertise with the open, fun engineering culture of Google minus the bureaucracy.
 



 As a GCP Presales Architect, you will act as the critical technical bridge between business goals and technical solutions, driving the early\-stage discovery and architectural design that wins complex enterprise client projects across Australia and New Zealand.
 



**What's in it for you?** 



* **Global Impact:** 
 Lead technical discovery and shape cloud strategies for major international businesses across Australia and New Zealand.
* **Elite Engineering Culture:** 
 Work alongside ex\-Googlers and cloud experts. We prioritize clean code, high velocity shipping, and technical excellence over politics.
* **Pure GCP Playground:** 
 Gain deep exposure to the entire Google Cloud and Vertex AI ecosystem to propose next\-generation, innovative solutions to clients.
* **Verified Happiness:** 
 Join a team objectively recognized as a "Best Place to Work" for two years running. We take culture as seriously as we take our architecture.
* **ESOP \& Equity:** 
 Share in our success with our employee option plan and the opportunity to gain equity in the company (eligible after 6 months).



**Role Description** 



* **Technical Discovery \& Strategy:** 
 Lead technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders to deeply understand client challenges, business requirements, and strategic objectives.
* **Solution Architecture Design:** 
 Design robust, scalable, and secure Google Cloud architectures, specializing in complex hybrid, data, and AI ecosystems in line with GCP best practices.
* **Proposal \& RFP Authoring:** 
 Craft comprehensive technical proposals, Statement of Work (SOW) documents, and respond to RFPs with high\-fidelity technical solutions and estimations.
* **Executive Pitching \& Demonstrations:** 
 Deliver compelling technical presentations and proof\-of\-concepts (PoCs) to both engineering teams and non\-technical C\-suite stakeholders.
* **Partner Collaboration:** 
 Work closely with Google Cloud partner managers and internal delivery teams to ensure a seamless handoff from the presales phase to post\-sale execution.
* **Champion Modern Practices:** 
 Incorporate Google Cloud’s modern automation, infrastructure\-as\-code (Terraform), and security principles into prospective solution designs.



**What You'll Bring to the Table:** 



* **Presales Expertise:** 
 3\+ years of experience in a customer\-facing presales, consulting, or technical account management role in a cloud environment.
* **GCP Competency:** 
 4\+ years of hands\-on experience designing and proposing solutions specifically on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* **Exceptional Communication:** 
 Outstanding English presentation and communication skills, with a proven ability to present deep technical concepts to diverse audiences.
* **GCP Certification:** 
 Google Cloud Certified \- Professional Cloud Architect is required.
* **Technical Breadth:** 
 Strong understanding of core GCP services, cloud networking, identity management (IAM), and enterprise data/AI ecosystems.



**Bonus Points:** 



* **Additional Certifications:** 
 Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer or Professional Data Engineer credentials.
* **Modern Tech Familiarity:** 
 Understanding of containerization (GKE), infrastructure\-as\-code (Terraform), or Google’s Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.
* **AI/ML Presales Experience:** 
 History of pitching advanced RAG pipelines, LLM\-based solutions, and generative AI architectures to enterprise clients.



**Our Core Values:** 




 We operate with radical transparency, believe in rigorous teamwork, prioritize continuous excellence and growth, and deliver exceptional value as dedicated client partners.

0f62b78e.title: Specialist Manager - OT Solution Integrator
0f62b78e.description:
Date: Jun 29, 2026
   

  

 Location:
   

  

 Vikhroli, West Mumbai, MH, IN Pune, MH, IN
   

  

 Company: Black \& Veatch Family of Companies
   

  

 We believe real value is powered by the unique skills and experiences of our professionals. The interchange of ideas from a diverse group of people gives our teams an expanded perspective and the ability to find better solutions for our clients.
   

  

**Req Id :** 
 115703
   

  

**Job Title :** 
 Specialist Manager \- OT Solution Integrator
   

  

**Business Unit sector :** 
 CPL\-STRGW\-INFRA ADV DELIVERY
   

  

**Department:** 
 BVCPL \- IA DIGITAL
   

  

**Work Location :** 
 INMUMBAI2, INPUNE
   

  

**Opportunity Type :** 
 Staff
   

  

**Relocation eligible :** 
 No
   

  

**Full time/Part time :** 
 Full\-Time
   

  

**Recruiter :** 
 Pranjal Gupta
   

  

**Job Summary**
 Black \& Veatch allows you to lend your talent and perspective to humanity’s biggest challenges in a flexible environment where you are empowered to grow and explore new possibilities.
   

  

 Our hybrid environment allows you to balance your work and personal life. At Black \& Veatch, you own your career with purpose and meaning. You are empowered to grow and explore new possibilities at every step of your career journey. Bring your big ideas while knowing you are safe to be who you are and speak up with concerns or questions and put your diverse talents and perspectives to use.
   

  

 Black \& Veatch is seeking an exceptional and experienced professional to join our Infrastructure Advisory organization as a Manager – Consulting to provide expertise around OT Systems implementation and other related utility OT projects in an Integration Architecture capacity. The world is changing at an unprecedented rate and that change increases the demand for innovation and efficiency to deliver solutions and services across the world’s utility infrastructure. Join Black \& Veatch’s growing Infrastructure Advisory business and use your talents and expertise to deliver innovative solutions that drive measurable results for our clients, with the opportunity to grow your skills, expand your professional network, and shape a rewarding career path aligned with your aspirations.
   

  

 The Delivery Team is a diverse group of early\-to\-mid career professionals with a solid foundation of utility experience and knowledge. Peers are engaged in a wide range of technical projects and encouraged to sharpen their skills to provide clients superior consulting services and continue to advance in a specialized career track. You will work with professionals in the Consulting and Digital Delivery Teams who represent a dynamic and cross\-functional group of experts in strategy, data, technology, and asset management systems. Together, they deliver innovative, data\-driven solutions that help clients navigate complex infrastructure challenges across diverse industries.
   

  

 We partner with clients to align their people, processes, technologies, and data in response to rapid industry transformation. Our work enables organizations to modernize infrastructure, optimize asset performance, enhance resilience, and achieve long\-term sustainability goals. By joining this team, you’ll be part of a collaborative environment that values innovation, continuous improvement, and client success. You’ll contribute to mission\-critical projects that make a meaningful impact on communities and industries around the world.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 The Solution Integrator is responsible for designing, orchestrating, and validating complex technology solutions across operational technology (OT) and enterprise IT environments. This role ensures that systems such as ADMS, EMS, SCADA, and associated platforms function cohesively as an integrated operational ecosystem. The Solution Integrator provides technical leadership across solution architecture, integration design, cybersecurity alignment, and end\-to\-end system validation within large\-scale utility transformation programs.
   

  

* Solution Architecture \& Design
* Develop and document end\-to\-end solution architecture across OT and IT systems, including ADMS, EMS, SCADA, GIS, and enterprise platforms
* Define logical and technical architectures, including system boundaries, data flows, and interface patterns
* Lead architecture workshops and design sessions to align stakeholders on solution approach
* System Integration Design \& Oversight
* Design and oversee integration architecture across multiple systems, vendors, and technologies
* Define integration patterns, interface specifications, and data exchange requirements across IT/OT boundaries
* Ensure interoperability and end\-to\-end functionality across integrated workflows
* IT/OT Integration \& Operational Alignment
* Lead the design and implementation of IT/OT integration strategies, ensuring alignment with operational workflows and control system requirements
* Coordinate across OT systems (ADMS, EMS, DERMS, SCADA) and enterprise IT systems (CIS, ERP, GIS)
* Ensure solutions support real\-time operations, reliability, and operational decision\-making
* Cybersecurity \& Compliance Alignment
* Integrate cybersecurity principles into solution and integration design, including access control, data protection, and secure communication patterns
* Align system architecture with enterprise cybersecurity policies, regulatory requirements, and industry standards
* Support risk identification, mitigation, and validation activities for OT and IT environments
* System Validation, Testing \& Readiness Support
* Support end\-to\-end system validation by ensuring integration design aligns with test scenarios and operational requirements
* Collaborate with testing teams to validate system behavior, data flows, and integration performance
* Participate in defect triage, root cause analysis, and resolution of integration\-related issues
* Integration Governance \& Vendor Coordination
* Provide technical oversight and governance across vendors, internal teams, and system implementers
* Lead integration design reviews, ensure adherence to architecture standards, and manage technical risks
* Serve as the technical point of integration accountability across the project lifecycle


**Key Competencies**
* Systems thinking with the ability to connect complex technical components into a cohesive solution
* Strong stakeholder communication and facilitation across technical and business teams
* Ability to manage ambiguity and drive alignment across multiple vendors and workstreams
* Risk\-aware mindset with focus on reliability, security, and operational performance


**Management Responsibilities**
 Individual Contributor
   

  

**Preferred Qualifications**
* Master’s degree in instrumentation, Information Technology or Engineering
* 10 years of experience in business and technology consulting, relevant product management, and/or project implementation services as part of an OT vendor team with emphasis on system integration and solution architecture
* 2\+ years of experience with electric utility control systems operations or maintenance
* Actively participated in at least two ADMS projects through the complete lifecycle including requirements development, design, systems integration \& implementation and testing
* Knowledge of industry standards (e.g., NERC CIP, IEC, IEEE) and utility regulatory environments
* Experience with integration platforms (e.g., MuleSoft, Boomi) and enterprise architecture frameworks
* Background in electrical engineering, computer engineering, or related technical discipline
* Knowledge of or direct experience with Grid Management \& Modernization Solutions Deployment (e.g. Grid Modernization Technologies, Advanced Distribution Management System, Distributed Energy Resource Management System, Automated Metering Infrastructure) and/or Utility IT Transformation (Enterprise Asset Management, Work Management, Customer Information Systems, ERP)


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in electrical, instrumentation or computer engineering, Information Systems, or similar Technical domain
* 7 years of experience in business and technology consulting, relevant product management, and/or project implementation services as part of an OT vendor team with emphasis on system integration and solution architecture
* Extensive Knowledge of Electric utilities operations functions and associated processes
* Actively participated in at least two ADMS projects with technical domain experience
* Hands\-on experience in utility OT platforms such as ADMS, EMS, SCADA, DERMS, or related systems
* Deep understanding of system integration concepts including APIs, middleware, data models, and real\-time data exchange
* Proven experience designing IT/OT integration architectures in complex, multi\-vendor environments
* Familiarity with cybersecurity principles for critical infrastructure systems (e.g., identity management, network segmentation, secure integration patterns)
* Experience working across full system lifecycle including design, integration, testing, and go\-live
* Familiarity with major industry trends and OT/ADMS/DERMS vendor solutions


**Certifications**
 Certifications related to area of expertise, where applicable preferred.
   

  

**Work Environment/Physical Demands**
 Ready to support US projects with a time overlap in late evening hours to ensure smooth handovers and strong collaboration with the US teams.
   

  

**Competencies**
 Action oriented
   

  

 Customer focus
   

  

 Interpersonal savvy
   

  

**Salary Plan**
 CST: Consulting
   

  

**Job Grade**
 017
   

  

 BVH, Inc., its subsidiaries and its affiliated companies, complies with all Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) affirmative action laws and regulations. Black \& Veatch does not discriminate on the basis of age, race, religion, color, sex, national origin, marital status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender Identity and expression, disability, veteran status, pregnancy status or other status protected by law.
   

  

 Black \& Veatch is committed to being an employer of choice by creating a valuable work experience that keeps our people engaged, productive, safe and healthy. We offer professionals an array of health and welfare benefits that vary based on their geographic region and employment status. This may include health, life accident and disability insurances, paid time off, financial programs and more. Professionals may also be eligible for a performance\-based bonus program.
   

  

 By valuing diverse voices and perspectives, we cultivate an authentically inclusive environment for professionals and are able to provide innovative and effective solutions for clients.
   

  

**Job Segment:** 
 Electrical Engineering, Geology, Instrumentation, Electrical, Engineer, Engineering

00cc315c.title: Senior Partner Solutions Engineer - APAC
00cc315c.description:
The Sr. Partner Solutions Engineer is a highly experienced technical lead responsible for driving the growth and technical enablement of our key partners (National Partners, Value\-Added Resellers (VARs), and System Integrators) across Australia, NewZealand, Singapore and Philippines. 
 



 This senior individual contributor role reports directly to the Vice President, Partner Solution Engineering. You will act as the primary technical point of contact, supporting partners in establishing and scaling their Contact Center as a Service (CCaaS) and Customer Experience Automation (CXA) practices built around the Talkdesk platform. This role involves deep technical engagement, partner enablement, co\-selling support, and providing technical thought leadership to ensure mutual partner and customer success across the assigned territories.
 


**Key Responsibilities** 
**Partner Enablement \& Practice Development** 
* ****Lead Technical Enablement:****
 Design and execute comprehensive enablement plans to educate partner Solutions Architects and Sales Engineers on the Talkdesk value proposition, product architecture, competitive differentiators, and roadmap.
* ****Partner Center of Excellence:****
 Support the development of Partner Competency Centers by coaching on effective technical discovery, platform demonstrations, and proof\-of\-concept (POC) execution.
* ****Domain Expertise:****
 Develop and maintain deep domain expertise in the regional Partner landscape, understanding their current go\-to\-market (GTM) strategy, areas of focus, and identifying new opportunities for expansion.


**Co\-Selling Support \& Technical Leadership** 
* ****Agentic AI Focus:****
 Provide technical expertise on
 **Agentic AI** 
 solutions within the contact center, including prompt engineering, RAG implementations, tools integration, and guardrail best practices.
* ****Customer Engagement:****
 Provide technical oversight, guidance, and direct assistance to Partner sales teams in understanding complex customer business and technical requirements, use cases, and solution design.
* ****Solution Demonstration:****
 Lead advanced technical discussions, conduct compelling demonstrations of the Talkdesk platform, and articulate the ease of integration within an enterprise ecosystem.
* ****Ecosystem Integration:****
 Develop a deep understanding of the enterprise ecosystem, including integration requirements with
 **CRM** 
 (e.g., Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics),
 **WFM, Knowledge Management, and UCaaS** 
 vendors.



  
 


**Strategic Contribution \& Communication** 
* ****Voice of the Partner:****
 Act as the critical communication channel to Talkdesk Product Management and Engineering teams, relaying Partner and customer needs, market trends, and product enhancement requests.
* ****Market Representation:****
 Represent Talkdesk as a technical expert at regional Partner summits, technical events, webinars, and conferences.
* ****Travel:****
 Ability to travel approximately
 **35\-70%** 
 of the time across Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, and other ASEAN countries as required.


**Essential Skills \& Experience** 
* ****Regional Experience:****
 10\+ years of experience as a
 **Partner Solutions Engineer** 
 or Pre\-Sales Engineer in the
 **CCaaS/CXA** 
 sector.
* Language Requirements: Professional fluency in English is required. Proficiency in additional regional languages (e.g., Filipino) is highly desirable.
* ****Communication:****
**Excellent communication, presentation, and whiteboard session skills** 
 with an ability to lead advanced technical discussions and deliver compelling platform demonstrations for enterprise customers \& Partners.
* ****Partner Background:****
 Solid experience working with
 **Service Providers, Regional Systems Integrators, National Partners, and VARs** 
 , with a proven understanding of a partner\-centric GTM approach within the APAC markets.
* ****Technical Leadership:****
 Proven ability to lead and drive complex technical engagements and serve as a subject matter expert without direct people management responsibilities.
* ****Telephony \& Protocol Knowledge:****
 Experience with at least one
 **Unified Communication protocol** 
 (e.g., SIP, WebRTC, RTP) and familiarity with Call/Message processing Proxies and Session Border Controllers.
* ****Applied AI Expertise:****
 Hands\-on experience or strong familiarity with modern
 **Agentic AI** 
 technologies, including the practical application of LLMs for Contact Center and Customer Experience Automation use cases.
* ****Education:****
 Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, MIS, or an equivalent combination of education and years of relevant experience.




 Talkdesk is pioneering a new era of Customer Experience Automation (CXA), redefining how the world’s most admired brands interact with their customers through AI. Our global team of courageous innovators is customer\-obsessed, building AI\-first solutions that put empathy, trust, and transparency at the center of every interaction. We foster an inclusive culture where diverse perspectives drive our success and every voice belongs. Combining the stability of a global leader with the agility of a disruptor, Talkdeskers are empowered with the autonomy to drive meaningful impact, while giving back to the communities and environment around us.
 





 Talkdesk has been recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Contact Center as a Service (CCaaS) and in the G2 Overall Grid® Reports for AI Agents and Contact Center. With seven consecutive years on the Forbes Cloud 100 and multiple AI Breakthrough awards, there has never been a more exciting time to join us as we shape the future of customer experience automation!
 





**Work Environment and Physical Requirements:** 






 Primarily office\-environment work, extended periods of sitting or standing, computer\-based work. Limited lifting, and equipment usage limited to computer\-related equipment (keyboards, mouse, etc.)
 





 The Talkdesk story hinges on empathy and acceptance. It is the shared goal among all Talkdeskers to empower a new kind of customer hero through our innovative software solution, and we firmly believe that the best path to success for our mission is inclusivity, diversity, and genuine acceptance. To that end, we will hire, promote, work along, cheer for, bond with, and warmly welcome into the Talkdesk family all persons without regard to ethnic and racial identity, indigenous heritage, national origin, religion, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, marital status, veteran status, genetic information, or any other legally protected status.

5c8017de.title: SDE - Customer Engineering | Automation Testing - Selenium | Pre-sales & Post-sales |
5c8017de.description:
**Who are we and what do we do?**
 BrowserStack is the world’s leading cloud\-based software testing platform, empowering over 50,000 customers—including Amazon, Microsoft, Meta, and Google—to deliver high\-quality software at speed. Founded in 2011 by Ritesh Arora and Nakul Aggarwal, the company has grown to support more than two million tests daily across 22 global data centers, providing instant access to 35,000\+ real devices and browsers.
   

  

 With over 1,200 employees and a remote\-first approach, BrowserStack operates at the intersection of scale, reliability, and innovation. Its suite of products spans manual and automated testing, visual regression, accessibility, and test management—all designed to simplify the testing process for modern development teams. Behind the scenes, BrowserStack continues to push the boundaries with AI capabilities like smart test case generation and design, flakiness detection, auto\-healing and more —helping teams reduce maintenance overhead, debug faster, and catch issues earlier in the development lifecycle.
   

  

 Recognized for its innovation and growth, BrowserStack has been named to the Forbes Cloud 100 list for four consecutive years. With backing from investors like Accel, Bond, and Insight Partners, the company continues to expand its product offerings and global footprint. Joining BrowserStack means being part of a mission\-driven team dedicated to shaping the future of software testing.
   

  

 Location: This is a remote position; however, the role requires the candidate to be based in Mumbai.
   

  

**Role In Nutshell**
 You will be part of a growing, high\-performing Customer Engineering team that partners with Sales function to deliver revenue growth. You love technology in all forms and are keen to expand your knowledge in agile software development and testing technologies. You enjoy collaborating with customers and solving real world customer facing problems. This is an extremely hands\-on position in a typical start\-up environment, so we are looking for motivated self\-starters who aren’t afraid to roll\-up their sleeves and contribute across the entire Sales cycle.
   

  

**Please note: The candidate should be comfortable working in US hours that is, 5:00PM to 2:00AM IST.**
**Desired Experience**
* Minimum 1 to 3 years of experience in Automation Testing \- Selenium \& API or 2026 pass\-out with internship experience.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or related technical discipline with
* Ability to work well in a highly dynamic / team environment; excellent customer facing communication skills; strong team player
* Familiarity with agile software development and deployment methodologies and the modern Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
* Ability to handle multiple competing priorities in a fast\-paced environment.
* Ability to break down complex concepts into easily understood frameworks and models.
* Disciplined self\-starter, does whatever it takes in order to succeed
* Able to work with customer in different time zones, as required


**What will you do?**
* Drive the customer’s BrowserStack technical product evaluation end to end.
* Coordinate actively with customer stakeholders like the customer's Dev, QA, Network, Security, Business teams etc., to resolve technical product queries or technical roadblocks.
* Lead Customer Engineering activities including technical discovery, RFP responses, product value proposition, architectural guidance, L3 technical support escalations and ongoing customer relationships
* Dev is technical approaches/solutions to enable customers to achieve success with BrowserStack.
* Work with cross functional product \& engineering teams, learn \& develop on testing domain technologies among others as per the customer needs. This involves programming, test automation frameworks, CI tools, security, networks, etc.
* Design and lead comprehensive technical sessions and workshops for customers
* Work as a bridge between Customer and Product \& Engineering teams, capture technical product requirements and feedback from customers and relay it to product with relevant market insights to enhance product.


**Benefits**
 In addition to your total compensation, you will be eligible for following benefits, which will be governed by the Company policy:
   

  

* Medical insurance for self, spouse, upto 2 dependent children and Parents or Parents\-in\-law up to INR 5,00,000
* Gratuity as per payment of Gratuity Act, 1972
* Unlimited Time Off to ensure our people invest in their wellbeing, to rest and rejuvenate, spend quality time with family and friends
* Remote\-First work environment that allows our people to work from home
* Remote\-First Allowance for home office setup, connectivity, accessories, co\-working spaces, wellbeing to ensure an amazing remote work experience

YASH Technologies is a leading technology integrator specializing in helping clients reimagine operating models, enhance competitiveness, optimize costs, foster exceptional stakeholder experiences, and drive business transformation.
  
  

At YASH, we’re a cluster of the brightest stars working with cutting\-edge technologies. Our purpose is anchored in a single truth – bringing real positive changes in an increasingly virtual world and it drives us beyond generational gaps and disruptions of the future.
  
  

We are looking forward to hire ServiceNow Professionals in the following areas :
  
  

A Technical Architect for ServiceNow with 12\+ years of exp responsible for ensuring the successful implementation and optimisation of ServiceNow solutions \& oversee application and workflow configuration, offering industry\-standard architectural solutions.
  
  

The ServiceNow Technical Architect combines technical expertise, architectural guidance, and business acumen to drive practical ServiceNow implementations.
  
  

Adhering to ServiceNow coding standards, following the ITIL framework, and ensuring ServiceNow solutions' scalability, performance, and maintainability.
  
  

Overseeing application and workflow configuration \& provide an industry\-standard architectural point of view and solutions for the workflows.
  
  

Must have worked on Web Services Integration (SOAP, REST) Administration of a ServiceNow instance including the delegation of groups, modification of CMS, workflows, business rules, UI actions, UI policies, ACLs, dictionary, catalog items and updates of all other existing solutions requiring revisions ServiceNow Experience should include scripting in ServiceNow, tool configuration, design work, technical configuration and deployment.
  
  

Specifically, candidates shall possess the skill to develop on the ServiceNow platform including the creation and/or customization of the core applications such as Incident, Problem, Change, Service Catalog and ESM applications as well.
  
  

Must have worked on multiple integrations / eBonding with other ITSM / Non ITSM tools using iPaas solutions. System/Process Automation (Orchestration) experience. Must be aware of ServiceNow offerings and release cycle. Must be able to demonstrate new features introduced with every ServiceNow release.
  
  

**ServiceNow Skills :** Strong working knowledge of ITSM, ITOM, Event management, CSM,SPM,ITAM (SAM \& HAM) , HRSD ,Orchestration, Virtual Agent \& Portal, ServiceNow Integrations and Automated testing Framework,
  
  

Proficiency in developing custom applications, modules, and workflows using ServiceNow's native development tools, such as ServiceNow Studio, ServiceNow Workflow Editor, and ServiceNow API. o Knowledge of web services, APIs, and integration methodologies. o Proficiency in JavaScript, as it is the primary scripting language used in ServiceNow. o Knowledge of HTML, CSS, and other web technologies is essential for customising ServiceNow user interfaces and building Service Portal components.
  
  

**Job Description:** Adapts existing methods and procedures to create possible solutions to complex requirements. Lead and enrich the team of \>8 technical resources.
  
  

Uses considerable judgment to determine solution on complex problems. Must be able to manage multiple small to large scale projects on Service Now Duties may include: Perform software configuration and customization including, but not limited to: screen tailoring, workflow administration, report setup, data imports, integration, custom scripting and third\-party software integrations Obtain and analyze business requirements and document technical solutions Develop, design and rollout new application modules, workflows and catalog requests Research new functionality and recommend solutions that deliver customer value Provide escalated support on technical issues to team members who are working service now implementations Candidates should demonstrate experience in the following areas: Design and delivery of complex technical solutions based on the ServiceNow platform Leadership skills in technical initiatives Generating detailed documentation Communications that clearly articulate solutions and the ability to perform demonstrations.
  
  

**Preferred Skills:** Experience implementing systems using the Agile/Scrum methodology Experienced in the System Development Life Cycle (SDLC) processes including customer requirement analysis and system design ServiceNow certifications such as CSA, CIS and CAD are must. ITIL certification is a plus Understanding of RDBMS, Infrastructure components, Cloud Management (Azure, AWS) etc is desired
  
  

Reviews on the architecture and design deliverables and support as an SME
  
To architect, design and develop (through Team) solution for product or project and sustenance delivery.
  
To ensure knowledge up\-gradation and work with new technologies so that the solution is current and meets quality standards and the client requirements.
  
To gather specifications and deliver solutions to the client organization based on understanding of a domain or technology
  
To recommend client value creation initiatives and implement industry best practices
  
To train and develop team so as to ensure that there is an adequate supply of trained manpower in the said tech
  
  

At YASH, you are empowered to create a career that will take you to where you want to go while working in an inclusive team environment. We leverage career\-oriented skilling models and optimize our collective intelligence aided with technology for continuous learning, unlearning, and relearning at a rapid pace and scale.
  
  

Our Hyperlearning workplace is grounded upon four principles
  
  

Flexible work arrangements, Free spirit, and emotional positivity
  
Agile self\-determination, trust, transparency, and open collaboration
  
All Support needed for the realization of business goals,
  
Stable employment with a great atmosphere and ethical corporate culture

f143b5d3.title: Technical Architect
f143b5d3.description:
**About Our Company**


Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their financial objectives for 20 years. We are part of Ameriprise Financial Inc., a US financial planning company headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence and diversified financial services leader with more than $1\.5 trillion in assets under management, administration and advisement as of year\-end 2024\. The firm’s focus areas include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and Insurance Protection.


Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards you for your contributions, and work with other talented individuals who share your passion for doing great work. You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark at the office and a difference in your community. So, if you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong, ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a career at Ameriprise India LLP.

**Job Description**


We are seeking a skilled AWS Cloud DevOps Hands\-on Architect to design, implement, and manage scalable cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. The role requires strong expertise in AWS, automation, and DevOps practices, along with working knowledge of networking and security.**Key Responsibilities**

**???? CI/CD \& Automation**

* Design and manage CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub, Harness
* Automate build, test, and deployment processes
* Develop scripts using Python/Shell to improve efficiency

**???? AWS Cloud Management**

* Provision and manage AWS resources (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, etc.)
* Ensure high availability, scalability, and cost optimization
* Support deployments and environment configuration**s**

**???? Networking**

* Configure and manage VPC, subnets, route tables
* Work with load balancers (ALB/NLB) and Route 53
* Troubleshoot connectivity and network issues

**???? Security**

* Implement IAM roles and policies
* Manage security groups and access controls
* Support cloud security best practices and compliance

**???? Monitoring \& RCA**

* Set up monitoring using CloudWatch or equivalent tools
* Handle production incidents and perform RCA
* Implement preventive improvements

**???? Collaboration**

* Work with development and infrastructure teams
* Drive DevOps best practices and documentation

**Required Skills**

* CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub, Harness
* Cloud: AWS (core services \+ networking \+ IAM)
* Scripting: Python / Shell
* Strong troubleshooting and RCA skills
* Basic security and networking knowledge

  

  

**Required Qualifications**

* Masters or bachelor’s degree in computer science engineering or related technical field.
* 3\-7years of broad experience across architecture practices (Cloud, infrastructure, DevOps and security) with depth of experience in at least one area.
* Knowledge of Enterprise\-wide architecture and ability to 'see the big picture' and how it affects current and future technologies.
* Internal/External consulting experience that spans organizational boundaries and includes influencing technology \& business leaders.
* Depth of experience in the architecture, design, implementation and support of complex enterprise solutions.
* Exposure to multiple, diverse technical configurations, technologies and process improvements.
* Good hands\-on past experience as a developer and programmer in developing modules requiring complex logic and integrations.

**AWS experience:**

* Worked with or have sound knowledge of AWS cloud services. (required)
* AWS Solution Architect – Associate (preferred)

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Cloud certification (AWS, Azure or GCP)

**In\-Office Collaboration**


We are a client\-centric, relationship\-based business. Working together, in\-person, is foundational to how we achieve results. By fostering a culture of face\-to\-face collaboration, idea sharing, productivity and personal connection, we deliver for our stakeholders — clients, advisors, employees and shareholders. Our employees work in the office at least three (3\) days per week, with flexibility to work from home two (2\) days per week. Some roles may require additional in\-office time or different in\-office expectations, and specific requirements will be discussed during the hiring process.

**Full\-Time/Part\-Time**


Full time**Timings**


(2:00p\-10:30p)**India Business Unit**


AWMPO AWMP\&S President's Office**Job Family Group**


Technology*Ameriprise India LLP is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, genetic information, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, military status, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, family status or any other basis prohibited by law.*

 A fast\-scaling SaaS product studio building next\-gen enterprise applications for global clients, we specialize in architecting scalable, secure, and extensible cloud\-native platforms using Laravel and Python ecosystems. Our architects translate business complexity into modular, maintainable, and high\-performance system designs—ensuring seamless scalability, integration readiness, and DevOps alignment across microservices, APIs, and cloud infrastructures.
