0e005987.title: Solutions Architect
0e005987.description:
**Description**
 AWS is hiring for Solutions Architects, who embeds directly inside India's most strategic enterprise accounts to architect production AI systems that deliver measurable business impact. The role will support complete engagement from discovery and scoping, through architecture and help build/co\-build.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Lead discovery through production rollout for strategic enterprise accounts, co\-building and architecting agentic systems on Amazon Bedrock, AgentCore, and Strands Agents
   

  

* Translate requirements into Guardrails, Automated Reasoning Checks, data residency configurations, and audit\-ready compliance artifacts that regulated enterprises can take to their risk teams.
* Design and deliver working AI prototypes, then architect the path to production, hardening with eval frameworks, IaC (AWS CDK), observability, and enterprise security
* Architect and co\-develop production MCP servers, RAG pipelines, multi\-agent orchestrations, and LLM\-as\-judge eval frameworks alongside customer engineering teams, leaving them with complete, owned deployment packages they can operate independently.
* Codify repeatable deployment patterns into AWS\-wide playbooks and feed structured field signal (model gaps, eval results, feature friction) directly to Amazon Bedrock PM and AgentCore engineering teams, shaping the AWS AI roadmap for India.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 4\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* 2\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience
* 10\+ years of IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries experience
* Experience delivering products to volume production
* Experience translating customer needs into business requirements
* Experience in customer engagement
* Experience navigating prospective accounts from and into a senior executive level to identify new customer opportunities
* 
* Lead discovery workshops with customer CTO / engineering teams to map high\-value AI use cases across multiple industry verticals.
* 
* Own technical scoping, solution architecture for agentic AI workloads on Amazon Bedrock and AgentCore.
* 
* Build PoCs leveraging Amazon Bedrock, Strands Agents SDK, Amazon AgentCore
* 
* Design and implement multi\-agent orchestrations, MCP tool servers, RAG pipelines (Knowledge Bases for Bedrock, OpenSearch Serverless, Aurora pgvector), and LLM\-as\-judge evaluation frameworks.
* 
* Deliver IaC (AWS CDK / CloudFormation / Terraform) for repeatable, production\-grade deployment patterns that the customer can own post\-engagement.
* 
* Architect AI systems for auditability: model version pinning, prompt logging, PII redaction, inference geography (ap\-south\-1\), and compliance artifact generation.
* 
* Deliver eval\-driven acceptance criteria: define benchmark suites, run eval loops against domain\-specific test sets, and produce launch\-evidence packages that satisfy customer risk / model governance teams.
* 
* Run structured discovery (jobs\-to\-be\-done, process mining, failure mode analysis) to identify AI leverage points and sequence delivery for maximum early impact.
* 4\. AWS Field Signal \& Product Influence
* 
* Codify repeatable deployment patterns into AWS\-wide playbooks, reference architectures, and GitHub samples that scale insights across hundreds of customers.
* 
* Feed structured field signal (model gaps, tooling friction, feature requests, eval results) to AWS Engineering teams
* 
* Collaborate with AWS SA leadership, Specialists, Partner SA, and ISV teams to deliver joint engagements and avoid duplicating effort.
* 
* Represent AWS AI at customer EBCs, industry conferences, and CXO briefings — you are the technical face of AWS's GenAI capability in the field.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working within software development or Internet\-related industries


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Karnataka

e380d365.title: AI Solutions Architect
e380d365.description:
The Role
   

  

 Here is what you'll actually do.
   

  

 You'll bridge the gap between business problems and AI implementation. For 1\-2 concurrent projects, you will digest client requirements, design systems involving LLMs and vector databases, rapidly prototype the solution, build the production pipeline, and hand off an intelligent API or agent system. You ship working AI, not just Jupyter notebooks.
   

  

 What You'll Build
   

  

 Recent task cards you would have pulled.
   

  

 \[ RAG Systems ]Complex conversational interfaces with semantic search
   

  

 \[ Agentic Workflows ]Multi\-agent frameworks, LangChain pipelines, automated task execution
   

  

 \[ Python APIs ]FastAPI servers wrapping model calls with low latency
   

  

 Who We're Looking For
   

  

**We Are Extremely Specific About Who Fits.**
 You're right for this role if...
   

  

 ✓You've shipped something real and can show us the commit history
   

  

 ✓You understand that a reliable 80% solution beats a theoretical 99% accuracy model that never ships
   

  

 ✓You communicate progress before you're asked for an update
   

  

 ✓You follow the AI space hourly and know which new model invalidates our current approach
   

  

 This role isn't right for you if...
   

  

 ✕You need detailed tickets with every edge case spelled out
   

  

 ✕You measure success by hours logged, not features shipped
   

  

 ✕You're looking for a stepping stone — we want people who want to stay
   

  

 The Stack
   

  

 Tools of the trade.
   

  

**Must Have**
 PythonOpenAI API / ClaudeLangChain / LlamaIndexVector DBs (Pinecone/Weaviate)FastAPI
   

  

**Nice To Have**
 Hugging FaceAWS/GCP ml\-ops deploymentsNext.js for quick UIs
   

  

**We'll Teach You**
 Advanced prompt engineering for specific edge casesTypescript backend basics
   

  

**Compensation \& Benefits**
 Honest numbers. No fluff.
   

  

 Base Salary
   

  

 PKR 1M \- 1\.5M. Determined by your past shipped work.
   

  

 Performance Track
   

  

 USD Performance Track after 6 months. For top performers with high sprint velocity.
   

  

 Absolute Flexibility
   

  

 Async, outcome\-based. No time tracking. Deliver features, not hours.
   

  

 Public Growth
   

  

 Case study credit. Your work becomes your portfolio. Your name goes on it.
   

  

 The Hiring Process
   

  

 How we decide.
   

  

 01
   

  

 Apply
   

  

 \~10 min
   

  

 Form below. No CV required.
   

  

 02
   

  

 Skill Task
   

  

 48 hrs
   

  

 You'll receive a dataset and a problem statement. Build a simple RAG pipeline using a vector DB and an LLM to answer questions accurately with citations. Return a working API endpoint. 48 hours.
   

  

 03
   

  

 30\-min Call
   

  

 \~30 min
   

  

 We discuss your code.
   

  

 04
   

  

 Offer
   

  

 24 hrs
   

  

 Yes or No, within 24 hours.
   

  

 Build with us.
   

  

 Submit your best work to start the process.
   

  

 Full Name
   

  

 Email
   

  

 Link to your best work
   

  

 One thing you built that you're most proud of
   

  

 Why DaaS Labs specifically?
   

  

 Availability
   

  

 We don't review CVs. We review work.

c1e29034.title: Solutions Architect- SAP
c1e29034.description:
**About the company :** 




  





 At Daimler Truck, we change today’s transportation and create real impact together. We take responsibility around the globe and work together as one global team. We drive our progress and success together – everyone at Daimler Truck makes the difference. Together, we want to reduce our carbon footprint, increase safety on and off the track, develop smarter technology and attractive financial solutions. All essential, to fulfil our purpose \- for all who keep the world moving.
 



  





  





**Short Description** 




  





 SAP S/4HANA Solution Architect – Supply Chain \& Logistics
 



 We are looking for an experienced
 **SAP S/4HANA Solution Architect** 
 with deep expertise in
 **Supply Chain, Logistics, and Compliance** 
 to design, implement, and support enterprise\-scale SAP solutions.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities\-Solution Architecture** 



* Design end\-to\-end SAP S/4HANA solutions across
 **MM, EWM/dEWM, TM, Manufacturing, Procurement, and Sales** 
 .
* Ensure scalable, integrated architectures aligned with
 **SAP Best Practices, Clean Core principles, and SAP Activate methodology** 
 .
* Lead solution governance, architecture reviews, and design approvals.



  





**SAP Material Management (MM)** 



* Configure and support
 **Procure\-to\-Pay** 
 processes, including Purchase Orders, Supplier Master, Goods Receipt/Goods Issue, Inventory Management, Purchase Pricing, and Advanced Returns Management (ARM).
* Gather business requirements, deliver functional solutions, and provide production support.
* Collaborate with
 **SAP SD, EWM, FI, and TM** 
 teams for end\-to\-end process integration.



  





**SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM/dEWM)** 



* Configure and support
 **Inbound \& Outbound Warehouse** 
 processes, including Putaway, Deconsolidation, Cross Docking, Picking, Packing, Goods Issue, and Exception Handling.
* Manage Physical Inventory, Inventory Adjustments, Warehouse Movements, Customs/Bonded Warehouse processes, and Warehouse Structure.
* Design
 **RF, Barcode Scanning, Automation, Storage Control, and Labor Management** 
 solutions.
* Perform configuration, testing, defect resolution, production support, and process optimization.



  





**SAP Transportation Management (TM)** 



* Architect and support transportation planning and logistics execution processes.
* Configure transportation, freight planning, shipping, receiving, carrier integration, and logistics execution capabilities.
* Ensure seamless integration with
 **MM, EWM, SD, and other SAP modules** 
 .



 Required Skills
 


* Strong experience in
 **SAP S/4HANA Solution Architecture** 
 .
* Hands\-on expertise in
 **SAP MM, EWM/dEWM, and SAP TM** 
 .
* Deep understanding of
 **Supply Chain, Procurement, Warehouse Management, Inventory Management, and Transportation** 
 processes.
* Experience with
 **SAP Activate, Clean Core, Solution Governance, System Configuration, Testing, Production Support, and Cross\-functional Integration** 
 .
* Strong stakeholder management, analytical, and problem\-solving skills.

8ac4551e.title: Cloud Presales / Solution Architect
8ac4551e.description:
We are looking for Cloud Presales / Solution Architecture professionals with expertise in designing scalable cloud solutions across AWS, Azure, or GCP platforms. The role involves engaging with clients to understand business requirements and translating them into effective cloud solution strategies.
   

  

 Candidates should have experience in solution design, cloud migration, security architecture, automation, and applying Well\-Architected Framework principles. Exposure to preparing solution proposals, SoWs, architecture diagrams, pricing estimations, and conducting technical discussions with clients is highly preferred.
   

  

 Strong understanding of cloud infrastructure, networking, IAM, storage, DevOps, scalability, and performance optimization is required. Hands\-on experience with architecture tools such as Lucidchart, Draw.io, or Visio and cloud pricing calculators will be an added advantage.
   

  

 Skills: presales,solution architecting,cloud

5824a3cc.title: Senior Salesforce Service Cloud Developer with Gainsight Experience
5824a3cc.description: Experience : 6\.5\+ Work Mode: Remote Note: Candidates currently based in Hyderabad or Andhra Pradesh (AP) are not eligible for this opportunity. Mandate skills :Quote Managemet, Case management, sales cloud, service cloud, omi channel, Entitlement, Territory Management IAS Sheet S No Skills Priority 1 Service Cloud Implementation (Case Mgmt, SLAs, Entitlements, Milestones, Escalations) Must Have 2 Omni\-Channel Routing \& Agent Console Customization Must Have 3 Experience Cloud (Community Cloud) – Customer \& Partner Portals Must Have 4 Apex Development (Triggers, Batch, Schedulable, Queueable) Must Have 5 Lightning Web Components (LWC), Aura, Visualforce Must Have 6 Salesforce Flows (Record\-triggered, Screen Flows, Orchestration) Must Have 7 Integrations – REST/SOAP APIs, Platform Events, CDC Must Have 8 Enterprise Integrations (ERP, Billing, Support Tools, IAM) Must Have 9 Data Migration, Bulk API, Data Loader, Data Sync \& Error Handling Must Have 10 Security Model – Roles, Sharing Rules, Permission Sets, External User Security, SSO (SAML/OAuth) Must Have 11 DevOps – Git, CI/CD (Gearset/Copado/Jenkins/Azure DevOps), Release Management Must Have 12 SOQL/SOSL, Debugging, Governor Limits \& Performance Optimization Must Have 13 Agile/Scrum, Cross\-functional Collaboration, Production Support Must Have 14 Certifications, Middleware (MuleSoft/Boomi), Knowledge/KCS, AI/Bots Good to Have 15 Monitoring Tools (Splunk/NewRelic), Frontend Skills (HTML/CSS/JS), Large Data Migration Experience Good to Have Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and deliver scalable Salesforce Service Cloud solutions aligned with business requirements and Salesforce best practices. Lead hands\-on development of Service Cloud capabilities including Case Management, Service Console, Omni\-Channel, Knowledge Base, and Experience Cloud components. Develop and configure Salesforce Gainsight solutions, including customer health scoring, success plans, journey orchestration, lifecycle management, and reporting to enable proactive customer success initiatives. Implement AI\-driven automation and intelligence using Salesforce Einstein, predictive case routing, sentiment analysis, intelligent recommendations, and automated workflows to improve service efficiency and customer experience. Translate business requirements into high\-quality technical solutions, producing detailed technical designs, user stories, and implementation artifacts. Build and maintain custom Salesforce components, including Apex classes, triggers, batches and queueable Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), Aura components, Visualforce, Flows, and Platform Events. Ensure code quality and platform performance by adhering to Salesforce development best practices, governor limits, Apex Enterprise Patterns, and test automation standards. Collaborate closely with architects, product owners, business stakeholders, and QA teams to deliver reliable, secure, and scalable Salesforce solutions. Develop and manage integrations between Salesforce, Gainsight, and external systems using Salesforce APIs, REST/SOAP services, and middleware platforms. Support data migration, synchronization, and data quality initiatives, ensuring integrity across Service Cloud, Gainsight, and integrated systems. Participate in DevOps and CI/CD processes, including source control, automated testing, code reviews, and release deployments. Stay current with Salesforce platform enhancements, especially Service Cloud, Gainsight, Lightning, and Salesforce AI capabilities, and recommend continuous improvements. Required Skills \& Qualifications 5–7\+ years of Salesforce development experience, with strong hands\-on coding responsibility. 5\+ years of experience developing Salesforce Sales, Service Cloud and Experience Cloud solutions. Salesforce Service Cloud Consultant and/or Salesforce Platform Developer I/II, Certified JavaScript Developer certification preferred. Hands\-on experience with Salesforce Gainsight, including configuration, data modeling, rules engine, success plans, and reporting (or strong experience integrating Gainsight with Salesforce). Knowledge of Customer Success metrics (Health Score, NPS, CSAT, Renewal Risk) Experience implementing AI\-powered automation within Salesforce using Einstein AI, predictive insights, and intelligent workflows. Experience with Einstein Bots, Digital Engagement, and AI\-driven service analytics 4\+ years of Lightning development experience, including Lightning Web Components (LWC) and Aura. Strong expertise in: • Apex (classes, triggers, batch, queueable) • Lightning Web Components (LWC) • Visualforce • Flows \& Process Automation • Platform Events • SOQL \& Salesforce APIs Deep understanding of Salesforce governor limits, performance tuning, Apex Enterprise Patterns, Apex Mocks, and testing best practices. Experience with Salesforce DX, Visual Studio Code, Git\-based source control, and CI/CD pipelines. Knowledge of integration patterns and ETL tools such as MuleSoft, Workato, Boomi, or Informatica. Experience working in Agile/Scrum development environments, contributing to sprint planning, estimation, and technical design. Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to mentor junior develo

0e9ba6d5.title: IN-Technical Consultant Int - Cloud
0e9ba6d5.description:
Scope: The IN\-Technical Consultant Int – Cloud acts as the point of escalation for infrastructure operations, responsible for handling complex issues, driving root cause analysis, and implementing long\-term solutions. This role also contributes to infrastructure design, optimization, and strategic initiatives, while mentoring L1/L2 teams and ensuring adherence to best practices. Our current technical environment:
   

  

* Microsoft Azure
* VMware ESXi What you’ll do:
* Perform troubleshooting of hardware, OS, and network issues based on standard operating procedures (SOPs).
* Log, track, and update incidents and requests in the ticketing/ITSM system.
* Escalate unresolved issues to L3 teams with proper documentation and logs.
* Perform routine health checks, daily checklist activities, and report deviations.
* Support user requests related to access, password resets, and basic infra queries.
* Adhere to defined processes, SLAs, and compliance/security guidelines.
* Maintain accurate documentation of incidents, knowledge articles, and runbooks.
* Manage servers (Windows/Linux), virtualization platforms, storage systems, and network devices.
* Implement standard changes and upgrades to infrastructure components.
* Support patching, backup/restore operations, and performance monitoring.
* Create technical documentation, knowledge articles, and mentor L1/L2 engineers.
* Participate in audits, compliance checks, and ensure security standards are met.
* Collaborate with architects and project teams on infrastructure design and integration. What we are looking for:
* Bachelor’s degree in IT/Computer Science/Electronics (preferred) or equivalent diploma.
* 5\+ years of relevant infrastructure support/engineering experience
* Relevant certifications (e.g., Microsoft, Red Hat, VMware, CCNA, ITIL Intermediate) are highly desirable.
* Deep expertise in at least two infrastructure domains (e.g., server administration, networking, storage, cloud, security).
* Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills with ability to solve complex, multi\-domain issues.
* Experience with automation/scripting (PowerShell, Python, Ansible, Terraform, etc.).
* Hands\-on experience with enterprise monitoring, backup, and ITSM tools.
* Strong understanding of ITIL processes and enterprise operations.
* Excellent communication and leadership skills to collaborate with business, operations, and engineering teams.
* This role involves rotational shifts, including night shifts, to provide 24/7 application support.
* Flexibility to work weekends and public holidays as per shift schedule.
* Ability to handle responsibilities independently during off\-hours.//Req\_27


**Our Values**
 If you want to know the heart of a company, take a look at their values. Ours unite us. They are what drive our success – and the success of our customers. Does your heart beat like ours? Find out here: Core Values
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

b51c8bdb.title: Cloud engineer
b51c8bdb.description:
Your tasks
   

  

* Design, deploy, and maintain cloud infrastructure across Azure and AWS, including networking, compute, storage, IAM, monitoring, and cost optimization.
* Support and administer OpenShift platforms, including cluster operations, application deployments, upgrades, troubleshooting, security, and performance tuning.
* Provide Elasticsearch support, including cluster administration, indexing and search performance tuning, monitoring, troubleshooting, backup/recovery, and data lifecycle management.


**Your Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent hands\-on experience.
* Proven experience supporting and administering Azure and AWS cloud environments in production.
* Strong hands\-on experience with OpenShift platform administration and support.
* Practical experience with Elasticsearch administration, monitoring, troubleshooting, and performance tuning.
* Strong problem\-solving, communication, and documentation skills.


 Interested?
   

  

 We are looking forward to receiving your application! Ideally, you should apply online with the reference number. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact your recruiting contact via LinkedIn or XING.
   

  

 We promote equal opportunities and welcome applications from people with and without disabilities. We offer an inclusive work environment where all individuals can develop their skills and talents regardless of gender, nationality, ethnic and social background, religion, worldview, age, sexual orientation, identity, and other characteristics.
   

  

 reference number
   

  

 Recruiting Contact
   

  

 Rohde \& Schwarz is a global technology company with approximately 14,000 employees and three divisions Test \& Measurement, Technology Systems and Networks \& Cybersecurity. For 90 years, the company has been developing cutting\-edge technology, pushing the boundaries of what is technically possible and enabling customers from various sectors such as business, government and public authorities to maintain their technological sovereignty. Rohde \& Schwarz is a leading supplier of solutions in the fields of Test and Measurement, Broadcasting, Radio monitoring and Radiolocation as well as Mission\-critical Radio communications. For more than 80 years, company has been developing, producing and marketing a wide range of electronic products. Headquarters in Munich with subsidiaries and representatives active in over 70 countries around the world, Rohde \& Schwarz has achieved its global presence greatly. In India the company is present as Rohde \& Schwarz India Pvt. Ltd (RSINDIA) which is 100% owned subsidiary of Rohde \& Schwarz GmbH KG \& Co, Germany, whose head office is located in New Delhi and branch offices in Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai and Field presence at Ahmedabad, Chennai and Pune. With more than 10 channel partners situated at key industrial locations we serve across the country. Our emphasis is to provide outstanding sales, service and support to our customers. The company has invested sustainably to increase the local support capability as well as to provide a fully automated Calibration facility for most of the products sold. Rohde \& Schwarz India has ISO 9001 2015 certified Quality Management Systems and ISO 17025 NABL Accreditation. The company continuously invests in training its service and sales personnel regularly to maintain a high level of technical competence in pre\- and post\-sales support and outstanding quality in services viz. Repairs, Calibration, Product support \& Project management. Rohde \& Schwarz India is a financially stable company rated by CRSIL as SME 1 for more than 5 years now. This rating is the highest in its category. Rohde \& Schwarz India is committed to 100% customer satisfaction through innovative product offerings and outstanding support and services. Our comprehensive and continuously growing range of services are designed to provide customers with the highest level of quality and value throughout the life cycle of our products.
   

  

 Our offer
   

  

* Allowance for home office equipment
* Flexible working hour models
* Possibility of car leasing
* Sports promotion
* Health care
* (Group) accident insurance
* Online medical counselling
* Life insurance
* Corporate/team events
* Gifts for special life events

6c7a533d.title: Presales Solution Architect-Digital Workplace
6c7a533d.description:
**Digital Workplace Presales Solution Architect – Job Description**




**1\) Role Overview** 




 The
 **Digital Workplace Presales Solution Architect** 
 is responsible for
 **designing, positioning, and winning Digital Workplace / End User Services (EUC \+ EUS) deals** 
 by translating client business needs into
 **scalable, cost\-effective, and differentiating solutions** 
 .
 



  





**2\) Key Responsibilities** 




**A. Opportunity \& Requirement Management** 



* Analyze
 **RFI/RFP/RFQ requirements, client environment, and volumetrics (users, devices, SLAs, locations)**
* Identify
 **opportunity fit, risks, and transformation levers**



**B. Solution Architecture (Core Responsibility)** 



* Design
 **end\-to\-end Digital Workplace solutions** 
 , including:
* End User Computing (devices, OS, VDI, endpoint management)
* Service Desk / Workplace Support
* Collaboration platforms (M365, Google Workspace)
* Workplace security \& identity
* Translate requirements into
 **scalable architectures aligned to business outcomes**
* Ensure: Deliverability, Cost optimization, Innovation (automation, GenAI, DEX, etc.)



**C. Proposal Development \& Deal Shaping** 



* Develop
 **client\-facing proposals** 
 including: Solution overview, Architecture diagrams, service descriptions, Value proposition \& outcomes
* Own
 **solution strategy, pricing inputs**
* Define: Assumptions, Risks \& mitigations, Transition approach



**D. Client Engagement \& Solution Defense** 



* Conduct: Solution presentations, Q\&A / clarifications
* Explain
 **technical solution in business terms**
* Participate in
 **solution defense and contract discussions**
* Coordinate to ensure
 **PoCs, demos, and transformations** 
 where required



**E. Sales \& Stakeholder Collaboration** 



* Work closely with: Sales / Account teams, Delivery \& SMEs, Finance / Pricing teams
* Provide
 **technical leadership in deal pursuit**



**F. Risk, Governance \& Deal Closure** 



* Perform
 **risk assessment and mitigation planning**
* Lead
 **internal solution reviews \& approvals** 
 before submission
* Ensure: Compliance, Competitive differentiation, Win strategy alignment



  





**3\) Scope of Digital Workplace (Expected Coverage)** 




 The role covers:
 



**End User Computing (EUC)** 



* Devices (laptops, mobiles, OS platforms), Endpoint management (Intune, MECM, etc.), Virtual desktops (VDI)



**End User Services (EUS)** 



* Service desk \& helpdesk, Field support, Device lifecycle / onboarding



**Collaboration \& Productivity** 



* Microsoft 365 / Teams / Google Workspace, Knowledge management \& digital experience



  





**4\) Skills \& Competencies** 




**Technical** 



* Digital Workplace / EUC / EUS architecture expertise
* Knowledge of:
* Endpoint management
* Collaboration platforms
* Identity \& security
* Cloud awareness (Azure, M365 ecosystem)



**Presales \& Commercial** 



* RFP/RFI response management
* Cost modeling \& pricing strategy
* Proposal writing and storytelling
* Competitive analysis



**Consulting \& Client Engagement** 



* Strong communication \& presentation skills
* **Translate technical solutions into business outcomes**



**Analytical \& Strategic** 



* Risk analysis
* Solution optimization (cost vs performance)
* Win themes



  





**5\) Experience Requirements** 



* **10–14 years in IT / Digital Workplace / Infrastructure**
* **3\-5\+ years in Digital Workplace presales solution architect role**
* Strong experience in both
* **Workplace Managed services**
* **Workplace transformation services**

9c8d6a61.title: Delivery Manager
9c8d6a61.description:
Role – Delivery Manager (Capital Market / Stock Broking)

Location \- Thane, MAH

Experience required – 3\+ years

About us:

Ventura is an omnichannel trading and investment platform with a network of branches, sub\-brokers and Digital Channels. Founded in 1994, the company is now entering the next phase of growth by pivoting to a digital\-first approach and strengthening its direct\-to\-consumer franchise. The company has now carved out a separate fintech vertical tasked with digital transformation using cutting\-edge technology and bringing in fresh talent.

We are seeking an experienced Delivery Manager to lead the planning and execution of strategic technology initiatives across our Capital Markets platform. The ideal candidate will drive cross\-functional programs involving Product, Engineering, QA, Design, Compliance, Operations, and Business teams to deliver high\-quality solutions for stock market products. The role requires strong program

management expertise, excellent stakeholder management skills, and the ability to deliver multiple

concurrent initiatives while ensuring regulatory compliance and operational excellence

Join us if you like:

1\) Delivery

 Lead end\-to\-end execution of multiple technology programs across trading and investment products.

 Define program roadmaps, delivery milestones, timelines, dependencies, and success metrics.

 Drive execution across Product, Engineering, QA, DevOps, Information Security, Compliance, and Operations teams.

 Ensure delivery within agreed timelines, scope, budget, and quality standards.

 Track program progress and proactively resolve delivery bottlenecks.

2\) Cross\-functional Coordination

 Coordinate execution across multiple product teams working on Equities, Mutual Funds, IPOs, Bonds, ETFs, Margin Trading, Derivatives, and Wealth products.

 Manage inter\-team dependencies and release schedules.

 Facilitate sprint planning, release planning, and production rollout readiness.

 Ensure alignment between business priorities and engineering capacity.

3\) Regulatory \& Compliance Programs

 Drive implementation of regulatory initiatives from SEBI, NSE, BSE, CDSL, NSDL, and other regulatory bodies.

 Coordinate timely delivery of mandatory compliance changes and regulatory releases.

 Work closely with Compliance , Information Security teams to ensure regulatory adherence.

 Monitor regulatory deadlines and ensure organization\-wide readiness.

4\) Stakeholder Management

 Act as the central point of communication for program stakeholders.

 Present program status, risks, dependencies, and mitigation plans to senior leadership.

 Conduct governance meetings

 Manage vendor and third\-party delivery where applicable.

5\) Risk \& Governance

 Identify delivery risks, technical challenges, and operational dependencies.

 Develop mitigation plans and escalation strategies.

 Maintain RAID (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies) logs.

 Drive governance through dashboards , and executive reporting.

6\) Process Improvement

 Establish and improve program governance frameworks.

 Standardize project planning, reporting, and release management processes.

 Drive Agile best practices across multiple engineering teams.

 Improve execution efficiency through metrics and continuous process improvements.

7\) Production Readiness

 Coordinate production release planning.

 Ensure operational readiness across Engineering, QA, Support, Customer Service, and Business Operations.

 Track post\-production issues and lead retrospective reviews.

What you'll need to bring:

 Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, Business, or a related field.

 3–8 years of experience in Program Management, Technical Project Management, or Product Operations.

 Demonstrated experience managing large cross\-functional technology programs.

 Strong understanding of Agile, Scrum, Kanban, and SDLC methodologies.

 Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.

 Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities

 Experience working with stock broking or trading platforms.

 Knowledge of Indian capital markets, exchange ecosystems, and settlement processes.

 Familiarity with SEBI, NSE, BSE, CDSL, NSDL, and exchange circular implementation.

 Experience delivering trading, investment, or wealth management products.

Technical Knowledge

 Candidates should have working knowledge of:

 SQL

 DBMS ( good to have)

 Bonds and fixed\-income products

Pay: ₹600,000\.00 \- ₹1,200,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Food provided
* Health insurance
* Leave encashment
* Paid sick time
* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Thane, Maharashtra (Thane, Thane District)

5ef59f88.title: Senior Delivery Manager
5ef59f88.description:
**About 66degrees** 




 66degrees is an end\-to\-end AI transformation partner that helps enterprises solve complex business challenges through cloud, data, artificial intelligence, analytics, and modern application development. Built through the convergence of several industry\-leading organizations, we combine deep technical expertise with consulting excellence to help businesses transform data into strategic assets, simplify complexity, and accelerate AI\-driven innovation.
 



 Our vision is to enable every organization to become an intelligent enterprise by unlocking the full potential of autonomous systems and human ingenuity.
 



 At 66degrees, we believe in
 **Thriving Through Challenges** 
 and
 **Winning Together** 
 . These values shape our culture and drive our commitment to innovation, collaboration, and continuous professional growth.
 



**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for an experienced
 **Delivery Manager** 
 with a strong background in Agile delivery and Scrum to lead the successful execution of customer\-facing technology programs across Cloud, Data, AI, Analytics, and Application Development initiatives.
 



 This role is ideal for professionals who have evolved from Software Engineering, Technical Leadership, Solution Architecture, or Engineering Management into Delivery Management and Agile Leadership positions.
 



 The ideal candidate combines technical expertise with strong delivery leadership and is comfortable collaborating with clients, architects, product teams, and engineering teams to deliver complex technology transformation programs while ensuring exceptional customer outcomes.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**Delivery Management** 



* Lead the successful delivery of software, cloud, data, AI, and digital transformation programs aligned with customer objectives.
* Define project scope, delivery plans, timelines, milestones, resource requirements, and success metrics.
* Manage delivery risks, dependencies, resource constraints, and escalation paths.
* Monitor project health, delivery milestones, financial performance, team velocity, and customer satisfaction.
* Ensure projects are delivered on time, within budget, and meet quality expectations.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance delivery processes and operational efficiency.
* Manage multiple concurrent projects across geographically distributed teams.



**Agile Delivery \& Scrum Leadership** 



* Coach teams on Agile principles, Scrum practices, and delivery excellence.
* Facilitate Agile ceremonies including Sprint Planning, Daily Stand\-ups, Sprint Reviews, Backlog Grooming, and Retrospectives.
* Foster a culture of ownership, accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
* Remove delivery impediments and proactively resolve execution challenges.
* Drive Agile maturity across teams and support adoption of best practices.
* Partner closely with Product Owners on backlog prioritization and sprint planning.



**Technical \& Consulting Leadership** 



* Collaborate with clients, architects, product teams, and engineering leaders to translate business objectives into execution plans.
* Participate in technical discussions, architecture reviews, solution planning, and delivery strategy sessions.
* Understand technical challenges and work with engineering teams to identify practical solutions and mitigation strategies.
* Balance delivery commitments with scalability, quality, security, and maintainability requirements.
* Provide delivery oversight for enterprise cloud modernization, AI, analytics, data, and application development initiatives.



**Client \& Stakeholder Management** 



* Build trusted relationships with customers, business stakeholders, and executive sponsors.
* Lead governance meetings, executive reviews, steering committee discussions, and project status updates.
* Communicate project progress, risks, issues, dependencies, and mitigation plans effectively.
* Manage stakeholder expectations and ensure alignment between customer and internal teams.
* Serve as the primary point of contact for delivery\-related activities throughout the engagement lifecycle.
* Support account growth by identifying opportunities for process improvements and additional services.



**Operational Excellence** 



* Establish and promote delivery governance frameworks, reporting standards, and delivery metrics.
* Drive best practices in Agile delivery, project execution, and team collaboration.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of organizational delivery methodologies.
* Support resource planning, capacity management, and delivery forecasting.
* Mentor delivery teams and encourage knowledge sharing and professional development.



**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.
* 10\+ years of overall experience in Software Engineering, Technical Leadership, Project Delivery, or Program Management.
* Minimum 3\+ years of experience as a Delivery Manager, Technical Delivery Manager, Program Manager, Scrum Master, or Engineering Delivery Lead.
* Strong technical foundation with prior experience as a Software Engineer, Technical Lead, Engineering Lead, or Solution Architect.
* Proven experience delivering enterprise\-scale software, cloud, data, analytics, or AI programs in consulting or professional services environments.
* Strong understanding of Agile methodologies, Scrum, SDLC, and modern software delivery practices.
* Experience managing distributed cross\-functional teams and multiple concurrent projects.
* Ability to understand system architecture, APIs, microservices, distributed systems, and cloud platforms.
* Experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP), AWS, or Microsoft Azure.
* Experience working with engineering teams delivering cloud\-native applications, analytics, AI/ML, or data platform solutions.
* Hands\-on experience with Agile project management tools such as Jira or Azure DevOps.
* Excellent leadership, communication, stakeholder management, negotiation, analytical, and problem\-solving skills.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience working in consulting, professional services, or customer\-facing delivery organizations.
* Experience delivering cloud migration, AI/ML, Generative AI, analytics, data modernization, or digital transformation programs.
* Scrum certifications such as CSM, PSM, SAFe Scrum Master, or equivalent.
* Exposure to Google Cloud technologies and AI\-driven solutions.
* Experience managing globally distributed teams and enterprise customers.
* Strong customer consulting and executive stakeholder management experience.



*66degrees is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, national origin, age, marital status, sexual orientation, veteran status, disability, or any other protected characteristic.*

6d666826.title: Senior Enterprise Solutions Manager - Brand & Engagement
6d666826.description:
**Company:** 
 Free Stand Sampling Solutions Pvt. Ltd. ("FreeStand") 
 



**Location:** 
 Delhi \& Mumbai, close to the founding team and our enterprise clients. 
 



**Type:** 
 Full\-time · Early/founding hire · High ownership 
 



**Reports to:** 
 \[Founder / CBO]
 



  





**Read this before you apply** 




  





 Most "customer success" jobs are relationship\-management jobs: QBRs, check\-ins, a calendar full of cadence. This is not that.This is a
 **builder's seat.** 
 You'll be measured on getting blue\-chip FMCG brands
 *live, instrumented and expanding* 
   not on meeting frequency. You'll configure our internal tooling yourself, build the demo a brand evaluates, wire up their dashboards, write the SQL, and clear the legal and operational steps between a signed contract and a working campaign. When our defaults don't fit a brand's ask, you won't escalate and wait, you'll design the workaround.We're upfront about this because the people who thrive here read that and get
 *excited* 
 , not deterred. If you want a polished account\-management role with a comfortable cadence, this isn't it. If you want to own outcomes in ambiguity, get your hands into the tooling and the data, and
 *define a function* 
 rather than inherit one, keep reading.
 



  





**About FreeStand** 




 FreeStand is a
 **digital sampling and customer\-engagement platform for FMCG brands.** 
 Founded in 2019 and built in Delhi, we help brands plan, execute, monitor and audit product\-sampling campaigns digitally \- putting the right sample in the right consumer's hands at the right moment, and turning every sample into a measurable customer\-engagement opportunity. We run campaigns for brands across India, managed from our Delhi base.
 



 A few things worth knowing about who you'd be joining:
 


* **We work with the biggest names in FMCG.** 
 FreeStand is the sampling partner of choice for 40\+ brands, including
 **L'Oréal (CeraVe), HUL, Nestlé, Nivea, Reckitt, Emami, Mars Petcare, Cipla (Nicotex) and Piramal (Little's).**
* **Our campaigns operate at real scale.** 
 Individual launches have reached
 **10M\+ consumers** 
 (e.g. L'Oréal CeraVe's India launch and Nivea's first\-party\-data campaign), with customer\-satisfaction scores above 95% on programmes like Piramal Little's.
* **We're backed and recognised.** 
 FreeStand is backed by
 **Venture Catalysts, SucSEED Indovation and Nocking Point Advisors** 
 across multiple seed rounds, and has been recognised by the
 **Google for Startups Accelerator (Women Founders cohort)** 
 ,
 **IIM Calcutta Innovation Park** 
 and
 **I\-Venture @ ISB** 
 .
* **We're founder\-led and lean.** 
 You will work directly with the founders, your decisions will be visible every single day, and your wins will be felt immediately.



  





 Here's the part most candidates miss:
 **signing a blue\-chip brand is the start, not the finish.** 
 The gap between a signed contract and a live, instrumented, expanding campaign is exactly where enterprise deals are won or lost.
 *That gap is what this role owns.* 
 When a brand like L'Oréal or HUL trusts FreeStand, you are the person who turns that trust into a working, measurable campaign and into the next one.
 



  





**The role** 




 You own what happens after a brand signs, and part of what happens just before. You take a signed (or near\-signed) enterprise brand and stand up a working, measurable campaign: configuring our internal tooling, building the demo/sandbox the brand evaluates, wiring up their analytics dashboards, and clearing the legal and operational steps between contract and go\-live. When the standard path doesn't fit a brand's ask, you design one. And you feed every recurring gap back to Product, so the next deployment is faster.
 



 This is a builder's seat, not a relationship\-management seat. You'll be measured on getting brands
 *live, instrumented, and expanding,* 
 not on meeting cadence.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* **Demos \& sandboxes:** 
 Build the demo environments and proof\-of\-concept setups brands evaluate, in coordination with the founding team.
* **Solutioning:** 
 Translate a brand's objective into a concrete campaign configuration. Invent workarounds when our defaults don't fit.
* **Customer setup:** 
 Configure and launch new enterprise customers in our internal tools. Own time\-to\-first\-live\-campaign.
* **Analytics:** 
 Stand up and maintain customer\-facing dashboards so every brand can see purchase intent and campaign outcomes without having to ask.
* **Cross\-functional coordination:** 
 Drive legal (MSAs, DPAs, brand \& procurement reviews) and operations (fulfilment, sampling logistics) to unblock go\-live.
* **Account outcomes:** 
 Own the ongoing result accounts that stay live and grow
 *because they're properly instrumented* 
 . Catch risk in the data before it surfaces at renewal, not after.
* **Product partnership:** 
 Surface recurring friction, scope it with Product, and help shape the tooling built specifically for this function. The playbook you build becomes the product that the next deployment runs on.



  





**What we're looking for** 



* **4–7 years** 
 in solutions engineering, implementation/onboarding, technical account management, or enterprise customer success at a B2B SaaS, martech, or adtech company.
* **Hands\-on data fluency:** 
 You build dashboards from raw data, not just read them hands\-on SQL, plus a BI tool (Metabase, Looker, Power BI, Tableau).
* **Ownership in ambiguity:** 
 You've run an implementation or a complex onboarding end\-to\-end, not just managed a relationship around one.
* **Enterprise stakeholder management:** 
 You've sat across from brand/marketing, procurement and legal, ideally in or around FMCG/CPG brand teams or their agencies (WPP, Publicis, Mindshare, Dentsu) and moved them.
* **Communication:** 
 Sharp written and verbal; you can run a room of senior client stakeholders.Bonus
* Exposure to FMCG / CPG brand\-marketing teams or agencies (WPP, Publicis, Mindshare, Dentsu).
* Light scripting (Python / JS), API / integration comfort, or hands\-on use of AI / LLM tooling.
* Experience at a company with a forward\-deployed or solutions\-led delivery model.



  





**Your first year** 




 This role has a clear arc \- from shipping your first brand to owning the function.
 


* **Months 0 to 3 \- Your first deployment.** 
 Take one signed brand from contract to live, instrumented campaign, end\-to\-end. Learn our tooling, our brands and our defaults cold. By the end, you've shipped something real.
* **Months 3 to 6 \- Your own book.** 
 Run multiple enterprise deployments independently. Every account lives, dashboarded and adopted without hand\-holding. Time\-to\-live trending down as you build repeatable patterns.
* **Months 6 to 12 \- Define the function.** 
 Turn your patterns into SOPs and tooling specs with Product, set the standard for how FreeStand deploys enterprise brands and lay the groundwork for the team you'll eventually lead.



 You won't be left to sink: direct access to the founders, real authority to unblock, and clear targets. What you won't get is vagueness about what success means, and that's by design.
 



  





**How we'll measure success (first 6–12 months)** 




 The metric we obsess over first:
 **time from contract signed to first live campaign.** 
 Everything else compounds from there:
 


* **Activation:** 
 dashboards and analytics delivered and adopted, per account.
* **Retention:** 
 gross retention and health of your book of enterprise accounts.
* **Expansion:** 
 growth influenced within existing accounts.
* **Product impact:** 
 feedback converted into shipped tooling.



  





 Clear ownership, clear outcomes. This is what makes the role serious and what makes the trajectory below real when you deliver.
 



  





**Why this role \- and where it goes** 




 You'll join early, with high ownership, at an AI\-native company working with blue\-chip consumer brands. You won't just operate a process \- you'll
 **define this function and help build the tooling that powers it.** 




 That's also the path forward. The person who builds FreeStand's forward\-deployed delivery motion from the ground up and proves it converts signed brands into live, expanding accounts is first in line to lead this function as it grows: more accounts, a team to build, and the same playbook stood up as FreeStand scales beyond India. This is a genuine, named prospect of the role, not a vague promise.
 



  





**Compensation** 




 Competitive fixed salary, outcome\-linked variable, and meaningful ESOPs.
 



 ₹15L fixed \+ ₹5L variable \+ ESOPs
 



  





**Selection process** 




 We're selective about this one, on purpose.
 


1. Fill out the application form with short notes.
2. A solutioning working session: we'll put a real FreeStand brand scenario in front of you and build the campaign configuration together.
3. A short analytics task shows us how you'd stand up a dashboard that a brand would actually use.
4. Final conversation with the entire team.



  





 If owning outcomes in ambiguity excites you and building the function does too, apply. We're moving fast.
 



 FreeStand is a women\-led, equal\-opportunity workplace. Made with care in Delhi.

a7779366.title: Solution Strategy and Client Engagement Manager
a7779366.description:
**Who Are We?** 
  
 



 Millipixels Interactive is where creativity, technology, strategy, and innovation come together to build meaningful digital experiences. We partner with startups, growing businesses, and enterprise brands to create everything from immersive digital products and marketing ecosystems to transformation\-driven technology solutions.
 



 But beyond the work, we’re a team that thrives on ideas, ownership, experimentation, and execution. We like people who take initiative, think beyond the obvious, and bring energy into everything they do.
 



 If you’re someone who enjoys building, collaborating, and making a visible impact — you’ll probably enjoy being here.
 



  





**About the Role** 
  
 



 Every strong proposal has a moment where sales promise meet technical reality and someone has to make sure those two things actually match. At Millipixels, that's you.
 



 You'll own the entire technical pre\-sales journey: running discovery workshops that uncover what clients actually need, architecting solutions that hold up under real\-world conditions, and standing in front of clients to present, demo, and defend what Millipixels can build. You're the bridge between business development and delivery making sure nothing gets sold that can't be built, and nothing gets built that wasn't sold right.
 



  





 This role sits at the intersection of technical credibility and commercial instinct. You'll need to go deep enough into AI and tech solutioning to earn a room full of engineers' respect, while staying sharp enough on commercial viability to keep a deal moving forward.
 



  





**You’ll Be the Person Who** 



* **Leads Discovery That Actually Uncovers Something:** 
 Runs workshops that go beyond surface requirements to understand what clients really need and what they haven't said out loud yet.
* **Architects Solutions That Hold Up:** 
 Designs technical solutions that are robust enough to survive delivery, not just impressive enough to survive a pitch.
* **Owns the Client\-Facing Moment:** 
 Presents, demos, and fields tough technical questions in real time turning complexity into clarity for the people across the table.
* **Bridges Sales and Delivery:** 
 Makes sure what gets promised in a proposal is exactly what delivery can and will build.
* **Stress\-Tests Every Proposal:** 
 Ensures each solution is commercially viable, technically sound, and operationally realistic before it ever reaches a client's inbox.
* **Speaks Fluent AI:** 
 Understands AI solutions deeply enough to shape them, question them, and explain them not just reference them.
* **Solves in Real Time:** 
 Handles technical clarifications and objections on the spot, without needing to "get back to you."
* **Keeps Solutions Aligned to Reality:** 
 Ensures every proposed solution actually reflects what Millipixels can deliver not just what sounds good on paper.
* **Shapes the Proposal, Not Just Reviews It:** 
 Gets involved early in proposal solutioning, so technical thinking is baked in from the start, not bolted on at the end.



  





**You’ll Be a Great Fit If** 



* You come from a hardcore tech solutioning background hands\-on, not just adjacent to it.
* You have strong working knowledge of AI solutions and can architect around them, not just talk about them.
* You've operated in technical pre\-sales, solution architecture, or a similar client\-facing technical role.
* You have excellent communication skills; fluent enough with engineering heads to discuss what gets built and how, yet just as at ease making deep tech solutions digestible to non\-technical stakeholders
* You're equally comfortable in a whiteboard session with engineers and a boardroom pitch with executives.
* You can translate deep technical detail into a language that lands with non\-technical stakeholders.
* You think commercially, you know a great solution still has to make business sense.



  





**Benefits of Working at Millipixels** 



* **Flexible work, your way:** 
 Work where you do your best thinking. We measure outcomes, not hours at a desk.
* **Life admin handled:** 
 Regular expert\-led sessions on finance, tax, and healthcare, so the boring stuff doesn’t eat into your weekends.
* **Comprehensive Health Coverage:** 
  Company\-paid health insurance of ₹500,000, with options to extend to spouse.
* **Generous paid leave:** 
  Properly switch off and recharge. We’re in this for the long game, and so are you.
* **Room to grow:** 
  Continuous learning and real development in a global team, with space to grow your career as fast as you grow the pipeline.
* **Ground\-floor impact:** 
  Join early, help shape the GTM playbook, and put your mark on how we grow, including our AI platform, avirat.ai.
* **Ownership, not red tape:** 
  Small team, big trust. Bring the idea, run with it, and watch it ship.

be5bf092.title: Technical Program Manager
be5bf092.description:

 Coimbatore

 7\+ Years

 Full\-Time

 Any UG/PG

 We are seeking a highly skilled Technical Program Manager to drive end\-to\-end services and
 





 product development initiatives at iHub/Square. The role requires strong technical expertise, program management experience, and the ability to collaborate across cross\-functional teams to ensure timely and high\-quality delivery.

04527416.title: Sr Technical Program Manager, Global Procurement Technology
04527416.description:
**Description**
 Amazon's Global Procurement Organization is on a mission to transform how procurement works at Amazon scale. We build the technology that powers billions of dollars in purchasing decisions, and We're looking for a Senior Technical Program Manager to lead the delivery of technical solutions and programs focused on inventory management of non\-inventory supplies across Amazon's global operations. This is a high\-impact role at the intersection of technology, operations, and business strategy — where your work directly influences how Amazon procures and manages supplies at scale.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
* Own and drive complex, cross\-functional programs that modernize how non\-inventory supplies are managed across Amazon's global network of sites.
* Collaborate deeply with business partners and technology teams within the Operations business unit to ensure solutions integrate seamlessly with existing software and hardware deployed at Amazon Operations sites worldwide
* Actively participate in architecture and design discussions, leveraging a strong understanding of AWS services to drive the right technical decisions and trade\-offs
* Independently identify and resolve integration challenges across external and internal teams, driving alignment without requiring constant escalation
* Champion the use of AI and machine learning tools to automate workflows, surface insights, and transform procurement technology
* Define program strategy, set objectives, manage roadmaps, and drive delivery across multiple engineering teams and organizations
* Proactively identify risks, clear blockers, and accelerate progress by driving crisp, timely decisions
* Communicate program status, trade\-offs, and outcomes effectively to senior leadership including Directors and VPs


**What We're Looking For**
 Successful applicants will have experience developing functional and non\-functional requirements, writing high\-level technical designs, systems integration plans, and technical specifications. You are someone who thrives facilitating both business and technical meetings, partnering with resources outside of your immediate team to get things done, and navigating shifting priorities by scheduling and pivoting project plans as needed. You bring a track record of communicating status clearly, resolving risks proactively, removing barriers for engineering teams, leading cross\-functional teams, and communicating effectively to a large number of stakeholders across multiple organizations.
   

  

 The ideal candidate has hands\-on experience with AWS services and cloud\-native architectures, and can hold their own in design reviews and technical deep dives. You have a strong grasp of AI and machine learning technologies and understand how to apply them to solve real\-world operational problems. You are comfortable operating in ambiguity, bringing structure and clarity where none exists, and you have a bias for action that keeps programs moving forward. Above all, you are customer\-obsessed — always working backwards from the needs of the business and the end user.
   

  

**Why You'll Love It Here**
 Our team thinks big and moves fast. We're passionate about innovating on behalf of our customers and tackling problems at a scale few organizations ever encounter. You'll work in a fast paced environment where your designs directly impact how Amazon operates, with the freedom to push boundaries and make bold ideas real.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

**Key Job Responsibilities**
* Define and manage the end\-to\-end lifecycle of complex, cross\-functional technology programs — from requirements gathering and design through build, launch, and iteration.
* Develop functional and non\-functional requirements, high\-level technical designs, systems integration plans, and technical specifications in partnership with engineering, product and business teams.
* Drive architecture and design discussions, applying deep knowledge of AWS services and AI to evaluate trade\-offs, challenge assumptions, and ensure solutions are scalable, secure, AI\-driven and operationally sound.
* Lead integration efforts with existing software and hardware systems deployed across Amazon sites, independently resolving cross\-team technical challenges and driving alignment across organizations.
* Manage program roadmaps, milestones, and dependencies across multiple engineering teams. Proactively identify risks, develop mitigation strategies, and remove barriers to keep delivery on track.
* Facilitate business and technical meetings, driving crisp decisions and ensuring the right people are in the room at the right time.
* Communicate program status, risks, trade\-offs, and outcomes to a broad set of stakeholders — from engineering teams to Directors and VPs — through clear written narratives and verbal updates.
* Schedule and pivot project plans as priorities shift, balancing short\-term delivery needs against long\-term strategic goals.
* Drive process improvements that increase the speed and quality of delivery across teams, streamlining mechanisms and eliminating unnecessary overhead.
* Drive the expansion and scaling of existing products within your program portfolio into new regions, business lines, or use cases — identifying growth opportunities, building the business case, and leading cross\-functional execution to broaden impact.


**About The Team**
 Global Procurement Technology is the technical force behind Amazon's Global Procurement Organization. We build the tools and systems that power procurement across Amazon — a function that forms the backbone of the company's operations. Our team sets the technology strategy for the business, driving its AI transformation by embedding intelligent automation, machine learning, and data\-driven capabilities into every layer of the procurement experience. We partner closely with business teams to modernize systems, simplify complex workflows, and deliver scalable solutions that help Amazon procure smarter, faster, and more efficiently at global scale.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 7\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience leading highly technical programs involving infrastructure, complex systems, systems engineering


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 4\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership
* Experience working with or evaluating AI systems
* 3\+ years of technical specialist, design and architecture experience, or AWS Professional level certification


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- Amazon Dev Center India \- Hyderabad
   

  

 Job ID: A10430283

7d3b9c0b.title: Technical Program Manager III
7d3b9c0b.description:
**Job Description**
 Join our dynamic team to innovate and drive technology advancements, contributing to significant business growth and client success.
   

  

 As a Technical Project Manager III in Commercial \& Investment Bank Payments Technology team, you will help lead complex technology projects and programs that drive business goals and create value for clients, employees, and stakeholders. Applying a broad knowledge of technical principles, practices, and theories is essential to developing innovative solutions, along with leveraging analytical reasoning and adaptability skills to navigate through ambiguity and change. Your strong communication abilities will enable you to effectively collaborate with cross\-functional teams and manage stakeholder relationships, ensuring alignment on project objectives and governance. By optimizing resources and managing risks, you will contribute to the successful delivery of high\-impact projects that shape the future of the firm.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Develop and execute comprehensive project plans, incorporating technical requirements, resource allocation, and timelines to ensure timely and successful delivery of technology projects
* Identify and mitigate project risks, proactively addressing potential roadblocks and implementing risk management strategies to minimize impact on project outcomes
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including software development, quality assurance, and business stakeholders, to define project scope, objectives, and deliverables, ensuring alignment with business goals
* Utilize technical fluency to evaluate and recommend appropriate technologies, platforms, and vendor products for project implementation
* Monitor project progress, adjusting plans and schedules as needed, and providing regular status updates to stakeholders, ensuring transparency and effective communication throughout the project or program lifecycle
* Uses enterprise\-authorized AI capabilities within the work environment to accelerate project planning and risk synthesis (e.g., drafting plans, RAID, and status narratives), validating outputs and handling data according to sensitivity requirements


**Required Qualifications, Capabilities, And Skills**
* 3\+ years of experience or equivalent expertise in technical program management, leading complex technology projects and programs in a fast\-paced environment
* Demonstrated proficiency in applying analytical reasoning and problem\-solving techniques to break down business, technical, or operational objectives into manageable tasks and activities
* Proven experience leading through the project lifecycle management, including influencing decision makers and adapting to changes as business needs evolve
* Strong technical fluency, with familiarity in current and relevant platforms, software tools, and technologies
* Proficient in stakeholder management, with a track record of establishing productive working relationships and driving mutually beneficial outcomes
* Demonstrated experience using enterprise\-authorized AI capabilities within the work environment to support technical program management workflows with strong validation habits and awareness of data sensitivity
* Ability to review and validate AI\-assisted plans, risks, and recommendations before use, escalating when uncertain and following data handling expectations


**About Us**
 JPMorganChase, one of the oldest financial institutions, offers innovative financial solutions to millions of consumers, small businesses and many of the world's most prominent corporate, institutional and government clients under the J.P. Morgan and Chase brands. Our history spans over 200 years and today we are a leader in investment banking, consumer and small business banking, commercial banking, financial transaction processing and asset management.
   

  

 We recognize that our people are our strength and the diverse talents they bring to our global workforce are directly linked to our success. We are an equal opportunity employer and place a high value on diversity and inclusion at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute, including race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital or veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. We also make reasonable accommodations for applicants' and employees' religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs. Visit our FAQs for more information about requesting an accommodation.
   

  

**About The Team**
 J.P. Morgan's Commercial \& Investment Bank is a global leader across banking, markets, securities services and payments. Corporations, governments and institutions throughout the world entrust us with their business in more than 100 countries. The Commercial \& Investment Bank provides strategic advice, raises capital, manages risk and extends liquidity in markets around the world.

b6d8746c.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Amazon Music
b6d8746c.description:
**Description**
 Amazon Music is an immersive audio entertainment service that deepens connections between fans, artists, and creators. From personalized music playlists to exclusive podcasts, concert livestreams to artist merch, Amazon Music is innovating at some of the most exciting intersections of music and culture. We offer experiences that serve all listeners with our different tiers of service: Prime members get access to all the music in shuffle mode, and top ad\-free podcasts, included with their membership; customers can upgrade to Amazon Music Unlimited for unlimited, on\-demand access to 100 million songs, including millions in HD, Ultra HD, and spatial audio; and anyone can listen for free by downloading the Amazon Music app or via Alexa\-enabled devices. Join us for the opportunity to influence how Amazon Music engages fans, artists, and creators on a global scale.
   

  

 As a Sr. Technical Program Manager in the Amazon Music team, you will collaborate with product, engineering, marketing, design, content producers and artist/label relation teams to deliver customer obsessed engineering solutions with efficient use of resources and technologies. You will assess risks, anticipate bottlenecks, make tradeoffs, balance the needs of the business and technical constraints. You will be a role model enforcer of industry standard software development processes and practices. You will be the face to leadership to demonstrate progress and surface risks early.
   

  

 You possess a deep understanding of customer facing product design, mobile implementations, complex software services and will represent the technical team to senior leadership and partners. Your technical expertise, attention to details with regard to process efficiencies and operational excellence will influence the team’s decisions and drive secure and robust solutions. You should not only be passionate about delivering great music experiences, but should also be obsessed with driving continuous process improvements to optimize product delivery. If you enjoy solving problems in a dynamic environment, influencing product, business and technical leaders with creative solutions, we want to talk to you.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Drive implementation and delivery of large\-scale Music initiatives.
* Lead agile engineering and design teams to coordinate, prioritize and deliver the roadmap
* Understand service inter\-dependencies, mobile implementation nuances and lead cross\-functional teams towards technical solutions
* Clarify, prioritize and drive project commitments as well as establish and maintain clear chains of accountability
* Strong (executive) communication and presentation skills
* Articulate program goals, desired outcomes, risks and mitigation plans clearly
* Strong metrics based decision making skills
* Drive continued process improvements in the organization
* Strong JIRA/Asana skills
* Mentor junior employees and build effective teams


**Basic Qualifications**
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- Karnataka

ad67ce88.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, Customer Experience and AI, Amazon Now (Project Tez)
ad67ce88.description:
**Description**
 Amazon Now is Amazon's quick commerce business, one of its largest and fastest growing, running 8\+ marketplaces and handling 700k\+ orders a day scaling to 2MM by year end. Amazon NOW CX is the customer experience org behind it. We are looking for a Sr. Technical Program Manager to own the customer experience end to end and build AI as a worldwide platform for Quick Commerce.
   

  

 This role owns the journey from storefront through checkout and into delivery, returns, and lifecycle, and on top of it drives the three largest bets in the org: AI as a platform capability built once and run everywhere, customer service as a first class product experience, and the growth of what the store sells through product and selection discovery expansion. The north star is surfaceless shopping where customers shop by intent and the platform does the rest.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Own the AI platform roadmap for Quick Commerce, from foundations (context, evaluation, guardrails) through customer facing capabilities (discovery, basket building, AI assisted support), targeting less than 3 seconds from intent to basket and 80% self served support.
* Stand up customer service as a managed tech and product program, driving contacts per order from 5% toward below 0\.1%, a direct lever on profitability at 2MM orders a day.
* Drive multi region stores with overlapping catchments and selection growth across categories.
* Own the cross surface programs from storefront and merchandising through personalization, cart, and checkout that turn a visit into an order.
* Own the delivery promise, tracking, post order, returns, and refunds experience.
* Own notification and lifecycle programs including LiveKit, a worldwide real time platform Tez CX operates for all of Amazon.
* Own deals, offers, and savings programs that shape what a customer pays.
* Run weekly roadmap reviews with engineering counterparts, bi monthly roadmap planning cycles, AI syncs and workshops, and ML coordination.


 A day in the life
   

  

 You start the day reviewing AI experiment results and customer metrics across marketplaces. Mornings are spent in roadmap reviews with SDMs and principal engineers, aligning technical design with what reaches the customer. You run AI workshops where teams demo new capabilities and decide what ships next. Afternoons shift to customer service program reviews, tracking CPO trends and unblocking self service launches. You coordinate across shopping, post order, and growth teams to ensure each surface ships as one experience. You represent the customer experience in leadership forums where the org's biggest bets are reviewed. Your internal stakeholders are engineering managers, principal engineers, product managers, and org leadership. Your customers are the hundreds of thousands of shoppers who use Amazon Now every day across 8\+ marketplaces.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Tez CX is the customer experience org for Amazon Now, Amazon's quick commerce business. We build and operate the full shopping journey across 8\+ marketplaces including India, MENA, North America, EU, UK, and Japan. We run Tier 1 services at thousands of transactions per second. Some of what we build has become canonical worldwide platforms the rest of Amazon runs on, LiveKit and our proprietary design system among them. We are at an inflection point, building AI as a platform capability, standing up customer service as a designed experience, and growing what the store sells, each cutting across across and beyond customer facing surfaces.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience with software development lifecycle and Agile methodologies
* Understanding of AI and ML concepts, model lifecycle, and how AI systems are built and evaluated


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership
* Experience in a high volume, transactional and distributed system environment
* Experience building or operating AI/ML platforms or AI powered customer experiences
* Experience launching products across multiple countries or regions simultaneously


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company**
