cf09d82e.title: Solutions Architect - Senior Manager
cf09d82e.description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**Title Solution Architect**
**Overall Years of Experience 15\+ years**
**Relevant Years of Experience 10\+**
**Role Overview:**
 As a Solution Architect in the AI \& Data Team, you will be responsible for proposing technological solutions to our clients, helping them to navigate the complexities of digital transformation and to leverage technology to achieve their business objectives. The Solution Architect will work closely with clients to understand their needs and serve as a key liaison between business stakeholders and the technical team, to design customized solutions using various technologies.
   

  

**Position Summary**
* Lead the end\-to\-end architecture of AI and data\-driven solutions across multiple business domains.
* Translate business requirements into scalable and maintainable architecture designs using cloud\-native and hybrid approaches.
* Define reference architectures, best practices, and solution blueprints for AI, ML, data pipelines, and analytics systems.
* Collaborate with data scientists and MLOps engineers to ensure robust deployment and monitoring of models.
* Evaluate and integrate LLMs, vector databases, RAG frameworks, and AI orchestration platforms.
* Design data platforms including data lakes, warehouses, and real\-time streaming systems.
* Define data models, data governance frameworks, and metadata management strategies.
* Design and architect full stack solutions spanning backend services (using modern frameworks and languages such as .net, .net core, python ) and front\-end applications (with React or Angular), while integrating AI capabilities at every layer.
* Act as the technical advisor to business and engineering teams, ensuring alignment to architectural principles and target state.
* Conduct design reviews and provide architectural guidance throughout the development lifecycle.
* Ensure AI and data solutions comply with enterprise security, privacy, and compliance policies.
* Promote ethical and responsible AI practices, including explainability and bias mitigation.


**Roles And Responsibilities**
**Essential**
* Responsible for determining the overall strategic, operational, and technical scope of new business opportunities with customers and prospects
* Should be able to play the role of a business consultant with a technological mindset
* Work closely with sales team and take part in business proposal creation
* Work with implementation teams to convert business problems into technological solution designs
* Must be able to articulate technology and design approach to both business and technical users
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or related field.
* Strong experience in any of the cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP)
* Expertise in modern data architectures including data mesh, data fabric, and zero ETL patterns.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

92e12cd6.title: Senior Consultant - Infra & Cloud
92e12cd6.description:
Coretek Services is seeking a Senior Systems Engineer consultant to supplement its Enterprise Technology team. This individual will provide operational coverage for critical infrastructure responsibilities while also supporting the company's Azure\-based Digital Transformation environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Serve as a backup for day\-to\-day infrastructure operations, including:
+ PowerMax storage administration, partition setup, monitoring, and cleanup
+ SFTP/FTP server administration and customer or carrier account setup
+ Monitoring approximately 100 scheduled file\-transfer processes and resolving failures, capacity issues, and other anomalies
+ Firewall rule changes and IP address whitelisting
+ Server, network, storage, security, and infrastructure incident response

* Assist with infrastructure monitoring, troubleshooting, documentation, patching, upgrades, and operational support
* Work alongside Green Mountain's Lead Systems Engineer and perform responsibilities similar to those currently handled by Johnathan Urschel
* Provide advanced technical support for Azure services used in the Digital Transformation program, including Azure networking, AKS, App Services, Functions, Storage, Key Vault, Entra ID, Azure Monitor, Sentinel, and related security services
* Support Azure environment configuration, deployment, monitoring, troubleshooting, access management, and operational readiness
* Develop and maintain infrastructure documentation, procedures, diagrams, and knowledge\-transfer materials
* Participate in disaster recovery, security, and after\-hours support activities when required


**Requirements**
* Senior\-level experience supporting Windows, Linux, storage, networking, firewalls, and enterprise infrastructure
* Strong hands\-on experience with Microsoft Azure infrastructure and platform services
* Experience supporting hybrid environments that include both on\-premises data centers and Azure
* Strong troubleshooting, documentation, communication, and knowledge\-transfer skills
* Ability to work independently while collaborating closely with internal staff, vendors, and development teams

60b3f7c5.title: Senior Cloud Infrastructure Consultant
60b3f7c5.description:
Technology is our how. And people are our why. For over two decades, we have been harnessing technology to drive meaningful change.
   

  

  

  

 By combining world\-class engineering, industry expertise and a people\-centric mindset, we consult and partner with leading brands from various industries to create dynamic platforms and intelligent digital experiences that drive innovation and transform businesses.
   

  

  

  

 From prototype to real\-world impact \- be part of a global shift by doing work that matters.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 Our senior infrastructure consultants are responsible for designing and implementing back\-end services. They ensure reliability, security, and scalability for all platform layers within our solutions. Infrastructure teams provide expertise across virtualization, cloud services, storage solutions, cybersecurity, and scripting and automation.
   

  

  

  

**Responsibilities**



* Part of a dedicated team providing project delivery services and solutions on both premises and Cloud infrastructures
* Design, implement and test projects based on clients functional and business requirements (including sometimes travel to other countries)
* Creation and maintenance of technical documentation
* Involvement in architecture and project definition working with software and infrastructure/solution architects to define requirements.
* Research and development of new technologies based on project pipelines
* Provide support services during project go\-live, performance tuning, and transition to support operations.


**Qualifications**
  

  
* 15\+ years of experience
* Excellent spoken and written English
* Experience working in an enterprise level company, managed services or service provider company
* Expert experience with Azure administration and its infrastructure offerings (Entra ID, Storage Accounts, VMs, Backups, KeyVault, SSO, Conditional Access, VDI, etc.)
* Experience with infrastructure\-based processes (Migrations, Monitoring, Capacity planning, Performance tuning, Disaster Recovery)
* Hands\-on experience with Intune administration or similar tool like Tanium, HCL BigFix (Device Enrollment and Management, Mobile Application Management)
* Hands\-on experience with SCCM administration (Distribution points deployment and administration)
* Hands\-on experience with Office 365 (Hybrid Exchange environments, SharePoint)
* Hands\-on experience with Active Directory infrastructure administration
* Hands\-on experience with Hyper\-V administration
* Experience implementing and managing Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention policies.
* Good understanding of network services like DNS, DHCP, Firewall, VPN, etc.
* Experience with AWS or GCP Suite administration – nice to have
* PowerShell skills (nice to have)
* Terraform, Bicep, Cloudformation (nice to have)
* Certificates:
   

 AZ\-104, AZ\-305, MS\-102, AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (any of these are desirable)


**Additional Information**

 Discover some of the global benefits that empower our people to become the best version of themselves:
   

  

  




* **Finance:**
 Competitive salary package, share plan, company performance bonuses, value\-based recognition awards, referral bonus;
* **Career Development** 
 :
   

 Career coaching, global career opportunities, non\-linear career paths, internal development programmes for management and technical leadership;
* **Learning Opportunities:**
 Complex projects, rotations, internal tech communities, training, certifications, coaching, online learning platforms subscriptions, pass\-it\-on sessions, workshops, conferences;
* **Work\-Life Balance:**
 Hybrid work and flexible working hours, employee assistance programme;
* **Health:**
 Global internal wellbeing programme, access to wellbeing apps;
* **Community:**
 Global internal tech communities, hobby clubs and interest groups, inclusion and diversity programmes, events and celebrations.



 At Endava, we’re committed to creating an open, inclusive, and respectful environment where everyone feels safe, valued, and empowered to be their best. We welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives—because we know that inclusive teams help us deliver smarter, more innovative solutions for our customers. Hiring decisions are based on merit, skills, qualifications, and potential. If you need adjustments or support during the recruitment process, please let us know.

d9b42fe5.title: Cloud Engineer
d9b42fe5.description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced DevSecOps Engineer to join our team. As a DevSecOps Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining security measures to protect our cloud\-based infrastructure and applications. You will work closely with our development and operations teams to ensure that security best practices are followed throughout the cloud environment. You will also be responsible for monitoring and responding to security incidents and conducting regular security audits and assessments. The ideal candidate has a strong background in cloud security, a deep understanding of cloud architectures, and a passion for staying up to date with the latest security threats and trends.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design and implement security controls and measures to protect cloud\-based infrastructure and applications.
* Collaborate with development and operations teams to integrate security into the software development lifecycle.
* Regular security assessments and audits should be conducted to identify vulnerabilities and recommend remediation actions.
* Monitor and respond to security incidents and conduct investigations as necessary.
* Stay current with emerging cloud security threats, vulnerabilities, and industry best practices.



  





**Requirements** 




**Qualification** 



* 3\+ Proven experience working as a DevSecOps Engineer or in a similar role.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field. At least one of the relevant certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Security \- Specialty, AWS Certified Network \- Specialty, AWS Solutions Architect \- Professional, CCSP, CISSP). Additional certifications are a plus.
* Strong understanding of cloud computing concepts and AWS architectures. GCP is a plus.
* In\-depth knowledge of cloud security best practices, standards, and frameworks (e.g., CIS Benchmarks, NIST, ISO 27001\).
* Hands\-on experience with cloud security tools and technologies (e.g., AWS Security services, Web Application Firewalls, Cloud Security Posture Management tools).
* Experience with infrastructure\-as\-code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or CloudFormation. CDK is a plus.
* Experience with Python programming and the boto3 library. TypeScript is a plus.
* Experience conducting security assessments and audits.
* Understanding of networking protocols and security technologies (e.g., VPN, Firewall, IDS/IPS).

5da9fa26.title: Infrastructure Specialist-Cloud Platforms
5da9fa26.description:
**Introduction**
 A career in IBM Consulting is built on long\-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long\-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As an Infrastructure Specialist for Cloud Platforms, you will manage and implement infrastructure solutions across various cloud environments according to established designs, ensuring scalability, reliability, and security. You will collaborate with IT teams to implement and integrate cloud infrastructure solutions based on existing designs.
   

  

**Your Primary Responsibilities Will Include**
* Set Up and Configure Cloud Infrastructure: Set up, configure, and manage virtual machines, storage solutions, networking, and databases across different cloud platforms to effectively support business applications.
* Implement and Oversee Cloud Resources: Implement and oversee essential cloud resources such as Virtual Private Clouds (VPCs), Load Balancers, and Cloud Storage solutions to ensure smooth operations.
* Monitor and Troubleshoot Infrastructure: Continuously monitor infrastructure, troubleshoot issues, and maintain high availability (HA) and disaster recovery (DR) configurations to ensure reliable performance.
* Apply Security Measures: Apply and enforce security measures to ensure cloud infrastructure complies with organizational policies and industry regulations.
* Optimize Cloud Costs: Optimize cloud costs by right\-sizing resources, developing cost\-effective solutions, and monitoring usage patterns.


**Preferred Education**
 Master's Degree
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
* Cloud Services Proficiency: Exposure to cloud services from providers such as Oracle Cloud, Nutanix Cloud, Alibaba Cloud, and others, with expertise in Linux and VMware environments.
* DevOps Practices Experience: Exposure to DevOps practices, such as continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD), with experience in using automation tools like Terraform, Ansible, and native cloud automation services.
* Cloud Migration Project Experience: Experience with cloud migration projects, including implementation and execution, with proficiency in managing Kubernetes clusters across various cloud environments.
* Cloud Cost Optimization: Experience with optimizing cloud costs by right\-sizing resources, developing cost\-effective solutions, and monitoring usage patterns.
* Automation Tools Proficiency: Exposure to automation tools like Terraform, Ansible, and native cloud automation services to automate and streamline processes.


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
* Cloud Security Knowledge: Exposure to cloud security best practices and compliance frameworks to ensure cloud infrastructure aligns with organizational policies and industry regulations.
* Advanced Automation Skills: Experience with automation tools beyond Terraform, Ansible, and native cloud automation services to further automate and streamline processes.
* Multi\-Cloud Expertise: Exposure to managing multiple cloud providers, including Oracle Cloud, Nutanix Cloud, Alibaba Cloud, and others, to effectively support business applications across diverse cloud environments.

8ef3ea4c.title: Solutions Engineer , Chennai
8ef3ea4c.description:
TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk.  



  

At TrendAI™, we’re always seeking exceptional talent; people who want to collaborate with the best and push boundaries together. Here, your work goes beyond building a career. You will help protect what matters and play a vital role in shaping a safer, more trustworthy AI\-powered future.  



  

AI Fearlessly.


**Solutions Engineer, Chennai**

**ABOUT TRENDAI™**

TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk. Trusted by the largest enterprises and governments across 185 countries, TrendAI™ secures the entire organization, from identities to infrastructure to data. AI Fearlessly. Learn more: trendaisecurity.com


**POSITION OVERVIEW**

The Solutions Engineer (SE) with Delhi/Bangalore, will be the technical bridge between our Sales Representatives and their pre\-sales customers. As a TrendAI product expert will guide customers and prospects in the selection and deployment of Trend Micro Next\-Gen security solutions and take joint ownership with Sales team in developing customer relationships, providing leadership in security architecture and help influence customer’s technical strategy with strong problem\-solving skills. A Solutionsan an architecturesolutionsunderstandingpre\-sales supportan skillspanellisteventswebinarsworkshopsDevelopcustomerssolvesolutionsproducts'the more the the the cybersecuritycustomers Engineer is a trusted advisor to customers by developing an understanding of customer needs, risks, tolerance and technology gaps and implementation.


**PRIMIRY RESPONSIBILITY**

* Apart from being a technologist, you are expected to understand customer journey with product and it’s experience and help customer to navigate through it smoothly
* Obsessed with Customer Success during entire part of his engagement, onboarding and product experience journey
* A strong pillar to build and train sales organisation. You shall be an extremely good storyteller and help sales team to sell better and effectively
* Understand emerging ecosystem of cyber security partners like SOC services partner, CSP (cloud service partners), MSSP etc.
* Leveraging channel partners by upscaling and training for customer engagement is integral part of the role
* Conduct routine update on the new product/ technology to the internal sales staff
* Work closely with Regional / Global Product Manager and Product Marketing Manager to obtain the latest Product/ Technology know how
* Confidently deliver engaging technical demonstrations highlighting Trend Micro products advantages and benefits via solid messaging, presentation skills and public speaking
* Encourage and empower the partners and channel to propose, position and convince the customers with our products and solution
* Present to all levels of an organisation complex technical issues and solutions in a meaningful, engaging, and digestible manner
* Apply strong problem\-solving skills to design solutions that solves the customer problems
* Developing close relationships to help influence the technical strategy of the customer
* Deliver training to customer and prospects about Trend Micro solutions
* Working with company technical support personnel to ensure ongoing quality of support and customer health
* Contribute to departmental best practices, strategies, methodologies and documentation for increased efficiencies
* Continuous self\-improvement and learning to maintain current technical knowledge, participate in technical communities of interest
* Most of the sales engineers actively participate in webinar, workshop and other industry event as a speaker or panelist. Very good public speaking skill will be added advantage to the role

**EXPERIENCE**

* Rich experience in delivering highest quality presales Support and Solution by bringing unique value on to the table for customers
* Strong understand and knowledge on SOC operations, security analytics capabilities, cloud architect understanding, cloud native application security, SASE, CASB, Zero trust model will be key advantage.
* Knowledge and understating on Microsoft O365, Azure, google, AWS services will be added advantage.
* Exposure to security software solutions like Firewall, Content Security, Intrusion prevention, encryption, data leakage, data protection and monitoring security will be added advantage
* Good written and spoken communication skills in English
* A strong interest in all aspects of cybersecurity and a passion for customer security
* Excellent of understanding of public cloud technologies such as AWS and Azure

TrendAI™ strives to build an environment of equity and inclusion, which reflects diverse points of view. We welcome, value, promote, and celebrate diversity – the very experiences and attributes that make us who we are, including but not limited to race, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identification, sexual orientation, level of ability, age, religion, veteran status, socio\-economic status, and political philosophy.


\#LI\-SR1


\#LI\-Hybrid


We embrace change, empower people, and encourage innovation. Join Trend Micro and Thrive with us.

474df5e3.title: SAP Tech Delivery Manager
474df5e3.description:
**Primary skills:** SAP S4Hana, ECC, SAP Ariba, SAP Fiori, BW, Black line
  
  

**Experience:** 8\-11 years
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

Lead the end\-to\-end delivery of technology solutions across Finance, Procurement and Supply Chain platforms, ensuring successful execution of business change, system enhancements, application modernisation and operational improvements. Accountable for delivery governance, technical coordination, stakeholder engagement, risk management and service stability across SAP and enterprise application landscapes.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
  

Delivery Leadership
  
  

* Lead the delivery of business and technology initiatives across Finance, Procurement and Supply Chain domains.
* Manage the complete delivery lifecycle from demand intake through planning, design, build, testing, deployment and post\-implementation support.
* Ensure delivery commitments are achieved within agreed scope, timelines, quality and budget.
* Drive Agile and hybrid delivery practices to improve predictability, transparency and customer outcomes.


SAP Enterprise Application Delivery
  
  

* Deliver and support solutions across:


o SAP S/4HANA
  
  

o SAP ECC
  
  

o SAP Ariba
  
  

o SAP BW/BI
  
  

o SAP BlackLine
  
  

o SAP Fiori
  
  

o Finance Supply Chain applications
  
  

* Coordinate cross\-functional teams including architects, developers, business analysts, testers and suppliers.
* Ensure alignment of delivered solutions with business objectives and enterprise architecture standards.


Integration Middleware Delivery
  
  

* Lead delivery of SAP CPI (Cloud Integration Suite) initiatives and integration enhancements.
* Manage SAP PI/PO landscapes, migrations, upgrades and decommissioning activities.
* Coordinate API, middleware and enterprise integration deliveries across multiple platforms.
* Support cloud migration and integration modernisation programmes.
* Ensure robust integration design, performance, security and operational support readiness.


Governance Stakeholder Management
  
  

* Act as the primary delivery contact for business and technology stakeholders.
* Provide clear reporting on progress, dependencies, risks, issues and mitigation plans.
* Facilitate governance forums, delivery reviews and stakeholder updates.
* Collaborate with business teams to prioritise demand and manage competing priorities.


Operational Excellence
  
  

* Ensure production stability and service continuity for critical business applications.
* Lead incident, problem and change management activities.
* Drive root cause analysis and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Support audit, compliance and security requirements across delivered solutions.


Resource Supplier Management
  
  

* Coordinate internal teams, external partners and managed service providers.
* Support delivery planning, estimation, resource allocation and capacity management.
* Monitor supplier performance against contractual and operational commitments.


Continuous Improvement Innovation
  
  

* Promote automation, AI and modern delivery practices to improve efficiency.
* Identify opportunities for process simplification and technical debt reduction.
* Contribute to delivery standards, reusable frameworks and best practices.


Skills Experience
  
  

Essential
  
  

* Strong experience delivering SAP Finance, Procurement or Supply Chain solutions.
* Hands\-on understanding of SAP S/4HANA, ECC, Ariba, BW and related applications.
* Experience delivering SAP CPI, PI/PO and enterprise integration solutions.
* Strong knowledge of Agile, Scrum and delivery governance practices.
* Experience managing technical dependencies across multiple teams and suppliers.
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Experience in incident, change and release management processes.


Desirable
  
  

* SAP CPI Migration programmes.
* SAP PI/PO to CPI Transformation.
* Cloud Integration and API Management.
* Power BI and reporting solutions.
* AI, Copilot and automation initiatives.
* SAFe, Agile, ITIL or Project Management certifications.


Key Outcomes
  
  

* Predictable and successful delivery of Finance Supply Chain initiatives.
* Stable and secure operation of SAP and enterprise applications.
* Successful CPI migration and PI/PO modernisation activities.
* Improved delivery efficiency, quality and stakeholder satisfaction.
* Reduced delivery risks and operational incidents.
* Increased automation and adoption of modern delivery practices.

* Ensure delivery commitments are achieved within agreed scope, timelines, quality and budget.
* Drive Agile and hybrid delivery practices to improve predictability, transparency and customer outcomes.


SAP Enterprise Application Delivery
  
  

* Deliver and support solutions across:


o SAP S/4HANA
  
  

o SAP ECC
  
  

o SAP Ariba
  
  

o SAP BW/BI
  
  

o SAP BlackLine
  
  

o SAP Fiori
  
  

o Finance Supply Chain applications
  
  

* Coordinate cross\-functional teams including architects, developers, business analysts, testers and suppliers.
* Ensure alignment of delivered solutions with business objectives and enterprise architecture standards.


Integration Middleware Delivery
  
  

* Lead delivery of SAP CPI (Cloud Integration Suite) initiatives and integration enhancements.
* Manage SAP PI/PO landscapes, migrations, upgrades and decommissioning activities.
* Coordinate API, middleware and enterprise integration deliveries across multiple platforms.
* Support cloud migration and integration modernisation programmes.
* Ensure robust integration design, performance, security and operational support readiness.


Governance Stakeholder Management
  
  

* Act as the primary delivery contact for business and technology stakeholders.
* Provide clear reporting on progress, dependencies, risks, issues and mitigation plans.
* Facilitate governance forums, delivery reviews and stakeholder updates.
* Collaborate with business teams to prioritise demand and manage competing priorities.


Operational Excellence
  
  

* Ensure production stability and service continuity for critical business applications.
* Lead incident, problem and change management activities.
* Drive root cause analysis and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Support audit, compliance and security requirements across delivered solutions.


Resource Supplier Management
  
  

* Coordinate internal teams, external partners and managed service providers.
* Support delivery planning, estimation, resource allocation and capacity management.
* Monitor supplier performance against contractual and operational commitments.


Continuous Improvement Innovation
  
  

* Promote automation, AI and modern delivery practices to improve efficiency.
* Identify opportunities for process simplification and technical debt reduction.
* Contribute to delivery standards, reusable frameworks and best practices.


Skills Experience
  
  

Essential
  
  

* Strong experience delivering SAP Finance, Procurement or Supply Chain solutions.
* Hands\-on understanding of SAP S/4HANA, ECC, Ariba, BW and related applications.
* Experience delivering SAP CPI, PI/PO and enterprise integration solutions.
* Strong knowledge of Agile, Scrum and delivery governance practices.
* Experience managing technical dependencies across multiple teams and suppliers.
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Experience in incident, change and release management processes.


Desirable
  
  

* SAP CPI Migration programmes.
* SAP PI/PO to CPI Transformation.
* Cloud Integration and API Management.
* Power BI and reporting solutions.
* AI, Copilot and automation initiatives.
* SAFe, Agile, ITIL or Project Management certifications.


Key Outcomes
  
  

* Predictable and successful delivery of Finance Supply Chain initiatives.
* Stable and secure operation of SAP and enterprise applications.
* Successful CPI migration and PI/PO modernisation activities.
* Improved delivery efficiency, quality and stakeholder satisfaction.
* Reduced delivery risks and operational incidents.
* Increased automation and adoption of modern delivery practices.

9077976b.title: Senior Manager Digital Solutions Consulting
9077976b.description:
**Overview**
**About Business Unit:**
 As part of the Digital Integration Services team, you’ll be at the forefront of modernizing marketing and delivering ground\-breaking solutions. From crafting data\-driven, personalized experiences that customers truly value to turning marketing visions into reality \- we empower brands to achieve their goals.
   

  

 Our team of 1,200 experts in strategy, analytics, creative, and digital experience uses innovative technology and data\-driven insights to craft relevant, customer\-centric strategies for the world’s leading brands.
   

  

**Why We Are Looking For You**
* You are passionate about helping clients solve complex business challenges through digital transformation, data\-driven decision making, and innovative technology solutions.
* You excel at building strong relationships with business and technology partners and can confidently lead discussions in ambiguous and evolving environments.
* You enjoy uncovering opportunities, facilitating discovery conversations, and translating business needs into actionable strategies and solution roadmaps.
* You bring a consulting mentality, combining analytical thinking, problem\-solving, and business insight to drive measurable outcomes.
* You are energized by continuous learning and enjoy exploring emerging technologies, platforms, and industry trends to create business value
* You have a strong consulting mentality and can connect business objectives with technology capabilities to create meaningful and measurable outcomes.
* You thrive at facilitating discussions, challenging assumptions, and driving clarity in ambiguous situations.
* You are curious, adaptable, and excited to learn about emerging technologies, digital platforms, and modern ways of working.


**What You Will Enjoy In This Role**
 As part of the Digital Experience team
   

  

* Partner with leading global brands and enterprise clients to solve strategic business challenges and shape large\-scale digital transformation initiatives.
* Influence business and technology decisions by working directly with senior partners, product leaders, architects, and cross\-functional delivery teams.
* Drive meaningful conversations that help organizations modernize customer experiences, optimize operations, and unlock value through technology and innovation.
* Gain exposure to a broad ecosystem of digital technologies, customer experience platforms, marketing technologies, enterprise applications, data platforms, analytics solutions, and emerging AI capabilities.
* Work across the full consulting lifecycle—from discovery and strategy through solution definition, implementation support, adoption, and business value realization.
* Collaborate with highly skilled consultants, designers, architects, engineers, and industry specialists in a culture that values innovation, knowledge sharing, and continuous learning.
* Expand your expertise across business consulting, digital strategy, transformation, product thinking, requirements engineering, data, AI, and customer experience domains.
* Take ownership of high\-impact engagements where your recommendations, insights, and leadership directly influence client success and business outcomes.


 Click here to view how Epsilon transforms marketing with 1 View, 1 Vision and 1 Voice.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Client Consultation: Collaborate with clients to understand their marketing goals, target audience, current tech stack, and problems. Conduct thorough assessments of their existing digital marketing technology infrastructure, including tools for analytics, CRM, content management, email marketing, social media, advertising, and automation.
* Tech Stack Evaluation: Evaluate the client's current tech stack and identify gaps, redundancies, and opportunities for improvement. Research and analyze potential digital marketing tools, platforms, and integrations to address the client's specific needs and goals. Consider factors such as scalability, compatibility, ease of use, and cost\-effectiveness.
* Digital Experience \& Enterprise Platform Consulting Define requirements for digital experience platforms, enterprise content management systems, customer engagement technologies, marketing technology ecosystems, commerce platforms, CRM solutions, and enterprise digital initiatives and consulting expertise across Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), Sitecore, Crown peak, etc. .Collaborate with solution architects and platform specialists to align business requirements with platform capabilities and solution designs
* MarTech, CRM \& Customer Data Platforms: Provide consulting expertise across MarTech, CRM, Customer Data Platforms (CDP), personalization platforms, marketing automation platforms, and broader customer experience ecosystems. Support technology selection, capability assessment, integration planning, and business adoption initiatives across customer engagement platforms.
* Data Platform Consulting: Lead requirements and consulting activities for enterprise data platforms, including data ingestion, integration, transformation, governance, lineage, reporting, analytics, and data architecture initiatives. Support data modernization and data\-driven transformation programs by aligning business requirements with enterprise data capabilities. Collaborate with data architects, engineering teams, and business partners to ensure successful implementation of data and analytics solutions.
* Recommendations and Transformation Roadmaps: Develop comprehensive recommendations and a roadmap for optimizing the digital marketing tech stack. Present findings to clients, clearly explaining the benefits, costs, and implementation requirements of each recommended tool or integration. Prioritize recommendations based on their potential impact and alignment with the client's marketing strategy.
* Implementation and Integration: Collaborate with internal teams or external vendors in early stages to implement and integrate the selected tools into the client's tech stack. Oversee the deployment process, ensuring proper configuration, data migration, and user training.
* Data and Analytics: Work closely with clients to establish robust data collection and analytics processes within the tech stack. Define key performance indicators and metrics aligned with marketing goals. Configure analytics tools and dashboards to provide accurate and actionable insights for campaign optimization and decision\-making.
* Training and Support: Provide training and documentation to the client's marketing team on how to effectively use the new tools and features within the tech stack. Offer ongoing support and troubleshooting assistance to ensure the smooth operation of the implemented solutions. Stay updated on the latest features, updates, and guidelines related to the recommended technologies.
* Performance Monitoring and Optimization: Continuously monitor the performance of the digital marketing tech stack and assess its effectiveness in achieving marketing goals. Analyze data, identify bottlenecks or areas for improvement, and propose adjustments or enhancements to optimize performance. Stay informed about emerging technologies and trends to recommend future enhancements to the tech stack.
* Strategy Development: Develop and implement comprehensive digital marketing strategies aligned with clients' goals. Identify key performance indicators and establish measurable targets to track campaign effectiveness. Provide strategic guidance on the selection and utilization of digital marketing channels, technologies, and tools to enhance online visibility, brand recognition, lead generation, and conversion rates.
* Industry Research: Stay abreast of the latest trends, innovations, and standards in digital marketing. Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify emerging opportunities, industry benchmarks, and potential areas of differentiation for clients. Share industry insights and thought leadership to guide clients' decision\-making and keep them at the forefront of digital marketing trends.
* Client Relationship Management: Foster strong, trusted relationships with clients by delivering exceptional customer service and value. Proactively engage with clients, providing regular updates on campaign performance, industry developments, and new marketing opportunities. Anticipate clients' evolving needs and propose new strategies or initiatives to drive continuous improvement.


**Qualifications**
* Requires overall experience of at least 12\-16 and 7 \-10 years in client facing roles
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree or equivalent experience preferred. MBA or equivalent experience from a reputed Business School with Marketing specialization (Also Non\-MBA, with exceptional communication skills)
* Proven experience in digital marketing, preferably in a consulting or agency environment.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively convey complex ideas to clients and partners
* Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects simultaneously, and meet deadlines.
* Demonstrated problem\-solving skills and a proactive attitude towards identifying and resolving marketing challenges.


**Additional Information**
 Epsilon is a global data, technology and services company that powers the marketing and advertising ecosystem. For decades, we’ve provided marketers from the world’s leading brands the data, technology and services they need to engage consumers with 1 View, 1 Vision and 1 Voice. 1 View of their universe of potential buyers. 1 Vision for engaging each individual. And 1 Voice to harmonize engagement across paid, owned and earned channels.
   

  

 Epsilon’s comprehensive portfolio of capabilities across our suite of digital media, messaging and loyalty solutions bridge the divide between marketing and advertising technology. We process 400\+ billion consumer actions each day using advanced AI and hold many patents of proprietary technology, including real\-time modeling languages and consumer privacy advancements. Thanks to the work of every employee, Epsilon has been consistently recognized as industry\-leading by Forrester, Adweek and the MRC. Epsilon is a global company with more than 9,000 employees around the world.
   

  

 Our pillars aren't just words. They're how we show up every day.
   

  

* People centricity: We focus on employee well\-being in an environment where colleagues truly care about each other.
* Collaboration: We work together, support one another, and collectively achieve goals.
* Growth: There are endless opportunities for growth through learning, development and career advancement.
* Innovation: We drive progress through cutting\-edge solutions and forward\-thinking approaches.
* Flexibility: We’ve created a balance between work and personal life, and we encourage adaptability to solve problems creatively.


 Our values guide us to create value for our clients, our people and consumers.
   

  

* Act with integrity
* Work together to win together
* Innovate with purpose
* Respect all voices
* Empower with accountability


 These pillars and values are our foundation—shaping our culture, guiding our decisions, and uniting us in common purpose.
   

  

**Epsilon is an Equal Opportunity Employer.**
 Epsilon is committed to promoting diversity, inclusion, and equal employment opportunities by using reasonable efforts to attract, recruit, engage and retain qualified individuals of all ethnicities and backgrounds, including, but not limited to, women, people of color, LGBTQ individuals, people with disabilities and any other underrepresented groups, traits or characteristics.

7f0de55d.title: Engagement Manager
7f0de55d.description:
**Associate / Engagement Manager – Fractional CFO \& Finance Advisory** 




**About SmartFin Consulting** 




 SmartFin Consulting is a fractional CFO and finance advisory firm that partners with founders and leadership teams to bring structure, clarity, and financial discipline to growing businesses. We work closely with startups and mid\-sized companies across IT/ITeS, FMCG, e\-commerce, services, healthcare, and technology, supporting them through scaling, investor readiness, strategic decision\-making, and finance transformation.
 



 Collaboration, ownership, and execution excellence sit at the core of how we work. We're looking for professionals who enjoy solving business problems, working directly with founders and leadership teams, and driving meaningful outcomes across multiple client engagements.
 



  





**The Role** 




 We're hiring an Engagement Manager with 3–5 years of experience in finance, consulting, transaction advisory, business finance, or CFO advisory. This role suits a qualified
 **CA** 
 or
 **CFA** 
 who can independently manage client engagements, lead financial analysis, provide strategic insight, and act as a trusted advisor to founders and business leaders.
 



 You'll work directly with SmartFin leadership and client stakeholders, helping businesses improve financial performance, strengthen controls, enhance governance, and build scalable finance functions.
 



 You'll lead multiple client engagements across industries, owning financial reporting, business analysis, budgeting, cash flow management, strategic projects, compliance oversight, and stakeholder management, balancing strong technical finance capability with business acumen, project management, and senior\-stakeholder communication.
 



**Core Skills \& Attributes We're Assessing For** 




**Throughout the hiring process, we assess candidates across the following six key attributes:** 




**Core Finance \& Accounting Capability** 



* Qualified CA and/or CFA (Level II/III), with 3–5 years in finance, accounting, FP\&A, transaction advisory, or CFO advisory.
* Strong command of financial reporting, MIS, and Indian regulatory frameworks (GST, TDS, Companies Act, FEMA, RBI).



**Analytical \& Problem\-Solving Skills** 



* Advanced Excel and financial modelling ability; builds structure from raw, messy data.
* Moves fluidly from variance analysis to insight to a clear, actionable recommendation.



**Advisory \& Client\-Facing Skills** 



* Comfortable acting as a trusted advisor to founders, CEOs, and leadership teams, not just a report preparer.
* Communicates complex financial ideas simply and confidently, even under pushback.



**Fractional Model Fit** 



* Manages multiple client engagements in parallel without compromising quality or context.
* Adapts quickly across industries, systems, and stakeholder styles while working independently with minimal oversight.



**SmartFin Culture \& Values Fit** 



* Ownership mindset—accountable for outcomes, not just tasks completed.
* Collaborative and coachable, with the ability to mentor junior team members while continuing to build personal expertise.



**Practical Execution (Role\-Level Dependent)** 



* **Engagement Manager:** 
 Leads engagements independently, owns client relationships, and reviews and mentors Analysts and Associates.
* **Associate:** 
 Delivers models, MIS, and analysis under guidance while building towards independent client ownership.



**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. CFO Advisory \& Business Partnering** 



* Act as the primary day\-to\-day finance advisor for assigned clients.
* Work closely with founders, CEOs, and business leaders on strategic decision\-making.
* Identify opportunities to improve profitability, working capital, and cash flow.
* Drive finance transformation and process improvement initiatives.



**2\. Financial Reporting \& MIS** 



* Review and present monthly MIS, management reports, and performance analysis.
* Monitor key business metrics, profitability, cash flows, and operational KPIs.
* Analyze business trends and translate them into actionable recommendations.
* Present insights and performance updates to client leadership teams.



**3\. Budgeting, Forecasting \& FP\&A** 



* Lead annual budgeting and forecasting exercises.
* Develop financial models and scenario analyses.
* Track performance against budget and identify key variances.
* Support business planning and strategic growth initiatives.



**4\. Cash Flow \& Working Capital Management** 



* Monitor cash flow performance and liquidity.
* Develop rolling cash flow forecasts.
* Improve receivables, payables, inventory, and working capital management.
* Support funding and capital allocation decisions.



**5\. Compliance, Governance \& Risk Management** 



* Oversee compliance with accounting, tax, and regulatory requirements.
* Support clients on FEMA, RBI regulations, ODI/FDI compliance, and corporate governance.
* Help strengthen internal controls and financial governance frameworks.
* Coordinate with auditors, consultants, and external advisors.



**6\. Stakeholder \& Team Management** 



* Manage client relationships and ensure high\-quality service delivery.
* Mentor and review the work of Analysts and Associates.
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams and project deliverables.
* Drive accountability and execution across engagements.



**Qualifications \& Skills** 




**Education** 



* Chartered Accountant (CA)
* CFA Level II or III Candidate
* Master's degree in Commerce, Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field



**Experience** 



* 3–5 years across Finance \& Accounting, FP\&A, Transaction Advisory, Consulting, Corporate Finance, CFO Advisory, or Business Finance.



**Technical Skills** 



* Strong financial reporting and accounting knowledge.
* Advanced Excel and financial modelling skills.
* Experience with budgeting, forecasting, and cash flow management.
* Working knowledge of GST, TDS, Companies Act, FEMA, and RBI regulations.
* Exposure to ESG frameworks, BRSR reporting, governance, or sustainability initiatives is a plus.



**Leadership \& Communication** 



* Strong stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to independently manage client engagements.
* Excellent written and verbal communication.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities.
* Comfort operating in a fast\-paced, entrepreneurial environment.



**What We Offer** 



* Direct exposure to founders, CEOs, and investors.
* Opportunity to lead multiple client engagements across industries.
* Hands\-on experience in Fractional CFO and Strategic Finance Advisory.
* Exposure to fundraising, business transformation, ESG, governance, and growth strategy projects.
* A high\-learning environment with real ownership and career progression.
* Competitive compensation aligned with experience and performance.

e3bd0fc0.title: ENTERPRISE ARCHITECTURE - FSI
e3bd0fc0.description:
Make an impact with NTT DATA
  
Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.
  
  

Your day at NTT DATA
  
  

This is a pivotal new role envisioned in NTT Data Inc, which is formed by integrating operating companies within NTT Group to create a global full\-stack services company with a range of business and technology services. The broad intent is to take a carefully curated portfolio in targeted verticals to top clients picked discerningly based on propensity for our portfolio. We will deploy a world\-class go\-to\-market field force in such clients; and we are now making a step\-change our capacity by inducting senior enterprise architecture professionals with expertise in targeted industry verticals and horizontal competencies. One such key role is of APAC DIRECTOR – FSI ENTERPRISE ARCHITECTURE, who will engage our clients in the financial services vertical to baseline their landscape, understand their pains and aspirations, and propose solutions that address them. The sections below provide more details of the attributes expected in this role.
  
  

DETAILED ROLES RESPONSIBILITIES
  
  

Support the client manager in five areas – Account Planning, Opportunity Seeding, Opportunity Strategy Execution, Portfolio Ideation, and In\-Contract Innovation Strategy.
  
* Account Planning in this important sales activity the EA may support the CM by doing the groundwork to understand the client’s current enterprise\-wide landscape, their pains and ambitions, and identify the NTT Data Inc solutions that can be of potential value to the clients.
* Opportunity Seeding is the logical next step where the EA may support the CM in client presentations and workshops to create client awareness and interest in our portfolio offers identified in the account plan, which results in qualified opportunities.
* Opportunity Strategy Execution requires the EA to play a key role in stitching a multi\-domain solution with solution and technical architects from many NTT Data Inc service divisions. The EA optimizes the value and costing to balance the outcomes desired by the client, which is the key for winning deals.
* Portfolio Ideation – EA are best positioned to share the needs and wants of clients with the service divisions to trigger portfolio enhancements, and related value propositions of our offers, which are powered by leading edge technologies of the time. Must also know the competition capabilities, to benchmark our services, and stay on the leading edge.
* In\-Contract Innovation Strategy is important for curating large client installed bases by demonstrating NTT Data Inc ability to bring innovation into ongoing delivery. The EA assigned to the client plays a key role in defining the innovation strategy.


It is important to track the above leading activities, as well as the lagging indicator of bookings growth which is attributable to the efforts and outcomes from the leading above activities. The APAC DIRECTOR – FSI ENTERPRISE ARCHITECTURE will be responsible for line\-of\-sight bookings KPI.
  
  

DELIVERABLES
  
  

Support the client managers by producing high quality and timely deliverables.
  
* Document Client Insights – business and IT landscape, pains ambitions.
* Account Plan – contribute the business and technical aspects of the plan.
* Solution Value Proposition – articulate value \- how solution addresses pains and ambitions.
* Facilitated Client Workshops – workshop deliverable document.
* Multi\-domain Solutioning – stitch the full solution.
* Opportunity Strategy – contribute to opportunity plan on solution and value.
* Cost\-Value Optimization – ensure that value and cost are as per client’s needs.
* In\-Contract Innovation – IT/digital strategy documentation.
* Bookings KPI – the above must result in line of sight bookings metrics and targets, attributable to the efforts and outcomes of the above deliverables.


KNOWLEDGE SKILLS
  
* Expertise (or appreciation) of industry value chain, client pains ambitions, and industry best business and IT practices relevant for their client.
* Sensing market trends – industry business practices and leading\-edge technology practices – sift between hype and real trends that move the needle for their client.
* Be a disciple of the NTT Data Inc portfolio and know how to position its value and differentiators; and work with service divisions on keeping the portfolio competitive.
* Use of frameworks like TOGAF, Zachmann Framework or DoDAF and modelling tools, to define the enterprise architecture that addresses clients pains and realizes their ambitions.
* Conduct workshops with client’s C\-suite and line of business executives, to understand their vexing issues, and investigate approaches for mitigating them.
* Convert client’s business and technology needs and wants into high level architecture; orchestrate specialized domain architects to optimize the total solution for value and cost.
* Value proposition frameworks to highlight the business value and outcome of our offers.
* Deep understanding of commercial concepts to be able to work towards a target cost and price in solutions, and the right model – CapEx, OpEx, PAYG.
* Ability to create world class proposals for the client, with solutions that address the client’s needs and wants, and ability to present the value, differentiation and a compelling case.


QUALIFICATIONS EXPERIENCE
  
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, computer science or any technology discipline.
* Prefer a master’s in business management or executive management programs in business.
* Total experience of 15 years, and 5 years specializing in enterprise architecture.
* Experience in FSI industry \- banking, insurance; and financial services, with exposure to.
* Best practices and business models like BIAN in banking.
* Applications and data analytics \- Core Banking, Payments, AML/Compliance, etc.
* Exposure to IT infrastructure best practices such as SDx, Cloud, DevOps, Agile, ITSM, etc.
* Worked across the sales lifecycle from inception to conclusion.
* account planning
* business development
* opportunity planning
* opportunity execution
* Excellent verbal communication, presentation, facilitation and interpersonal.
* Demonstrated ability to think strategically and solve complex problems.
* Evidence of engaging the C\-suite in clients, strategic partners and internally.
* Experience in orchestrating technical architects to optimize value\-cost of solutions.
* Excellent communication, negotiation, conflict management and interpersonal skills.


**Workplace type:**  

About NTT DATA
  
NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune
  
  

Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through
  
  

responsible innovation. We are one of the world’s leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with
  
  

unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and
  
  

application services. Our consulting and industry solutions help organizations and society move
  
  

confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more
  
  

than 70 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as
  
  

established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each
  
  

year in RD.
  
  

Equal Opportunity Employer
  
NTT DATA is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer with a global culture that embraces diversity. We are committed to providing an environment free of unfair discrimination and harassment. We do not discriminate based on age, race, colour, gender, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, or any other protected category. Join our growing global team and accelerate your career with us. Apply today.
  
  

Third parties fraudulently posing as NTT DATA recruiters
  
  

NTT DATA recruiters will never ask job seekers or candidates for payment or banking information during the recruitment process, for any reason. Please remain vigilant of third parties who may attempt to impersonate NTT DATA recruiters whether in writing or by phone in order to deceptively obtain personal data or money from you. All email communications from an NTT DATA recruiter will come from an nttdata.com email address. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, please contact us.

than 70 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as


established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each


year in R\&D.

 **Equal Opportunity Employer**  

NTT DATA is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer with a global culture that embraces diversity. We are committed to providing an environment free of unfair discrimination and harassment. We do not discriminate based on age, race, colour, gender, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, or any other protected category. Join our growing global team and accelerate your career with us. Apply today.

 **Third parties fraudulently posing as NTT DATA recruiters**


NTT DATA recruiters will never ask job seekers or candidates for payment or banking information during the recruitment process, for any reason. Please remain vigilant of third parties who may attempt to impersonate NTT DATA recruiters whether in writing or by phone in order to deceptively obtain personal data or money from you. All email communications from an NTT DATA recruiter will come from an **@nttdata.com** email address. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, please *contact us*.

39831172.title: Technical Program Manager
39831172.description:
The Role
 

  






 As a high\-impact Program Manager reporting to the CEO, you will be the driving force behind a core engineering initiative. You will coordinate the cross\-functional roadmap, facilitate technical execution, and establish the operational rhythm necessary to ship high\-quality products at an aggressive pace. You will monitor daily project delivery, enforcing strict Kanban hygiene to optimize engineering flow and delivering data\-driven MIS reports to leadership for providing clear visibility into milestones progression and blockers.
 





  
 




**Key Responsibilities:** 



* You will be the Coordinator for Engineering sprints among multi\-disciplinary teams.
* You sit in engineering meetings, understand the technical blockers, and convert engineering data into the final reports.
* You bridge the gap between the CEO’s strategic vision and the engineering team’s daily output.



**What you will do:** 



* Project Technical Documentation: You will compile and prepare technical documents, project \& review reports taking inputs from Design \& Engineering Leads e.g. you chase the Propulsion Lead for graphs and the Structures Lead for CAD screenshots. Then you compile, format and edit the technical report.
* Engineering Logistics: "We need an equipment quote by Friday." You find the vendors, get the specs, and hand the data to the engineers.
* Meeting Cadence: You organize the daily stand\-ups. You take notes on "Action Items" and relentlessly follow up.
* Knowledge Management: Organize the Work Drive/SharePoint. Ensure every CAD file and simulation result is version\-controlled and accessible.




 Note:There will be a probation period for this role.
 




  





 Requirements
 


 Minimum Qualifications:
 



* Education: B.E./B.Tech (Aerospace related preferred).
* Experience: 3\-5 years with minimum 2 years in Technical Program Management.
* Experience in operating in multi\-disciplinary and cross\-functional teams under tight deadlines.
* Must have served as a Team Lead or Coordinator for a technical project e.g. project management experience in industry \- a proven ability to translate engineering data into reports.
* Key certifications: Project Management Professional (PMP), Kanban Management Professional (KMP), or Six Sigma/Lean credentials.




 Preferred Qualifications:
 



* M.Tech is preferred
* Basic literacy in engineering design and a good grasp of AI concepts (you don't need to code, but you need to understand what product designers are saying).
* Technical writing \& Illustration (LaTeX or Advanced Excel / Data Visualization) expertise.
* We value speed and adaptability to coordinate the Design SPRINTs.




 Skills \& Abilities:
 



* Hardware development life cycles: Deep understanding of systems engineering principles, including Technology Readiness Levels (TRLs), gated design reviews (SRR, PDR, CDR), and qualification testing.
* MIS \& metrics: Proficiency in data\-driven reporting using critical path analysis, automated program management tools and basic data visualization.
* Exceptional written communication Skills. You must be able to turn messy engineering data into clean, professional reports (Word/PPT) rapidly.
* Technical Skills: You will need to handle Project Management tools (Jira/Notion/Trello/Zoho Projects/
 

 MS Project, or custom ERP systems
 

 ).
* Traits: "High Agency" with a proven history of solving problems without a play book, confident (can chase senior engineers), detail\-oriented and articulate.




  
 





 Application Requirement: 
 





 1\. Attach a sample of a professional report or technical paper or data visualization you created. We are looking for clarity, structure, and attention to detail. (Do you think a one page complete report could be okay?)
 





 2\. Please attach a clear and concise cover letter telling us why you are a 'fit' for this role, and the value you bring to accomplish the key responsibilities, as also for the four primary job requirements required to be carried out. Do not forget to attach your CV.
 




  





  





 Benefits
 


 Rewards Plus  
 



* Opportunity: To work in the hottest sector of technology today, and to work with cross\-functional teams making emerging\-tech systems. We are building high\-speed autonomous systems.
* Impact: You are joining an iDEX winner team building next\-gen aerospace technologies. As we scale, you will see accelerated growth. The runway is clear for take\-off.
* Startup Vibe: This is a unique Firster’s Team opportunity to join 0\-1 builders and help in building the company’s DNA.




 The Compensation, Health, Wellness \& Professional Development  
 



* Compensation: Competitive Market Salary \+ Performance\-Based Incentive.
* Comprehensive Allowances: Structured House Rent Allowance (HRA) and standard Conveyance Allowance.
* Digital \& Workplace Enablement: Dedicated allowances covering Mobile \& Internet connectivity, and monthly fixed value food coupons.
* Health \& Wellness: Fixed Medical Allowance integrated into monthly compensation to support ongoing medical and wellness needs.
* Continuous Growth: Direct reimbursement for Professional Development and technical certifications, as specified/applicable to the role.
* Dynamic Work Culture in NCR: A collaborative, 'builder\-first' environment in NCR (Gurgaon), which values institutional discipline alongside rapid startup innovation.
* Field \& Travel Support: On deployment for travel on project work(if applicable).



  





  





 About Company
 

**Aeroshul Technologies Pvt. Ltd.** 
 stands at the forefront of developing cutting\-edge technologies. The company has set itself on the path of becoming an end\-to\-end technology solution provider with primary focus on autonomous systems and intelligent solutions. With a firm commitment to innovation, efficiency, and customer satisfaction, Aeroshul is emerging as a beacon of technological excellence.
 



 We rely on top class professionalism and knowledge to develop customised solutions for end users. Our team of experts have extensive experience in the industry, both from user and technology perspectives.
 



  





**Vision** 




 To be a leading technology company with a global footprint for innovation, design and creation of intelligent systems.
 



  





**Mission** 




 To use cutting edge technologies and human innovation to solve challenges facing our customers, thereby delivering product solutions of the highest quality to meet their needs.
 



  





**Values** 




  




* Commitment
* Customer Focus
* Innovation
* Quality



  





**Corporate office :** 
 Unit No. 3,Ground Floor, AeroShul Tech, Bestech Business Tower, Sohna \- Gurgaon Rd, Sector 48, Gurugram, Haryana 122018
 



**Registered Address:** 

 4001, Block\-A, Devinder Vihar, Sector 56, Gurugram, Gurugram, Haryana, 122011, GURGAON, Haryana, India

b16afdd6.title: Technical Program Manager, AI
b16afdd6.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Hyderabad, Telangana, India; Bengaluru, Karnataka, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* 5 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience managing the unique complexities and fast\-paced lifecycle of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) software development projects.
* Experience in helping teams measure and improve operational excellence, product excellence, and accessibility.
* Expertise in leading Agile transformations, with a track record of coaching and upskilling less mature engineering teams in Agile delivery and ceremonies.


**About the job** 
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers. The Core team builds the technical foundation behind Google’s flagship products. We are owners and advocates for the underlying design elements, developer platforms, product components, and infrastructure at Google. These are the essential building blocks for excellent, safe, and coherent experiences for our users and drive the pace of innovation for every developer. We look across Google’s products to build central solutions, break down technical barriers and strengthen existing systems. As the Core team, we have a mandate and a unique opportunity to impact important technical decisions across the company.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own and drive the planning and execution of complex, cross\-functional engineering efforts within a specific domain or product area.
* Lead programs using Agile methodologies. Demonstrate a strong understanding of Agile ceremonies and help software teams adopt and mature their Agile practices to improve efficiency.
* Implement governance structures for prioritization and execution within your assigned area to ensure alignment with key success metrics.
* Build and maintain effective relationships with technical and non\-technical stakeholders across teams to ensure project alignment and buy\-in.
* Use sound judgment to drive project planning, scheduling, execution, and communication, building consensus among team members and partners.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

f2d5f009.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Amazon Global Logistics
f2d5f009.description:
**Description**
 As a Senior Technical Program Manager for Amazon Global Logistics (AGL), you'll lead complex cross\-organizational initiatives that revolutionize e\-commerce through innovative global logistics solutions. You'll drive programs that help break down barriers for selling partners, enabling them to reach hundreds of millions of customers worldwide through our highly\-available, scalable distributed systems.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Lead and manage complex technical programs across multiple engineering teams and stakeholders
* Design and implement sustainable processes for cross\-functional program management
* Drive development of software solutions that optimize global fulfillment and cross\-border selling
* Establish and track key performance indicators (KPIs) and service level agreements (SLAs)
* Manage program scope, schedule, budget, quality, risk, and critical path elements
* Coordinate release schedules and ensure successful delivery of technical solutions
* Partner with engineering teams to build scalable, distributed systems
* Present progress and metrics to senior leadership


 A day in the life
   

  

 Your day might start with a strategic planning session with engineering teams, followed by coordination meetings with cross\-functional stakeholders. You'll spend time analyzing program metrics, identifying potential risks, and developing mitigation strategies. You'll collaborate with global teams to remove friction points in our fulfillment processes and work on innovative solutions to enhance the selling partner experience. Your role will involve both tactical execution and strategic planning to drive AGL's mission forward.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The Amazon Global Logistics team is committed to creating the world's most efficient global logistics solutions. We offer comprehensive benefits including medical, dental, and vision coverage, parental leave options, paid time off, and a 401(k) plan. Our inclusive culture values diverse perspectives and encourages innovation. We're building systems that make global commerce accessible to everyone, and we need passionate individuals to help us achieve this mission.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- Amazon Dev Center India \- Hyderabad
   

  

 Job ID: A10479378

57d16d26.title: Technical Program Manager, Geo Intel and Escalations
57d16d26.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Bengaluru, Karnataka, India; Hyderabad, Telangana, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience in program management.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* 2 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience in analysis, SQL, incident management and vendor management.
* Experience in an abuse fighting or security domain and incident or crisis management protocol and ability to operate under pressure during a crisis.
* Experience in computer security industry such as detection research, malware analysis, threat intelligence, cyber incident response, or Penetration Testing/Red Team and Open Source Intelligence Gathering OSINT) based investigations.
* Experience with Geo data management.


**About The Job**
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 The Geo team is focused on building the most accurate, comprehensive, and useful maps for our users, through products like Maps, Earth, Street View, Google Maps Platform, and more. Every month, more than a billion people rely on Maps services to explore the world and navigate their daily lives.
   

  

 The Geo team also enables developers to use the power of Google Maps platforms to enhance their apps and websites. As they plot a course for the future of mapping, they are solving complex computer science problems, designing beautiful and intuitive product experiences, and improving our understanding of the real world.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Drive forensic root cause analysis of abuse attacks and design processes to optimize the impact of incident investigations.
* Produce reports and communications to enable partner teams to develop mitigation plans.
* Drive risk mitigation programs for significant events (elections, social unrest etc).
* Partner with engineering teams to develop subject matter expertise about system vulnerabilities.
* Act as an Incident Manager to contain abuse attacks/unplanned events.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law.
