0690071a.title: People Analytics Program Manager
0690071a.description:
Join our dynamic team as an IT Product Management Senior Professional and be the bridge between vision and execution in our innovative product development landscape!
   

  

**What will you do:**
* Program Leadership \& Governance
+ Own the end\-to\-end delivery of People Analytics programs, ensuring alignment with business strategy and global priorities.
+ Define program objectives, success metrics, and governance frameworks for analytics initiatives.
+ Oversee portfolio planning, prioritization, and resource allocation across multiple projects.


**Team Management \& Collaboration**
* Lead and mentor a cross\-functional team of analysts, data engineers, and program coordinators.
* Foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous improvement within the People Analytics team.
* Act as a bridge between HR, Digital, and business stakeholders to ensure seamless execution.


**Analytics \& Technology Enablement**
* Drive adoption of advanced analytics, AI, and machine learning capabilities within People Analytics solutions.
* Ensure platforms and tools (e.g., Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, Oracle) are optimized for scalability and performance.
* Champion data quality, security, and compliance standards across all analytics initiatives.


**Strategic Thinking \& Innovation**
* Translate business needs into actionable analytics strategies and technology roadmaps.
* Identify emerging trends in AI, predictive analytics, and workforce insights to shape future capabilities.
* Influence senior leadership on data\-driven decision\-making and workforce planning strategies.


**What will make you successful:**
* Proven track record in IT product management and service delivery optimization
* Strong understanding of agile methodologies and ability to maximize value through best practices
* Excellence in stakeholder management and cross\-functional collaboration
* Deep knowledge of IT service portfolio management and cost allocation strategies
* Outstanding analytical and documentation skills with attention to detail


**What's in it for you:**
* Opportunity to shape product strategy and drive technological innovation
* Dynamic environment fostering professional growth and leadership development
* Exposure to cutting\-edge technologies and diverse stakeholder interactions
* Autonomy in driving service improvements across people, processes, and technology
* Platform to influence product direction and customer satisfaction outcomes
* Master’s degree in relevant field (Data Science, Analytics, Information Systems, computer science).
* 8\+ years of experience in analytics, technology, or program management roles within large, complex organizations.
* Proven track record of leading multi\-team programs and delivering strategic outcomes.


 Rewards designed for you
   

  

 Our Total Rewards is our way of saying: We see you and we value you. It’s more than just pay and benefits—it’s a meaningful investment in you. It is designed to help you perform, grow, feel safe, and elevate your potential. The package helps you care for yourself and your family, plan your future, grow your skills and career, collaborate in an inclusive workplace, and contribute to your community. At Schneider Electric, we’re here for what matters most to you. Discover more at our Career Page.
   

  

* Country\-specific programs and initiatives may be available.


**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €40 billion global revenue
   

  

 \+9% organic growth
   

  

 150 000\+ employees in 100\+ countries
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

f3409684.title: Program Manager
f3409684.description:
**Company Description** 




 Launched in 2007 by Aloke Bajpai \& Rajnish Kumar, ixigo (Le Travenues Technology Limited) is a technology company focused on empowering Indian travellers to plan, book and manage their trips across rail, air, buses and hotels. ixigo assists travellers in making smarter travel decisions by leveraging artificial intelligence.
 



 The ixigo, ConfirmTkt and AbhiBus apps allow travellers to book train tickets, flight tickets, bus tickets, hotels, and cabs, and provide travel utility tools and services developed using in\-house proprietary algorithms and crowd\-sourced information. With over 54 crore Annual Active Users in Fiscal 2025, ixigo is the leading OTA for Next Billion Users in India. For more information, please visit http://www.ixigo.com
 



  





**Job Description** 



* Take ownership through every stage of the agile software development lifecycle
* Facilitates all the Scrum ceremonies
* Fetching reports from JIRA \& maintaining sprint metrics
* To forecast and publish the plan for all the major projects running
* Develop a detailed project plan to monitor and track progress, manage changes to the project scope \& project schedule using appropriate verification techniques
* Keeping close track of all the deliveries
* Coach the team members around Scrum \& Agile whenever needed
* Assist the Product team in maintaining the roadmaps \& Backlogs
* Collaborates with other Technical Program Managers (TPM) to coordinate cross\-team dependencies and other teams within the organization
* Provide visibility into gaps, issues, risks, and opportunities across Agile teams
* Contributing ideas to product development initiatives
* Collaborating with system engineers and software architects
* Reporting product development progress to Senior Leadership
* Overseeing product deployment and integration.
* Evaluating product performance metrics and facilitating adjustments.
* Documenting processes and ensuring compliance with industry standards.
* Keeping up with advancements in product technologies
* Maintaining the open communication environment



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in computer sciences, software engineering, technology management, business management, or similar.
* Total 5\+ Years of experience in technical program management, in software product industry
* Expertise in Agile methodology
* Experience of Program/Project Management and/or Scrum Master experience in a high\-tech company, preferably in a B2C e\-commerce environment
* A demonstrated experience driving agile software development with engineering, quality assurance, and functional teams
* Proficiency in JIRA
* Scrum Certifications are a plus
* Demonstrate understanding of functional and technical information (e.g. user flows, technical system design, and workflows)
* Very good written and verbal communication skills



  





**Additional Information** 




 Responsible for safeguarding sensitive company data against unauthorized access, use, or disclosure, and for reporting any suspected security incidents in line with the organization's ISMS (Information Security Management System) policies and procedures.

b138ec23.title: Presales Lead
b138ec23.description:
**Presales Lead — Data Platform Modernization (Cloud / On\-Prem)** 




**Company:** 
 Smart Analytica \|
 **Location:** 
 Pune, India \|
 **Experience:** 
 10\+ years \|
 **Type:** 
 Full\-time
 



  





**About Us** 




 Smart Analytica is a Data and AI company with 100\+ PB of data engineered in production, 250\+ engineers, and partnerships across Microsoft, AWS, Google Cloud, Databricks, and Snowflake. Our Migration Suite accelerators (ProbeX, KodeX, ReconX, SynthX) power modernization pursuits across India, the US, and the Middle East.
 



  





**The Role** 




 Own presales for our Data Platform Modernization portfolio — Modern Data Platform, Cloud Modernization, and Cloudera Big Data services. You'll shape deals from discovery to proposal defense, converting legacy estates (Teradata, Netezza, CDH/HDP, Informatica, etc.) into winnable modernization roadmaps on Cloudera CDP, Databricks, and hyperscaler\-native stacks.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end presales: discovery, solution architecture, estimation, RFP/RFI responses, and proposal defense.
* Design target\-state lakehouse architectures and apply the 6 R's framework to map workloads to modernization patterns.
* Scope and price engagements — readiness audits, migration pilots, and cohorts — with TCO/ROI business cases.
* Demo our accelerators and co\-sell with Cloudera, Databricks, and hyperscaler partner teams.
* Build reusable presales assets (reference architectures, estimation models, case studies) and mentor solution engineers.



  





**Must\-Haves** 



* 10\+ years in data platform delivery/architecture, with 5\+ years in presales or solution consulting for data/cloud services.
* Track record of winning large modernization or migration deals ($1M\+ TCV / PB\-scale).
* Deep expertise in at least two of: Cloudera/Hadoop ecosystem (CDH/HDP → CDP), legacy DWs (Teradata, Netezza, Oracle), or cloud Lakehouse targets (Databricks, Fabric, BigQuery, Snowflake).
* Strong estimation, proposal writing, and CxO\-level storytelling skills; willingness to travel.



  





**Good\-to\-Haves** 




 Cloudera / Databricks / hyperscaler certifications; experience in regulated industries (BFSI, capital markets, telecom); FinOps exposure; familiarity with AI\-readiness themes (semantic layers, RAG on governed data).
 



*Apply at smart\-analytica.com/careers or write to info@smart\-analytica.com.*

2dd7d1cb.title: Senior - Presales
2dd7d1cb.description:
**About The Role**
 We are looking for an experienced
 **Lead – Presales** 
 to partner with our Sales organization in driving strategic customer engagements and accelerating revenue growth.
   

  

 This is a highly customer\-facing role requiring strong business acumen, solution consulting expertise, and the ability to translate complex customer requirements into scalable SaaS solutions. You'll own the technical sales cycle for enterprise opportunities, influence solution strategy, and work closely with Product, Engineering, Delivery, and Customer Success teams to deliver business value.
   

  

 The ideal candidate has a strong SaaS presales background, excels at engaging CXOs and business stakeholders, and thrives in a fast\-paced, high\-growth environment.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities****
* Lead discovery sessions to understand customer business objectives, challenges, and technical requirements.
* Own the solutioning process for enterprise and mid\-market opportunities, mapping LeadSquared capabilities to customer use cases.
* Deliver compelling product demonstrations, executive presentations, workshops, and solution walkthroughs tailored to different stakeholders.
* Design scalable solution architectures, workflows, integrations, and implementation approaches aligned with customer requirements.
* Create high\-quality solution proposals, technical documentation, RFP/RFI responses, and commercial support documents.
* Build proof\-of\-concepts (POCs), customized demos, and integration approaches that strengthen the sales process and improve win rates.
* Partner closely with Sales throughout the deal lifecycle, from qualification to negotiation and closure.
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Delivery, and Customer Success teams to resolve technical challenges and ensure successful customer outcomes.
* Stay current on market trends, competitive offerings, and emerging technologies to strengthen positioning and solution strategy.
* Act as a trusted advisor to customers by providing consultative recommendations rather than product\-centric pitches.
* Drive continuous improvements in presales processes, reusable assets, demo environments, and knowledge sharing across the team.
* Mentor junior presales consultants and contribute to capability building within the organization.


**What We're Looking For** 
****Required****
* 3\-6 years of experience in SaaS Presales, Solution Consulting, Sales Engineering, or Solution Architecture .
* Strong experience supporting enterprise or mid\-market B2B SaaS sales.
* Demonstrated ability to lead customer discovery, solution design, technical presentations, and product demonstrations.
* Experience responding to RFPs, RFIs, solution proposals, and enterprise procurement processes.
* Strong understanding of APIs, integrations, CRM/MarTech ecosystems, and cloud\-based SaaS architectures.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills with the ability to engage technical teams as well as CXO\-level business leaders.
* Strong analytical thinking and structured problem\-solving abilities.
* Proven ability to manage multiple opportunities simultaneously in a fast\-paced environment.


****Preferred****
* Engineering degree (Computer Science or related discipline preferred).
* Experience with CRM, Sales Automation, Marketing Automation, or Customer Engagement platforms.
* Familiarity with AI/ML, automation, conversational AI, or workflow technologies.
* Hands\-on experience with APIs, SQL, scripting, or low\-code/no\-code platforms is an advantage.
* Prior experience in high\-growth SaaS organizations.


****What You'll Bring****
* A consultative mindset with a strong customer\-first approach.
* Ability to simplify complex technical concepts into business value.
* Strong commercial awareness and solution\-selling capabilities.
* Ownership, curiosity, and a bias for action.
* Passion for solving customer problems and enabling revenue growth.


****Why LeadSquared?****
* Work with one of India's fastest\-growing enterprise SaaS companies.
* Solve complex business challenges for customers across multiple industries and global markets.
* Partner with high\-performing Sales, Product, and Engineering teams.
* Influence product direction through customer insights and market feedback.
* Be part of a culture that values ownership, innovation, and continuous learning.

00e1e102.title: Architect - AI Business Solutions
00e1e102.description:
**Overview**
 Microsoft Industry Solutions Delivery (ISD) is a global organization hosting over 6,000 strategic sellers, industry and security experts, elite engineers, world\-class data scientists and architects, consultants, and delivery specialists. Together with our partners, we help Microsoft’s most strategic customers worldwide to address their specific challenges and provide comprehensive and industry\-specific solutions that meet their unique needs. ISD is at the forefront of innovation, driving value across the entirety of the customers’ digital and AI transformation journey through repeatable and customized cutting\-edge solutions through strategic engagements with customers across the globe powered by Microsoft Cloud and AI.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Pre\-Sales Support
   

  

 Collaborates with internal stakeholders (e.g., Solution Architect, Pursuit Lead, Consulting Account Executive) in the pre\-sale process by understanding business requirements and providing industry and technical input and/or solution offerings to help shape the deal. Supports drafting proposals and/or statement of work (SOW).
   

  

 Provides input on staffing and skill requirements for delivery to Resource Deployment, Technical Delivery Managers (TDMs), and/or Project Managers. 
   

  

 Technical Delivery
   

  

 Follows the capacity process outlined by Resource, Insights, Capacity, and Capability (RICC) team. Maintains tools with up\-to\-date skills and availability.
   

  

 Leads meetings with customers/partners to understand business needs. Uses business, industry, and technology strategies to map customer/partner requirements to the adoption and optimization of Microsoft technology solutions. Engages others appropriately to understand and define customer requirements.
   

  

 Participates in project planning and develops project documents by identifying the risks and dependencies. Communicates the business value of planned solutions to customers/ partners. Identifies technical and business risks in programs and proposes mitigations. Assists project managers/architects in preparing for steering committee (e.g., developing artifacts). Manages their schedule and communicates with project leads. Generates and delivers Work Breakdown Structure (WBS).
   

  

 Implements solutions and provides oversight and leadership on workstreams across domains while adhering to Industry Solutions processes. Aligns solutions with the intent of the architecture. Manages escalations, analyzes situations, and coordinates appropriate resources to resolve issues by following delivery practices, considering cost implications, and engaging in conversations with internal and external stakeholders (e.g., Customer Service and Support, Project Manager, Solution Architect, Product Group) as needed. 
   

  

 Proactively manages executive\-level customer/partner/stakeholder relationships to identify and contribute to the drivers of satisfaction and dissatisfaction, determine the root cause, and establish recovery actions to improve the experience. Works with account team to ensure One Microsoft approach. Shares lessons learned with workgroup and consultant community.
   

  

 Intellectual Property Management
   

  

 Acts as an ambassador in the consumption of intellectual property (IP) by leveraging and/or modifying existing IP or creating repeatable content where applicable. Provides feedback on Managed IP for continuous improvement, reports IP gaps, reviews IP to be considered for harvesting and curation and ensures it is logged for consumption. Improves Industry Solutions offerings quality and collaborates with portfolio and solution teams by providing feedback.
   

  

 Business Development
   

  

 Identifies opportunities to expand or accelerate the adoption and consumption of cloud and Microsoft technologies. Facilitates, as appropriate, other team members to scale the business with existing customers by articulating value propositions of strategic Microsoft products and services and developing new offerings for the domain. Drives innovation and digital transformation. Ensures the use of the existing intellectual property (IP).
   

  

 Readiness
   

  

 Learns new technologies or services based on business demands and industry trends. Obtains relevant accreditations and certification(s) as advised by domain leadership team. Identifies certifications and readiness plans in partnership with World Wide Learning. Leads or participates in relevant technical communities and conducts training sessions to evangelize technology and/or offerings based on availability. Mentors team members and acts as a technical advisor for stakeholders by providing thought leadership, articulation of solutions value, and outcomes of business strategies.
   

  

 Operational Excellence
   

  

 Completes operational tasks and readiness and ensures timeliness and accuracy. Follows Microsoft policies, compliance, and procedures (e.g., Enterprise Services Authorization Policy, Standards of Business Conduct, labor logging, expenses, travel guidelines). Leads by example and guides team members on operational tasks, readiness, and compliance. 
   

  

**Other**
 Embody our culture and values
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Required/Minimum Qualifications
   

  

 Bachelor's degree in computer science, Engineering, Finance, Business, or related field AND 3\+ years leadership experience in relevant area of business
   

  

 OR equivalent experience.
   

  

**Additional Or Preferred Qualifications**
 5\+ years leadership experience in relevant area of business.
   

  

 Technical certifications based on domain/service line (e.g., Azure, Security, Dynamics).
   

  

 Delivery Management certification (e.g., Scrum, Agile, Change Management, Project Management).
   

  

 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

56a95e8c.title: Solutions Engineer
56a95e8c.description:
**Own Every Moment at NetApp**
 At NetApp, your ideas power innovation. We lead in intelligent data infrastructure—delivering unified storage, integrated data services, and solutions that help organizations unlock the full potential of their data, from AI to multicloud.
   

  

 Ready to innovate and contribute to our path to $10B? Here, you'll collaborate with passionate teams, tackle real\-world challenges, and see your impact in how customers transform and grow. If you're ready to bring curiosity, creativity, and drive to every moment, NetApp is where your journey begins. Join teams that drive results, innovate to elevate, and excel together across every function.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 As an Solutions Engineer in NetApp’s Sales function, you will utilize strong customer handling and technical competencies to set objectives and execute plans for winning sales campaigns. This challenging and high\-visibility position provides a huge opportunity to grow in your career and cover the largest account base in the region. You develop long\-term strategies and shorter\-term plans to meet aggressive performance goals with the channel partners and internal stakeholders, including the Client Executive and the District Manager. You must be extremely results driven, customer focused, tech savvy, and skilled at building internal relationships and external partnerships.
   

  

**Essential Functions**
* Provide technical oversights to channel partners and customers within the territory to drive all pertinent issues sales campaigns and goal attainment.
* Work towards meeting target along with the client executive for the territory by devising short terms goals and long term strategies in the assigned accounts.
* Evangelise NetApp’s proposition in the assigned territory.
* Drive technical closures for any sales campaign positioning NetApp as the most viable solution for prospective customers.


 Job Requirements
   

  

* Excellent verbal and written communications skills, including presentation skills.
* Proven experience in presales, designing and proposing technical solutions.
* Excellent presentation, relationship building and negotiating skills.
* Ability to work collaboratively with functional peers across functions including Marketing, Sales, Sales Operations, Customer Support, and Product Development.
* Strong understanding of Data storage, Data Protection, Disaster recovery and competitive offerings in the marketplace. Understanding of Cloud technologies is highly desirable.
* Ability to convey and analyze information clearly as needed to help customer make buying decisions.
* An excellent understanding how technology products and solutions solve business problems.
* The ability to hold key technical decision maker and CXO relationships within major accounts in the territory assigned.


 Education
   

  

* At least 5 years of experience in infrastructure solutioning/hybrid cloud architecture.
* A Bachelor of Sciences Degree in Engineering, Computer Science; or related field is preferred; a Graduate Degree is mandatory.


 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in\-office and/or in\-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**
 NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.
   

  

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**
 At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.
   

  

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise\-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.
   

  

 If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment \- make your next move your best one. Apply now.
   

  

**Submitting an Application**
 To ensure a streamlined and fair hiring process for all candidates, our team only reviews applications submitted through our company website. This practice allows us to track, assess, and respond to applicants efficiently. Emailing our employees, recruiters, or Human Resources personnel directly will not influence your application.
   

  

**AI Disclosure**
 For select roles, some stages of our hiring process may use artificial intelligence tools to help evaluate applications and candidate selection. These tools support—rather than replace—human decision\-making.

6acaa096.title: Lead - Presales
6acaa096.description:
**About Leadsquared**
 LeadSquared is one of the fastest\-growing SaaS companies in the CRM space — trusted by 2,000\+ customers and 2\.5 lakh\+ users globally. We help organizations automate sales and marketing to run high\-velocity revenue operations at scale. With a strong presence across the US, Middle East, ASEAN, ANZ, and South Africa, LeadSquared is expanding its US vertical teams to drive growth in Healthcare and Education — two of our strongest market segments.
   

  

**About The Role**
 LeadSquared is expanding its US Healthcare vertical and is looking for a senior PreSales Consultant with deep expertise in the Healthcare sector to drive enterprise deal pursuits across Hospitals \& Health Systems, Payers/Health Plans, Digital Health platforms, and Post\-Acute/Home Health organizations. You will serve as the technical and solutions authority in the sales process — owning discovery, demo design, RFP responses, and proof\-of\-concept development — while acting as a trusted advisor to prospects and a strategic partner to the US Sales team.
   

  

***🏥 This is not a generic SE role. We need someone who speaks Healthcare — who understands patient acquisition funnels, care coordination, and how health systems and payers buy technology.***
**Solution Engineering Product Demonstrations RFP/RFI Response CRM HealthTech Patient Engagement POC Development**
**Key Responsibilities**
***Solution Design \& Demonstrations***
* Lead tailored product demonstrations of LeadSquared's CRM and Patient Engagement/Lifecycle Management platform for Hospitals, Health Systems, Payers, and Digital Health prospects.
* Design and deliver discovery\-led demos that address specific institutional pain points — patient acquisition, referral management, care coordination, and patient retention.
* Develop and present end\-to\-end solution blueprints aligned to each prospect's clinical, administrative, and technology workflows.
* Build and deliver proof\-of\-concepts (POCs) for complex or competitive enterprise evaluations.
* Showcase integration capabilities with EHR/EMR platforms (Epic, Cerner/Oracle Health, MEDITECH, athenahealth), care management systems, and other healthcare ecosystem technologies.


***RFP Leadership \& Proposal Excellence***
* Own RFI/RFP responses for US Healthcare prospects, including functional requirements, solution architecture, and integration approach.
* Create compelling solution documents, executive summaries, and business case narratives tailored to CIO, VP Patient Access, and Chief Medical/Marketing Officer\-level audiences.
* Develop effort estimation, implementation roadmap, and TCO analysis for enterprise Healthcare deployments.
* Maintain and improve a library of standard RFP responses, demo scripts, and proposal templates for the US Healthcare team.


***Healthcare Domain Authority***
* Serve as LeadSquared's internal subject\-matter expert on US Healthcare: patient acquisition, care coordination, referral management, and patient engagement workflows.
* Maintain competitive intelligence across Healthcare CRM and engagement platforms (Salesforce Health Cloud, Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare, Healthgrades, symplr) and develop battle cards.
* Stay current on HIPAA compliance, interoperability standards (HL7/FHIR), and healthcare data privacy requirements.
* Represent LeadSquared at US Healthcare conferences, events, and industry forums to build brand presence and generate pipeline.


***Stakeholder Engagement \& Cross\-Functional Collaboration***
* Engage VP Patient Access, CIOs, CMOs, Marketing Directors, and Care Coordination leaders as a trusted advisor, not just a vendor.
* Partner with the US Sales team, Marketing, and Customer Success to build winning deal strategies and seamless customer handoffs.
* Provide structured feedback to Product and Engineering on US Healthcare market requirements and competitive gaps.
* Mentor and support junior PreSales resources as the Healthcare vertical scales.


**What We're Looking For**
***Experience \& Education***
* 7–12 years of experience in PreSales, Solution Engineering, or Sales Consulting, with significant tenure supporting US Healthcare accounts.
* Deep understanding of US Healthcare institutional buying processes — hospitals, health systems, payers, or digital health — including IT governance and technology procurement.
* Prior hands\-on experience with Healthcare CRM, EHR/EMR, or Patient Engagement platforms is strongly preferred.
* Bachelor's degree required; advanced degree or prior experience working inside a US healthcare organization is a strong plus.
* Excellent English communication skills — written, verbal, and presentation — with proven ability to engage C\-suite and VP\-level healthcare leaders.


**Technical \& Domain Skills**
* Strong understanding of patient acquisition, care coordination, referral management, and patient engagement workflows.
* Familiarity with US Healthcare technology ecosystem: EHR/EMR platforms (Epic, Cerner/Oracle Health, MEDITECH, athenahealth, eClinicalWorks), care management tools, and communication/patient engagement platforms.
* Knowledge of HIPAA, HL7/FHIR interoperability standards, and compliance requirements for US Healthcare technology.
* Proficiency in solution architecture, integration design, and API\-based connectivity for enterprise Healthcare environments.
* Experience with competitive platforms: Salesforce Health Cloud, Microsoft Cloud for Healthcare, symplr, Healthgrades, or similar.


***Good to Have***
* Experience presenting at HIMSS, ViVE, or similar US Healthcare conferences.
* Familiarity with value\-based care models, payer\-provider integrations, and population health platforms.
* Experience with data analytics and reporting for patient outcome tracking.

f3d7aa9a.title: Microsoft AI Pre-Sales Engineer
f3d7aa9a.description:
**Job Description – Microsoft AI Pre\-Sales Engineer**
**Location:** 
 Gurgaon
   

  

**Experience:** 
 3–5 Years
   

  

**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-Time
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a
 **Microsoft AI Pre\-Sales Engineer** 
 who can engage with enterprise customers, understand their AI and business requirements, and propose Microsoft AI\-powered solutions. The candidate should have strong technical knowledge of Microsoft AI technologies and experience in solution consulting.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Engage with customers to understand AI and business transformation requirements.
* Design AI\-based solutions using Microsoft technologies.
* Conduct product demonstrations, workshops, and Proof of Concepts (PoCs).
* Prepare technical proposals, solution architecture, and RFP responses.
* Collaborate with Microsoft teams and internal delivery teams.
* Support the sales team during customer discussions and technical evaluations.
* Stay updated with Microsoft AI, Azure AI, and Generative AI offerings.


**Required Skills**
* Microsoft Azure AI Services
* Azure OpenAI Service
* Azure Machine Learning
* Microsoft Copilot
* Microsoft Fabric (preferred)
* Azure Cognitive Services
* Azure Bot Services
* Microsoft Power Platform AI
* Prompt Engineering
* Generative AI
* Large Language Models (LLMs)
* Solution Architecture
* Azure Cloud


**Preferred Certifications**
* Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals (AI\-900\)
* Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate (AI\-102\)
* Azure Fundamentals (AZ\-900\)
* Azure Solutions Architect (AZ\-305\) (Preferred)


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, AI, or a related field.
* 3–5 years of experience in AI/Cloud Pre\-Sales or Solution Consulting.
* Strong understanding of Azure AI, Generative AI, and Microsoft AI ecosystem.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.

a68cd31f.title: Presales Solutions Architect - AI
a68cd31f.description:
We are looking for a
 **Pre\-Sales Solution Consultant – AI/GenAI/Agentic AI** 
 who can bridge business requirements with AI\-driven technology solutions. The role involves customer engagement, solution consulting, AI solution positioning, proposal development, and executive presentations. Strong Microsoft PowerPoint storytelling, communication, and stakeholder management skills are essential.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Engage with customers to understand business challenges and AI transformation opportunities.
* Lead customer calls, workshops, demonstrations, and discovery sessions.
* Lead RFP/RFI responses, proposals, solution documentation, and executive presentations.
* Collaborate with Sales, Solution Architects, and Engineering teams to design customer\-focused AI solutions.
* Identify and position GenAI and Agentic AI use cases aligned with business needs.
* Create compelling Microsoft PowerPoint presentations that clearly communicate business value and AI solutions.
* Support AI demos, accelerators, and proof of concepts.



**Required Skills** 



* Strong understanding of Generative AI, LLMs, Agentic AI, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Data Engineering, Analytics, and Cloud AI ecosystems
* Knowledge of Python, SQL, APIs, and cloud technologies
* Excellent customer engagement, communication, proposal writing, and Microsoft PowerPoint storytelling skills



**Preferred Background (Mandatory)** 



* Experience with a Big 4 or MBB consulting firm
* Experience in AI Consulting, Solution Consulting, Technical Pre\-Sales, or Customer Engineering
* Proven experience leading customer presentations, RFP/RFI responses, and executive stakeholder engagement
* Ability to bridge business requirements with AI solutions
* Near\-native English fluency
* Strong executive presentation and Microsoft PowerPoint storytelling skills

6ece4be1.title: Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer
6ece4be1.description:
Job Summary

We are looking for an experienced **Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC) Developer/Consultant** to design, develop, and implement enterprise\-scale digital marketing solutions. The ideal candidate should have hands\-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud modules, campaign automation, customer journey orchestration, personalization, integrations, and data management. The role requires close collaboration with business stakeholders, marketing teams, and Salesforce technical teams to deliver scalable and high\-performing marketing automation solutions.

Key Responsibilities

* Design, develop, and implement Salesforce Marketing Cloud solutions.
* Configure and manage Email Studio, Journey Builder, Automation Studio, Contact Builder, and Content Builder.
* Build personalized customer journeys using Journey Builder.
* Develop dynamic emails and landing pages using AMPscript, SSJS, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
* Create reusable email templates and content blocks.
* Develop SQL queries for audience segmentation and data extraction.
* Configure Data Extensions, Lists, Filters, and Subscriber Management.
* Build automated workflows using Automation Studio.
* Integrate Marketing Cloud with Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, CRM systems, REST/SOAP APIs, and third\-party platforms.
* Implement triggered emails, transactional messaging, and API\-based communications.
* Perform data imports, exports, and synchronization activities.
* Monitor campaign performance and optimize deliverability.
* Troubleshoot campaign issues and optimize automation processes.
* Ensure compliance with email marketing best practices, GDPR, CAN\-SPAM, and data privacy standards.
* Collaborate with business users to gather requirements and deliver scalable marketing solutions.

Required Skills

* Salesforce Marketing Cloud
* Email Studio
* Journey Builder
* Automation Studio
* Contact Builder
* Content Builder
* Mobile Studio
* AMPscript
* Server\-Side JavaScript (SSJS)
* SQL
* HTML5
* CSS3
* JavaScript
* REST API
* SOAP API
* Marketing Cloud Connect
* Data Extensions
* Subscriber Management
* Triggered Sends
* CloudPages
* Marketing Automation
* Salesforce CRM Integration
* Git (preferred)

Preferred Qualifications

* 6\+ years of Salesforce Marketing Cloud experience.
* Experience integrating Salesforce Marketing Cloud with Sales Cloud and Service Cloud.
* Strong knowledge of customer segmentation, campaign management, and marketing automation.
* Experience with Salesforce Data Cloud is an advantage.
* Understanding of email deliverability and customer lifecycle marketing.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.

Certifications (Preferred)

* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Email Specialist
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Developer
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Consultant
* Salesforce AI Associate (optional)

Good\-to\-Have Skills

* Salesforce Data Cloud
* Marketing Cloud Intelligence (Datorama)
* Marketing Cloud Personalization
* Google Analytics
* CRM Analytics
* Salesforce Agentforce
* CI/CD for Salesforce deployments

Soft Skills

* Excellent communication skills
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities
* Ability to work with cross\-functional teams
* Client\-facing consulting experience
* Self\-driven and proactive approach
* Strong documentation skills

Pay: ₹100,000\.00 \- ₹120,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Work from home

Experience:

* Overall: 8 years (Preferred)
* Marketing cloud: 6 years (Preferred)

Work Location: Remote

4f46ee6e.title: Solution Architect
4f46ee6e.description:
𝗧𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗿𝗼𝗹𝗲 𝗶𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗪𝗲𝗲𝗸𝗱𝗮𝘆'𝘀 𝗰𝗹𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀
   

  

 𝗦𝗮𝗹𝗮𝗿𝘆 𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗲: 𝗥𝘀 𝟭𝟬𝟬𝟬𝟬𝟬𝟬 \- 𝗥𝘀 𝟭𝟲𝟬𝟬𝟬𝟬𝟬 (𝗶𝗲 𝗜𝗡𝗥 𝟭𝟬\-𝟭𝟲 𝗟𝗣𝗔)
   

  

 Experience: 5\+ yrs
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru
   

  

 Job Type: Full\-time
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced
 **Solution Architect** 
 with strong expertise in implementing enterprise privacy and data governance platforms. This role is ideal for professionals who have hands\-on experience deploying privacy solutions, integrating enterprise applications, and delivering secure, scalable implementations across complex business environments.
   

  

 As a Solution Architect, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and optimizing privacy platform solutions while collaborating with business stakeholders, security teams, legal teams, and IT leadership. You will play a key role in translating business and regulatory requirements into technical solutions, ensuring successful project delivery through strong technical expertise, stakeholder engagement, and end\-to\-end implementation ownership.
   

  

**Requirements**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, implement, and support enterprise privacy platform solutions across data discovery, consent management, breach management, and related modules
* Configure, customize, and integrate privacy platforms with enterprise applications using APIs, CURL calls, databases, and related integration technologies
* Gather business and technical requirements and translate them into scalable solution architectures
* Collaborate with security, legal, compliance, and IT teams to deliver privacy solutions aligned with organizational and regulatory requirements
* Conduct solution design workshops, client demonstrations, knowledge transfer sessions, and user training programs
* Support User Acceptance Testing (UAT), deployment planning, production rollouts, and post\-implementation activities
* Troubleshoot technical issues, optimize platform performance, and resolve integration challenges across enterprise environments
* Manage implementation timelines, project deliverables, and technical documentation while ensuring high\-quality project execution
* Build strong relationships with business stakeholders and provide technical guidance throughout the implementation lifecycle
* Drive continuous improvements by recommending best practices, process optimizations, and scalable privacy solution architectures


**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* 5\+ years of experience implementing enterprise privacy, security, or data governance solutions
* Hands\-on experience with privacy platforms such as BigID, OneTrust, Securiti.ai, or similar enterprise privacy technologies
* Strong expertise in API integrations, REST services, CURL calls, database administration, and enterprise application connectivity
* Experience configuring and customizing enterprise software platforms to meet business and regulatory requirements
* Strong understanding of privacy, compliance, and data governance principles
* Proven ability to gather requirements, design technical solutions, and support UAT and production deployments
* Excellent troubleshooting, analytical, and problem\-solving skills with strong attention to detail
* Outstanding communication and stakeholder management skills with experience collaborating with security, compliance, legal, and IT teams
* Self\-driven professional with strong ownership, execution focus, and the ability to manage multiple implementation projects simultaneously
* Experience delivering client workshops, solution presentations, and technical training sessions in enterprise environments

168c6ff2.title: Solutions Architect
168c6ff2.description:
**Solution Architect / Practice Lead – Retail Digital Commerce \& GenAI** 




  





**Work Location: Hyderabad / Chennai**




  





**Aspire Systems (www.aspiresys.com)** 
 is a global technology services company that helps enterprises build and modernize digital products through engineering excellence, domain expertise, and customer\-centric innovation. With deep capabilities across Digital Engineering, Cloud, Data, AI, Enterprise Applications, and Quality Engineering, Aspire partners with organizations to accelerate business transformation and deliver measurable outcomes.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We are looking for a
 **Solution Architect / Practice Lead – Retail Digital Commerce \& GenAI** 
 to join our Retail business unit.
 



 This role will anchor solution architecture, pre\-sales support, accelerator development, and client\-facing consulting across digital commerce, store systems, customer experience, and emerging GenAI\-led solutions.
 



 The ideal candidate will bring strong experience in
 **enterprise architecture, Java / microservices, cloud\-native solutioning, and retail commerce, with practical exposure to GenAI / LLM\-based applications such as RAG, AI assistants, workflow automation, or agent\-based prototypes.** 




 This is a hands\-on architecture and consulting role. The person should be comfortable shaping ideas into proposals, building POCs with engineering teams, presenting to client stakeholders, and converting innovation initiatives into production\-ready engagements.
 



  





**Must\-Have Skills** 




**Core Architecture** 



* Strong understanding of enterprise application architecture.
* Java / Spring Boot / microservices experience.
* REST API design, integration patterns, and cloud\-native architecture.
* Experience with at least one major cloud platform — Azure, AWS, or GCP.
* Familiarity with containers, CI/CD, environment planning, and production deployment considerations.



**Retail / Digital Commerce** 




**Experience in at least two of the following areas:** 



* Digital commerce platforms such as SFCC, commercetools, Adobe Commerce, Shopify Plus, Oracle Commerce, or similar.
* Store systems / POS / associate\-facing applications.
* Order management, inventory, loyalty, customer service, or merchandising workflows.
* Search, personalization, product discovery, customer engagement, or commerce integrations.
* Retail data flows involving ERP, CRM, CDP, BI, or data warehouse platforms.



**GenAI / AI Application Exposure** 




**Practical experience in some of the following:** 



* LLM\-based application development using OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or similar.
* RAG / knowledge search patterns.
* Prompt engineering and grounding techniques.
* Vector databases or semantic search.
* AI assistants, copilots, chatbots, workflow automation, or agent\-based POCs.
* Basic understanding of LLM evaluation, hallucination risk, access control, and cost considerations.



**Consulting \& Communication** 



* Ability to conduct discovery conversations and convert business needs into solution options.
* Strong proposal writing, estimation, and presentation skills.
* Ability to explain technology clearly to both technical and business stakeholders.
* Comfortable working with sales, delivery, engineering, and leadership teams.



  





**Candidate Profile We Are Looking For** 




**The right candidate may come from one of these backgrounds:** 



1. **Retail Digital Commerce Architect** 
 who has started working on GenAI / AI\-led use cases.
2. **Cloud / Microservices Solution Architect** 
 with retail domain exposure and recent GenAI hands\-on experience.
3. **Pre\-sales Solution Architect** 
 with strong technical depth and experience shaping POCs, demos, and proposals.
4. **Technical Practice Lead** 
 who can combine architecture, client consulting, and team enablement.



**We are not looking for a pure data scientist or research\-only AI profile.** 




**This role needs a practical architect who can take business problems from idea to proposal to POC to production.** 




  





**Required Experience** 



* **8\+ years** 
 in solution architecture, technical leadership, or enterprise application design.
* **5\+ years** 
 of experience in retail, digital commerce, customer experience platforms, store systems, OMS, loyalty, merchandising, or adjacent domains.
* Practical experience in
 **pre\-sales, solution consulting, proposal support, or client\-facing architecture discussions** 
 .
* Hands\-on exposure to
 **GenAI / LLM\-based applications** 
 through POCs, pilots, internal accelerators, or production implementations.



**Note:**




**\*We do not expect long\-tenured GenAI experience.** 




**\*Practical hands\-on exposure to LLM\-based solutioning over the last 12–24 months is sufficient if the candidate has strong architecture fundamentals.** 




  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Solution Architecture \& Consulting** 



* Design scalable enterprise solutions across retail digital commerce, store operations, customer service, order management, merchandising, and related retail workflows.
* Translate business problems into practical technology solutions using cloud\-native architecture, APIs, microservices, integration patterns, data platforms, and AI/GenAI components.
* Define solution blueprints, architecture diagrams, effort estimates, implementation approaches, and delivery assumptions.
* Review technical feasibility, identify risks, and guide teams on pragmatic design choices.



**2\. GenAI / AI\-Led Solutioning** 



* Lead solutioning for GenAI\-enabled use cases such as conversational assistants, knowledge search, workflow automation, store associate enablement, customer service automation, and operational intelligence.
* Work with engineering teams to build and refine POCs using LLMs, RAG patterns, prompt engineering, vector search, APIs, and enterprise data sources.
* Evaluate where GenAI adds business value and where deterministic/rules\-based approaches are more appropriate.
* Support responsible AI considerations such as access control, grounding, observability, evaluation, and cost management.



**3\. Pre\-Sales \& Proposal Support** 



* Partner with sales, account teams, delivery leaders, and practice teams to shape proposals, solution narratives, demos, and commercial models.
* Participate in discovery calls, client workshops, technical deep\-dives, and executive presentations.
* Prepare solution decks, estimates, assumptions, implementation roadmaps, and proposal responses.
* Help convert early\-stage opportunities and POCs into structured delivery engagements.



**4\. Practice \& Accelerator Development** 



* Contribute to reusable accelerators, reference architectures, demo assets, case studies, and internal capability\-building initiatives.
* Mentor engineers and consultants across digital commerce, cloud, and AI\-led solution areas.
* Run or support internal practice cadences to track solution progress, reusable assets, technical learnings, and upcoming opportunities.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams across delivery, infrastructure, data, cloud, UX, marketing, and sales.



**5\. Delivery Governance \& Technical Leadership** 



* Provide architecture oversight during project initiation and early delivery phases.
* Support teams on environment setup, integration dependencies, CI/CD, cloud deployment, security considerations, and production\-readiness.
* Work with delivery managers to ensure technical assumptions, scope boundaries, and risks are clearly understood.
* Help troubleshoot architecture\-level blockers during POCs and early implementation cycles.



  





**Good\-to\-Have Skills** 




**These are desirable but not mandatory:** 



* Experience with agent frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, Semantic Kernel, AutoGen, CrewAI, or similar.
* Experience with AI observability, evaluation frameworks, or AgentOps concepts.
* Exposure to Snowflake, Databricks, Power BI, Looker, or enterprise data platforms.
* Knowledge of MACH architecture, composable commerce, headless commerce, or API\-first commerce platforms.
* Experience building reusable accelerators, internal IP, demos, or technical whitepapers.
* Exposure to pricing models for cloud, AI tokens, infrastructure, or managed services.
* Experience working with US or global retail clients.



  





**What Success Looks Like** 




**Within the first year, the person should be able to:** 



* Lead solutioning for multiple retail technology and GenAI opportunities.
* Build credibility with client stakeholders through practical architecture and business\-value framing.
* Support conversion of POCs into production engagements.
* Strengthen reusable accelerators and reference architectures.
* Mentor teams and improve internal capability around GenAI\-enabled retail solutions.
* Partner effectively with sales, delivery, cloud, data, and engineering teams.



  





**Why Join Us** 




 This role offers the opportunity to work at the intersection of retail transformation, digital commerce, cloud architecture, and GenAI adoption. You will help shape next\-generation solutions for enterprise retailers while contributing to reusable platforms, accelerators, and consulting capabilities.
 



 You will work with senior leaders, architects, sales teams, and delivery teams to solve real business problems.

e5990f7e.title: Solutions Architect
e5990f7e.description:
Required Skills \& Experience:
 



  3\-5 years as a Solution Architect or Domain Architect in enterprise product information, eCommerce, or digital commerce ecosystems.
 



  12\+ years of overall experience in software engineering, system design, and distributed systems architecture.
 



  Strong expertise in product information systems including PIM/PXM platforms such as Salsify or equivalent enterprise product data platforms, along with experience in CMS platforms such as Drupal, including large\-scale CMS migration and decoupling strategies.
 



  Hands\-on experience with digital asset management and media pipelines including Cloudinary and cloud\-based media processing systems on Google Cloud Platform.
 



  Strong experience in designing and implementing event\-driven architectures, microservices\-based capability architectures, and domain\-driven design (DDD) systems.
 



  Proven experience in decomposing ESB\-based integration systems and modular monolith architectures into scalable, event\-driven microservices.
 



  Strong understanding of product data, pricing, inventory, and media integration patterns across distributed enterprise systems.  Experience with commerce platforms such as Salesforce Commerce Cloud and integration with multi\-channel commerce ecosystems.
 



  Strong understanding of real\-time data processing, event streaming systems, and cross\- system synchronization strategies for high\-volume enterprise data.
 



  Experience designing capability\-based microservices, ensuring reusability, scalability, and domain ownership clarity.
 



  Strong knowledge of API\-first design, composable architecture, and enterprise integration patterns.
 



  Experience in data governance, system\-of\-record design, and enforcing data consistency across distributed systems.
 



  Experience with cloud platforms (GCP (Preferred), Azure or AWS) and capability to design solutions using cloud services.
 



  Proven ability to translate business needs into technical architecture, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and automation.
 



  Excellent solution design, problem\-solving, and documentation skills.
 



  Experience in cross\-functional collaboration, mentoring, and governance of architecture standards.
 



  Agile mindset and strong communication skills, able to present architectural decisions to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.

74fae008.title: Solutions Architect
74fae008.description:
Role Overview As a Solution Architect –
 



 Customer Service, you will define the strategic architecture for our customer service platforms. You will ensure that our systems are highly scalable, secure, and automation\-ready, while enabling AI\-driven workflows, chatbots, omnichannel support, and seamless integrations. You will collaborate closely with product owners, development teams, eCommerce architects, and customer service squads to ensure that architecture meets current business requirements and supports future growth. This is a strategic architecture role responsible for defining the architectural vision, establishing standards, and ensuring governance, while enabling the delivery function to successfully execute that vision. Job Description · Design a future\-ready architecture roadmap for customer service systems, including Zendesk, Node.js microservices, ADA chatbot, Spring Boot apps. Knowledge management systems, SAP integrations · Own the end\-to\-end architecture of customer service systems, including ticketing workflows, Case management, Omnichannel support, Automation, Chatbots, System Integrations · Architect AI\-driven capabilities such as Automated email responses, RAG\-based knowledge retrieval, Smart ticket routing · Provide technical oversight for system migrations, microservices scaling, and integrations across Zendesk, custom applications, and ERP/eCommerce systems. · Define and enforce microservice architecture patterns, domain\-driven design (DDD), event\-driven architecture, and composable service architectures. · Collaborate with business, product, and technical teams to translate customer experience strategies into scalable, maintainable solutions. · Establish data governance, service quality rules, and compliance with GDPR, ISO standards, and other privacy regulations. · Evaluate emerging technologies, chatbots, and AI solutions to enhance customer support. · Coordinate with architects from other domains \& enterprise architect to ensure enterprise\-wide architectural alignment. · Define observability, monitoring, and performance strategies to ensure high availability, scalability, and reliability of CS systems. · Document architecture decisions, design patterns, and standards to enable team alignment and maintainability. Required Skills \& Experience · 3\-5 years as a Solution Architect, preferably in customer service, CRM, or contact center ecosystems. · 12\+ years of experience in software engineering and architecture \& system design, with strong exposure to distributed systems. · Strong expertise in microservices architecture, including service design, orchestration, and event\-driven patterns. · Experience with AI\-based customer service workflows (chatbots, automated email responses, RAG knowledge retrieval). · Hands\-on experience with CRM and Customer Service Plateform and Integrations with ERP/eCommerce systems. · Strong knowledge is database schema design using SQL or NO SQL databases. · Experience with cloud platforms (GCP (Preffered), Azure or AWS) and capability to design solution using cloud services. · Knowledge of search and analytics technologies such as Elasticsearch. · Strong understanding of data privacy, GDPR, and compliance requirements for customer data. · Experience mentoring technical leads and guiding development teams · Proven ability to translate business needs into technical architecture, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and automation. · Excellent solution design, problem\-solving, and documentation skills. · Experience in cross\-functional collaboration, mentoring, and governance of architecture standards. · Agile mindset and strong communication skills, able to present architectural decisions to both technical and non\-technical

c22245c1.title: Solutions Architect
c22245c1.description:
* **Role Overview**



 Platform/solution architect for enterprise lakehouse programs: governance, security, lineage, cost/performance guardrails and platform standards.
 


* **Core Responsibilities**
* Own target\-state lakehouse architecture: metastores, Unity Catalog topology, workspace strategy, governed sharing, lineage.
* Define platform standards for DLT/Workflows, streaming, CDC/SCDs, data contracts, and schema strategy.
* Establish cluster policies, pools, autoscaling, Photon adoption, cost guardrails \& FinOps dashboards at org level.
* Lead modernization (legacy DW/ETL → Databricks) with migration patterns, parallel run, and cutover.
* Set DataOps \& observability standards: CI/CD, test suites, SLIs/SLOs, reliability scorecards; security/privacy posture.
* **Must\-have Skills (Screening Focus)**
* Expert Spark/Delta internals; large\-scale performance engineering and cost governance.
* Unity Catalog governance (RBAC/ABAC), row/column security; audit \& compliance readiness.
* Estate\-wide DLT/Workflows standards; migration playbooks; ADRs \& platform blueprints.
* **Nice\-to\-have (Prefer, not Mandatory)**
* Delta Sharing, Marketplace, Lakehouse Federation; Model Serving/Vector Search awareness.
* Multi\-cloud architecture; FinOps maturity.

86796e92.title: Partner Engineer, Google Cloud, GSI
86796e92.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Bengaluru, Karnataka, India; Hyderabad, Telangana, India; Gurugram, Haryana, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a partner management or support role.
* Experience with cloud engineering, on\-premise engineering, virtualization, or containerization platforms.
* Experience engaging with, and presenting to, technical stakeholders and executive leaders.
* Experience translating customer objectives into Cloud solutions across multiple domains.
* Experience in managing GSI or other channel partners as a technical alliance lead or engineer.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience managing multiple stakeholders, and working cross\-functionally, in a collaborative environment.
* Experience building business partnerships with partners and customers in an architecture or solution delivery role.
* Excellent communication skills, with experience conducting partner technical engagements.


**About The Job**
 When leading companies choose Google Cloud, it's a huge win for spreading the power of cloud computing globally. Once educational institutions, government agencies, and other businesses sign on to use Google Cloud products, you come in to facilitate making their work more productive, mobile, and collaborative. You listen and deliver what is most helpful for the customer. You assist fellow sales Googlers by problem\-solving key technical issues for our customers. You liaise with the product marketing management and engineering teams to stay on top of industry trends and devise enhancements to Google Cloud products.
   

  

 As a Global System Integrators (GSI) Partner Engineer, you will partner with GSI Partner development and Sales teams to differentiate Google Cloud to our GSI partners. You will serve as the GSI partner’s primary technical partner and trusted advisor, engaging in technical\-led conversations to understand their business issues. You will troubleshoot technical questions and roadblocks, engage in proofs\-of\-concepts and demos, and use your expertise to architect cross\-pillar cloud solutions that solve these business challenges. You will drive the technical win with the GSI Partner and assist to define the delivery and consumption plans. You will use your acumen and presentation skills to engage with technical and business leaders, and persuasively present practical and useful solutions on Google Cloud.
   

  

 You will focus on identifying, pursuing, and winning new business workloads and driving penetration within existing ones as a technical generalist, spanning infrastructure modernization, application modernization, data analytics and more. You will blend sales prowess, market knowledge and direct technical engagement to prove the value of the Google Cloud portfolio.Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop and own the GSI partner technical strategy, participating in planning and supporting targeted sales motions.
* Combine sales, programming, and solutions architecture expertise to prove the value of Google Cloud Platform across the portfolio through assisting and guiding the GSI partner to develop and deliver complex demos, pilots and in\-depth workshops.
* Architect cross\-pillar solutions, drive technical wins, and define initial delivery plans for customers with GSI partners; continue to lead the technical engagement in the solution phase.
* Plan and support the GSI Partner in building, developing and enhancing their Google Cloud practice.
* Be the technical point\-of\-contact for GSI partner for product and solution enquires, working in conjunction with Product and Support specialists within Google Cloud platform (GCP).


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

6ba0526b.title: Cloud Engineer
6ba0526b.description:
**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* Design, deploy and maintain secure, scalable and highly available AWS cloud infrastructure.
* Configure and manage AWS services such as EC2, VPC, S3, IAM, RDS, CloudWatch, Lambda, Route 53, ELB and Auto Scaling.
* Provision and manage cloud resources using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with Terraform or AWS CloudFormation.
* Monitor cloud infrastructure, troubleshoot issues and ensure optimal system performance and availability.
* Support application deployment and automate release processes using CI/CD pipelines.
* Implement cloud security best practices, including IAM policies, encryption, security groups and access controls.
* Perform routine system maintenance, patch management, backup and disaster recovery activities.
* Optimize AWS resources for performance, scalability and cost efficiency.
* Work with Docker containers and support Kubernetes\-based deployments where required.
* Collaborate with development, QA, and DevOps teams to ensure smooth deployment and infrastructure support.
* Troubleshoot networking, storage, compute and application\-related issues in AWS environments.
* Maintain technical documentation, architecture diagrams and operational procedures.
* Assist in cloud migration, infrastructure upgrades and implementation of new AWS services.
* Ensure compliance with organizational security standards and cloud governance policies.
* Stay updated with the latest AWS services, cloud technologies and industry best practices.



  





**Requirements** 
 :
 



  




* Bachelor's degree in CS/IT/EC or MCA.
* **1\+ years of hands\-on experience** 
 with AWS cloud services.
* Must hold
 **at least one AWS Associate Certification** 
 , such as:
* AWS Certified Solutions Architect \- Associate
* AWS Certified Developer \- Associate
* AWS Certified CloudOps Engineer \- Associate
* AWS Certified Data Engineer \- Associate
* AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer – Associate
* Good knowledge of AWS services including EC2, VPC, IAM, S3, RDS, CloudWatch and Lambda.
* Experience with Terraform or AWS CloudFormation.
* Familiarity with Linux, Docker, Git and CI/CD tools.
* Basic scripting knowledge (Python or Bash).
* Strong problem\-solving, communication and teamwork skills.
* Immediate joiners preferred.

2d0a4ad7.title: Architect
2d0a4ad7.description:
Country/Region: IN
Requisition ID: 37881
Work Model:
Position Type:
Salary Range:
Location: INDIA \- MUMBAI \- BIRLASOFT OFFICE
**Title:** **Architect**
========================

Description:
**Area(s) of responsibility**
-----------------------------



We are currently seeking an experienced Oracle OTM/GTM Cloud Lead to join our dynamic team. The successful candidate will be responsible for leading the design, development, and implementation of Oracle Transportation Management (OTM) and Global Trade Management (GTM) cloud solutions. This role requires a deep understanding of logistics and global trade processes, as well as the ability to translate business requirements into system configurations. The Oracle OTM/GTM Cloud Lead will also be responsible for providing technical leadership, mentoring team members, and ensuring the successful delivery of projects.


**Responsibilities**


* Lead the design and implementation of Oracle OTM/GTM cloud solutions.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure successful integration of OTM/GTM with other systems.
* Provide technical guidance and mentorship to the team members.
* Manage and resolve any technical issues related to OTM/GTM cloud.


**Required Skills**


* OTM Integration
* Oracle Transportation Management (OTM)
* Strong understanding of GTM (Global Trade Management) module
* The candidate must have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field. A Master's degree is preferred.


**Preferred Skills**


* Supply Chain Management
* Supply Chain
* JDE \- E1
* Oracle Cloud
* Knowledge of SQL and PL/SQL
* Familiarity with Oracle Fusion Middleware
* Experience with Oracle EBS
* Understanding of EDI and XML standards
* Knowledge of Java and J2EE technologies
* Experience with Agile methodologies

e3741330.title: Senior Solution Architect
e3741330.description:
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
  
Job Summary
  
  

We are looking for passionate Forward Deployed Engineers (FDEs) to join our cluster. As an FDE, you’ll be embedded directly with customers, solving complex problems by building and deploying production\-grade solutions. This is a unique opportunity to combine software engineering expertise with customer\-facing impact .
  
  

Responsibilities
  
  

Partner with client stakeholders to understand workflows, pain points, and opportunities.
  
Design, build, and deploy scalable solutions using modern technologies.
  
Own the full deployment lifecycle — from discovery and architecture to rollout and adoption.
  
Collaborate with product teams to surface insights and influence roadmap decisions.
  
Train and enable customer teams to maximize long\-term success.
  
  

Requirements
  
  

Strong programming skills (Python, Java, or equivalent).
  
Experience with APIs, cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP), and distributed systems.
  
Familiarity with data engineering, pipelines, or AI/ML systems is a plus.
  
Excellent problem\-solving skills and ability to thrive in ambiguous environments.
  
Strong communication skills to engage both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
  
2–6 years of professional experience in software engineering, consulting, or deployment roles.
  
  

Why Join Us
  
  

Work on mission\-critical projects with direct customer impact.
  
Be part of a fast\-growing cluster with opportunities to lead and mentor.
  
Exposure to cutting\-edge technologies in AI, cloud, and data engineering .
  
Collaborative, high\-energy environment with a focus on innovation.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
1\. To assess the domain IT landscape assessment and Application portfolio optimization for gap analysis
  
2\. Creation of solution and architectural views (logical\| conceptual\| development\| execution\| infrastructure \& operations architecture)
  
3\. To collaborate with business and technical stakeholders, including leaders, project managers, and development teams, to understand and prioritize requirements while defining the architecture.
  
4\. To ensure knowledge up\-gradation and work with new and emerging products/technologies
  
5\. To drive innovation by exploring and recommending new solutions within the organization.
  
6\. To contribute towards white/technical papers and knowledge base
