b20fb166.title: Technical Program Manager
b20fb166.description:
About the Role
 



 We are looking for a high\-impact Technical Program Manager to drive enterprise project execution and strategic account growth for our flagship relationship with Adani Enterprises. This is a senior, highly visible role that sits at the intersection of delivery excellence and enterprise sales — requiring both sharp operational rigour and a commercial mindset.
 



 You will be the single point of contact for one of our most strategic enterprise accounts, owning end\-to\-end project delivery, stakeholder relationships, and revenue growth targets.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



**A. Project Execution \& Delivery (70%)** 



* Serve as the primary external Point of Contact for all project updates, escalations, and communications with Adani Enterprises stakeholders across business units.
* Own end\-to\-end project execution for all ongoing deployments — from SOW sign\-off through go\-live — ensuring timelines, milestones, and quality standards are consistently met.
* Drive internal coordination across Product, Engineering, Pre\-Sales, and QA teams to align on deliverables, resolve dependencies, and eliminate blockers.
* Review, negotiate, and execute Statement of Work (SOW) agreements in collaboration with legal, finance, and sales teams — both internally and externally.
* Proactively identify and escalate commercial and technical risks that could impact delivery timelines or customer outcomes; maintain a live risk register with mitigation plans.
* Manage structured governance cadences — weekly project updates, monthly business reviews, and quarterly CSAT reviews — to track progress, surface gaps, and drive accountability.
* Anchor quarterly business reviews (QBRs) with the customer to assess satisfaction, close delivery gaps, and align on the roadmap ahead.
* Escalate red flags, delivery risks, or account health concerns to the Head of Enterprise Sales in a timely and structured manner.
* Maintain accurate project documentation, dashboards, and status reports accessible to both internal and external stakeholders.



**B. Revenue Growth \& Commercial Accountability (30%)** 



* Own and drive upsell and cross\-sell revenue of ₹5 Cr annually within Adani Enterprises, focused exclusively on Enterprise Business — identifying expansion opportunities across new business units, use cases, and product lines.
* Establish and nurture OEM partnerships that contribute to top\-line revenue growth and improve EBITDA margins — identifying the right partners, structuring commercial arrangements, and driving joint GTM motions.
* Collaborate with the Enterprise Sales head to build account plans that map Adani's strategic priorities to our product capabilities and identify whitespace for growth.
* Track account\-level revenue performance, forecast accuracy, and pipeline health — providing regular updates to sales leadership.
* Participate in commercial negotiations and contract renewals, ensuring pricing, scope, and terms reflect the value delivered.
* Build executive\-level relationships within Adani Enterprises to position the company as a long\-term strategic technology partner, not just a vendor.



 What We're Looking For
 


* 6–10 years of experience in Technical Program Management, Delivery Management, or a hybrid delivery \+ sales role — preferably in SaaS, AI, or enterprise technology.
* Proven track record managing large, complex enterprise accounts with multiple internal and external stakeholders.
* Strong commercial acumen — ability to identify upsell opportunities, own revenue targets, and participate meaningfully in commercial conversations.
* Exceptional stakeholder management skills — comfortable engaging CXOs, business heads, and technical teams with equal confidence.
* Experience managing SOWs, project contracts, and delivery governance frameworks.
* Familiarity with enterprise software deployment lifecycles — including product rollout, integration, QA, and hypercare phases.
* Strong analytical and communication skills — ability to distil complex project status into crisp executive updates.
* Experience working with or establishing OEM/technology partnerships is a strong plus.
* PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent certification preferred but not mandatory.
* Prior experience with large Indian conglomerates or enterprise accounts (Adani, Reliance, Tata, L\&T etc.) is a significant advantage.

238246db.title: Technical Program Manager, Program Lead
238246db.description:
**The impact you’ll make**
 As a Technical Program Manager at Lam, you are not just overseeing projects – you’re orchestrating breakthroughs in support of Owning the Outcome. You’ll lead cross\-functional teams through successful project execution blending your technical excellence with strategic planning to deliver new or upgraded products. Your role is vital, owning technical projects from initiation through delivery using your expertise in planning, directing, and monitoring schedules and budget.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Perform technical program management duties involving cross\-functional teams focused on delivery of company’s products and services.
* Develop and present program plans to senior management, gain buy in and deliver results.
* Organizes cross\-functional activities, ensuring completion of the program i.e. product/ solution release on schedule and within budget constraints.
* Monitors the program from initiation through delivery including planning and directing schedules and monitoring budget/spending.
* Manage CFTs with a diverse array of talents and responsibilities to drive to solutions and alignment (with program objective, product release and material cut\-in strategies, Excess \& Obsolete (E\&O) and effectivities)
* Assist in the definition and institutionalizing of new processes to improve effectiveness, leverage synergies and enable maturity of the organization.
* Be the change agent, driving process excellence, ownership of PDR process, responsiveness to dynamic business environment and leading by example.


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Who we’re looking for**
* Bachelor’s degree with 12\+ years of experience; or Master’s degree with 10\+ years’ experience;
* 8\+ years of technical program management.
* Experience guiding cross\-functional teams and demonstrating leadership and influence skills to deliver results.
* Excellent communication and executive presentation skills with the ability to present to audiences at all levels in the Company.


**Mandatory Skills**
* Knowledge of Program Management methods and experience in Product Development \& Release (PDR) procedures.
* Strong influencing, negotiating and conflict resolution skills.
* Experience in or knowledge of Semiconductor fabrication, Semiconductor Equipment Operations, or related industries is a plus.
* Experience in HW development, Agile and/or Waterfall project methodologies is a plus
* Expertise with project management software and tools including MS Project, QuickBase, Office Timeline, or equivalent.
* Structured Thinking: Logical approach, appropriate framing problems, and conclusions. Focuses on building capabilities across span of control.
* Communication: Clear, concise, and conclusive that shapes senior\-leader understanding and draws out specific recommendations and conclusions.
* People Management: Leads CFTs that continually improves self, business, and function. Sets direction for group and provides compelling vision for the work; establishes a high\-performance environment.
* Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi\-tasking skills.
* Other experience that would prove highly valuable: Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Operations and Logistics.


**Our commitment**
 We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results.
   

  

 Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non\-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees.
   

  

*Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on\-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On\-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On\-site Flex’ you’ll work 3\+ days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1\-2 days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.*

e8797e4b.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
e8797e4b.description:
**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end program management for mission\-critical initiatives, starting with our automation and quality programme.
* Build visibility across systems, dashboards, monitoring, alerting, health metrics, and escalation workflows.
* Drive rapid root\-cause analysis and coordinate incident resolution across engineering, ML, data, clinical, and CS teams.
* Build process frameworks, runbooks, and scalable operational models that allow teams to execute predictably.
* Establish proactive risk management, quality gates, and cross\-team checkpoints before major releases.
* Lead complex multi\-team launches and rollouts (currently 6\-8 weeks) and streamline them for predictability and speed.
* Run program reviews, track dependencies, and maintain clear ownership across stakeholders.
* Champion operational excellence, continuous improvement, tighter SLAs, better tooling, and consistent execution.


**Requirements**
* Skills: Quality assurance, SQL, Looker, program management, project management, Tableau, machine learning, and NLP.
* 5\+ years of technical programme management experience, ideally in ML/AI, healthcare tech, or other quality\-critical domains.
* Proven track record managing multi\-team programmes involving engineering and non\-engineering stakeholders.
* Experience building operational systems such as monitoring, alerting, quality frameworks, and incident response.
* Strong ability to drive results without formal authority and work effectively in high\-ambiguity environments.
* Background working with regulated or quality\-sensitive workloads is strongly preferred.


**Technical And Analytical**
* Ability to understand system architecture and map which components are impacted by changes.
* Strong analytical skills: SQL proficiency, comfort with dashboards, and trend analysis.
* Experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, Metabase, etc.
* Comfortable having technical conversations with engineers and understanding trade\-offs.
* Familiarity with modern data/ML stacks: we use GCP and BigQuery.


**Leadership And Communication**
* Exceptional communicator who brings clarity, structure, and urgency.
* Low\-ego, high\-empathy leader who can influence without authority.
* Comfortable running war rooms, driving decision\-making, and managing incidents end\-to\-end.
* Builds processes that scale without creating unnecessary overhead.


**Nice To Have**
* Experience in healthcare AI, medical coding, RCM workflows, or quality engineering.
* Experience scaling programmes at a fast\-growing startup.
* Exposure to pod\-based org structures.
* Prior background in operational excellence or reliability engineering.

bda88887.title: Program Manager - Component & Sub-systems
bda88887.description:
Fluence (Nasdaq: FLNC) is a global market leader delivering intelligent energy storage and optimization software for renewables and storage. Our solutions and operational services are helping to create a more resilient grid and unlock the full potential of renewable portfolios. With gigawatts of successful implementations across nearly 50 markets, we are transforming the way we power our world for a more sustainable future. For more information, please visit fluenceenergy.com.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Program Manager for Components \& Sub\-Systems is responsible for the full execution and delivery of a defined portion of a Fluence product or program — such as a hardware component, subsystem, software module, or technical workstream. This role ensures that assigned scope meets all requirements for timing, quality, cost, and readiness before integration into the broader program.
   

  

 This position requires strong leadership, cross\-functional coordination, and disciplined execution. Successful candidates will demonstrate the ability to independently drive outcomes within their scope while collaborating closely with Engineering, Supply Chain, Operations, Product, and the Senior Program Manager. This role carries full accountability for execution of the assigned subsystem, including timing, quality, and readiness for integration into the full program. This role may include ownership of a software\-focused workstream, requiring close coordination with software engineering teams to ensure integration readiness, testing coverage, and software release alignment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end execution for an assigned component, subsystem, or workstream, from requirements alignment through production launch readiness.
* Develop and manage the detailed program plan for owned scope, including schedules, milestones, risks, dependencies, and mitigation actions.
* Ensure Engineering\-owned technical deliverables for the component/subsystem are completed on time and meet program requirements, while supporting clarity, tracking, and issue resolution. The PM ensures delivery but does not own technical content or engineering decision\-making.
* Coordinate interface definition and alignment with dependent or upstream/downstream subsystems to ensure seamless integration.
* Maintain rigorous tracking of progress, risks, issues, and dependencies; drive timely cross\-functional actions to stay on schedule.
* Translate customer, market, and platform requirements into clear objectives and workstream deliverables.
* Partner with Supply Chain to support procurement readiness, supplier engagement, long\-lead component planning, and launch\-critical material availability.
* Work with Operations and Manufacturing Engineering to ensure build readiness, coordinate validation activities, and support integration into production processes.
* Provide structured, data\-driven status updates for owned scope during Program Reviews, Stage\-Gates, and leadership syncs.
* Maintain accurate program documentation, dashboards, and communication tools to ensure visibility and alignment.
* Escalate risks quickly with recommended options for resolution; support decision\-making with well\-structured data.
* Model strong leadership, accountability, and proactive problem\-solving consistent with Fluence program management expectations.
* Proactively challenge assumptions and drive clarity in ambiguous or conflicting situations.
* Collaborate closely with global and regional Engineering, Supply Chain, and Operations teams.


**Qualifications**
* 3–7 years of experience in Program or Project Management, Engineering, Supply Chain, Operations, or similar roles managing technical deliverables or workstreams.
* Demonstrated ability to lead cross\-functional teams and drive execution across hardware and/or software development environments.
* Experience with component\-level or subsystem\-level planning, procurement, supplier coordination, and production readiness preferred.
* Strong schedule management, risk management, and communication skills.
* Ability to operate with ownership and independence while maintaining alignment with the broader program organization.
* Comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment with evolving priorities and complex dependencies.
* Ability to work closely with global teams across time zones, ensuring seamless communication and alignment.
* Experience working within global engineering organizations and/or multinational product development environments.
* Proven ability to lead without direct authority and drive cross\-functional outcomes.
* Understanding of embedded systems, APIs, and cross\-component software interactions preferred.
* Experience managing software or firmware development workstreams, including familiarity with SDLC, backlog management, software integration, and validation processes.
* Ability to coordinate with software engineering teams across Agile frameworks and ensure alignment between software deliverables and overall program milestones.
* Certifications (PMP, Agile, Lean) a plus but not required.


**Required Education**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, Supply Chain, or a related technical field required.
* Advanced degree a plus but not required.


**Candidates who have applied within the past three months need not apply.**
 Qualified candidates are requested to submit a resume and cover letter at careers@fluenceenergy.com for consideration.
   

  

**Our Culture**
 At Fluence, our culture is the foundation that drives our ambitious growth strategy and fuels our mission to transform the future of energy. Our core cultural pillars empower us to innovate, collaborate, and lead with purpose, ensuring we continue to deliver unparalleled value to our customers and the world.
   

  

**Unleash Voices**
 We believe every voice matters. We encourage openness, active listening, and decisive action to create a culture where everyone has the opportunity to contribute to our success. We foster an environment where diverse perspectives are heard and valued, driving innovation and progress.
   

  

**Customer Fluent**
 Our customers are at the heart of everything we do. We’re committed to delivering exceptional value that exceeds expectations by understanding our customers' needs and adapting swiftly to meet them. Our deep focus on customer satisfaction drives us to continuously improve and innovate.
   

  

**Infinite Impact**
 We are committed to creating the impossible. We push boundaries to deliver sustainable, game\-changing solutions that shape a brighter, more energy\-efficient future for all. Our team is passionate about making a lasting impact that will resonate for generations to come.
   

  

**All In**
 We are all in for growth. Our teams are relentlessly focused on identifying and seizing opportunities that propel us forward. We embrace an ownership mindset, pushing ourselves and each other to accelerate progress and create lasting success.

25105fce.title: Technical Program Manager
25105fce.description:
**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end program management for mission\-critical initiatives, starting with our automation and quality programme.
* Build visibility across systems, dashboards, monitoring, alerting, health metrics, and escalation workflows.
* Drive rapid root\-cause analysis and coordinate incident resolution across engineering, ML, data, clinical, and CS teams.
* Build process frameworks, runbooks, and scalable operational models that allow teams to execute predictably.
* Establish proactive risk management, quality gates, and cross\-team checkpoints before major releases.
* Lead complex multi\-team launches and rollouts (currently 6\-8 weeks) and streamline them for predictability and speed.
* Run program reviews, track dependencies, and maintain clear ownership across stakeholders.
* Champion operational excellence, continuous improvement, tighter SLAs, better tooling, and consistent execution.


**Requirements**
* 7\+ years of technical programme management experience, ideally in ML/AI, healthcare tech, or other quality\-critical domains.
* Proven track record managing multi\-team programmes involving engineering and non\-engineering stakeholders.
* Experience building operational systems such as monitoring, alerting, quality frameworks, and incident response.
* Strong ability to drive results without formal authority and work effectively in high\-ambiguity environments.
* Background working with regulated or quality\-sensitive workloads is strongly preferred.
* Ability to understand system architecture and map which components are impacted by changes.
* Strong analytical skills: SQL proficiency, comfort with dashboards, and trend analysis.
* Experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, Metabase, etc.
* Comfortable having technical conversations with engineers and understanding trade\-offs.
* Familiarity with modern data/ML stacks; we use GCP and BigQuery.
* Exceptional communicator who brings clarity, structure, and urgency.
* Low\-ego, high\-empathy leader who can influence without authority.
* Comfortable running war rooms, driving decision\-making, and managing incidents end\-to\-end.
* Builds processes that scale without creating unnecessary overhead.
* Experience in healthcare AI, medical coding, RCM workflows, or quality engineering.
* Experience scaling programmes at a fast\-growing startup.
* Exposure to pod\-based org structures.
* Prior background in operational excellence or reliability engineering.

5c5d136b.title: Technical Program Manager 3
5c5d136b.description:
**The group you’ll be a part of**
 The Customer Support Business Group focuses on enabling our customers with premier customer support throughout their lifecycle with Lam. We drive performance, productivity, safety, and quality of customers installed base performance and deliver service and lifecycle solutions for their most critical equipment and processes.
   

  

**The impact you’ll make**
 As a Technical Program Manager at Lam, you are not just overseeing projects – you’re orchestrating breakthroughs in support of \[insert strategic initiative]. You’ll lead cross\-functional teams through successful project execution blending your technical excellence with strategic planning to deliver new or upgraded products. Your role is vital, owning technical projects from initiation through delivery using your expertise in planning, directing, and monitoring schedules and budget.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Hands\-on experience managing the Obsolescence lifecycle from risk identification through solution release.
* Drive resource planning, mitigation plan, implementation, and program execution.
* Lead LTB strategy, excess inventory management, and runout risk mitigation within tight demand and supply windows
* Strong analytical skills to build decision frameworks using demand, forecast, cost, and risk inputs
* Own program plans, milestones, schedules, risks, and performance metrics to ensure delivery on time and within business targets.
* Identify workflow gaps, reduce manual tracking burden, and help standardize execution across product groups.
* Partner with stakeholders to understand process and system requirements and drive scalable improvements in business process.
* Lead cross\-functional programs with strong governance, escalation, and stakeholder management discipline
* Operate in a global, high\-interaction environment with frequent reviews, milestone tracking, and executive escalations
* Solid understanding of Product Life Cycle (PLC) and its impact on obsolescence, supply continuity, and cost
* Ability to multi\-task across multiple, competing priorities in a dynamic environment


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Who we’re looking for**
* 
* Bachelor’s degree with 5\+ years of experience. 3\+ years of technical program management.
* 3\+ years of continuous improvement or technical program management.
* Experience guiding cross\-functional teams and demonstrating influence skills to deliver results.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to present to audiences at all levels in the Company.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in Semiconductor, Electrical, or Electronic OEM industries, related industries is a plus.
* Proven ability to influence without authority, drive alignment, and deliver sustainable change
* Knowledge of Program Management methods and experience in Product Development \&Release (PDR) procedures
* Familiarity with project management software and tools including MS Project, QuickBase, Office Timeline, or equivalent.
* Knowledge of Change Management methodologies is a plus.


**Our commitment**
 We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results.
   

  

 Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non\-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees.
   

  

*Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on\-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On\-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On\-site Flex’ you’ll work 3\+ days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1\-2 days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.*

6654eead.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
6654eead.description:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.
   

  

 This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 The Product and Engineering team in the Cloud Native Business Unit is looking to bring on a Senior Technical Program Manager to join a team of TPMs focused on driving complex and cross\-cutting initiatives and programs to meet our top objectives and key results to delight our customers.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* You will take charge using your technical leadership and program management skills to drive execution with high quality for these key initiatives.
* You will be responsible for establishing best practices, collaborating across multiple business units and managing dependencies and deliverables for multiple programs.
* You will be working with a global team of software engineers who develop new features and capabilities with a rapid rate of change.
* You will be responsible for driving multiple parallel product releases in a fast pace environment.
* We are primarily an in\-office environment and therefore, you will be expected to work from the Bangalore office in compliance with Everpure's policies, unless you are on PTO, or work travel, or other approved leave.


**What You Bring**
* Minimum 8\+ years of experience as a Technical Program Manager (TPM) leading product delivery teams for enterprise commercial software organizations
* MS in computer science, MBA or engineering management equivalent preferred.
* Minimum 6\+ years hands\-on experience delivering enterprise commercial software releases in a dynamic environment
* Proven ability for this release TPM to develop and use Agentic AI in their day\-to\-day job.
* Outstanding verbal and written communication skills with the ability to interact with technical and non\-technical, cross\-functional groups.
* Advanced understanding and extensive use of Jira Cloud in software development program management and release management
* Demonstrated strong analytical and problem solving skills.
* Big picture thinker providing clarity on what we are trying to accomplish, understanding of the business objectives and driving the outcome for the program
* Capabilities to identify and recommend process changes that would enable faster time to market while driving organization consistency and efficiency.
* Solid knowledge of end\-to\-end SDLC best practices
* Experience in managing projects throughout the entire SDLC, including investigation, design, planning, execution and delivering products to market on schedule, and addressing customer feedback in development. Solid knowledge of end\-to\-end SDLC best practices
* Drive content, schedule and overall delivery of the program and set it up for success in the field and customer base for overall Go\-To\-Market readiness and New Product Introduction
* Recognize when trade\-offs and timely decisions are needed; drive the necessary discussions to conclusion and drive accountability for delivery and ensure that the objectives of the program are met
* Use your solid project and technical skills and judgment to build credibility with technical leaders and demonstrate the ability to influence multiple functions across the organization
* Strong team and customer focus.
* Take ownership of the product experience, product quality and associated health metrics
* Set goals for the program, track and periodically communicate to stakeholders as well as executive leadership
* Ensure corrective actions and risk mitigations are in place as needed to keep programs and releases on track
* Be the single point person for delivery decisions, exec and cross team communication and working with various functional groups to deliver the program
* Optimize team processes to improve quality, productivity, and responsiveness to feedback and changing priorities along with setting up the program for success in the field
* Highly collaborative; overcome obstacles by resolving issues, regardless of team boundaries, and identify and resolve teamwork issues.


**INCLUDE FOR POSTING LOCATION IDENTIFICATION**
 ,
   

  

**What You Can Expect From Us**
* Innovation: We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
* Growth: We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
* Team: We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.


 And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company\-sponsored team events. Check out purebenefits.com for more information.
   

  

**Accommodations And Accessibility**
 Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at TA\-Ops@purestorage.com if you’re invited to an interview.
   

  

**Our Commitment To a Strong And Inclusive Team**
 We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.
   

  

 Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or any other characteristic legally protected by the laws of the jurisdiction in which you are being considered for hire.
   

  

**Join us and bring your best.**
**Bring your bold.**
**Pure and simple.**

638bd869.description:
**Job Description**

**Job Title:** Software Solutions Consultant

**Location:** Coimbatore

**Experience:** 1–3 Years

**About the Role**

Indsys Tech Services India Pvt. Ltd. is looking for a dynamic Software Business Development Executive to promote our enterprise software solutions, identify new business opportunities, conduct product demonstrations, and build strong customer relationships. The role involves working closely with customers and the Presales and Technical teams to deliver the right business solutions.

**Software Solutions**

You will promote and demonstrate solutions including:

* ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning)
* HRMS and Payroll Management
* CRM
* Attendance and Visitor Management Systems
* Digital ID and Employee Self\-Service Applications
* Asset and Project Management Solutions
* Help Desk and Service Management Software
* Cloud\-Based Business Applications
* Business Process Automation
* Data Backup and Disaster Recovery Solutions
* IT Infrastructure and Managed Services

**Key Responsibilities**

* Generate new business opportunities through field visits, networking, referrals, and digital platforms.
* Meet prospective clients to understand business requirements.
* Conduct software presentations and live product demonstrations.
* Recommend suitable software solutions and prepare proposals.
* Coordinate with the Presales and Technical teams for solution delivery.
* Build strong customer relationships and follow up until project closure.
* Gather customer feedback and support business growth by achieving sales targets.

**Required Skills**

* Excellent communication and presentation skills.
* Business Development and Lead Generation.
* Solution Selling and Customer Relationship Management.
* Software Demonstration and Requirement Analysis.
* Knowledge of ERP, CRM, HRMS, Payroll, SaaS, Cloud Solutions, or Business Applications.
* Proficiency in MS Office.

**Preferred Candidate**

* Passion for Software Sales and Business Development.
* Quick learner with strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Self\-motivated and target\-oriented.

**Travel Requirement**

MBA (Marketing, Sales, Business Administration, or related specialization)

Pay: ₹20,000\.00 \- ₹40,000\.00 per month

Work Location: In person

d873bd1d.title: Presales Consultant (Mechanical/ Electrical)
d873bd1d.description:
**Pre\-sales Consultant (Mechanical/ Electrical / Electronic)**

**About Skill\-Lync** 

Skill\-Lync is a Y Combinator\-backed EdTech company offering industry\-aligned engineering and technology programs across Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Electronics, and Computer Science domains. We help aspiring engineers bridge the gap between academics and industry through practical, job\-oriented learning. As one of the fastest\-growing YC\-backed startups, we're building a high\-performing sales team to connect learners with impactful upskilling opportunities.

**Role Overview**

As a Demo Engineer, you'll play a key role in showcasing Skill\-Lync's learning programs through engaging live technical demos. You'll help prospective learners understand the value of our programs by explaining technical concepts, demonstrating real\-world applications, and addressing their queries.

Location: Chennai – Work from Office

Experience: 0–1 Years (Freshers with strong technical fundamentals are welcome to apply)

Employment: Type: Full\-time Hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM \| 6\-day work week

Joining: Immediate

**Key Responsibilities**

* Conduct engaging live technical demos (online/offline) to showcase Skill\-Lync's engineering programs, projects, and curriculum.
* Explain core engineering concepts in a simple and structured manner while addressing learner queries related to Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Electronics, or other relevant engineering domains.
* Demonstrate real\-world industry applications, simulations, case studies, and project\-based learning to help learners understand the practical value of the programs.
* Work closely with Sales, Counsellors, and Academic teams to enhance the demo experience and improve learner conversions. Stay updated with curriculum enhancements, industry trends, and emerging technologies to deliver engaging and high\-quality technical demonstrations.

**Who We're Looking For?**

* Bachelor's degree in Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Electronics, or related Engineering disciplines.
* Strong fundamentals in core engineering concepts relevant to your specialization.
* Ability to explain technical concepts clearly and confidently to students and working professionals.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills.
* Confident in conducting live technical demonstrations and engaging with learners.
* Passion for teaching, mentoring, and helping learners understand industry\-relevant concepts.
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* Fresh graduates to 1 year's of experience.
* Prior experience in technical training, workshops, demos, or mentoring is an added advantage.
* Self\-motivated individuals who enjoy combining technical expertise with learner interaction in a fast\-paced EdTech environment.

**Why Join Skill Lync?**

* Work with one of India's leading EdTech companies.
* Exposure to cutting\-edge technology and industry\-focused curriculum.
* Structured career growth into Senior Demo Engineer, Technical Trainer, Academic Mentor, or Pre\-Sales Engineer.
* Competitive salary with performance\-based incentives.
* Collaborative work culture with continuous learning opportunities.

Additional Details

Work Mode: Work from Office

Location: Chennai

Working Days: 6 Days a Week Working Hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM

How to Apply

Interested candidates can DM me directly or send their resume to prarthana.vakkiel@criodo.com with the subject line: "Pre\-sales Consultant Application – Your Name"

Pay: ₹360,000\.00 \- ₹450,000\.00 per year

Work Location: In person

16ffca29.title: Bid Manager -  US Facing
16ffca29.company: iPrime Services Pvt Ltd , NCR India
16ffca29.description:
**Job Title: Bid Manager and Specialist – US Bids** 




**Location:** 
 Noida / Sector 63 (or as specified)
 



**Reports To:** 
 Bid Team Lead and US Manager
 



  





**About iPrime Services Pvt. Ltd.** 




 iPrime Services is the authorized Veoci partner for India and South Asia, delivering enterprise software solutions across aviation, business continuity management, and other critical operations sectors. Among our core activities, we provide bid preparation and management services for our US principals . This is a vital and very critical function and you will be a valued and critical member of the bid team.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




  





 We are seeking a detail\-oriented Bid Specialist to manage the end\-to\-end bid and proposal process for our US\-based opportunities. This role involves identifying relevant tenders and RFPs, coordinating cross\-functional inputs, and producing high\-quality, compliant, and persuasive bid submissions that position iPrime and Veoci competitively in the US market.
 



  





 We are registered with many bid aggregators and received information form them on ongoing bids meeting our platform features and skill set. The submission requires inputs from multiple sources including finance , security , development , implementation etc and the whole bid has to be then put together and submitted online.
 



  





 AI usage is increasing and we routinely us AI to match RFPs and our features set and further fetch details from a data bank to populate the requirements of the RFP.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Assist the Search Team to identify relevant RFPs, RFIs, and tenders from procurement portals and on the websites of a list of identified prospects and customers.
* Analyze bid requirements, eligibility criteria, and compliance checklists to assess fit and win probability
* Coordinate with sales, technical, and delivery teams to gather inputs for proposal content
* Draft, structure, and edit compelling proposal narratives, executive summaries, and technical responses
* Use AI tools to accelerate research, drafting, and content reuse across bids while ensuring accuracy and compliance
* Ensure all submissions meet formatting, documentation, and compliance requirements specific to US procurement standards
* Manage bid timelines, tracking key milestones and submission deadlines
* Maintain a repository of reusable content, past submissions, and win/loss documentation
* Collaborate with pricing/commercial teams to finalize cost proposals and terms
* Support pre\-bid meeting with content and guidance as well as submit post\-submission clarifications or client queries
* Continuously improve bid quality based on feedback
* Track and analyse Wins and Losses.


- 


**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Business, Communications, English, or a related field
* **Excellent academic track record; must have scored above 85% in Class 12 Boards (CBSE)**
* Must be based in / from a metro city
* 2–5 years of experience in bid/proposal management, preferably with exposure to US government or enterprise procurement processes
* Excellent written English with strong editing and proofreading skills
* Familiarity with US RFP/RFI formats, compliance matrices, and procurement portals (e.g., SAM.gov, state/local portals)
* Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously
* Proficiency in MS Office/Google Workspace; experience with proposal software is a plus
* Experience using AI\-powered proposal or research tools in a bid/sales environment Working knowledge of AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot) for drafting, research, and content optimization



  





  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience in enterprise software, SaaS, or technology services bids
* Familiarity with sectors such as aviation, business continuity, public safety, or government services
* Prior experience working with or for US\-based clients or principals



  





**﻿Key Attributes** 



* Meticulous attention to detail and deadline discipline and to tools to colaborate with stakeholders to deliver award winning bids on time .
* Strong persuasive writing ability
* Comfortable working across time zones with US teams/clients
* Curious and adaptive mindset toward new tools and technologies, including AI

c0557685.title: Manager- Presales and BD- Multicloud connect and Networking
c0557685.description:
**About The Company**
 Tata Communications Redefines Connectivity with Innovation and IntelligenceDriving the next level of intelligence powered by Cloud, Mobility, Internet of Things, Collaboration, Security, Media services and Network services, we at Tata Communications are envisaging a New World of Communications
   

  

**Broad outline of the Role**
 Multi cloud connectivity is a Simple, flexible, scalable and secure multi\-cloud connectivity experience, delivered as\-a\-service. Multi cloud networking enhances cloud networking functionality by abstraction and delivers seamless AI workload experience, resiliency and compliances across multiple clouds. We are looking for a results\-driven Multi Cloud Networking professionals to work in a B2B segment in the enterprise segment. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a high\-growth environment, understands the nuances of cloud networking across hyper scalers, and offer innovative multi cloud connectivity solutions. The candidate will play a key role in working closely with sales and solution teams and act as an evangelist , bringing agility into sales process and clarity in solutioning.
   

  

**Minimum Qualifications \& Experience**
* \- 5–10 years of experience in cloud, networking, or managed services domain
* \- Experience in pre\-sales, technical consulting, or solutioning roles for hyperscaler environments
* \- Exposure to multi\-cloud or hybrid cloud deployments
* \- Proven experience in customer engagement and solution positioning
* \- Strong problem\-solving and analytical thinking ability
* \- Excellent communication and presentation skills
* \- Ability to learn quickly and adapt to new technologies/trends
* \- Strong collaboration and stakeholder management skills
* \- Commercial mindset with ability to articulate value and ROI
* Certifications like AWS Solutions Architect Associate (SAA\-C03\) , Microsoft Azure Security Engineer (AZ\-500\) or equivalent,
* Google Cloud Professional Cloud Network Engineer.
* Networking certifications (CCNA/CCNP equivalent) are a plus


**Other Knowledge \& Skills**
* Strong understanding of cloud networking concepts and architectures
* Hands\-on or working knowledge of at least one hyperscaler (AWS / Azure / GCP)
* Knowledge of VPC/VNET design, DNS, NAT gateways, routing, and security controls
* Understanding of egress costs and cloud pricing constructs
* Experience with hybrid connectivity (Site\-to\-Site VPN, Direct Connect, ExpressRoute)
* Exposure to SD\-WAN and multi\-cloud networking architectures
* Understanding of networking fundamentals including MPLS and BGP (preferred)


 Minimum Bachelor of Engineering; MBA is optional.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Drive business development and solution positioning for multi\-cloud connectivity and networking offerings
* Engage with enterprise clients to understand cloud connectivity, networking, and hybrid infrastructure requirements
* Work closely with sales and technical teams to design and present cloud networking solutions
* Support pre\-sales activities including solution design, architecture discussions, and technical presentations
* Perform cost\-benefit analysis and commercial modeling for multi\-cloud deployments
* Develop and propose solutions involving VPC/VNET design, hybrid cloud architectures, SD\-WAN, MPLS, VPN, and dedicated connectivity solutions
* Collaborate with hyper scalers and partners to build joint go\-to\-market strategies
* Stay updated with emerging trends in cloud networking and multi\-cloud ecosystems
* Contribute to RFP/RFI responses, proposals, and solution documentation
* Support post\-sales teams to ensure solution alignment and customer satisfaction


**Key Success Indicators**
* \- Ability to drive pipeline and influence deal closure through technical expertise
* \- Effectiveness in translating complex cloud networking solutions into business outcomes
* Quality of solution design, cost optimization, and customer engagement

b96abeb7.title: Manager - Sales Planning (Presales)
b96abeb7.description:
**Manager Sales Planning (Presales)** 




  





 Product Marketing \| Sales Planning \| Sales Enablement \| Media Strategy
 



  





 Every successful client engagement begins long before the first meeting \- it starts with a compelling story. The Sales Planning team sits at the center of InMobi's Brand Business, translating product capabilities, market insights, customer needs, and data into narratives that help our sales teams win.
 



 As the Manager \- Sales Planning, you will lead the strategic presales and GTM function for the Brand Business. This is a highly strategic, B2B\-focused role that combines Product Marketing, sales planning, client solutioning, and sales enablement. You will own the development of differentiated GTM narratives, proactive market\-facing collateral, and scalable frameworks that strengthen seller effectiveness and accelerate revenue growth.
 



 You will partner closely with Product Marketing, Product, Sales Leadership, BI, Trading, Supply, Deal Desk, and centralized Marketing teams across North America, APAC, and EMEA. You will also remain close to execution \- setting the quality bar for RFPs, client proposals, narrative decks, and strategic customer opportunities while building repeatable processes for the broader team.
 



**What You'll Be Doing** 




**GTM Strategy and Product Marketing** 



* Own the end\-to\-end GTM narrative and sales planning strategy for the Brand Business across North America, APAC, and EMEA.
* Develop differentiated positioning, messaging, value propositions, audience narratives, and customer\-centric solution frameworks.
* Partner closely with Product Marketing and Product teams to translate platform capabilities and launches into clear market\-facing stories and sales readiness programs.
* Gather and synthesize customer feedback, competitive intelligence, market trends, and advertiser needs to identify market gaps and evolving opportunities.
* Create and maintain messaging frameworks, persona\-based narratives, use\-case playbooks, and proof points that support the full sales cycle.
* Champion the Brand Business narrative internally and externally, ensuring consistency across regions, channels, and customer touchpoints.



**Sales Planning and Strategic Solutioning** 



* Lead the development of complex RFP responses, proposals, media strategies, and executive presentations for strategic opportunities.
* Translate advertiser objectives and campaign briefs into differentiated media recommendations and sophisticated client solutioning frameworks.
* Develop proactive GTM materials including vertical narratives, industry playbooks, tentpole collateral, one\-pagers, case studies, competitive battlecards, and solution briefs.
* Connect insights from BI, Trading, Supply, Product, and Deal Desk into a unified and persuasive customer story.
* Design visually compelling, story\-driven presentations for customers, agencies, Sales teams, and leadership audiences.
* Establish best practices and quality standards for all customer\-facing deliverables across the Sales Planning team.



**Sales Enablement** 



* Build scalable sales enablement programs that improve seller productivity, solution confidence, and win rates.
* Equip Sales teams with best\-in\-class market insights, competitive intelligence, messaging frameworks, customer stories, and objection\-handling tools.
* Partner with regional Sales leaders to identify enablement gaps and proactively develop solutions aligned to revenue priorities.
* Work with centralized Marketing execution teams to bring GTM strategies to life through vertical narratives, tentpole collateral, case studies, demand and supply collateral, and industry events.



**AI Transformation** 



* Lead the adoption of AI across the Sales Planning function and define an AI\-first operating model for the team.
* Build scalable AI workflows that automate research, proposal generation, content development, presentation creation, and knowledge reuse.
* Develop prompt libraries, AI playbooks, and reusable frameworks that improve quality, consistency, and productivity.
* Evaluate and deploy tools such as Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, Gamma, Canva AI, and other emerging platforms.
* Coach the broader Sales Planning and Sales organization on prompt engineering, responsible AI use, and high\-impact business applications.



**Cross\-Functional Leadership and Team Development** 



* Act as the central hub connecting Sales, Product Marketing, Product, BI, Trading, Supply, Deal Desk, and centralized Marketing teams.
* Influence product positioning, roadmap conversations, and GTM priorities by bringing customer feedback and market intelligence into cross\-functional discussions.
* Lead strategic initiatives from concept through execution, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery with measurable business outcomes.
* Mentor and coach Sales Planning professionals in storytelling, PMM fundamentals, client solutioning, AI adoption, and executive communication.
* Establish scalable processes, templates, operating rhythms, and measurement frameworks across the function.
* Balance long\-term strategic planning with hands\-on involvement in high\-priority customer opportunities.



**What We're Looking For** 




**Experience** 



* 8\+ years of experience in Product Marketing, Strategic Presales, Sales Enablement, GTM, Partner Marketing, or Agency Strategy roles within AdTech, MarTech, Digital Advertising, or related industries.
* Strong Product Marketing skill set with demonstrated ownership of messaging, positioning, GTM strategy, product launches, market intelligence, and sales enablement.
* Deep understanding of digital advertising, brand marketing, media planning, advertiser and agency needs, and the broader AdTech ecosystem.
* Experience working with global Sales organizations and cross\-functional teams across multiple regions.



**Product Marketing, Storytelling, and Content** 



* Exceptional storytelling ability, with a strong command of narrative development, messaging frameworks, and customer\-centric positioning.
* Proven ability to create GTM strategies, product launch narratives, vertical stories, use\-case frameworks, and sales enablement programs.
* Outstanding written communication skills across executive decks, reports, whitepapers, customer success stories, thought leadership, blogs, and external content.
* Advanced presentation design skills, with a strong focus on visual storytelling, structure, clarity, and executive impact.
* Excellent presentation and delivery skills, with the confidence to engage and influence senior internal and external audiences.



**AI and Innovation** 



* Extensive hands\-on experience with Generative AI platforms such as Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, Gamma, Canva AI, and similar technologies.
* Proven experience building AI workflows, prompt libraries, automation frameworks, or AI\-powered business processes.
* Excellent prompt\-building and prompt\-engineering skills, with the ability to generate consistently high\-quality business outputs.
* A track record of introducing new tools and ways of working that improve team productivity and output quality.



**Strategic Leadership and Collaboration** 



* Strong commercial and strategic acumen, with the ability to translate market signals and advertising data into actionable GTM strategies.
* Proven ability to influence decision\-making without direct authority and collaborate effectively across matrixed global teams.
* Strong stakeholder management and executive presence, with the ability to align Product, Sales, Marketing, and leadership teams.
* Demonstrated mentoring and coaching capability, with a commitment to raising the quality bar across the organization.



**Execution and Personal Attributes** 



* Strong analytical, conceptual, and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to turn complexity into clear and actionable recommendations.
* Excellent project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and proactively address risks or delays.
* Customer\-first, solution\-oriented mindset with high ownership, accountability, and attention to detail.
* Comfort working across diverse cultures, global teams, and time zones.
* Curious, innovative, and committed to continuous improvement.

4f887371.title: Architect I - Security Presales
4f887371.description:
**Requisition Number: 105048**
**Architect I \- Presales Security
   

  

 Location: Delhi NCR, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune, Trivandrum. This is a hybrid opportunity**
  

  

**Insight at a Glance**
* 14,000\+ engaged teammates globally with operations in 25 countries across the globe.
* Received 35\+ industry and partner awards in the past year
* $9\.2 billion in revenue
* \#20 on Fortune’s World's Best Workplaces™ list
* \#14 on Forbes World's Best Employers in IT – 2023
* \#23 on Forbes Best Employers for Women in IT\- 2023
* $1\.4M\+ total charitable contributions in 2023 by Insight globally


  

  

 Now is the time to bring your expertise to Insight. We are not just a tech company; we are a people\-first company. We believe that by unlocking the power of people and technology, we can accelerate transformation and achieve extraordinary results. As a Fortune 500 Solutions Integrator with deep expertise in cloud, data, AI, cybersecurity, and intelligent edge, we guide organisations through complex digital decisions.
   

  

  

  

**About The Role**
 The Presales Security Architect is responsible for designing, positioning, and articulating cybersecurity solutions that address customer business risks and technical requirements. This role works closely with sales, delivery, and partner teams to support the full presales lifecycle, including discovery, solution design, proposal development, and customer presentations.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Partner with sales teams to understand customer security requirements and business objectives.
* Lead security discovery sessions, workshops, and technical assessments.
* Design end\-to\-end security architectures aligned with Zero Trust and industry best practices.
* Develop solution documentation including architectures, SOWs, BOMs, and RFP/RFI responses.
* Present security solutions to technical and executive stakeholders including CIOs and CISOs.
* Collaborate with delivery teams to ensure alignment between presales commitments and implementation.
* Support development of standardized security offerings and reference architectures.


**Security Domains**
* Cloud Security (Azure, AWS, Hybrid)
* Identity \& Access Management (Entra ID / Azure AD)
* Endpoint \& Workload Security (Microsoft Defender suite)
* Network \& Perimeter Security
* Security Operations (SIEM/SOAR – Microsoft Sentinel)
* Compliance \& Governance (ISO 27001, NIST, CIS, GDPR, PCI\-DSS)


**Required Experience**
* 6–10\+ years of experience in cybersecurity, architecture, or consulting roles.
* 4–6\+ years in customer\-facing or presales roles.
* Experience supporting enterprise and regulated customers.


**Technical Skills**
* Strong understanding of cloud and hybrid security architectures.
* Hands\-on or design\-level experience with Microsoft security solutions.
* Knowledge of Zero Trust, identity\-first security, and threat management.


**Certifications (Preferred)**
* Microsoft SC\-100, AZ\-500, SC\-200
* CISSP, CCSP, or CISM
* Cloud Security certifications (Azure / AWS)


**Soft Skills**
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Ability to explain complex security concepts to non\-technical audiences.
* Commercial awareness and proposal\-writing capability.


**Success Metrics**
* Contribution to deal win\-rate for security opportunities.
* Quality and reusability of architectures and SOWs.
* Customer satisfaction and delivery alignment.


**What you can expect**
**Benefits**
 We’re legendary to take care of you, your family and to help you engage with your local community. We want you to enjoy a full, meaningful life and own your career at Insight. Some of our benefits include:
   

  

* Freedom to work from another location.
* Medical Insurance
* Health Benefits
* Professional Development: Learning Platform and Certificate Reimbursement
* Shift Allowance


  

  

 But what really sets us apart are our core values of Hunger, Heart, and Harmony, which guide everything we do, from building relationships with teammates, partners, and clients to making a positive impact in our communities.
   

  

  

  

**Join us today, your ambitious journey starts here** 
 .
   

  

  

  

 When you apply, please tell us the pronouns you use and any reasonable adjustments you may need during the interview process.
   

  

 At Insight, we celebrate diversity of skills and experience so even if you don’t feel like your skills are a perfect match \- we still want to hear from you! Today's talent leads tomorrow's success. Learn more about Insight:
   

  

 https://www.linkedin.com/company/insight/
   

  

  

  

  

  

  

  

 Insight is an equal opportunity employer, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, sexual orientation or any other characteristic protected by law.

418cf851.title: Architect - Enterprise Application Oracle S 4D
418cf851.description:
Architect \- Enterprise Application \- Oracle S**Ready to turn bold ideas into real\-world impact?**  

 At Genpact, we don’t just adapt to change, we lead it. AI and digital innovation are transforming the way businesses work, and we’re at the forefront of it. Genpact’s AI Gigafactory, our industry\-first accelerator, exemplifies how we scale advanced technology solutions to help global enterprises work smarter, grow faster, and transform at scale. Whether tackling complex challenges through large\-scale models or agentic AI, our breakthrough solutions tackle companies’ most complex challenges.  

  

If you thrive in a fast\-moving, innovation\-driven environment, love building and deploying cutting\-edge AI solutions, and want to push the boundaries of what’s possible, this is your moment.  

  

Genpact (NYSE: G) is an agentic and advanced technology solutions company. We leverage process intelligence and artificial intelligence to deliver measurable outcomes. With a strong partner ecosystem and decades of client trust, we provide innovative solutions that transform how businesses run. Powered by a team with an active learning mindset and client centricity at its core, we deliver lasting value for the world’s leading enterprises.  

 Get to know us at genpact.com and on LinkedIn, YouTube, X, and Facebook.

**Job Description**

**Oracle Project Manager – Roles and Responsibilities**
-------------------------------------------------------


An **Oracle Project Manager** is responsible for planning, executing, monitoring, and delivering Oracle implementation, upgrade, migration, and support projects while ensuring they are completed on time, within budget, and meet business objectives.

### **Key Roles and Responsibilities**


1\. Project Planning and Management* Define project scope, objectives, deliverables, and success criteria.
* Develop detailed project plans, schedules, milestones, and resource allocation.
* Estimate project timelines, budgets, and effort.
* Manage project lifecycle from initiation through closure.
* Ensure adherence to project management methodologies (Agile, Waterfall, Hybrid).


2\. Stakeholder Management* Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand requirements and expectations.
* Conduct regular project status meetings and steering committee reviews.
* Communicate project progress, risks, and issues to leadership.
* Manage stakeholder expectations throughout the project.


3\. Team Leadership* Lead cross\-functional teams comprising Oracle functional consultants, technical consultants, developers, architects, QA, and infrastructure teams.
* Assign responsibilities and monitor team performance.
* Foster collaboration across business and IT teams.
* Resolve conflicts and remove project roadblocks.


4\. Oracle ERP Implementation Oversight* Manage Oracle implementation projects such as: Oracle Cloud ERP Oracle E\-Business Suite (EBS) Oracle Fusion Applications Oracle SCM Oracle HCM Oracle Financials Oracle Procurement
* Ensure Oracle best practices are followed during implementation.


5\. Budget and Resource Management* Track project budgets and expenditures.
* Optimize resource utilization.
* Manage vendor and contractor engagements.
* Forecast resource requirements throughout the project lifecycle.


6\. Risk and Issue Management* Identify project risks and dependencies.
* Develop mitigation and contingency plans.
* Track issues and ensure timely resolution.
* Escalate critical risks to senior management when required.


7\. Change Management* Manage scope changes through formal change control processes.
* Assess business impact of changes.
* Coordinate approvals and implementation of approved changes.


8\. Quality Assurance* Ensure project deliverables meet quality standards.
* Review functional and technical documentation.
* Monitor testing phases including: Unit Testing System Integration Testing (SIT) User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Performance Testing
* Ensure successful production deployment.


9\. Vendor and Client Coordination* Coordinate with Oracle, implementation partners, and third\-party vendors.
* Manage contracts, Statements of Work (SOWs), and vendor deliverables.
* Ensure contractual obligations are met.


10\. Deployment and Go\-Live Management* Develop cutover and deployment plans.
* Coordinate production readiness activities.
* Monitor go\-live execution.
* Ensure hypercare support after deployment.


11\. Governance and Compliance* Ensure adherence to organizational governance standards.
* Maintain project documentation and audit readiness.
* Track KPIs and project metrics.
* Ensure compliance with security and regulatory requirements.


12\. Reporting* Prepare: Weekly project status reports Executive dashboards RAID (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies) logs Resource utilization reports Budget reports Milestone tracking reports

**Qualifications**


Bachelors \- Computer Engineering, Bachelors \- Computer Science, Bachelors \- Information Technology, Masters \- Software Engineering**Certifications**


Oracle Fusion Middleware (FMW) 11g Forms Developer \- OracleOracle**Required Skills**


Agile Methodology, Automated Testing, Change Management, Client Relations, Collaboration Tools, Design Thinking, Executive Presence, Inclusion, Modernizing Operations, Oracle, Oracle Application Express (APEX), Oracle Apps Financials, Oracle SCM, Oracle Transactional Business Intelligence (OTBI), People Leadership, PeopleSoft Administration, Personal Effectiveness, R12 \-Manufacturing, Risk Management, Siebel CRM Systems, Storytelling**Language**


English (Required)**Language Proficiency \-**

Advanced \- C1**Additional Job Location \-**

**Job Type**


Regular**Master Skill List \-**

Enterprise Application Oracle S**Remote Type \-**

Hybrid**Work Shift \-**

Day Job (India)**Why join Genpact?**  

* **Lead AI\-powered transformation** – Drive innovation and solve real\-world business challenges that matter
* **Make an impact** – Help global enterprises solve business challenges that matter
* **Accelerate your career** – Gain hands\-on experience, mentorship, and world\-class learning opportunities to stay ahead
* **Work with the best** – Join 140,000\+ bold thinkers and problem\-solvers who push boundaries every day
* **Thrive in a values\-driven culture** – Our courage, curiosity, and incisiveness \- built on a foundation of integrity and inclusion \- allow your ideas to fuel progress


  

Come join the 140,000\+ coders, tech shapers, and growth makers at Genpact and take your career in the only direction that matters: Up.  

Let’s build tomorrow together.  

  

Genpact is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, age, national origin, citizenship status, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. Genpact is committed to creating a dynamic work environment that values respect and integrity, customer focus, and innovation.  

Furthermore, please do note that Genpact does not charge fees to process job applications and applicants are not required to pay to participate in our hiring process in any other way. Examples of such scams include purchasing a 'starter kit,' paying to apply, or purchasing equipment or training.

fef3d642.description:
Company Profile:  

  

Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest independent IT and business consulting services firms in the world. With 94,000 consultants and professionals across the globe, CGI delivers an end\-to\-end portfolio of capabilities, from strategic IT and business consulting to systems integration, managed IT and business process services and intellectual property solutions. CGI works with clients through a local relationship model complemented by a global delivery network that helps clients digitally transform their organizations and accelerate results. CGI Fiscal 2024 reported revenue is CA$14\.68 billion and CGI shares are listed on the TSX (GIB.A) and the NYSE (GIB). Learn more at cgi.com.  

  

Job Title: Senior Java Full Stack Lead/Architect  

Experience: 10\+ Years  

Category: Software Development/ Engineering  

Shift: 11AM to 8PM  

Job location: Hyderabad  

Position ID: J0626\-2435  

Employment Type: Full Time  

Notice Period: Immediate to 10 days joiners  

Work Mode: Hybrid(3\-4 days work from office)  

Education Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field or higher with minimum 5 years of relevant experience.  

  

Member will be responsible for designing, developing, and overseeing the execution of highly complex software applications using a variety of modern technologies. You will be the driving force behind architecture and design decisions, collaborating with cross\-functional teams to deliver scalable, efficient, and secure solutions. This role also involves mentoring junior developers and ensuring the quality and integrity of the codebase.

**Your future duties and responsibilities**

* Lead the design and development of enterprise\-level software solutions with expertise in Java/JEE, Angular, Hibernate, and Spring frameworks.
* Develop RESTful services, SOAP web services, and integrate APIs using tools like APIM, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.
* Drive the usage of modern development tools like Maven, Git, GitHub, and IDEs such as IntelliJ, Eclipse, or STS.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams in an Agile/SCRUM environment, delivering on\-time software releases.
* Implement unit tests with JUnit and integration tests using frameworks like Robot Framework to ensure a high\-quality codebase.
* Monitor and maintain the CI/CD pipeline using Sonar, Azure, and Kibana for monitoring logs and metrics.
* Utilize JIRA for issue tracking and service ticket management, ensuring timely resolution of technical issues and project tasks.
* Troubleshoot complex production issues and lead debugging efforts to ensure uptime and performance.
* Foster a collaborative environment by mentoring junior developers, offering guidance on best practices and technical problem\-solving.
* Participate in code reviews, ensuring coding standards and security practices are met.
* Provide technical leadership in architecture and design discussions, recommending technology choices that align with business needs.

**Required qualifications to be successful in this role**

* Minimum 10 years of hands\-on experience in software development, with at least 3\+years in a Architect role.
* Define and own the end\-to\-end application architecture for enterprise solutions using Java (Spring Boot / Microservices) and Angular.
* Design scalable, secure, and high\-performance backend systems and responsive frontend architectures.
* Establish coding standards, architectural guidelines, and best practices for both Java and Angular teams.
* Lead the microservices architecture, including API design, inter\-service communication, and fault tolerance.
* Proficient in Java/JEE and Spring frameworks for building backend systems.
* Strong experience with Angular and JavaScript for front\-end development.
* Extensive experience with Hibernate for ORM and database management.
* Experience in designing and implementing SOAP and RESTful web services.
* Expertise in using Maven for build automation and dependency management.
* Familiarity with Azure cloud services, deployment, and monitoring tools.
* Deep understanding of version control using Git and GitHub.
* Experience with Sonar for code quality management and Kibana for log management.
* Ability to write and maintain automated tests with JUnit.
* Knowledge of JIRA for managing sprint backlogs, service tickets, and project management tasks.
* Strong familiarity with SCRUM methodologies, with hands\-on experience leading agile development teams.
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and ability to work under pressure in a fast\-paced environment.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate with various teams.

  

Good to have skills(Not mandatory):  

* Experience with SOAREPO for artifact management.
* Experience with Kibana and other logging/monitoring tools.
* Knowledge of security best practices in software development and deployment.
* Experience in mentoring junior developers and fostering a collaborative environment.

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**  

  

Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…  

  

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.  

  

Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.  

  

You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well\-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
