Oracle will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records pursuant to applicable law.

d25dd42b.title: Technical Program Manager
d25dd42b.description:
**About Turing**
 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises looking to deploy advanced AI systems. Turing accelerates frontier research with high\-quality data, specialized talent, and training pipelines that advance thinking, reasoning, coding, multimodality, and STEM. For enterprises, Turing builds proprietary intelligence systems that integrate AI into mission\-critical workflows, unlock transformative outcomes, and drive lasting competitive advantage.
   

  

 Recognized by Forbes, The Information, and Fast Company among the world’s top innovators, Turing’s leadership team includes AI technologists from Meta, Google, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, McKinsey, Bain, Stanford, Caltech, and MIT. Learn more at www.turing.com
   

  

**Job Description: Technical Program Manager – AI/LLM Training Programs**
**Role Overview**
 We are seeking an experienced
 **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** 
 to oversee end\-to\-end program management for AI/LLM training initiatives, large\-scale dataset creation efforts, and cross\-functional operations with our global data partners. This role requires a strong technical foundation, exceptional stakeholder management skills, and an ability to drive complex, multi\-team programs to success.
   

  

 You will work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, annotation teams, QA specialists, and external partners to ensure projects are delivered with consistent quality, on time, and within scope.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Program Planning \& Execution**
* Lead strategic planning, execution, and delivery of AI/LLM training programs and dataset creation projects.
* Define program scope, milestones, KPIs, and timelines; manage risks, resource needs, and dependencies.
* Build and maintain program dashboards, progress reports, and documentation for internal and external partners.


**Cross\-Functional Coordination**
* Collaborate with data labs, engineering, research, annotation, QA, and vendor teams to align goals and drive execution.
* Manage communication across technical and non\-technical stakeholders, ensuring clarity and accountability.
* Facilitate sprint planning, standups, and operational reviews for multi\-stream program teams.


**Quality \& Process Management**
* Implement scalable processes for data quality oversight, annotation workflows, and model training pipelines.
* Monitor dataset quality metrics and coordinate issue resolution with labeling and QA teams.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives across tools, workflows, compliance, and documentation.


**Technical Leadership**
* Understand data schemas, ML model training needs, labeling guidelines, and evaluation frameworks.
* Work with technical teams to surface requirements, solve bottlenecks, and optimize program workflows.
* Support integration of internal tools, automation, and AI\-assisted labeling systems.


**Vendor \& Client Engagement**
* Act as the primary program point of contact for global data lab clients.
* Manage vendor relationships, SLAs, compliance, and delivery expectations.
* Prepare and lead client reviews, performance assessments, and strategic planning discussions.


**Qualifications**
**Required**
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience, preferably in AI, ML, data operations, or large\-scale tech programs.
* Strong understanding of AI/ML concepts (LLMs, dataset creation, labeling pipelines, data quality, model evaluation).
* Proven experience delivering multi\-phase technical programs with cross\-functional global teams.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and problem\-solving skills.
* Experience with project management tools (e.g., Jira, Asana, Notion) and data/documentation systems.
* Ability to manage ambiguity, operate independently, and drive outcomes in fast\-paced environments.


**Preferred**
* Experience working with data annotation vendors, research labs, or ML ops teams.
* Familiarity with prompt engineering, RLHF, supervised fine\-tuning (SFT), or evaluation dataset creation.


**Values**
* We are client first: We put our clients at the center of everything we do, because their success is the ultimate measure of our value.
* We work at Start\-Up Speed: We move fast, stay agile and favor action because momentum is the foundation of perfection
* We are AI forward: We help our clients build the future of Al and implement it in our own roles and workflow to amplify productivity.


**Advantages of joining Turing**
* Amazing work culture (Super collaborative \& supportive work environment; 5 days a week)
* Awesome colleagues (Surround yourself with top talent from Meta, Google, LinkedIn etc. as well as people with deep startup experience)
* Competitive compensation
* Flexible working hours


**Don’t meet every single requirement?** 
 Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply to jobs unless they meet every single qualification. Turing is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status, or any other legally protected characteristics. At Turing we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace and celebrate authenticity, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.
   

  

 For applicants from the European Union, please review Turing's GDPR notice here.

c497f86d.title: Technical Program Manager
c497f86d.description:
****Job Title: Technical Program Manager****
****Location: Pune, India – In\-office Role****
****Reports to: Director of Engineering****
 Role Overview
   

  

 We are seeking a Technical Program Manager to play a critical role in the delivery of our new, innovative AI platform \- RISE. As the Technical Scrum Master / Program Manager, you are the primary custodian of team productivity and delivery health. You are not just a meeting facilitator, but a "flow master" responsible for optimizing the end\-to\-end value stream—from product discovery to production release. You will bridge the gap between strategic product vision and technical execution, ensuring high\-energy squads remain focused, unblocked, and aligned with mission\-critical goals.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

****Flow Optimization \& Mastery:****
 Act as the "bulldozer" for the team, identifying and aggressively removing technical and organizational impediments that hinder velocity.
   

  

 Agile Facilitation: Lead high\-energy Scrum ceremonies (Daily Stand\-ups, Sprint Planning, Retrospectives) and refine Kanban/Scrum processes to maintain a constant, sustainable work pace.
   

  

****Technical Delivery Oversight:****
 Use your technical background to engage in architecture discussions and issue triage, addressing first\-level blockers before they reach engineering management.
   

  

 Stakeholder \& Product Alignment: Partner with Product Owners to manage and groom backlogs, ensuring technical debt and architectural initiatives are balanced with feature delivery.
   

  

****Metric\-Driven Improvement:****
 Track and analyze flow metrics (Cycle Time, Lead Time, Velocity, and Throughput) to identify bottlenecks and drive continuous improvement.
   

  

****Shielding \& Focus:****
 Protect the team from external disruptions and "scope creep" by acting as the primary point of contact for stakeholders during active sprints.
   

  

 Communicate program status, risks, and decisions clearly to leadership
   

  

 Create and maintain program reports, dashboards, and executive\-ready views of delivery health
   

  

**Required Skills**
****Agile Expert:****
 Mastery of Scrum, Kanban, and Lean principles, with experience applying them in "high\-intensity" product environments.
   

  

****Program Management:****
 Proven ability to manage dependencies across multiple cross\-functional teams and maintain a high\-level roadmap while managing tactical sprint tasks.
   

  

****Technical Acumen:****
 Ability to "speak the same language" as developers—understanding CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and modern web architectures (e.g., ROR/React).
   

  

****Tools Mastery:****
 Power user of Jira and Confluence, capable of building advanced dashboards and automation workflows to visualize team health.
   

  

 What This Role Solves
   

  

* Missed or unpredictable delivery timelines
* Poor or inconsistent cross\-team coordination
* Unclear ownership and accountability
* Misalignment between Engineering, Product, and Business stakeholders


 Seniority \& Experience
   

  

* 6\+ years of experience in Technical Program Management or a related role
* Proven success driving cross\-team software delivery
* Experience operating in ambiguous, fast\-moving environments
* Platform, infrastructure, or large\-scale product experience is a plus


 Leadership Traits \& Soft Skills
   

  

* Strong self\-starter with a bias toward action and delivery
* Comfortable engaging in healthy conflict and holding teams accountable
* Direct, clear, and confident communicator
* Resilient under pressure and comfortable with difficult conversations


**Benefits**
* Medical insurance for employees and family, including parents/in\-laws
* Accident coverage for employees
* EAP powered by Living App
* Catered lunch
* Indoor games and team engagement
* Office snacks and refreshments
* Public holidays 10 days
* 20 PTOs and 6 CL/SL, full maternity and 4 weeks paternity

fe7c1103.title: Technical Program Manager
fe7c1103.description:
**Job Description: Technical Program Manager – AI/LLM Training Programs** 




**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking an experienced
 **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** 
 to oversee end\-to\-end program management for AI/LLM training initiatives, large\-scale dataset creation efforts, and cross\-functional operations with our global data partners. This role requires a strong technical foundation, exceptional stakeholder management skills, and an ability to drive complex, multi\-team programs to success.
 



 You will work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, annotation teams, QA specialists, and external partners to ensure projects are delivered with consistent quality, on time, and within scope.
 



  





  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**Program Planning \& Executio** 
 n
 


* Lead strategic planning, execution, and delivery of AI/LLM training programs and dataset creation projects.
* Define program scope, milestones, KPIs, and timelines; manage risks, resource needs, and dependencies
* Build and maintain program dashboards, progress reports, and documentation for internal and external partners



  





  





**Cross\-Functional Coordination** 



* Collaborate with data labs, engineering, research, annotation, QA, and vendor teams to align goals and drive execution
* Manage communication across technical and non\-technical stakeholders, ensuring clarity and accountability
* Facilitate sprint planning, standups, and operational reviews for multi\-stream program teams



  





  





**Quality \& Process Management** 



* Implement scalable processes for data quality oversight, annotation workflows, and model training pipelines
* Monitor dataset quality metrics and coordinate issue resolution with labeling and QA teams
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives across tools, workflows, compliance, and documentation



  





**Technical Leadership** 



* Understand data schemas, ML model training needs, labeling guidelines, and evaluation framework
* Work with technical teams to surface requirements, solve bottlenecks, and optimize program workflows
* Support integration of internal tools, automation, and AI\-assisted labeling systems



  





  





**Vendor \& Client Engagement** 



* Act as the primary program point of contact for global data lab clients
* Manage vendor relationships, SLAs, compliance, and delivery expectations
* Prepare and lead client reviews, performance assessments, and strategic planning discussions



  





  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Required5\+ years of program or project management experience, preferably in AI, ML, data operations, or large\-scale tech programs.
* Strong understanding of AI/ML concepts (LLMs, dataset creation, labeling pipelines, data quality, model evaluation).
* Proven experience delivering multi\-phase technical programs with cross\-functional global teams.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and problem\-solving skills.
* Experience with project management tools (e.g., Jira, Asana, Notion) and data/documentation systems.
* Ability to manage ambiguity, operate independently, and drive outcomes in fast\-paced environments



  





  





**Preferred Experience** 



* Working with data annotation vendors, research labs, or ML ops teams.
* Familiarity with prompt engineering, RLHF, supervised fine\-tuning (SFT), or evaluation dataset creation.

f36eae4e.title: Program & Delivery manager
f36eae4e.description:
**About Finkraft**
 Finkraft.ai is an AI\-first financial\-automation company. We turn the messiest layer of enterprise travel and tax — invoices, entity identities and indirect\-tax recovery — into clean, compliant, recoverable data for large corporates and their travel ecosystems. Our Bangalore team builds and runs the engine; we are now standing up the product, AI, data and go\-to\-market tracks that power our UAE and GCC expansion.
   

  

**Why this role exists**
*Several tracks are shipping at once, against a hard regulatory window. Right now, on\-time delivery lives in the founder’s head — it shouldn’t.*
 We need one person who owns the answer to “does it ship on time” across product, AI, data and GTM — turning founder velocity into sequenced, tracked, blocker\-free execution. This is the keystone hire for the build pod: nothing else lands predictably without it.
   

  

**The shape of the role**
**Where you’ll be.** 
 Based in Bangalore with the build pod, owning delivery for the UAE/GCC product and go\-to\-market sprint. It’s a hands\-on operating role in a fast, founder\-led environment — not a process\-administration seat.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**What you’ll own — roles \& responsibilities**
* One plan, one tracker. Build and maintain the master sprint plan and a single tracker of truth across all tracks — product, AI, data and GTM — with clear RACI where ownership is contested.
* Daily execution. Run standups that aren’t theatre, surface blockers fast, and drive blocker mean\-time\-to\-resolution down — you unblock, you don’t just escalate.
* Risk \& dependencies. Keep a live risk register and track external dependencies — ASP/e\-invoicing rails, PMS/ERP, banks, vendors — so nothing slips silently.
* Leadership visibility. Produce a weekly dashboard a founder reads in sixty seconds: what shipped, what’s at risk, what needs a decision.
* Hiring cadence. Run the pod’s hiring and onboarding tracker so staffing keeps pace with the build plan.


**Requirements**
**The track record we’re looking for**
 We’re Looking For Someone Who Has Done This Before — Who Has Held a Multi\-track Program Together When It Mattered. Concretely
   

  

* Multi\-workstream delivery. 8–14 years in delivery or program management in SaaS, fintech or technology services, running parallel workstreams with real external dependencies.
* A bias to unblock. You can point to a stuck, cross\-team dependency you personally drove to resolution — not one you merely flagged upward.
* Relentless follow\-through. You measure, you chase, you close loops — and you can show the metrics you ran a program by.
* Comfort in ambiguity. You’ve operated inside founder\-led chaos and brought order to it without slowing it down.


**Who You Are**
****What we’re looking for****
****What great looks like****
**Multi\-workstream delivery**
 You’ve sequenced and shipped programs spanning several teams and external partners, on cadence.
   

  

**Dependency \& risk management**
 You track and de\-risk external dependencies (vendors, banks, integrations) before they bite.
   

  

**Blocker removal**
 You drive blockers to closure with low MTTR — ownership, not just escalation.
   

  

**Tracker \& tooling discipline**
 One source of truth, set up day one; status a CEO can read in a minute.
   

  

**Operating without authority**
 You move teams without needing formal reporting lines over them.
   

  

**What Gives You An Edge**
* PMP, PRINCE2, CSM or SAFe certification.
* Exposure to travel, tax, e\-invoicing or integration/ASP programs.
* Fluency with Jira, Linear, ClickUp or Notion as delivery systems, not just trackers.
* Experience delivering against a compliance or regulatory deadline.

0b6f84f8.title: Bid Manager
0b6f84f8.description:
**Job Description**
 We are looking for an experienced
 **Bid Manager / Proposal Manager** 
 to support end\-to\-end bid management, proposal development, response management, and pricing activities for Digital Customer Experience (DCX) opportunities. In this role, you will work closely with Sales, Solution, Delivery, and Account teams to develop winning proposals, customer presentations, and sales pitches for global clients.
   

  

**Your Role:**
* Manage end\-to\-end bid and proposal processes, including RFPs, RFIs, RFQs, and proactive pursuits.
* Drive bid planning, bid/no\-bid decisions, response integration, and submission management.
* Collaborate with Sales, Solution Architects, Delivery Teams, SMEs, and Account Teams to develop high\-quality proposals.
* Support commercial and pricing discussions by coordinating with deal analysts and stakeholders.
* Create compelling customer presentations, sales pitches, and proposal collateral.
* Maintain proposal repositories, standard templates, boilerplate content, and rate cards.
* Track pursuit progress, provide status updates, and ensure timely completion of deliverables.
* Support the development of case studies, capability presentations, and market intelligence research.


**Required Skills \& Experience:**
* Experience in Bid Management, Proposal Management, or Presales within a Tier\-1 or Tier\-2 IT Services organization.
* Strong understanding of proposal development, bid governance, and solution selling.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to coordinate with technical SMEs and cross\-functional stakeholders globally.
* Exposure to Digital Experience, CRM, Commerce, Mobile, or Enterprise Technology solutions is preferred.


**Preferred Technical Exposure:** 
 Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), Sitecore, Pega, B2B/B2C Commerce, Mobile Applications, Java, and Microsoft technologies.

In this role, you will work closely with Sales, Solution, Delivery, and Account teams to develop winning proposals, customer presentations, and sales pitches for global clients.

* Support the development of case studies, capability presentations, and market intelligence research.


**Required Skills \& Experience:**

**Preferred Technical Exposure:** 
 Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), Sitecore, Pega, B2B/B2C Commerce, Mobile Applications, Java, and Microsoft technologies.

a0eea883.title: Solutions Architect
a0eea883.description:
FireMon has learned an unknown and unauthorized third party is impersonating FireMon HR as part of a phishing attempt. Communications from FireMon will always originate from the FireMon.com domain. FireMon will never ask for any banking information as part of an interview process. If you are concerned whether a communication from FireMon is legitimate, please contact us at \[email protected]
   

  

 The Solutions Architect plays a critical role within the FireMon Customer Experience team, helping to assess business opportunities and shape strategies to address technical challenges. This role collaborates closely with security architects, infrastructure specialists, and engineering teams within customer organizations to design impactful, results\-driven solutions. You will support both Pre\-Sale (Buyer’s Journey) and Post\-Sale (Customer Journey) phases. Your technical expertise, strategic insights, and in\-depth product knowledge will empower customers to make informed decisions and achieve success in their projects.
   

  

 Applicants for this role should understand that US timezone coverage will be needed.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Contribute to the process improvement and implementation methodology focused on prescriptively and proactively getting a customer to value as quickly as possible.
* Provide thought leadership related to API integration as the right approach for the management and delivery of Automation and Workflow for our customers.
* Account for the decisions you propose and be an expert in the implementation of proposed solutions.
* Conduct business process analyses, needs assessments, and preliminary cost/benefits analyses to align technology solutions with business initiatives.
* Partner with users to define and analyze problems and align the most appropriate technical, application or configuration solutions.
* Help develop, document, and manage the requirements gathering process and provide detailed design and business processes to support the requirements throughout the project life cycle up to and through change control.
* Review system test plans and system test applications to ensure successful test cycles.
* Partner with the end\-user to select or create appropriate scenarios to test implemented solutions to determine whether the solution meets shared requirements.
* Serve as a functional and technical resource for the project team and establish Level of Effort (LOE) and duration estimates for projects.
* Build architecture best practices.


**Required Skills And Experience**
* Bachelor's degree in the field of Science, Technology, Engineering, Math, or equivalent practical experience.
* Five or more years of business analysis and consulting experience – to or within large corporations, relating to enterprise software implementation and change management.
* Five or more years of experience designing and implementing client\-facing solutions.
* Strong problem solving and critical thinking skills
* Strong verbal and written communication skills


**Preferred Skills And Experience**
* Experience with the technologies relevant to the ServiceNow integration solutions, including SSO, SAML, SSL, Web Services, LDAP, JDBC, ODBC, REST, SCP, and FTPS
* Familiarity with multiple languages, including C\+\+, Java, Python Perl, or another programming language
* Experience implementing solutions using API Management Platforms
* Experience in technology architecture and implementation on the ServiceNow platform
* Communicate solution recommendations and influence decision\-makers
* Startup mentality with responsibilities for partner management
* Demonstrate experience across all phases of the SDLC and Agile software development practices
* Write design specifications and use appropriate charts and diagrams to illustrate your ideas
* Experience with incident management, service request, problem management, change management, discovery, and configuration management databases (CMDB)
* Experience designing application deployments on public (AWS, Azure) and hybrid cloud setup
* Ability to collaborate and communicate effectively with people from different disciplines and varying degrees of technical experience, at all levels within the organization and with external customers


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

SAP, ERP, ONESOURCE Tax Engine, SAP FICO, Financial Management, Order to Cash, Taxation, Statutory Reporting, Scrum, Agile, Procurement

4e292252.title: Technical Architect
4e292252.description:
Bengaluru, Karnataka
  
Job Summary
  
  

**JOB DESCRIPTIONS:** Human Resource Business Process Consultant – ServiceNow HRSD Position Summary: We are seeking an experienced Human Resource Business Process Consultant with deep knowledge of HR operations and ServiceNow HR Service Delivery (HRSD). In this role, you will partner with clients and internal teams to analyze, design, and implement optimized HR processes using the ServiceNow platform. You’ll serve as the bridge between HR functional teams and technical developers, ensuring solutions are aligned with HR best practices, compliance requirements, and user experience expectations. Required Qualifications: • Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business, Information Systems, or related field. • 10\+ years of HR experience, with strong knowledge of HR service delivery models. • 10\+ years of experience implementing or working with ServiceNow HRSD. • Strong understanding of: o HR Case Management o HR Knowledge Management o Lifecycle Events o HR data privacy and compliance • Proven experience in HR process design, optimization, and change enablement. • Excellent communication, facilitation, and stakeholder engagement skills. • Ability to translate business needs into structured user stories or functional specifications. Preferred Qualifications: • ServiceNow HRSD Implementation Specialist certification. • Experience working in a consulting or HR transformation environment. • Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies and ServiceNow implementation approaches. • Experience with integrations between ServiceNow and HCM systems (e.g., Workday, SuccessFactors). • Exposure to global HR operations and multilingual/multi\-region HR service delivery. Please find the important areas which need to be covered: 1\. Case Management (COE, COE Security Policies, HR Criteria, HR Service, Assignment and Matching Rule, and all other features) 2\. 7fc14abb.title: Cloud Engineer
7fc14abb.description:
**Cloud Engineer** 




 Remote, India
 



  





 NIKSUN is the recognized worldwide leader in making the Unknown Known, by using next\-generation technology that revolutionizes the way networks and services are secured, protected, and managed. The company develops and deploys a complete range of award\-winning forensics, compliance, security surveillance, and performance management solutions for applications ranging from core infrastructures to edge and branch environments.
 



  





 NIKSUN is seeking an experienced cloud engineer,
 **responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining cloud\-based infrastructure and services** 
 . This role is essential to ensuring the availability, performance, and scalability of our cloud\-native services and platforms. The ideal candidate will bring hands\-on experience in managing cloud environments and Kubernetes\-based deployments in production.
 



  





**Key responsibilities:** 




  




* Operate, monitor, and optimize clusters for performance and health, including cluster upgrades, patching, and performance tuning.
* Design and administer Kubernetes clusters including addition of new nodes, maintenance of existing nodes and infrastructure, management of taints and tolerations, etc
* Ensure high availability, fault tolerance, and cost\-efficiency across cloud\-based systems.
* Automate infrastructure tasks using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform, CloudFormation, or Ansible.
* Build and support CI/CD pipelines via Jenkins to streamline application deployment.
* Collaborate with development and DevOps teams to support application rollouts and incident management.
* Monitor system health and respond to incidents with clear communication and effective troubleshooting.
* Maintain detailed documentation for infrastructure, procedures, and runbooks.



  





**Requirements:** 




  




* 3\+ years of experience in cloud engineering, DevOps, or related infrastructure roles.
* Solid knowledge of
 **Kubernetes** 
 operations, Helm, and container runtimes (Docker, containers).
* Familiarity with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins and GitLab CI.
* Strong understanding of Linux operating systems and their administration



  





**Education:** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree in computer science or computer engineering



  





 The role involves working with customer engineering teams on a wide variety of cloud infrastructure projects, including migration, containerization, and transformation initiatives. Experience in regulated environments (HIPAA, PCI, ITAR, etc.) is beneficial.
 



  





 The Cloud Engineer will be part of a dynamic team designing, automating, and deploying services for NIKSUN’s internal and external cloud environments. This is an ideal opportunity for candidates who enjoy a challenging and exciting work environment, where the problems they solve are constantly evolving.
 



  





*Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, marital status, affectional or sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, disability, nationality, or protected veteran status*

21ada7fb.title: Solution Engineer
21ada7fb.description:
****Description****
 Job Title: Solution Engineer
   

  

**About The Team**
 The Generative AI team collaborates closely with clients to understand their unique needs and to customize AI solutions that enhance their operational efficiency and product offerings. Our team of solution architects and consultants is at the forefront of AI technology, advising clients on best practices and innovative approaches to integrate AI seamlessly into their workflows.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Solution Engineer will oversee a range of projects for key clients in designated geographical regions: Americas, EMEA, and APAC. They will be working with our customers to understand their requirements, collaborating with internal stakeholders to design solutions, execute POCs, and implement solutions.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Working closely with the project management team in designing \& implementing technical solutions for multiple projects and ensuring their efficacy and smooth data integration for various projects.
* Identify and provide timely workarounds and solutions when possible for incoming technical issues in project execution.
* Articulating features and differentiating solutions offerings to audiences ranging from project managers to end clients.
* Assist in developing analytics dashboards for customers and the fulfillment team (Product Management \& Supply Team), and write SQL queries.
* Documenting the technical solutions in precise detail so they can be reproducible in the future.
* Interacting with the clients to understand and help them in the data integration process, if needed.
* Driving operational efficiency by writing scripts \& APIs (Python, JS) to automate day\-to\-day work.


**Qualifications**
* Problem\-solving skills coupled with a sense of ownership and drive
* 02 year to 04 year of professional experience in writing scripts \& automation in Python and JavaScript.
* Bachelor's degree in Engineering. Computer Science is preferred.
* Expert in writing SQL.
* Good written and verbal communication skills
* A never\-ending desire to grow and learn.
* You understand programming logic and software well.
* You are inherently curious and believe any process can be improved upon and actively work on it.
* Prior knowledge of computer vision and machine learning algorithms is preferred.


****About Company:****
 TELUS Digital is the customer experience transformation partner to the world's most admired brands. Our diverse team weaves data, technology, and human ingenuity to deliver differentiated customer journeys, drive operational effectiveness, and scale AI solutions with meaningful value and positive impact.
   

  

 We craft real\-world solutions in the moments that matter, from customer acquisition to lifelong loyalty. Enabled by our global reach \- spanning 78,000 experts in 33 countries \- and deep industry expertise, we help over 600 organizations make the customer experience feel effortless.
   

  

 Our solutions span Data \& AI, Digital Experience \& IT, CX Management and Trust \& Safety. At the core of our innovation is Fuel iX™, an enterprise\-grade generative AI platform that helps clients safely access and optimize leading LLMs to scale their own AI from pilot to production.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer Statement**
 At TELUS Digital, we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. All aspects of employment, including the decision to hire and promote, are based on applicant's qualifications, merits, competence and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.

3e95562e.title: Senior Solutions Architect
3e95562e.description:
**Full Stack Solutions Architect (Senior)** 




*Architect — Solutions Practice* 




 AI\-Led Development \| Retail \& E\-Commerce
 



  





**Job Responsibilities** 




**Solution Architecture \& Hands\-On Delivery** 



* **Design end\-to\-end** 
 scalable, resilient full\-stack architectures for retail and e\-commerce platforms across web, mobile, and headless/commerce APIs.
* **Personally** 
 prototype and contribute production\-grade code across front end (React/Next.js, TypeScript) and back end (Node.js, Java, Python, or Go).
* **Architect** 
 cloud\-native solutions (AWS/Azure/GCP) with microservices, APIs, containers, IaC, and solid CI/CD and DevSecOps practices.
* **Guard** 
 delivery quality — reviewing designs and code, unblocking teams, and owning performance, scalability, and security.



**AI\-Led Development \& GenAI** 



* **Champion** 
 an AI\-led way of working — AI\-assisted coding, testing, and review — so small teams deliver faster at higher quality.
* **Architect and integrate** 
 customer\-facing AI features into client solutions: conversational commerce, semantic/vector search, personalization, and GenAI content.
* **Design** 
 LLM/RAG solutions responsibly — retrieval pipelines, embeddings, prompt orchestration, guardrails, evaluation, and cost control.



**Talent Enablement (Staffing Advantage)** 



* **Partner with** 
 our recruiting team to define the technical profiles, screen candidates, and validate skills for delivery teams.
* **Mentor** 
 and upskill engineers on the bench through mentoring, reusable training, and pairing — building capability, not dependency.
* **Advise on** 
 hiring and staffing decisions so we scale delivery capacity efficiently as demand grows.



**Practice \& Offering Development** 



* **Define and package** 
 service offerings and reusable solution accelerators for retail/e\-commerce and AI\-led development that we can sell repeatably.
* **Build** 
 delivery playbooks, reference architectures, estimation models, and reusable code/IP that reduce cost and de\-risk each engagement.
* **Help select** 
 technology partnerships and platform choices (commerce, cloud, AI) that shape our go\-to\-market.



  





**Pre\-Sales \& Solutioning** 



* **Lead technical** 
 client discussions, discovery workshops, and proposals — translating business needs into clear, credible solution designs and estimates.
* **Produce** 
 solution archite
* ctures, statements of work, and proof\-of\-concept demos that win client confidence and close deals.
* **Act** 
 as the trusted technical advisor to clients and to our internal sales and account teams.



**Required Qualifications** 



* 8\+ years in software engineering, including 3\+ years in a solutions/software architecture capacity preferably in the Retail domain/ E\-Commerce platforms \& applications.
* Proven full\-stack expertise: modern front\-end (React/Next.js, TypeScript) and back\-end services (Node.js, Java, Python, or Go).
* Strong, demonstrable experience delivering retail or e\-commerce platforms and applications at scale.
* Hands\-on experience integrating AI/GenAI into products — LLMs, RAG, embeddings/vector search, or ML\-driven personalization.
* Deep cloud experience (AWS, Azure, or GCP): microservices, APIs, containers/Kubernetes, and infrastructure as code.
* Client\-facing and pre\-sales experience — scoping solutions, writing proposals/SOWs, and presenting to stakeholders.
* A self\-starter comfortable operating with ambiguity and building something new with limited resources.
* Excellent communication and the ability to lead technical decisions across distributed, remote teams.



**Preferred / Nice\-to\-Have** 



* Prior experience in a services, consulting, or systems\-integration environment (ideally helping start or scale a practice).
* Experience with headless/composable commerce (commerce tools, Shopify, Salesforce Commerce Cloud, Adobe Commerce/Magento, BigCommerce).
* Familiarity with search/personalization stacks (Algolia, Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, vector databases) and OMS/ERP/PIM/payment integrations.
* Exposure to MLOps/LLMOps, model evaluation, and responsible\-AI governance.
* Experience working with or within a staffing/talent organization.



**What You Bring** 



* An owner's mindset — you are excited to build a practice, not just execute a role.
* A builder's instinct — you architect by prototyping, and you make reusable assets others can run with.
* Commercial awareness — you understand cost, margin, and how technical choices affect what we can sell and deliver.
* Pragmatism and high leverage — you get more done with less and multiply the team around you.



  





**What We Offer** 




 A rare chance to shape a new services business from day one and define its technical DNA; a fully remote, flexible environment; direct influence with leadership; and competitive compensation and benefits with clear upside as the practice grows.

2620983e.title: Solutions Architect
2620983e.description:
*FireMon has learned an unknown and unauthorized third party is impersonating FireMon HR as part of a phishing attempt. Communications from FireMon will always originate from the* *FireMon.com* *domain. FireMon will never ask for any banking information as part of an interview process. If you are concerned whether a communication from FireMon is legitimate, please contact us at* *\[email protected]*

The Solutions Architect plays a critical role within the FireMon Customer Experience team, helping to assess business opportunities and shape strategies to address technical challenges. This role collaborates closely with security architects, infrastructure specialists, and engineering teams within customer organizations to design impactful, results\-driven solutions. You will support both Pre\-Sale (Buyer’s Journey) and Post\-Sale (Customer Journey) phases. Your technical expertise, strategic insights, and in\-depth product knowledge will empower customers to make informed decisions and achieve success in their projects.

Applicants for this role should understand that US timezone coverage will be needed.
### **Responsibilities**

* Contribute to the process improvement and implementation methodology focused on prescriptively and proactively getting a customer to value as quickly as possible.
* Provide thought leadership related to API integration as the right approach for the management and delivery of Automation and Workflow for our customers.
* Account for the decisions you propose and be an expert in the implementation of proposed solutions.
* Conduct business process analyses, needs assessments, and preliminary cost/benefits analyses to align technology solutions with business initiatives.
* Partner with users to define and analyze problems and align the most appropriate technical, application or configuration solutions.
* Help develop, document, and manage the requirements gathering process and provide detailed design and business processes to support the requirements throughout the project life cycle up to and through change control.
* Review system test plans and system test applications to ensure successful test cycles.
* Partner with the end\-user to select or create appropriate scenarios to test implemented solutions to determine whether the solution meets shared requirements.
* Serve as a functional and technical resource for the project team and establish Level of Effort (LOE) and duration estimates for projects.
* Build architecture best practices.
### **Required Skills and Experience**

* Bachelor's degree in the field of Science, Technology, Engineering, Math, or equivalent practical experience.
* Five or more years of business analysis and consulting experience – to or within large corporations, relating to enterprise software implementation and change management.
* Five or more years of experience designing and implementing client\-facing solutions.
* Strong problem solving and critical thinking skills
* Strong verbal and written communication skills
### **Preferred Skills and Experience**

* Experience with the technologies relevant to the ServiceNow integration solutions, including SSO, SAML, SSL, Web Services, LDAP, JDBC, ODBC, REST, SCP, and FTPS
* Familiarity with multiple languages, including C\+\+, Java, Python Perl, or another programming language
* Experience implementing solutions using API Management Platforms
* Experience in technology architecture and implementation on the ServiceNow platform
* Communicate solution recommendations and influence decision\-makers
* Startup mentality with responsibilities for partner management
* Demonstrate experience across all phases of the SDLC and Agile software development practices
* Write design specifications and use appropriate charts and diagrams to illustrate your ideas
* Experience with incident management, service request, problem management, change management, discovery, and configuration management databases (CMDB)
* Experience designing application deployments on public (AWS, Azure) and hybrid cloud setup
* Ability to collaborate and communicate effectively with people from different disciplines and varying degrees of technical experience, at all levels within the organization and with external customers
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

be7391df.title: Global Solutions Partner Development Manager
be7391df.description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience in business development, partnerships, management consulting, or investment banking.
* Experience working with C\-level executives and cross\-functionally across all levels of management.
* Experience in supporting partners in creation of GTM offerings (e.g., application and infrastructure).
* Experience in designing application and infrastructure solutions.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience in delivering cloud agreements.
* Experience in taking new products and solutions to market, developing GTM offerings with partners based on industry and regional requirements.
* Experience in conducting partner executive briefings along with understanding of industry offerings and excellent communication skills.

**About the job**
-----------------


Google's line of products and services to our clients never stops growing. The Partnerships Development team is responsible for seeking and exploring new opportunities with Google's partners. Equipped with your business acumen and extensive product knowledge, you are right on the front line of interacting with our partners, and helping them find ways to grow using Google's newest product offerings. Your knowledge of relevant verticals and relationships with key industry players will help shape our great applications and content for products such as YouTube, Google TV and Commerce.



In this role, you will work with partners to develop pipelines, land joint wins and accelerate customer and partner value including accelerating consumption for the joint solution offerings. You will also work with partners to drive the GTM initiative by leading the Go\-to\-Market (GTM) efforts for application and infrastructure. You will help define the business plays and act as a trusted advisor to the partner in the entire journey of identifying new opportunities, developing capabilities, solutions and service offerings, pursuing Go\-to\-Market business plays, landing wins and delivering customer success. You will drive execution of the campaigns in orchestration with partners technical, sales and marketing teams. You will be leveraging the experience in solution building, partner management, strategy and sales, demonstrating the aptitude and passion for working with partners to transform large organizations with Google Cloud technologies.


Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Help partners grow their business on Google Cloud by driving application and infrastructure solutions with the aim of serving as their trusted advisor for both pre\-sales and post sales customer engagements.
* Serve as the technical consultant for the strategic partners application and infrastructure practices. Conduct L200/L300\-level technical sessions on Google Cloud's application and infrastructure.
* Review and validate partner\-developed solution architectures to ensure technical excellence, security, cost\-effectiveness, and adherence to Google Cloud best practices. Provide direct technical guidance to partners on their solutions for performance and consumption.
* Lead the life\-cycle of GTM offering creation from business case, solutioning, planning and governance, business value, solution differentiation.
* Support partners to jointly develop GTM offering, landing with the field.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

20a771b2.title: Enterprise Solutions Architect - CorpTech
20a771b2.description:
**Company Overview**
--------------------



Arcesium is a global financial technology firm that solves complex data\-driven challenges faced by some of the world’s most sophisticated financial institutions. We constantly innovate our platform and capabilities to meet tomorrow’s challenges, anticipate the risks our clients encounter, and design advanced solutions to help our clients achieve transformational business outcomes.


Financial technology is a high\-growth industry as change and innovation continue to disrupt the status\-quo and prompt major transformation. Arcesium is at a particularly interesting time in our own growth as we look to leverage our successfully established market position and expand operations in pursuit of strategic new business opportunities. We value intellectual curiosity, proactive ownership, and collaboration with colleagues, and we empower you to meaningfully contribute from day one and accelerate your professional development.


A senior techno\-functional role sitting between business and engineering. You'll embed with business teams, translate their pain into buildable solutions, and drive them to production with Engineering Architects and Developers. Above all, this is a transformation role \- you will change how teams and departments work and deliver measurable business impact across the firm. This is an AI\-first role: Claude Chat, Cowork, and Code are core to how you discover, document, prototype, and deliver.


**What You'll Do:**


* **Drive transformation:** Act as change agent across teams and departments; land measurable business impact and lift internal NPS / stakeholder satisfaction by 20\+ points.
* **Discover \& re\-engineer processes:** Embed with business teams, map current/target\-state flows (BPMN), and cut cycle time 30–50% on 2–3 core workflows through re\-engineering, automation, and AI.
* **Translate to delivery artifacts:** Convert workflows into user stories, story points, acceptance criteria, and BRDs precise enough for engineers to build without rework.
* **Partner on solutions:** Shape design with Engineering Architects and Developers; stay engaged through build, test, and release.
* **Deliver AI\-first:** Use Claude Chat, Cowork, and Code daily; drive 80%\+ active adoption and 25%\+ productivity gains across your domains.
* **Own roadmap \& build\-vs\-buy:** Prioritize multi\-quarter plans; run POCs and present data\-driven build\-vs\-buy recommendations; unlock 1–2 firm\-level initiatives with measurable revenue or CX impact.
* **Deliver value \& reduce risk:** Lead Agile execution and stakeholder buy\-in; deliver $500K–$2M\+ annual savings/avoidance and cut incidents, audit findings, and control gaps by 40%\+.
* **Lead \& mentor:** Guide junior consultants (including as direct reports); raise delivery quality and win senior sponsorship.


**What You'll Need:**


* **Experience:** 10–15\+ years overall; 5–8\+ in Solutioning, product/project management, or technical consulting with a discovery\-to\-production track record.
* **Technical bar (screening filter):** Write SQL, read APIs, interpret architecture diagrams, and critically direct AI coding tools like Claude Code. Non\-technical analysts are not a fit.
* **AI\-first delivery:** Daily hands\-on with Claude Chat, Cowork, Code (or equivalents); able to set AI delivery standards for a team.
* **Transformation mindset:** Proven track record of cross\-functional change that materially altered how teams work — measurable impact, not just delivered projects.
* **Technical foundation:** Strong SQL, APIs, data modeling; solid grasp of SDLC, cloud (AWS/Azure), and modern architecture. Prior developer experience strongly preferred.
* **Delivery craft:** Hands\-on process mapping, user stories, and acceptance criteria; extensive Agile/Scrum and Jira/Confluence experience across concurrent workstreams.
* **Leadership \& communication:** Develop juniors, influence without authority, and write proposals that win senior buy\-in across business, technical, and executive audiences.
* **Education:** Bachelor's required; Master's in Management, Technology, or related preferred. Prior consulting or vertical\-industry background a plus.
  

**Recruiting Security**  

Emails from genuine Arcesium recruiters who are employees of the company will always come from the @arcesium.com domain. In some cases, you may also be contacted by independent search firms engaged to recruit on our behalf; emails from their employees should always come from their firm's applicable domain. We'll never ask for your banking information or any payment as part of the recruiting process. If something seems off or you're contacted by an unexpected third party, please reach out to us at careers@arcesium.com (US/UK), careers\-india@arcesium.com (India) or careers\-europe@arcesium.com (Portugal/Sweden).


*Arcesium is an equal opportunity employer.*

124298af.title: Senior Cloud/Infrastructure Consultant (Remote)
124298af.description:
* **Job Title:** 
 Senior Cloud/Infrastructure Consultant (Remote)
* **Work Mode:** 
 Fully Remote
* **Schedule:** 
 Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are looking for Senior DevOps Engineers to join a paid remote AI training program focused on Infrastructure as Code (IaC). In this role, you will write realistic engineering\-ticket\-style prompts, configure LocalStack sandboxes, and build golden solutions with passing end\-to\-end tests to help AI models master Terraform, AWS CDK, and CloudFormation. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well\-suited for senior\-level DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure engineers seeking project\-based, asynchronous work.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Task Creation:** 
 Write natural language prompts that read like real engineering tickets, including realistic ambiguity and professional context, so AI can handle real\-world scenarios.
* **Environment Configuration:** 
 Set up and configure LocalStack sandboxes (local AWS mocks) to validate infrastructure tasks
* **Golden Solution Development:** 
 Craft the initial infrastructure state and a "golden solution" that includes passing automated end\-to\-end tests
* **Quality Benchmarking:** 
 Ensure tasks meet a high quality bar; simple or poorly formatted tasks will be rejected.
* **Response Evaluation:** 
 Choose the correct response between two AI\-generated answers to a given infrastructure question
* **Prompt Writing:** 
 Draft simple prompts that act as a starting point for AI models to build upon



  





**Qualifications** 



* **Seniority** 
 : Must be a Senior\-level practitioner in DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure Engineering
* **IaC Platform Expertise** 
 : Professional, hands\-on experience with at least one of the following — High Priority: AWS CDK, Terraform (HCL), or CloudFormation; Medium/Low Priority: Pulumi, AzureRM, Ansible, Chef, or Puppet
* **Programming Languages:** 
 Strong proficiency in at least one of the following for infrastructure scripting and testing: TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, or Java
* **Communication** 
 : Ability to articulate complex technical concepts fluently in written English, following strict style guidelines



  





**Eligibility Requirements** 



* Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations: Argentina, Australia, Austria, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Colombia, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, India, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Luxembourg, Mexico, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Peru, Puerto Rico, Singapore, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States



  





**Compensation** 



* Earn up to $50 USD/hr — plus additional incentives; rates vary based on expertise and project requirements
* Paid via PayPal and AirTM



  





**Work Arrangement** 



* Fully remote; choose your own schedule
* Flexible workload depending on project availability, most experts spend 5–10 hrs/week, up to 40 hours
* Free access to leading AI tools (GPT, Claude, and more) worth over $200/month included at no extra cost



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




 Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.
 



  





*Ready to put your infrastructure expertise to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.*

d3aa5aa0.title: Software Development Manager, Risk and Compliance Solutions (RCS)
d3aa5aa0.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


If you have an entrepreneurial spirit, know how to deliver with AI native development, are deeply technical, highly innovative, and looking for the opportunity to build pioneering solutions to challenging problems in the regulatory compliance domain, this role is for you.
  

  

As a Software Development Manager in RCS, you will be managing technology teams to help innovate, build, and expand the tech solutions for Payments Regulatory Compliance domain. You will be directly responsible for defining and building the Signal Suite and its features for RCS Org. You will be working with a unique, talented, and gifted team developing new, exciting, high impact product for our customers. The team is a multidisciplinary group of engineers, analysts, and business people engaged in a fast\-paced mission to deliver and maintain this new product by balancing technical invention, schedule, and performance, and regulatory requirements. You should be comfortable collaborating regularly with colleagues across many of Amazon’s regulatory compliance teams. To be successful, you need to be flexible and entrepreneurial, comfortable operating with ambiguity, and willing to develop quick proof of concepts. Come help us revolutionize RCS's Signal Suite!  

  

Key job responsibilities  

As a technical leader of the RCS Engineering Team:
  

* You will be responsible for guiding your team through AI native design, development, testing, and deployment of RCS's own Signal Suite that automates the end\-to\-end payments regulatory compliance lifecycle activities.
* You will recruit, hire, mentor, and coach Software Development Engineers at different levels of experience for the high\-performing team.
* You will help build the roadmaps for software teams, developing innovative customer experiences.
* You will shape the Compliance software product by driving transformation across product development process, AI technology adoption for end\-to\-end product delivery, config\-driven architecture for multi\-tenant application.
* You will derive mechanisms, and tools that shape the delivery and maintenance of the Signal Suite.
* You will own all operational excellence metrics and support for your team’s software.
* You will drive cross\-team alignment with partner teams to ensure cohesive strategy and execution.

  

About the team  

Risk and Compliance Solutions (RCS) serves as a crucial safeguard for Amazon's buyers, brands, and selling partners while ensuring business teams meet their regulatory obligations. Operating under the Three Lines of Defense (3LoD) model, RCS functions as the second line of defense, providing specialized oversight, monitoring, and expertise while setting policies and procedures that guide Amazon's compliance framework.  

RCS's mission is to leverage specialist industry insights and Amazon's unique approach to scale through technology, delighting customers through tailored compliance solutions. Our work spans multiple critical areas, including:  

* Enabling Amazon's financial services expansion through streamlined license acquisition
* Managing existing business risks across the organization
* Delivering comprehensive governance, risk, and assurance services
* Developing innovative solutions like Compliance as a Service (CaaS)
* Transforming compliance operations into a proactive, intelligence\-led framework
**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 3\+ years of engineering team management experience
* 7\+ years of engineering experience
* 8\+ years of leading the definition and development of multi tier web services experience
* Knowledge of engineering practices and patterns for the full software/hardware/networks development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, certification, and livesite operations
* Experience partnering with product or program management teams
* Experience designing or architecting (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems
* Experience developing, deploying and managing AI products at scale
* Experience in operational excellence, security compliance, and distributed systems resiliency

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in communicating with users, other technical teams, and senior leadership to collect requirements, describe software product features, technical designs, and product strategy
* Experience in recruiting, hiring, mentoring/coaching and managing teams of Software Engineers to improve their skills, and make them more effective, product software engineers
* Master's degree in Computer Science or related technical field
* Experience working in risk, fraud or compliance organizations
* Experience as a mentor, tech lead or leading an engineering team, or experience in computer architecture

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

09a364ef.title: Value Delivery Manager
09a364ef.description:
**About Axis My India**
**Axis My India Limited** 
 is India’s leading consumer data intelligence company, committed to enabling data\-driven decision\-making. It has launched the
 **"A" App** 
 , a people empowerment platform designed to enhance the lives of a billion citizens by providing access to authentic information and practical solutions for everyday needs. The app follows a
 **PHYGITAL** 
 model, leveraging Axis My India’s vast network of 5,000\+ locations across 700 districts. Powered by
 **Google Cloud** 
 and
 **Google Gen AI** 
 , it continuously learns and improves to deliver better user experiences. The company is spearheaded by Mr. Pradeep Gupta who is a leading name in market research and is India’s top psephologist.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The Value Delivery Manager (VDM) is responsible for ensuring that every user (customer) receives timely, relevant, and personalized information, opportunities, services, and benefits through our in\-house developed ‘People Empowerment Platform (PEP)’. The role focuses on understanding user profiles and preferences, identifying authentic and valuable offerings from multiple sources, and ensuring that the right content reaches the right user at the right time. The individual will act as the central coordinator across Research, Data Centre, Technology, Content, and Operations teams to drive personalized value delivery and maximize user engagement and outcomes.
   

  

**Requirements**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Accurately understand user requirements, preferences, and needs to enable relevant and personalized value delivery.
* Ensure seamless end\-to\-end delivery of benefits, services, and information to app users by coordinating with all relevant teams and stakeholders.
* Work closely with the Research team to ensure consumer insights and on\-ground data are effectively collated, structured, and converted into actionable user intelligence.
* Leverage new user onboarding data to drive personalized content, recommendations, and engagement.
* Enable targeted user communication by ensuring the PEP team utilizes user data for delivering relevant and personalized information.
* Coordinate with the Data Research Center team to ensure timely user outreach for service listing, and engagement.
* Driving and monitoring service and product listing activities.


**Skills And Competencies**
* Pro\-active result\-oriented person
* Ability to understand user requirements
* Strong organizational and multitasking skills
* Passion and intent towards social service


**Education And Experience**
* Graduate (in any specialization)
* Over 8\-10 years working experience
* Senior tenured employee
* Having held managerial positions before


**Benefits**
* Opportunity to make significant contributions for India’s foremost Consumer Data Intelligence Company.
* Competitive salary and health insurance package.
* Stay up to date on the latest industry trends and best practices.
* Walking distance from Chakala metro station, making commuting easy and convenient.


***At Axis My India, we value discipline and focus. Our team members wear brand on sleeves, adhere to a no\-mobile policy during work hours, and work from our office with alternate Saturdays off. If you thrive in a structured environment and are committed to excellence, we encourage you to apply***
**.**

5abd95b5.title: Client Technology -Senior Product Delivery Manager
5abd95b5.description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**CT Senior Product Delivery Manager \- Associate Director**
 At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help build a better working world.
   

  

**The opportunity**
**The selected candidate will**
* The Senior Product Delivery Manager will bring a strong understanding of modern software engineering principles and architecture. While not expected to code daily, the TPM should have prior experience working closely with engineers, solution architects, and data specialists. They will able to translate complex technical concepts into actionable deliverables.
* Be responsible for identifying, handling and executing product strategies for their function
* The Senior PDM will interact with individuals up to the Partner rank socializing, identifying and recommending products
* This role is a primary contact and lead for all product aspects including strategy, user experience design, development, and deployment
* The role will continuously evaluate and validate product vision to anticipate and address changing business and user needs
* The role has accountability for value delivery and budget adherence. Ensuring that resources, services, and delivery outcomes align with agreed value metrics and budget parameters.
* This role is responsible for helping to find opportunities for products to align to the firm’s broader organizational mission and strategy and that it is competitively positioned driving revenue and EY’s technological footprint in the market
* This role will require a solid understanding of Azure\-based architectures, data and AI platforms (e.g., Databricks, M365 integrations), and modern DevOps practices to ensure effective collaboration across globally distributed development teams.


**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Within large projects, define and maintain realistic delivery plans, ensuring disciplined software lifecycle management across analysis, design, development, testing, and release. Drive adherence to quality gates, change control, and CI/CD processes.
* This position is a leadership position responsible for defining the vision, strategy, and roadmap for a sophisticated product or a set of products within a product family
* Manage a mid\-size team of product professionals, as well as roles across a software delivery lifecycle, such as architects, engineers, scrum masters etc.
* Provide matrix leadership and coaching to Business Analysts to ensure user stories are well\-structured, technically feasible, and meet Definition of Ready and Definition of Done standards. Establish and enforce story quality standards and backlog readiness criteria.
* This leadership position is responsible for thought leadership ensuring the product supports the organization’s overall strategy and goals
* Outstanding leadership with the ability to communicate the vision and goals of the product, product family, and offerings
* Drive strategy development, establish priorities and manage the roadmap using criteria and requirements defined during research
* Act as the customer advocate articulating the user’s and/or buyer’s needs
* Work closely with engineering, sales, marketing, and support to ensure business case and customer satisfaction goals are met
* Have technical product knowledge or specific domain expertise
* Define what to solve in the market needs document, where you articulate the valuable market problem you’re solving along with priorities and justification for each part of the solution
* Align with business teams on MVP requirements, run beta and pilot programs during the qualify phase
* In Agile environments, regularly reviews completed work and checks with customers to ensure that it meets the customer expectations
* Is a market professional. Market expertise includes understanding the reasons customers purchase products. This includes a deep understanding of the competition, and how customers think of and buy your product. Product Managers need market research and competitive analysis skills to complete these tasks
* Acts as the product’s leader within the company
* Develops the business case for new products, improvements to existing products, and business ventures
* Responsible for the development and positioning of 2\-3 mid\-size products or 1 large enterprise product that is global with responsibility for sophisticated customization. These products enable critical internal capabilities across the firm, supporting operational excellence and technology modernization objectives.
* Recommends or requires an awareness of competitive pricing to understand how pricing impacts product profit margin compared to competition
* Execute the product plan, collaborating with product owner, engineering and other teams
* Translate architectural direction into incremental deliverables. Lead technical discovery and spike activities to reduce delivery risk and accelerate time\-to\-value. Work closely with solution architects to ensure technical feasibility and alignment with enterprise standards.
* Demonstrate functionality of completed products to partners
* Develop metrics to assess the success of products and features and resolve vital enhancements
* Anticipate changes in market dynamics/models, adapts products, and creates product retirement and transitioning strategies
* Identify new products and features to create growth opportunities


**Skills And Attributes For Success**
* A strong understanding of software engineering lifecycle principles, DevOps pipelines, and Agile delivery frameworks (Scrum, SAFe) is essential. The TPM must be able to assess technical risks, interpret architecture decisions, and translate them into clear, testable, and deliverable work items.
* Manage the product lifecycle including market requirements, product release plans, user stories, release criteria, product launch, and organizational readiness activities
* Collect business and technical input to define and prioritize the product backlog, ensuring alignment with architecture and platform capabilities. Partner with the BPM and engineering to continuously refine and sequence backlog items for efficient sprint execution
* Partner with internal customers to validate requirements and priorities through various forums (analysis, meetings, focus groups, etc.) and refine those requirements for broad market applicability
* Collaborate with user experience, business analysts and engineers with a focus on defining product functionality and designing solutions that bring differentiating value to our current and prospective clients
* Supervise market changes and trends to assess competitive positioning and opportunities for strategic product enhancements
* Provide regular updates about product direction and release plans to the senior partners and clients
* Monitor and report on delivery metrics such as lead time, user story cycle time, bug density, and mean time to restore service (MTTR) to ensure delivery health and continuous improvement.


**What We Look For**
 A technically fluent, outcome\-driven product leader who combines strategic thinking with the ability to engage deeply in delivery detail. Someone who can coach teams, manage complex technical dependencies, and drive clarity between business intent and engineering execution
   

  

 A self\-starter, independent\-thinker, curious and creative person with ambition and passion!
   

  

**Preferred Certifications And Experience**
* Microsoft Azure or other cloud certifications (e.g., AZ\-900, AZ\-104, or equivalent)
* Professional Product Management (e.g., SAFe POPM, CSPO, PSPO)
* Agile or DevOps certifications (e.g., Scrum Master, DevOps Foundation)
* Experience using Azure DevOps, GitHub, and CI/CD pipelines for software delivery


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

6e278bcc.title: SAP Service Delivery Manager
6e278bcc.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Your Role**
* SAP Service Delivery Leadership – Lead SAP AMS engagements with ownership of service delivery, client management, and governance.
* Program \& Operations Management – Manage program planning, issue/risk resolution, budgets, P\&L, financial reporting, and delivery milestones.
* Client \& Stakeholder Management – Act as the primary client\-facing delivery lead, ensuring stakeholder alignment and service excellence.
* Agile Team Leadership – Lead multiple Scrum teams, mentor team members, and drive successful project execution using Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Transformation \& Continuous Improvement – Drive automation, operational efficiency, quality controls, process improvements, and SAP transformation initiatives.


**Your Profile**
* Overall Experience 9\-12 Years needed.
* SAP Techno\-Functional Expertise – Strong hands\-on experience in SAP modules with ECC and S/4HANA exposure.
* SAP AMS \& ITSM Experience – Minimum 5 years in SAP Application Management, including Incident, Problem, Change, and Request Management.
* Delivery \& Financial Management – Experience with P\&L ownership, budgeting, SOW creation, financial reporting, risk management, and program governance.
* Leadership \& Agile Practices – Proven experience leading teams, stakeholder management, Agile/Scrum delivery; PMP/ITIL preferred, Scrum Master desirable.
* Automation \& Service Excellence – Experience driving automation, transformation programs, operational improvements, and working with ServiceNow/ITSM tools.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

70e9bad9.description:

**Location: Gr. Noida** 




**Mode: work from office**

 We are looking for Delivery Manager at Coforge. PFB the job description:
 



  




* Have managed large (100\+ FTE) Application maintenance and support outsourcing teams with diverse technologies, including data suppor
* Deep understanding in ITIL processes and familiarity in six sigma quality standards
* Proficient in various SLA/KPI models prevalent in the IT service
* Ability to independently run overall account governance meetings with client. Drive creation of related reporting and governance decks

* Excellent people skills and the ability to manage large (100\+) teams
