b90dc28a.title: Oracle Service Delivery Manager-10-15 Years Exp- Full time.
b90dc28a.description:
Position Description:
   

  

 The SDM is responsible for managing and developing Centroids support relationships and the delivery of Centroids managed service offerings across multiple client engagements. Establishing and maintaining strong client relationships is key in order to certify Centroid as a trusted advisor and proponent of our customer's business goals. The SDM plans and deploys support services as defined by the agreed upon Service Level Agreement and ensures deliverables are met. This role also includes an account management component by providing the link among projects, programs, clients, and support resources with the intent to grow client relations and Centroids' footprint.
   

  

 Day\-to\-Day Responsibilities:
   

  

 Coordination of support resources, as well as, facilitating communication with customers, internal partners, and vendors.
   

  

 Lead team training to ensure the team is familiar with IT service delivery processes and best practices. Maintain knowledge set and capabilities of team functions,
   

  

 Operations Support and People Management.
   

  

 Manage and Oversee 24x7 Support Operations delivered by a Global Team.
   

  

 Design and follow appropriate governance model/plan for SLA\-based support contracts.
   

  

 Drive cross\-functional interaction to ensure successful and timely delivery of high\-quality support services.
   

  

 Ensure that systems, processes, and methodologies, as specified, are followed to ensure effective monitoring, control, and support of service delivery.
   

  

 Manage multiple client engagements simultaneously.
   

  

 Manage regular internal and customer\-facing operational reporting including system uptime and utilization, incident management, resource forecasting and utilization, and overall account status.
   

  

 Responsible for timely and accurate monthly billing in accordance with the client's contract. This includes regular reviews and management of resources time and timesheets.
   

  

 Define and implement the required processes to enable the functioning of a global support center.
   

  

 Ensure excellence in service delivery to ensure customer satisfaction and minimize downtime. Identify areas for process improvement to ensure that teams are improving performance and service quality. Lead efforts at client engagements and across Centroid to implement and measure the improvements.
   

  

 Onboarding of new Managed Services clients to the Centroid delivery team.
   

  

 Track, manage, negotiate, and maintain client SOWs (Statements of Work), budgets, and project resource timesheets.
   

  

 Communicate potential needs for change orders with clients based on new support needs or projects.
   

  

 Maintain knowledge of the latest industry technologies and Centroid Service Offerings.
   

  

 Work with Centroid Consulting and Sales organizations on sales pursuit for Managed Services opportunities.
   

  

**Requirements**
 A minimum of 10 years of applicable industry experience in delivering Enterprise IT Services.
   

  

 Experience managing teams within an organization that utilizes Oracle EBS.
   

  

 3 to 5 years managing teams as part of an IT Service Delivery organization within a Managed Services environment.
   

  

 Proven ability to manage multiple accounts and engagements across multiple industries and technologies.
   

  

 Knowledge of Oracle application, database and infrastructure solutions, cloud, and systems integration
   

  

 Demonstrable experience managing customers and delivery of IT services.
   

  

 Proven people management skills.
   

  

 Must possess strong written and oral communication skills
   

  

 Preferred Skills:
   

  

 ITIL Service Delivery qualification is desirable.
   

  

 Experience working with multiple Cloud service providers including AWS, Google Cloud
   

  

 Education:

b639306a.title: Service Delivery Manager - Cybersecurity
b639306a.description:
Position Description
   

  

 Company Profile:
   

  

 At CGI, we’re a team of builders. We call our employees members because all who join CGI are building their own company \- one that has grown to 72,000 professionals located in 40 countries. Founded in 1976, CGI is a leading IT and business process services firm committed to helping clients succeed. We have the global resources, expertise, stability and dedicated professionals needed to achieve. At CGI, we’re a team of builders. We call our employees members because all who join CGI are building their own company \- one that has grown to 72,000 professionals located in 40 countries. Founded in 1976, CGI is a leading IT and business process services firm committed to helping clients succeed. We have the global resources, expertise, stability and dedicated professionals needed to achieve results for our clients \- and for our members. Come grow with us. Learn more at www.cgi.com.
   

  

 This is a great opportunity to join a winning team. CGI offers a competitive compensation package with opportunities for growth and professional development. Benefits for full\-time, permanent members start on the first day of employment and include a paid time\-off program and profit participation and stock purchase plans. We wish to thank all applicants for their interest and effort in applying for this position, however, only candidates selected for interviews will be contacted. No unsolicited agency referrals please.
   

  

 Job Title: Service Delivery Manager \- Cybersecurity
   

  

 Category: Service Delivery Manager \- Cybersecurity
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru
   

  

 Position ID: J0726\-0915
   

  

 Employment Type: Full Time
   

  

 Experience Required: 8\+ Years
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking for cybersecurity Service Delivery Manager role is part of a major IT transformation, complying with standards and requirements. The role plays a key part in the Sunrise transformation: major change in the target operating model (offshore), steering with local iT in each country the transformation and then ensuring service continuity, technical consistency, support quality, and proper integration of production, security, and documentation requirements in a complex, multi entity and multi contract environment.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Cybersecurity Technical Project Management of Sunrise transformation for infrastructure
* Manage during the due diligence the technical infrastructure assessment, focus on the cybersecurity perimeter: understand the exiting partners involved in the infrastructure security services.
* Collaborate with the local IT Hosting \& Network teams, leadership, business entities and other stakeholders to assess key infrastructure security risks, plan controls and strategic initiatives accordingly, to help ensure organisations risk appetite is met (NIST controls \& target rating)
* Follow up the knowledge transfer with the existing offshore providers to ensure cyber security is properly addressed
* Infrastructure Cybersecurity Service Delivery for the transformed entities concerned
* Support the Cyber Security teams in the investigation, resolution and reporting of critical incidents to help ensure these are managed in a timely and effective manner to help minimize impact to the group
* Lead the management of the day to day infrastructure security processes managed by the infrastructure teams and third party providers in the areas of:
* Vulnerability management and network security (firewall management, web filtering, NAC, network intrusion detection, email security, endpoint, and server protection etc.)
* Information protection (Data Loss Prevention management and key management)
* Infrastructure Application security (pre and post development control implementation and testing
* Contribute to Root Cause Analyses (RCA), post mortems, and action plans
* Delivery quality with external partners
* Develop a strong, open and proactive working relationship with the outsourced Service Delivery team
* Be the primary interface between organisations and the infrastructure security service providers and ensure they meet contractually defined Service Level Agreements (e.g : Patching activities , NisT controls, AD assessments, Disaster recovery exercises …)
* Define and collect metrics / KPIs for the measurement of infrastructure security and periodically report to leadership on events and incidents to help ensure performance is in line with organisations' risk appetite
* Hold regular governance calls (weekly, monthly, quarterly, as needed) with outsourced providers to monitor and review cyber performance of their contract
* Challenge the quality of diagnostics, escalations, and resolutions
* Manage the collection of evidence for compliance reporting : SOC2 reports , ISO27001, ORADAD .. with all 3rd parties
* Support Enablement \& Excellence


 Support the Infrastructure teams in all Infrastructure Security matters to ensure compliance
   

  

 Contribute to the formalization of:
   

  

* Technical procedures
* Operational runbooks
* Knowledge Base content
* Promote skill development and autonomy within support teams
* Identify weaknesses and recurring incidents
* Propose and lead improvement initiatives
* Contribute to the evolution of Production and Support standards


 Technical Skills
   

  

* Good understanding \& knowledge of Infrastructure security, including Windows Client \& Server technologies, Virtualisation technologies, Networking, Patch/ Vulnerability management and Business Continuity / Disaster Recovery
* Very strong knowledge of ITIL processes and their operational application
* Ability to understand complex environments and architectures
* Will have proven track record of working with external service providers and building strong relationships with them
* Professional qualification in Project Management and/or 3 years demonstrated work experience
* Experience in managing, executing, and improving IT controls
* English (Fluent, verbally and written)


 Posture \& Soft Skills
   

  

* High level of autonomy
* Strong Customer and Service Management Mindset
* Natural technical leadership
* Problem solving \& analysis
* Strong Communication
* Planning, Coordinating \& Organizing
* Strong ability to manage pressure and critical situations


 This is a cross functional Security reference role, accountable for the management of cybersecurity across all stack of it infrastructure
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities

07b830d5.title: Vendor Performance Manager, SMB Growth, Google Customer Solutions
07b830d5.description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 7 years of experience in operations or business management, and vendor management.
* 7 years of experience using analytics or applying project management tools to address business issues.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Project Management certifications such as PMP, Six Sigma, etc.
* Experience with managing digital advertising, Google Ads, campaign building and optimization.
* Experienced with the GCS Incentive system (Points, UAAs, Spend Bands, Offerings, etc).
* Experience in early customer lifecycle stages (i.e. Onboarding and Acquisition).
* Understanding of selling best practice and techniques (e.g., objection handling, competitive selling).
* Excellent sales performance analysis skills, along with the ability to manage sales activities and metrics, diagnose performance issues, and translate insights into recommendations.

**About the job**
-----------------


As a Vendor Performance Manager (VPM), you will play a critical role on the frontlines of Google Customer Solutions (GCS) vendor sales management. You will be the principal stakeholder for your vendor management team, influencing and holding them accountable to deliver excellent sales performance and quality while enabling site\-program success with targeted support.  

  

You will be responsible for analyzing vendor performance and presenting key insights to Google sales leadership, supporting initiatives to improve GCS vendor operations, and sharing best practices with vendor management and Google teams across global markets and lines of business.  

  

This role is aligned to the AUNZ market and will require working non standard hours.The Global Business Organization (GBO) is the engine that powers Google’s full ecosystem of products and services to help customers and partners succeed and grow. GBO includes the commercial arms of Ads sellers, business development teams, and customer services and support, as well as overlay programs that enable coordinated engagement with Google's most complex and important customers and partners.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Build quarterly strategy in collaboration with vendor leaders, monitor weekly sales performance metrics, and share key market performance insights with Google sales leadership via weekly updates and monthly reviews.
* Ensure vendor service quality against contracted Service Level Agreement (SLA) and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) by conducting regular call audits, calibration sessions, and quality reviews.
* Build influential, trusted partner relationships with vendor sales management (e.g., Senior Manager), communicating rigorous expectations for delivering against program\-specific agreement terms while providing appropriate support, best practices, and guidance.
* Provide critical on\-the\-ground feedback and support to land vendor operations improvement initiatives led by central Google teams.
* Find opportunities and execute on cross GCS collaborations to enable smooth customer outreach, graduations, and more.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

0a2a65e4.title: Sr. Technical Customer Solutions Manager, India CSM Team
0a2a65e4.description:
**Description**
 Sales, Marketing and Global Services (SMGS)
   

  

 AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small\- and mid\-market accounts to enterprise\-level customers including public sector.
   

  

 As a Senior Customer Solution Manager you will work with the largest and most complex enterprises in the world, to enable their multi\-year journey to the cloud. In this new, highly visible, role you will ensure that all AWS teams work together effectively and efficiently to deliver migration, modernization and GenAI outcomes for the customer in relation to Amazon Web Services (AWS) Cloud.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 You will be a trusted advisor to the customer. You will leverage your complex program management, technical, organizational, and transformation expertise to understand customer's business and strategic goals, translate them into an executable plan, and drive the implementation to success by working with the customer, AWS, and our partners. You will understand your customers' biggest IT challenges and provide prescriptive guidance, based on AWS best practices, to guide them through their migration and modernization journey to AWS at scale.
   

  

 You will take end\-to\-end ownership of multiple migration, modernization and GenAI projects within a single enterprise or across several enterprises, utilizing your communication skills to interface with and influence a broad range of multi\-disciplinary teams (Business development, solutions architecture, support, product, professional services, and partners). The Customer Solution Manager role is responsible for cloud migration and modernization programs (incl. technical, operational, organizational, and education) that span across traditional IT teams and business units.
   

  

 Engaging from the inception stage onwards, you will have a deep understanding of your customer's business vision, culture, and processes, you will be your customer's voice within AWS, ensuring that their needs are accurately communicated to AWS leadership, product, and engineering teams. Engaging during the latter stages of the business cycle you will be responsible for ensuring consistent best\-practices are applied, including: (1\) ensuring Migration Readiness Assessment (MRA) is conducted and bringing in SMEs to deliver the migration foundations (e.g. landing zone build, security controls, operating model, training etc.), (2\) Migration kick off workshops are conducted (including stakeholder alignment), and (3\) Executive Steering Committees and reporting are established, including customer, partner, and AWS Cloud exec sponsors and ensure mechanisms are in place to identify and mitigate any identified risks. You should be passionate about delivering a great customer experience by delivering successful IT transformation programs. You will ensure that the customer IT and business stakeholders are aligned, to ensure broad adoption of the migration and modernization across the customer organization. You will use AWS mechanisms to inform the customer migration journey. Where required, you will lead the interaction with specialist teams, ProServ and Partners for handoffs, especially with respect to migreation, modernization and GenAI implementation.
   

  

 In addition to your customer facing responsibilities, you will help shape the rapidly growing Customer Solution Management function, where your passion to define and implement standard processes, methodologies, and tools will be highly valued. Passionate about customer value creation, you will be adept at measuring and quantifying customer value realization and ensuring it stays on path. Successful candidates will have a technical program management background, technology foundation and consultative mindset, be detail driven, and have experience in managing teams to deliver complex programs. You will be a passionate and proven leader with the ability to gain stakeholder buy\-in, communicate confidently at both the executive and project team level, and collaborate with a wide range of technical and non\-technical teams, regardless of geographical or organizational boundaries to ensure compliance with AWS Standards, policies and best practices. You will be comfortable in working with diverse teams to ensure appropriate partners are on\-boarded and involved in the migration as required. Be an active participant of steering committees and governance structures regardless of who is leading the migration and modernization and act as the point of contact for escalations if the migration and modernization hits barriers. You will be proactive in assessing Migration and modernization progress and design and implement plans to mitigate any risks or delays. Along with project management cadence, you will support the people and process pillars of migration including CCOE design and be the overall owner of reporting and system updates related to the health of migration. You will be a natural problem solver with a cool head that can deal with ambiguity, work autonomously to drive the deliver results for your customer, build IP, and share best practice across geographies.
   

  

 \#aws\-ags\-india
   

  

**About The Team**
 About AWS
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 9\+ years of leading large\-scale, technical or engineering programs with a proven record of thought leadership, business case development, realizing customer benefits, and successful program completion experience
* 5\+ years of customer\-facing work, engaging with customer executives, technologists or partners to solve business problems with advanced technologies experience
* Bachelor's degree in science, technology, engineering, math, business or equivalent
* Experience leading technical and non\-technical transformation project teams with a proven ability to work across broad functional teams


**Preferred Qualifications**
* PMP certification, or SCRUM/Agile, SAFe certification
* Experience implementing cloud services including migrations and modernization projects or similar


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

 Microsoft Azure, Azure Presales, Azure Solution Architect, Azure IaaS, Azure PaaS, Azure Migration, Cloud Consulting, Cloud Infrastructure, Solution Architect, Azure Solutions Architect Expert, AZ\-305, Technical Presales, Solution Design, Azure Cost Optimization, RFP/RFI/RFQ, Proof of Concept (PoC), Azure Networking, Azure Virtual Machines, Azure App Services.
 



  





**Regarding Us:** 




 We provide complete IT solutions from creating IT Infrastructure to managing IT Infrastructure to Enabling Businesses with Applications to helping companies with better business decisions using Business Intelligence.
 



  





 Team offers end\-to\-end solutions to customers covering wider solutions such as Business Intelligence, ERP enterprise solutions, Google Cloud Solutions, Facility Management Services, Software Projects/development, PC Hardware and Software, Breakfix, etc.
 



  





 We understand customer needs and identify, integrate, and support high\-quality, low\-cost IT Solutions with speed, flexibility and an attitude of 'sewa'.
 



  





**About the Role:** 




 We are looking for an enthusiastic Azure Pre\-Sales to support our Microsoft Cloud business. The ideal candidate should have hands\-on experience with Microsoft Azure, excellent customer\-facing skills, and a strong understanding of cloud infrastructure and migration solutions. The candidate should hold the Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert certification or be actively pursuing it (preferred for exceptional candidates).

 \- 1 –3 years of experience in Azure Pre\-Sales, Cloud Consulting, Infrastructure, or Solution Engineering.
 



 \- Strong communication, presentation, and customer engagement skills.
 



 \- Ability to work closely with Sales, Delivery, and Microsoft stakeholders.

601813db.title: Senior Engineer Presales
601813db.description:
**Company Description** 
 Commtel Networks is a global engineering and technology company delivering high\-performance digital communication, surveillance, security, safety, and AI solutions for critical national infrastructure sectors such as Oil \& Gas, Power, Mining, and Transportation. Founded in 1998, Commtel has executed over 500 projects across four continents, driving digital transformation for mission\-critical environments. The company specializes in Unified Critical Communication and turnkey solutions spanning design, engineering, multi\-system integration, project management, commissioning, and life cycle management. With offices in three countries and customized solution delivery centers in India and the UAE, Commtel has deployed over 160,000 km of dedicated telecom networks. Its unique Three “C” model—Conceptualize, Construct, Care—ensures end\-to\-end customer engagement from early design through deployment, maintenance, and ongoing support.
   

**Role Description** 
 This is a full\-time, on\-site Senior Engineer Presales role based in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. The Senior Engineer Presales will work closely with the sales and solutions teams to understand customer requirements in critical infrastructure sectors and design technically sound, cost\-effective communication and security solutions. Responsibilities include preparing detailed technical proposals, solution architectures, and Bills of Material; conducting site surveys and feasibility studies; and presenting solutions to customers and internal stakeholders. The role involves responding to RFPs/RFQs, supporting demos and proof\-of\-concept deployments, and coordinating with engineering and project teams to ensure solution viability and alignment with delivery capabilities. The Senior Engineer Presales will also contribute to product and solution enhancements, maintain up\-to\-date knowledge of industry standards and technologies, and support customer meetings, technical workshops, and training sessions.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong foundation in telecommunications and networking, including IP networks, fiber\-optic systems, wireless communication, and industrial communication protocols.
* Experience with critical communication, security, and surveillance solutions (e.g., unified communication platforms, CCTV, access control, safety systems, and related AI/analytics applications).
* Demonstrated presales and solution design capabilities, including requirements gathering, solution architecture, technical proposal writing, and RFP/RFQ response.
* Proficiency in technical documentation, presentations, and customer\-facing communication, with the ability to explain complex solutions clearly to technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Exposure to project engineering activities such as site surveys, system integration planning, and coordination with delivery and project management teams.
* Ability to work collaboratively with cross\-functional teams across sales, engineering, supply chain, and vendor partners in a fast\-paced environment.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Electronics, Telecommunications, Electrical, or related field); advanced certifications in networking, telecom, or security systems are an advantage.

f3a788f3.title: Senior Solutions Engineer
f3a788f3.description:
**Who are we?**
 Checkmarx is the AI\-powered application security leader helping the world’s most security\- conscious enterprises secure the software that powers modern life. For more than two decades, our unified platform and services have helped organizations protect human\- and AI\- generated code from the first line through runtime, reducing risk across applications, cloud, and the software supply chain without slowing innovation.
   

  

 We’re trusted by 1,600\+ customers in 70\+ countries, including some of the largest enterprises and governments in the world. Guided by research\-led innovation and a developer\-first mindset, we help every developer, security team, and enterprise build software that is risk\-free by design.
   

  

**What are we looking for?**
 Checkmarx is seeking a talented Solutions Engineer to support its sales and business development activities in India and the other local regions. The primary responsibility is to act as a technical adviser and product expert, working with the Sales team and driving the technology evaluation stage in the sales process. You must be able to articulate technology and product positioning to both business and technically\-oriented prospects as well as ensure customer satisfaction throughout the sales cycle. You need to be self\-motivated and work in a fast\-paced environment comfortably. The role involves working remotely and onsite within India, and in additional territory as we expand.
   

  

**How will you make an impact?**
* Act as a technical adviser and product expert for Checkmarx prospects and customers across the region
* Manage and coordinate all technical requirements in the Sales process
* Perform technical demonstrations of the Checkmarx solution in a face to face meetings, conventions, and web sessions
* Responsible for presenting the Checkmarx solution to prospects at field events, Conferences, seminars, etc.
* Able to respond to functional and technical elements of RFPs
* Able to convey customer requirements to the Product Management teams
* Design implementation of solutions according to customer’s technical requirements


 Requirements:
   

  

**What is needed to succeed?**
* A passion to learn and grow in a fast\-changing industry
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering, or any correlating degree; master’s degree and/or CISSP certification preferred.
* At least 6\+ years’ experience
* Preference for experience with application/software development C\#, .NET, JAVA, PHP, etc. programming languages and experience with modern CI/CD and DevOps tools preferred.
* Experience in a customer\-facing role and enterprise software Pre\-Sales experience or consulting background is preferred.
* Project management experience would be an advantage.
* Technical writing experience a plus.
* Good teamwork capability, ability to work autonomously, self\-starter who works effectively with technical and non\-technical people.
* A background in the software security industry, including penetration testing and code review, is highly preferred.
* Adaptable and flexible with a history of embracing new tools and technologies.
* Understanding of application security challenges and testing tools.
* Travel required when the situation allows and when it is safe to do so.


 What we have to offer:
   

  

 Checkmarx offers a great work environment, professional development, challenging careers, competitive compensation, great work\-life balance, as well as great benefits and perks throughout the year. Checkmarx is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.

77923781.title: Solution Architect (Presales) – AI Security
77923781.description:
Solution Architect (Presales) – AI Security
 



 Location: India
 



  





**About Fortinet** 




 Fortinet is a global leader in cybersecurity, delivering broad, integrated, and automated security solutions across networks, applications, cloud, and endpoints. As organizations rapidly adopt AI\-driven technologies, Fortinet continues to innovate and help customers secure modern AI\-powered environments.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 Fortinet is looking for a highly skilled Solution Architect (Presales) – AI Security to support enterprise customers in designing and securing AI\-driven environments. This role will work closely with Sales, Engineering, and Customers to position Fortinet’s AI Security portfolio and help organizations address emerging threats related to AI/ML workloads, GenAI adoption, cloud security, and application protection.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* AI data Center security design: Architect zero\-trust segmentation, east\-west traffic inspection, and perimeter defence for AI/GPU cluster environments using Fortinet Solutions
* LLM \& AI workload protection: Implement security controls for LLM inference pipelines, model serving APIs, and AI orchestration layers — including prompt injection defense and model output filtering.
* GPU server hardening
* Threat detection \& SOC integration: Deploy Fortinet solutions to ingest telemetry from AI infrastructure, build AI\-specific detection rules, and automate incident response playbooks.
* 5Network fabric \& SD\-WAN: Design secure inter\-DC connectivity for distributed AI training clusters
* Pre\-sales \& advisory: Lead proof\-of\-concept engagements, deliver technical presentations, and serve as a trusted advisor to Enterprise, Commercial, and Strategic



 customers build and secure AI infrastructure.
 


* Support RFP/RFI responses and technical solution design
* Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams on customer requirements and AI security use cases
* Stay updated on trends related to GenAI, LLM Security, Adversarial AI, and AI governance



  





**Required Skills \& Experience** 



* 8–15 years of experience in Presales / Solution Architecture within Cybersecurity
* Strong understanding of Network Security, Cloud Security, SASE, ZTNA, and Application Security
* Experience working with AWS, Azure, and GCP environments
* Understanding of AI/ML concepts, APIs, and AI application environments
* Experience managing enterprise and strategic customer engagements
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience with AI Security, CNAPP, CSPM, CWPP, or DevSecOps technologies
* Understanding of LLM risks and secure AI adoption
* Relevant certifications such as NSE, AWS/Azure, CISSP, or CCSP
* Experience with cybersecurity vendors or cloud security companies preferred



  





**Why Join Fortinet?** 




 Opportunity to work on cutting\-edge AI and cybersecurity technologies while engaging with leading enterprise customers and strategic digital transformation initiatives.

3b31b14a.title: Manager - Business Solutions & Presales
3b31b14a.description:
We are a technology\-led healthcare solutions provider. We are driven by our purpose to enable healthcare organizations be future ready. We offer accelerated, global growth opportunities for talent that’s bold, industrious and nimble. With Indegene, you gain a unique career experience that celebrates entrepreneurship, and is guided by passion, innovation, collaboration and empathy. To explore exciting opportunities at the convergence of healthcare and technology, check out www.careers.indegene.com
 



 Looking to jump\-start your career?
 



  





 We understand how important the first few years of your career are, which create the foundation of your entire professional journey. At Indegene, we promise you a differentiated career experience. You will not only work at the exciting intersection of healthcare and technology but also will be mentored by some of the most brilliant minds in the industry. We are offering a global fast track career where you can grow along with Indegene’s high\-speed growth.
 



  





 We are purpose\-driven. We enable healthcare organizations be future ready and our customer obsession is our driving force. We ensure that our customers achieve what they truly want. We are bold in our actions, nimble in our decision\-making, and industrious in the way we work.
 



  





 If this excites you, then apply below.
 



  





 Role: Senior Manager \- Business Solutions \& Presales
 



  





 Job Description:
 



  





 You will be responsible to
 



  





 • Strategize, lead and design functional and technical solution development for new business acquisition activities related Indegene’s data, analytics, insights oriented solutions.
 



 • Architect pricing models, solution construct and orchestrate between clients and internal stakeholders.
 



 • Drive business solutions design and proposal development activities for Indegene services
 



 • Conduct discovery sessions with customers to shape opportunities and contribute to the overall pipeline development.
 



 • Maximize top line growth by focusing on both incremental and strategic/large deals focused on multi\-year contracts at global level
 



 • Evaluate client requirements in collaboration with internal SME/tech experts, aligning them with Indegene's right service proposition.
 



 • Drive end\-to\-end bid management, author proposal responses, and actively participate in proposal defence discussions.
 



 • Develop a deep understanding of our products and services to identify opportunities for business solutions. Propose value\-add solutions and explore avenues for business expansion
 



 • Lead ideation sessions with internal leadership teams to identify innovative win themes and value propositions during proposal development.
 



 • Articulate Indegene value proposition to clients in both written as well live mediums
 



  





 Must have:
 



  





 • MBA graduate with overall 9\-12 years experience
 



 • Prior experience in managing complex solution development for data management and analytics areas are mandatory
 



 • Experienced in pricing estimations, client discovery discussions and solution architecture related to data \& analytics workstreams
 



 • Hands\-on experience in bid management, solution design, client presentations and legal agreements (SOWs)
 



 • Prior experience in creating new solutions, POVs and industry benchmarking collateral related to data and analytics areas
 



 • Exposure/understanding of pharma ecosystem will be preferred.
 



 • Skills: Excellent communication and presentation skills, along with an analytical and problem\-solving mindset.
 



  





 EQUAL OPPORTUNITY
 



 Indegene is proud to be an Equal Employment Employer and is committed to the culture of Inclusion and Diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, sex, colour, age, national origin, pregnancy, sexual orientation, physical ability, or any other characteristics. All employment decisions, from hiring to separation, will be based on business requirements, candidate’s merit and qualification.We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristics.

6a53488d.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Security Consultant
6a53488d.description:
**Role Overview**

The **SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Security Consultant** is responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining secure Identity and Access Management (IAM) frameworks in a cloud\-native environment.

This role focuses on configuring SAP Fiori security artifacts, managing user lifecycles through SAP Cloud Identity Services, and ensuring compliance with organizational security policies, including Segregation of Duties (SoD) and Clean Core principles.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Identity \& Access Management (IAM)**

* Configure and manage users using the **Maintain Business Users** app
* Assign access using **standard and custom Business Catalogs and Roles**
* Design intuitive **Spaces and Pages in SAP Fiori** for optimal user experience

**Cloud Security Integration**

* Set up and manage:
* **Communication Arrangements**
* **Communication Systems**
* **Communication Users**
* Enable secure **API\-based system\-to\-system integrations**

**Identity Services**

* Implement and support **SAP Cloud Identity Services**
* Identity Authentication Service (**IAS**)
* Identity Provisioning Service (**IPS**)
* Manage user provisioning and lifecycle integration between systems

**Organizational Restrictions**

* Define and maintain access restrictions such as:
* Company Code
* Plant
* Purchasing Organization
* Ensure adherence to the **Principle of Least Privilege** and data segregation

**Clean Core Compliance**

* Follow SAP **Clean Core** guidelines
* Avoid use of legacy tools (e.g., **PFCG, SU01**)
* Utilize **standard SAP IAM apps and best practices**

**Testing \& Transport Lifecycle**

* Manage **Software Collections** for role transport (Export/Import)
* Troubleshoot authorization issues using:
* **Fiori apps**
* **IAM Information System tools**

**Audit \& Compliance**

* Perform **Segregation of Duties (SoD) analysis**
* Support compliance initiatives and internal/external audits
* Prepare and present **security audit reports**

**Required Qualifications \& Skills**

**Experience**

* **4–8\+ years** of SAP Security experience
* Hands\-on implementation experience in **SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud** environments

**Technical Expertise**

* Strong knowledge of:
* SAP **Fiori Security**
* SAP **Business Technology Platform (BTP)**
* **Cloud Identity \& Access Governance (IAG)**

**Methodologies \& Tools**

* Familiarity with:
* **SAP Activate methodology**
* **SAP Cloud ALM**

**Education**

* Bachelor’s degree in:
* Computer Science
* Information Technology
* MCA or equivalent

**Soft Skills**

* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills
* Ability to translate **business requirements into secure IAM solutions**
* Experience working with **global cross\-functional teams**

a03014cb.title: Solutions Architect
a03014cb.description:
**Welcome to Searce** 




 The ‘process\-first’, AI\-native modern tech consultancy thats rewriting the rules.
 



 We don’t do traditional.
 



 As an engineering\-led consultancy, we are dedicated to relentlessly improving the real business outcomes. Our solvers co\-innovate with clients to futurify operations and make processes smarter, faster \& better. We build alongside our clients. Not for the vanity metrics. But for the transformation to embed lasting competitive advantage for our clients.
 



  





 The result? Modern business reinvention, built on math, tech, and clarity of purpose.
 



  





**Solutions Architect: Cloud Security** 




  





 As a
 **Forward\-Deployed Solver (FDS)** 
 , you are the technical architect of trust. You lead the design and execution of cloud infrastructures that are not only AI\-powered but inherently resilient and "secure\-by\-design." You translate complex risk postures into automated, high\-performance architectural realities.
 



  





 We are looking for an experienced
 **Security Solutions Architect / Senior Security Solutions Architect** 
 to drive security solutioning across complex cloud, hybrid, and multi\-cloud customer environments.
 



 This is a customer\-facing solution architecture role operating at the intersection of
 **cloud security, cybersecurity transformation, compliance, pre\-sales solutioning, and delivery readiness** 
 . The architect will work closely with customers, sales, practice leaders, OEM partners, and delivery teams to understand business and security challenges and translate them into technically robust, commercially viable, and executable security solutions.
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 




  





**Architect the Autonomous Multi\-Cloud Defense Blueprint** 




 Design, govern, and own end\-to\-end multi\-cloud and hybrid security frameworks. Translate complex business, risk, and regulatory demands into scalable target\-state architectures, actionable transformation roadmaps, and resilient cloud\-native blueprints.
 



**Pioneer Enterprise Google Cloud \& CNAPP Innovation** 




 Architect and demonstrate advanced Google Cloud Security capabilities integrated natively with market\-leading CNAPP platforms like Wiz. Build dynamic cloud security postures, attack\-path analyses, and automated workload protection models that integrate directly into wider enterprise operating models.
 



**Reimagine SecOps with AI\-Driven Automation** 




 Modernize legacy security operations by designing next\-gen SIEM/SOAR architectures, security data onboarding strategies, and threat detection engines. Drive platform consolidation and implement AI\-enabled workflows to automate triage, accelerate incident response, and reduce operational friction.
 



**Engineered Compliance \& Continuous Governance** 




 Translate global and regional regulatory mandates—including GDPR, India DPDP, RBI/IRDAI, and Middle East/APAC frameworks—into practical, automated architectural controls. Transform compliance from a point\-in\-time audit into a continuous, telemetry\-driven posture management framework.
 



**Drive Pre\-Sales Strategy \& Deal Closure** 




 Serve as the premier technical authority across the sales lifecycle. Partner with growth teams to conduct deep\-dive discovery workshops, present and defend solution blueprints before CISOs and executive stakeholders, and build airtight, commercially viable Statements of Work (SOWs) that balance margin, risk, and delivery feasibility.
 



**Ensure Delivery Readiness \& Commercial Governance** 




 Validate architectural feasibility, scope, effort estimation, and key dependencies with engineering teams prior to customer sign\-off. Lead structured sales\-to\-delivery handovers to eliminate rework, protect margins, and guarantee successful execution.
 



**Scale the Practice \& Industrialize Reusable Assets** 




 Build reusable reference architectures, SOW frameworks, pricing accelerators, and discovery playbooks to elevate the CSRE security portfolio. Drive joint go\-to\-market motions with technology partners and OEMs, while actively mentoring junior security architects and engineers.
 



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* 8–12\+ years of relevant experience across cybersecurity, cloud security, security architecture, consulting, or security solutioning.
* Strong hands\-on experience with
 **Google Cloud Security** 
 , with the ability to architect, demonstrate, and position security capabilities in customer environments.
* Strong hands\-on experience with
 **CNAPP/CSPM technologies** 
 , preferably
 **Wiz** 
 .
* Strong understanding of cloud security architecture across IaaS, PaaS, containers, Kubernetes, cloud\-native services, and hybrid environments.

ea28031f.title: Solutions Architect
ea28031f.description:
Location: Hyderabad/Bengaluru, Sonata Office
 



 Start: ASAP
 








  





 Role Title:
 **Solution Architect** 




 Microsoft Services help customers realize their full potential through accelerated adoption and productive use of Microsoft technologies. We are a global team of highly dedicated professionals who deliver world class services with partners, earning customer confidence, trust, and loyalty by improving the overall Customer and Partner Experience, serving as the customer advocates within Microsoft and driving customer\-centric product improvement.
 



 Professional Direct for Microsoft Azure is a Microsoft services \& support offering targeted at mid\-sized customers and ISVs. This is a customer facing role and would require the individual to act as an Azure Cloud Solution Architects / Subject Matter Expert / Technical Specialist. The Tech Champ owns the overall technical relationship and strategy between the customer and Microsoft. They lead architectural design sessions, adoption plans, deliver ongoing refinement and enhancement. They hand hold the customer from knowing the service to deploying the service and Influence product through proactive, actionable, and prioritized feedback representing the voice of customer. To succeed in this role, one needs to understand how to plan solutions to meet our customer's business needs.
 



 RESPONSIBILITIES SUMMARY:
 



  




* Develop high\-level solution blueprints, architecture diagrams, and technical specifications to guide customers through their cloud transformation journey ensuring they leverage the full potential of Azure to achieve their strategic objectives.
* Proposing effective cloud strategies to meet the customer needs \& deliver them through workshops, trainings \& advisory services
* Lead the architecture and design of complex cloud solutions, leveraging Microsoft Azure services and ensuring alignment with industry best practices and security standards.
* The Solution Architect will collaborate closely with customers and stakeholders to understand business needs and translate them into scalable, secure, and efficient cloud architectures.
* Collaborate with customers to understand their business requirements, technical challenges, and long\-term objectives, proposing effective cloud strategies to meet their needs.
* Provide thought leadership and technical expertise in Microsoft Azure, staying up\-to\-date with the latest advancements and recommending innovative solutions for our clients.
* Assess existing IT environments, applications, and infrastructure to identify opportunities for cloud adoption and migration to Azure.
* Lead and participate in the implementation and migration of cloud solutions, providing technical guidance to development teams and ensuring successful execution.
* Perform cost optimization assessments and recommend solutions to optimize cloud spend without compromising performance and security.
* Implement security best practices, data protection mechanisms, and disaster recovery strategies to ensure the resilience of cloud\-based systems.
* Serve as in\-house technical expert with a focus on helping our customers increase their consumption by providing advisory services.
* Ability to inspire customers by communicating complex concepts in a simple, business value context with proven white boarding capabilities.
* Be a proven self\-starter who takes ownership of opportunities, works independently, manages multiple simultaneous tasks, and deals well with ambiguity and last\-minute changes.
* Have the ability and passion necessary to maintain technical excellence with emerging technologies, including competitive technologies, while continuing to manage customer opportunities.
* Focus on high level functions and capabilities necessary to help customers take advantage of new Azure features and functionalities.
* The Technical Specialist will be responsible to collate and provide information on the product and trending customer issues/challenges with the team along with maintaining Knowledge Base.
* Have a commitment to customer and partner satisfaction, ability to thrive in a competitive team environment.
* Track customer’s requirements \& work on delivering solutions in time\-bound scenarios.
* Need to work in flexible time zones.
* Quickly develop client relationships and trust and ensure client/partner expectations are being set and met.
* Coach and mentor PDMs to raise the technical ability of the rest of the team, and/or to become certified in required Azure technical certifications.
* Provide training and documentation feedback, updating role documentation as needed.



  





 QUALIFICATION AND EDUCATION REQUIREMENTS:
 



  





**Required Skills:** 




  




* Technical Specialist should have the two certs for the Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert or be able to complete them within the first 30 days.
* Technical Specialist should stay current on the required Azure certifications, as well as new certs that are relevant.
* Ideal candidate will have soft skills such as, effective written \& oral communications, and have the skills necessary to engage a customer in a deep technical conversation.
* Must have expertise in Azure Landing Zones, Enterprise Network Architecture, Security Reviews, and Microsoft Foundry (which is a unified Azure PaaS offering for enterprise AI operations, model builders, and application development)
* Design scalable cloud\-native solutions using Azure services including App Services, Azure Functions, AKS, Logic Apps, API Management, Container Apps, and other Azure PaaS options.
* Ensure security, scalability, and performance best practices are followed, and lead the architecture of complex solutions using Microsoft Azure while aligning with industry standards.



  










 SOFT SKILLS
 


* \[
 **1st** 
 ] Must be able to quickly develop trust and rapport with customers (most of the time they are of this profile: Enterprise Architects, Development \& Test Management)
* \[
 **2nd** 
 ] Passion for customer advocacy in a technology domain.
* Strong communication skills in both spoken and written English
* Demonstrated strong stakeholder management, communication and executive presentation skills
* Ability to articulate technical issues/requirements accurately with Customer, Microsoft Services, Azure development teams at the appropriate technical depth.
* Ability to work independently.








 EXPERIENCE (Preferred)
 


* 8\+ Years of Industry / related experience in technical consulting role



  





 EDUCATION/CERTIFICATION
 


* B.SC, BE, B. Tech in CS or IT
* MCSE or MCSD preferred

344629b2.title: AI / Agentic AI Solutions Architect
344629b2.description:
Avaali is looking for an
 **AI / Agentic AI Solutions Architect** 
 to lead the design and implementation of enterprise\-grade AI and Agentic AI solutions that transform business operations. This is a strategic, customer\-facing architecture role where you'll partner with enterprise clients to define AI transformation roadmaps, architect intelligent multi\-agent systems, and deliver production\-ready AI solutions. You will work closely with Product, Engineering, Data, AI/ML, DevOps, and customer stakeholders to build scalable, secure, and responsible AI platforms for large enterprises.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Own the end\-to\-end solution architecture for enterprise AI and Agentic AI implementations, from discovery through production deployment.
* Design scalable, secure, and enterprise\-grade AI architectures leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG), and multi\-agent orchestration frameworks.
* Architect intelligent AI agent ecosystems with reasoning, planning, memory management, tool calling, and human\-in\-the\-loop capabilities.
* Design AI integration patterns with enterprise applications such as SAP S/4HANA, Salesforce, Microsoft 365, ServiceNow, and other business platforms.
* Develop reusable AI reference architectures, solution blueprints, and architecture documentation for enterprise implementations.
* Lead AI discovery workshops, executive discussions, and customer engagements to translate business challenges into AI transformation strategies.
* Define AI governance, observability, monitoring, Responsible AI practices, and compliance frameworks for enterprise deployments.
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Data, Security, DevOps, and AI teams throughout the implementation lifecycle.
* Support pre\-sales activities including solutioning, architecture walkthroughs, PoCs, RFP responses, and technical design reviews.
* Ensure AI solutions follow best practices for scalability, security, performance, cost optimization, and operational excellence.
* Mentor engineering teams on Agentic AI architecture, enterprise AI best practices, and emerging AI technologies.



  





**Qualifications** 



* 8–12 years of experience in Solution Architecture, Enterprise Architecture, AI Architecture, or Enterprise Consulting.
* Strong experience designing and deploying enterprise AI, Generative AI, or Agentic AI solutions.
* Hands\-on expertise with LLMs, Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and enterprise AI architecture patterns.
* Experience designing multi\-agent AI systems using frameworks such as LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Semantic Kernel, or similar technologies.
* Strong understanding of enterprise integrations with SAP, Salesforce, Microsoft ecosystem, ServiceNow, and other enterprise platforms.
* Experience designing API\-first, microservices\-based, cloud\-native AI solutions with secure integration patterns.
* Knowledge of enterprise security concepts including OAuth, OpenID Connect (OIDC), RBAC, encryption, Responsible AI, and AI governance.
* Experience with cloud AI platforms such as Azure AI, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, or equivalent enterprise AI ecosystems.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills with experience leading customer\-facing architecture workshops and executive discussions.
* Experience working with enterprise product companies, consulting firms, or system integrators is highly preferred.
* Exposure to intelligent automation, workflow automation, RPA, Enterprise Content Management (ECM), or Procure\-to\-Pay (P2P) solutions is an added advantage.



  





**Tools \& Technologies You Will Use** 



* Large Language Models (OpenAI GPT, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Meta Llama, Mistral, Cohere)
* Agentic AI Frameworks (LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Semantic Kernel, Haystack)
* Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) \& Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Chroma, Milvus, Azure AI Search)
* Cloud AI Platforms (Azure AI Services, Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Foundry, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex AI)
* Python, FastAPI, LlamaIndex, LangChain, AI SDKs
* REST APIs, GraphQL, Microservices, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
* SAP S/4HANA, Salesforce, Microsoft 365, SharePoint, ServiceNow
* AI Observability \& Monitoring (LangSmith, Langfuse, Arize AI, Weights \& Biases)
* Enterprise AI Governance, Responsible AI, Security \& Compliance Frameworks



  





 About Avaali Solutions
 



 Avaali Solutions is a leading enterprise automation and AI company specializing in Intelligent Automation, Agentic AI, Enterprise Content Management (ECM), Workflow Automation, OCR, Digital Transformation, and Procure\-to\-Pay (P2P) solutions. Our AI\-powered platforms help global enterprises transform document\-intensive and business\-critical processes across Manufacturing, BFSI, Retail, Healthcare, Government, and Shared Services. As we continue to expand our Enterprise AI practice, we're looking for architects who can shape AI strategy, design enterprise\-grade Agentic AI solutions, and drive successful AI transformation initiatives for leading organizations worldwide.

* Python at strong production level — microservices, Flask / FastAPI / Bottle, REST API design, async patterns, error handling, modular architecture. LLM / GenAI architecture at hands\-on level
* RAG patterns, LangChain or LangGraph or comparable orchestration, prompt engineering, agent frameworks, model evaluation frameworks; must have shipped GenAI workflows into production. Workflow orchestration patterns

* AWS, Azure, or GCP at design level; serverless functions, blob storage, queues, IAM, cost management. CI/CD and DevOps hygiene
* Git workflows, GitHub Actions / GitLab CI / Jenkins, infrastructure\-as\-code basics (Terraform / Pulumi / equivalent). ITIL discipline
* incident, problem, change management, RCA, SLA compliance
* production\-stability mindset. Team leadership
* has led engineering teams of 5–10\+ in an agile / scrum setting, including hiring, performance management, and coaching. Stakeholder management
* comfortable presenting to executive committees, defending architecture decisions, and writing technical documents that non\-engineers can consume. Define and own the reference architecture, shared platforms, and technical standards across the Creative Automation Hub. Lead GenAI governance, including approved tools, model access, evaluation frameworks, and IP/compliance controls.
* Provide hands\-on architectural leadership, reviewing designs, unblocking complex technical decisions, and writing production‑grade code when needed. Coach and lead engineering teams, setting the hiring bar, mentoring senior engineers, and ensuring strong delivery and engineering health.

**Job Description:** 



* The Solution Architect Lead is the technical owner of the Creative Automation Hub, responsible for defining reference architecture, GenAI governance, and shared engineering platforms across squads.

**Note: Looking for Immediate Joiners**

ae57d416.title: Solutions Architect
ae57d416.description:
FEQ327R324
   

  

 As a Solutions Architect part of a Global Capability Center(GCC) focused Field Engineering team, you will shape the future of the Data and AI landscape by working with the most sophisticated Data and AI teams in the world, including Fortune 500 enterprises and global AI\-forward SaaS customers operating globally. In this role, you will be deeply embedded with our named strategic accounts, serving as a trusted long\-term technical advisor while also collaborating with internal sales, product, and engineering teams.
   

  

 You will help our customers achieve tangible data\-driven outcomes through the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform, helping data teams complete projects and integrate our platform into their enterprise ecosystem. You'll grow as a leader in your field, while finding solutions to our customers' biggest challenges in data engineering, analytics, AI and data science.
   

  

 Reporting to the Field Engineering Manager, you will collaborate with our most strategic global prospects and customers, partner with regional field teams across geographies, work directly with product and engineering to drive the Databricks roadmap forward, and work with the broader customer\-facing team to develop architectures and solutions using our platform. You will guide customers through the competitive landscape, best practices, and implementation, and develop technical champions along the way.
   

  

**The impact you will have**
* Be the trusted technical advisor for one or more named strategic accounts — building deep, durable relationships with their data, AI/ML, and platform engineering leaders, and earning a seat at the table for their most important architectural decisions.
* Help shape and drive your customer's AI strategy — partnering with their data science, ML, and AI platform teams to design GenAI and ML architectures, evaluate build\-vs\-buy decisions, and turn AI ambitions into production systems deployed on Databricks.
* Partner with the sales team and provide hands\-on technical leadership to help large enterprise customers understand how Databricks can help solve their business problems across the full data and AI lifecycle.
* Consult on modern Lakehouse architectures and implement proofs of concept for strategic projects spanning data engineering, data warehousing, machine learning, GenAI— including validating integrations with cloud services, in\-house tools, and third\-party applications.
* Work directly with the sales team to develop your book of business, define account strategies, and execute those strategies to help your customers and prospects solve their business problems with Databricks.
* Collaborate across regions with fellow Solutions Architects and account teams, supporting our customers with consistent architectural guidance across their international footprint.
* Become an expert in, promote, and recruit contributors for Databricks\-inspired open\-source projects (Spark, Delta Lake, MLflow, Unity Catalog) across the developer community.


**What We Look For**
* 12\+ years in data engineering, data science, technical architecture, or a similar pre\-sales / consulting role.
* 8\+ years hands\-on experience with Big Data and AI technologies, including Apache Spark™, data engineering, data science, and modern AI/ML workloads.
* Strong hands\-on architectural experience — able to whiteboard, design, and personally build end\-to\-end solutions, not just advise.
* Demonstrated experience working with large enterprise or Fortune 500 customers; experience supporting global accounts across multiple geographies strongly preferred.
* Experience working with digital\-native or SaaS enterprises with mature data and AI practices is a strong plus.
* Strong consulting / customer\-facing experience working with external clients across a variety of industries.
* Coding experience in Python, SQL, Scala, Java, or R.
* Experience building distributed data systems at enterprise scale.
* Hands\-on experience with at least one major public cloud (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
* Available to travel to customers in your region and occasionally internationally.
* Nice to have: prior experience working in or with a Global Capability Center model; Databricks Certification.


**About Databricks**
 Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Comcast, Condé Nast, Grammarly, and over 50% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to unify and democratize data, analytics and AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake and MLflow. To learn more, follow Databricks on Twitter, LinkedIn and Facebook.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Databricks, we strive to provide comprehensive benefits and perks that meet the needs of all of our employees. For specific details on the benefits offered in your region click here.
   

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At Databricks, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive culture where everyone can excel. We take great care to ensure that our hiring practices are inclusive and meet equal employment opportunity standards. Individuals looking for employment at Databricks are considered without regard to age, color, disability, ethnicity, family or marital status, gender identity or expression, language, national origin, physical and mental ability, political affiliation, race, religion, sexual orientation, socio\-economic status, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.
   

  

**Compliance**
**If access to export\-controlled technology or source code is required for performance of job duties, it is within Employer's discretion whether to apply for a U.S. government license for such positions, and Employer may decline to proceed with an applicant on this basis alone.**

**Leadership skills:**

* Must be an evangelist within the Company and Orator/Presenter outside the Company
* Must present Technical Notes through PPT or Videos and create a Learning Library for Company



  





**Required Skills:** 



* Must be capable of presenting at least two Solutions he has worked on supported by its Architecture, design, Inter\-operability etc., and one of them must be in AI Area.
* The person who is suitable for this Position should have minimum of 10\-15 years are above
* Hands on in designing, coding, reviewing, structuring Java based applications in monolith and micro services with any frontend (preferably Angular), Java 8\-21 with Spring Boot, RDBS \& NoSQL, Design Patterns, Load Balancers, Cloud and On\-prem solution architecture, CERT\-IN and other security standards and its implementation in the application, application performance, banking application integrations, guide the team leads and developers will be an added advantage
* Deep level experience in Design, development and implementing various Banking solutions including Core Banking Application.
* The person should have good understanding of functionality of various Banking Applications Like Core Corporate and Retain Core Banking and other banking solution functionalities like NPA, AML, ALM, WMS, and Fraud Detection etc.
* Should know top solutions \& tools available in the market for various Banking modules mentioned above
* Should be knowledgeable of Data Architecture, Solution Architecture and important solution components of various Banking Modules
* Should be well versed in trends and future developments, Problems in in the Banking industry.
* Must have good knowledge of Data source structures needed for (Data Analytics (KPIs)
* Good knowledge of security needs of various Banking Solution Areas
* Must have good communication skills and engage with CIO and CTO level executives of the Banks



  





**EDUCATION:** 



* Bachelor’s / Master’s degree in or any related field.

c2190dba.title: Microsoft Technical Architect
c2190dba.description:
**Microsoft Specialization**



* Provide architectural leadership across all five WAF pillars —
 **Reliability, Security, Cost Optimization, Operational Excellence, Performance Efficiency** 
 — for Microsoft Specializations.
* Lead the
 **Azure Well\-Architected Review (WAR)** 
 using the Microsoft Core WAR tool and export required pillar evidence across engagements.
* Build the control\-by\-control evidence index and lead the audit\-day "talking track"; support the mock audit and drive remediation ahead of the final audit.



**Microsoft AI practice \& co\-solutions**



* Own and grow Genzeon's
 **Microsoft AI architecture practice** 
 , defining reference architectures, patterns, and standards for AI workloads on Azure.
* Design and develop
 **Microsoft\-based AI co\-solutions** 
 (Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Services / Foundry, Azure Machine Learning, agentic and RAG\-based solutions), including productized/repeatable offerings suitable for co\-sell and Microsoft marketplace.
* Engage with
 **Microsoft partner, co\-sell, and specialization teams** 
 to align Genzeon's roadmap with Microsoft's AI priorities and unlock partnership benefits.
* Lead Genzeon through
 **future Microsoft Specialization and designation audits** 
 , building reusable evidence frameworks and reducing preparation effort over time.
* Embed
 **Responsible AI** 
 and healthcare compliance (HIPAA/PHI, BAA, data residency) into solution designs by default.
* Mentor and upskill architects and engineers on WAF and Azure AI, raising the organization's overall capability.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor to sales and delivery on Azure AI opportunities, effort estimation, and solution feasibility.


 Requirements
   

  


**Required skills and experience**



* **12–16 years** 
 in IT, including substantial recent experience as a
 **Solutions / Cloud Architect** 
 on production Azure workloads, with a clear focus on
 **AI/ML solutions** 
 .

 and proven experience running Well\-Architected Reviews.

* Deep expertise across the Azure AI stack:

 , plus App Service, Azure databases, Key Vault, Microsoft Entra ID, Azure Monitor / Application Insights, and IaC (Bicep / Terraform).

* Experience

 , ideally in a partner or co\-sell context.

 **lead and mentor** 
 technical teams.


 Benefits

 (AI Apps, Analytics, or similar), ideally with ISSI, and familiarity with Microsoft Partner Center specialization/ACR requirements.

 motion and partner GTM.

 and

 ; plus any of AZ\-104, AZ\-400, or DP\-100\.
