Join a team building next\-generation Cloud and IoT solutions that drive digital transformation across industries. As a Cloud Architect, you will be responsible for designing and delivering scalable, secure, and high\-performance cloud\-native platforms, enabling seamless integration between edge devices, enterprise systems, and cloud services. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to develop innovative solutions leveraging modern cloud, IoT, data streaming, and AI technologies.
 



  





**Your Role** 




  





 You will lead the architecture and development of enterprise\-grade cloud and IoT platforms, driving solution design from edge to cloud. You will collaborate with engineering, product, and business teams to build scalable applications, integrate cloud services, and establish best practices for modern SaaS platforms and cloud\-native architectures.
 



  





**In this role, you will:** 




  




* Architect and build scalable enterprise solutions and SaaS platforms on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Design and implement end\-to\-end IoT solutions spanning Edge, Cloud, and Enterprise applications.
* Develop and integrate cloud\-native applications utilizing PaaS services and microservices architectures.
* Design and optimize NoSQL and RDBMS databases, including data modeling, indexing, and performance tuning.
* Build and manage API\-driven integrations using public and enterprise APIs.
* Develop cloud\-native backend services using .NET, Golang, or Python.
* Implement real\-time data processing solutions using Kafka, Kinesis, Pulsar, or similar streaming platforms.
* Collaborate with UI teams to deliver modern web and mobile applications using React or Angular.
* Establish CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and release management processes for SaaS applications.
* Work closely with multiple engineering teams to ensure seamless integration, scalability, security, and operational excellence.
* Contribute to the development of innovative cloud and IoT platform capabilities from concept through production deployment.
* Evaluate and implement emerging technologies, including AI\-enabled solutions and RAG\-based architectures where applicable.



  





**Your Profile** 




**Mandatory Skills** 




  




* 9–12 years of hands\-on experience designing and building scalable enterprise applications on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Strong understanding of distributed systems and SaaS platform architecture.
* Hands\-on experience in IoT application development and cloud\-native solution design.
* Expertise in cloud infrastructure services and platform engineering.
* Strong knowledge of NoSQL and relational databases, including schema design, modeling, and indexing.
* Experience with data streaming platforms such as Kafka, Kinesis, or Pulsar.
* Proficiency in .NET, Golang, or Python development.
* Experience building RESTful APIs and cloud\-native microservices.
* Familiarity with React or Angular for modern web application development.
* Strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and SaaS release processes.
* Excellent problem\-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.



  





**Preferred Skills** 




  




* Experience in Power, Energy, Industrial Automation, Manufacturing, or Rail industry domains.
* Exposure to AI/ML solutions and Generative AI applications.
* Experience building applications using Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
* Knowledge of containerization and orchestration technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
* Understanding of cloud security, governance, and compliance frameworks.



  





**What You'll Love About Working Here** 




  




* Opportunity to architect large\-scale cloud and IoT platforms for global enterprises.
* Exposure to cutting\-edge technologies across Cloud, IoT, Data Streaming, and AI.
* Collaborative environment with experienced architects, engineers, and domain experts.
* Continuous learning and innovation\-driven culture.

14e52e67.title: Cloud DevOps Architect
14e52e67.description:
Join a team building modern cloud\-native SaaS platforms and large\-scale containerized infrastructures. As a Cloud DevOps Architect, you will lead the design, automation, deployment, and operational excellence of cloud environments, ensuring scalability, security, reliability, and continuous delivery. You will collaborate with engineering, product, and platform teams to establish DevOps best practices and accelerate enterprise cloud transformation initiatives.
 



  





**Your Role** 




  





 You will be responsible for architecting and managing cloud\-native DevOps ecosystems, enabling seamless deployment and operation of enterprise applications. You will drive automation, containerization, CI/CD adoption, cloud security, and platform engineering practices while supporting the development of scalable SaaS solutions from inception to production.
 



  





**In this role, you will:** 




  




* Architect and implement scalable DevOps solutions for cloud\-native and containerized applications.
* Design, deploy, and manage Kubernetes\-based platforms across AWS, Azure, or GCP environments.
* Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines to support rapid, secure, and reliable software releases.
* Develop infrastructure automation using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools and DevOps best practices.
* Optimize container orchestration environments using Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm.
* Collaborate with development, security, and operations teams to streamline application deployment processes.
* Troubleshoot complex infrastructure, networking, and platform\-related issues across cloud environments.
* Implement and enforce cloud security and network security standards across platforms and applications.
* Contribute to the design and development of SaaS platforms from the ground up.
* Monitor platform performance, availability, and reliability while driving continuous improvements.
* Review deployment architectures and recommend scalable, secure, and cost\-effective solutions.
* Support automation initiatives through scripting and platform engineering practices.



  





**Your Profile** 




**Mandatory Skills** 




  




* 9–12 years of experience in DevOps engineering and cloud platform architecture.
* Strong experience supporting containerized applications and cloud\-native environments.
* Expert\-level knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm Charts.
* Minimum 4 years of experience managing large\-scale container infrastructures.
* Hands\-on experience with at least one major cloud platform: AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Strong Linux administration, troubleshooting, and performance tuning skills.
* Expertise in Python scripting and automation.
* Strong knowledge of Git and version control best practices.
* Experience troubleshooting networking issues in cloud and containerized environments.
* Hands\-on experience designing and implementing CI/CD pipelines and release automation.
* Strong understanding of Infrastructure as Code (IaC), automation frameworks, and DevOps methodologies.
* Excellent problem\-solving, analytical, and communication skills.



  





**Preferred Skills** 




  




* Experience with cloud security and network security architecture and implementation.
* Hands\-on experience with security and vulnerability management tools such as Prisma Cloud, Rapid7, Coverity, Black Duck, or similar platforms.
* Exposure to platform engineering and site reliability engineering (SRE) practices.
* Experience working on enterprise SaaS platforms and distributed systems.
* Knowledge of monitoring, observability, logging, and incident management solutions.
* Relevant cloud certifications across AWS, Azure, or Google Cloudes



  





**What You'll Love About Working Here** 




  




* Opportunity to build and scale modern cloud\-native SaaS platforms.
* Work with cutting\-edge container, Kubernetes, and cloud technologies.
* Collaborative environment with architects, developers, security specialists, and platform engineers.
* Continuous learning through cloud transformation and automation initiatives.
* Flexible work environment that values innovation, technical excellence, and professional growth.

**Location:** Hyderabad, Telangana (Candidates should be willing to travel across India as required)  
**Job Type:** Full\-time \| Permanent  
**Experience Required:** 10\+ years overall experience, including at least 5 years in SAP Project/Program Management  
**Education:** Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Technology, Computer Science, or a related field. Master's degree is preferred.

**Job Summary**

To lead end\-to\-end SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation projects. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in managing enterprise SAP transformation programs, stakeholder engagement, project governance, and successful cloud ERP delivery.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead the complete lifecycle of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation projects.
* Define project scope, timelines, deliverables, and governance framework.
* Manage project risks, issues, budgets, and resource planning.
* Coordinate with cross\-functional SAP teams, implementation partners, and business stakeholders.
* Ensure adherence to SAP Activate methodology and project quality standards.
* Oversee testing, deployment, data migration, system integration, and post\-go\-live support.
* Drive organizational change management, user training, and adoption initiatives.
* Monitor project progress and provide regular status updates to stakeholders.

**Required Skills \& Qualifications**

* 10\+ years of overall professional experience with at least 5 years in SAP Project or Program Management.
* Proven experience managing full\-cycle SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation projects.
* Strong understanding of SAP modules such as FICO, MM, and SuccessFactors.
* Knowledge of SAP Cloud Architecture, API/CPI integrations, and SaaS deployment models.
* Experience with Agile and Hybrid project delivery methodologies.
* Expertise in project planning, scheduling, budgeting, financial tracking, and risk management.
* Hands\-on experience with SAP Activate methodology.
* Strong leadership, communication, stakeholder management, and documentation skills.
* SAP Certification and/or PMP or PRINCE2 certification is preferred.

Pay: ₹2,000,000\.00 \- ₹3,500,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Life insurance
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

**Skill required:** 
 Order to Cash \- Billing and Revenue Management
   

  

**Designation:** 
 Delivery Lead Manager
   

  

**Qualifications:** 
 Any Graduation
   

  

**Years of Experience:** 
 13 to 18 years
   

  

**About Accenture**
 Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 784,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
   

  

**What would you do?** 
 You will be aligned with our Finance Operations vertical and will be helping us in determining financial outcomes by collecting operational data/reports, whilst conducting analysis and reconciling transactions. Order to Cash is the complete process from receiving a customer order to collecting payment. It includes order management, credit management, invoicing, and payment processing. The goal is to ensure efficient and accurate handling of orders and timely collection of revenue. This process helps improve cash flow and customer satisfaction. Effective Order to Cash management is crucial for a companys financial health and operational efficiency keyword includes :\- ("Order to Cash","Cash App","Collection \& Dispute",Billing, "Deduction") A solution that delivers creation and support for billing functionality enabling clients to establish new or improved billing and customer care capabilities
   

  

**What are we looking for?** 
 OTC Expertise Should possess in and out through knowledge on order to cash process
   

  

**Roles and Responsibilities:**
* In this role you are required to identify and assess complex problems for area of responsibility
* The person would create solutions in situations in which analysis requires an in\-depth evaluation of variable factors
* Requires adherence to strategic direction set by senior management when establishing near\-term goals
* Interaction of the individual is with senior management at a client and/or within Accenture, involving matters that may require acceptance of an alternate approach
* Some latitude in decision\-making in involved
* you will act independently to determine methods and procedures on new assignments
* Decisions individual at this role makes have a major day to day impact on area of responsibility
* The person manages large \- medium sized teams and/or work efforts (if in an individual contributor role) at a client or within Accenture
* Please note that this role may require you to work in rotational shifts, Any Graduation

Job requisition ID :: 109462
Date: Jul 23, 2026
Location: Mumbai
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**T\&T \| Cyber: ES \| Manager \| Cloud Security \| Mumbai**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 109462
* **Location**: Mumbai
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**The team**



Deloitte helps organizations prevent cyberattacks and protect valuable assets. We believe in being secure, vigilant, and resilient—not only by looking at how to prevent and respond to attacks, but at how to manage cyber risk in a way that allows you to unleash new opportunities. Embed cyber risk at the start of strategy development for more effective management of information and technology risks. Lear more about Cybersecurity

  



**Your work profile:**

  


* Work independently to lead and complete high quality threat\-based risk assessments, business impact analysis across a diverse set of cloud technologies, business functions, and platforms.


* Conduct cloud infrastructure security risk assessments based on cloud security best practices.


* Assess cloud security architecture


* Cloud security controls evaluation to ensure compliance with business scope, security policies and standards


* Preparing cloud infrastructure risk assessment reports.


* Work closely with internal management/team and client business representatives to scope assessments, gather documentation, interview clients, identify risks, document findings, and ensure transparent assessment of risks by following a structured risk assessment methodology.


* Driving the efforts to identify, assess, and communicate the cloud information security risks to relevant\-internal and external stakeholders.

  


**Skills Required:**

  


* Strong understanding of cloud technologies and platforms: Azure/AWS/GCP/OCI


* Understanding of cloud security architecture


* Understanding of Zero trust principle, security technologies and controls:



AWS/Azure/GCP/OCI cloud native security controls, Identity Access Management, Data Security, IDS/IPS, SIEM, web application firewall, cryptography, Kubernetes, container security etc.


* Should have conducted cloud security assessments and configuration reviews as per industry best practices


* Familiarity with industry\-leading standards and frameworks such as ISO 27001, NIST, CSA CCM, CIS benchmarks to help clients adhere to compliance requirements


* Knowledge and experience of Risk Management Lifecycle (Risk Identification, Risk Assessment, Risk Response, \& Reporting)


* Experience with cloud security tools and services


* Knowledge and experience in developing/creating cloud security policies and frameworks for organizations


* Effective written and communication skills


* Strong sense of ownership, urgency, and drive


* Demonstrate teamwork and collaborate with other teams to ensure client’s cloud environment is secure

  


**Qualifications/Experience:**

  


* Bachelor’s degree preferred in Computer Science, Information Security, Information Technology, Engineering


* Cloud security certifications – CCSK/CCSP, AWS/Azure/GCP


* 8\-12 years of working experience in Cyber Security Consulting with proficiency in cloud security assessment


* Should have played a role in client engagements

  


**Preferred:**


* Certifications: CCSK/CCSP, Azure/AWS/GCP certifications

ce3eea55.title: Engineering Program Manager
ce3eea55.description:
Are you ready to advance your career with Adobe? Join our world\-class team as an Engineering Program Manager in Noida. You will have the chance to create a significant impact by using AI proficiency to ensure flawless program management and globalization efforts.
  
**Must\-Have:** AI Proficiency for Program Management Impact
  
  

Everyday use of AI tools to improve program management practices, including project planning, risk analysis, and communication with collaborators.
  
Ability to apply AI to boost efficiency and impact, including faster information synthesis, sharper risk identification, and higher\-quality communication.
  
Judgment to determine where AI can improve speed, quality, or scope of impact and initiative to incorporate new AI capabilities into your workflow.
  
Experience applying AI proficiency to globalization/localization workflows, such as AI\-assisted machine translation and automation.
  
Familiarity with AI quality\-estimation and automated linguistic QA tools applied in release pipelines, along with the skill to identify when human review is essential.
  
Curiosity and a proven track record of experimenting with new AI capabilities and converting them into measurable efficiency improvements.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  

Drive the globalization lifecycle of internationalization, localization, release, and marketing content across products.
  
Develop project plans with key achievements, ensuring progress within time and budget constraints.
  
Drive globalization platform agenda and exert ownership in realizing the state\-of\-the\-art vision
  
Coordinate schedules, planning, and risk management across various teams and vendors.
  
Define the approach for the product localization group and join product team meetings and global launch efforts.
  
Identify and address gaps in product global\-readiness and drive continuous improvement.
  
Communicate project status to Group Program Management and offer clear suggestions for addressing risks or issues.
  
Educate product teams on world\-readiness and localization processes.
  
Advocate for AI\-enabled tools and automation, building the argument for scaling successful pilots.
  
Manage multiple complex projects simultaneously and support peers on globalization processes.
  
Partner with senior management on group initiatives and contribute recommendations on projects outside direct ownership.
  
Support cross\-product process improvements, including localization workflow/automation and AI\-tooling roadmaps.
  
Contribute to Adobe\-wide vendor strategy and take part in vendor business reviews.
  
Use analytics, including AI\-assisted analysis, to inform regional strategy and customer experience improvements.
  
Required Qualifications
  
  

5–8\+ years of program/project management experience with exposure to globalization, localization, or international product delivery.
  
Verified, active involvement in using AI tools to refine program management techniques.
  
Demonstrated ability to handle schedules, budgets, and collaborations with multiple departments and external partners.
  
Excellent communication skills, capable of translating technical details into clear status updates and recommendations.
  
Comfort with ambiguity and a proactive approach to problem\-solving.
  
Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; PMP certification is a plus.
  
Preferred Qualifications
  
  

Experience at a global software company managing localization for a SaaS or desktop/mobile product portfolio.
  
Familiarity with localization/TMS platforms, CAT tools, and AI/MT engine integration.
  
Experience negotiating with and managing LSP or other outsourced vendor partners.
  
Data\-savvy with the ability to create straightforward dashboards or employ AI\-powered analytics tools to aid decision\-making.
  
  

Adobe is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome and encourage diversity in the workplace.
  
About Adobe
  
Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
  
  

Our 30,000\+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
  
  

Let’s Adobe together
  
At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture , focus on people, purpose and community , Adobe for All , comprehensive benefits programs , the stories we tell , the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
  
  

Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
  
  

Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \+1 408\-536\-3015\.
  
  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**  

Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
  
  

At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience .

787d2bea.title: Technical Program Manager 4
787d2bea.description:
**The group you’ll be a part of**
 In the Global Products Group, we are dedicated to excellence in the design and engineering of Lam’s etch and deposition products. We drive innovation to ensure our cutting\-edge solutions are helping to solve the biggest challenges in the semiconductor industry.
   

  

**The impact you’ll make**
 As a Technical Program Manager at Lam, you are not just overseeing projects – you’re orchestrating breakthroughs in support of \[insert strategic initiative]. You’ll lead cross\-functional teams through successful project execution blending your technical excellence with strategic planning to deliver new or upgraded products. Your role is vital, owning technical projects from initiation through delivery using your expertise in planning, directing, and monitoring schedules and budget.
   

  

 In this role, you will directly contribute to \_\_\_.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Over\-see the optimization or creation of technical product offerings, processes, or programs, developing project plans, aligning teams, managing risk, and driving projects through release.
* Take ownership and accountability for the success of projects and cross\-functional teams to ensure program schedules, performance metrics, and delivery meets business requirements on time and within budget.
* Partner with stakeholders to understand process and system requirements, and deliver enhancements based on a changing technology landscape.
* Run Continuous Improvement projects, from inception to impactful results.
* Perform data collection and statistical analysis, and report results to inform program schedules and deliverables.
* Influence cross\-functional stakeholders to continuously improve the process and inspire alignment.
* Deliver change management for programs that are sustainable and maintains long\-term success.
* Successfully navigate multiple projects in a dynamic environment.


**Minimum Qualifications**
**Who we’re looking for**
* Bachelor’s degree with 8\+ years of experience; or Master’s degree with 6\+ years’ experience; or a PhD with 3\+ years’ experience; or equivalent experience.
* 6\+ years of continuous improvement or technical program management.
* Experience guiding cross\-functional teams and demonstrating leadership and influence skills to deliver results.
* Excellent communication and executive presentation skills with the ability to present to audiences at all levels in the Company.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in or knowledge of Semiconductor fabrication, Semiconductor Equipment Operations, or related industries is a plus.
* Knowledge of Program Management methods and experience in Product Development \& Release (PDR) procedures.
* Relevant project management certifications such as PMP, CAPM, Scrum Master, or PRINCE2\.
* Experience in Lean Six Sigma methodology or certification (Green Belt, Black Belt) is a plus.
* Experience with Agile and/or Waterfall project methodologies.
* Expertise with project management software and tools including MS Project, QuickBase, Office Timeline, or equivalent.
* Experience in Change Management methodologies is a plus.


**Our commitment**
 We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results.
   

  

 Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non\-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees.
   

  

*Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on\-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On\-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On\-site Flex’ you’ll work 3\+ days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1\-2 days per week on\-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.*

a0b88f61.title: Senior Engineering Program Manager
a0b88f61.description:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
 In the HPE
 **Hybrid Cloud,** 
 we lead the innovation agenda and technology roadmap for all of HPE. This includes managing the design, development, and product portfolio of our next\-generation cloud platform, Green Lake. Working with customers, we help them reimagine their information technology needs to deliver a simple, consumable solution that helps them drive their business results. Join us redefine what’s next for you.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Manages and leads key programs involving multiple functions and program teams to drive the engineering development and implementation process for multiple products or service offerings for a Global Business Unit.
* Directs the development of overall program strategy, budgets, resource allocation plans, and general program requirements for the Global Business Unit.
* Manages activities of supporting program teams and internal and external development partners; ensures alignment with unit strategy and owns responsibility for overall program profit and loss management.
* Communicates program progress, escalations, and issue analysis to product stakeholders; collaborates with business unit management and internal manufacturing and development partners to recommend and implement changes to products, processes, or business practices to drive continuous improvement and manage program costs.
* Drives innovation and integration of new technologies and quality initiatives into projects and activities in the manufacturing engineering organization.
* Reviews and evaluates program plans and guidelines for compliancewith program management guidelines and standards; provides tangible feedback to improve overall program management quality and results for the organization.
* Leads and provides guidance and mentoring to less\-experienced staff members to set an example of program management innovation and excellence.


**Education And Experience Required**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Business Management, Engineering, Computer Sciences, or equivalent.
* PMP/PMI certification preferred Typically 10\+ years experience.


**What You Need To Bring**
* Experience designing and developing project and program planning tools and software packages to create, manage, and track project results.
* Excellent analytical and problem solving skills.
* Demonstrated business acumen, understanding of organizational strategy, and successful experience managing all aspects of cross\- business unit programs, including communicating with internal and external stakeholders and directing matrixed teams and resources.
* History of innovation withexamples of developing new technical, engineering and/or manufacturing processes.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills; mastery in English and local language.
* Ability to effectively communicate program management architectures, plans, proposals, and results, and negotiate options at business unit levels.


**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 \#india
   

  

 \#hybridcloud
   

  

**Job**
 Engineering
   

  

**Job Level**
 TCP\_05
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.

465361af.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
465361af.description:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Senior Technical Program Manager
   

  

 Technical Program Manager Role Overview
   

  

 Who is Mastercard?
   

  

 We work to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships, and passion, our innovations and solutions help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential.
   

  

 Our decency quotient, or DQ, drives our culture and everything we do inside and outside of our company. We cultivate a culture of inclusion for all employees that respects their individual strengths, views, and experiences. We believe our differences enable us to be a better team — one that makes better decisions, drives innovation, and delivers better business results.
   

  

 Technology at Mastercard
   

  

 What we create today will define tomorrow: revolutionary technologies that reshape the digital economy to be more connected and inclusive than ever before — safer, faster, and more sustainable.
   

  

 We need technologists who are energized by the challenges of a truly global network, with the talent and vision to create the critical systems and products that power global commerce and connect people everywhere to the vital goods and services they need every day.
   

  

 Working at Mastercard means being part of a unique culture that is inclusive, diverse, and built on collaboration. It is a place that celebrates your strengths, values your experiences, and offers the flexibility to shape a career across disciplines and continents — while working alongside experts and leaders at every level of the business to improve what exists and invent what’s next.
   

  

**All About You**
 Are you a technical program manager who wants to work for a company that offers above\-and\-beyond benefits, including paid parental leave, flexible work hours, gift matching, and volunteer incentives?
   

  

 Do you want to work in an inclusive and nurturing culture that encourages your professional learning and development?
   

  

 The ideal candidate is passionate about the customer experience journey, highly motivated, intellectually curious, analytical, and possesses an entrepreneurial mindset.
   

  

 Knowledge / Experience
   

  

* 8\+ years leading large\-scale, end\-to\-end technical programs across multiple teams with complex dependencies in enterprise environments.
* Strong expertise in portfolio\- and initiative\-level program management, including governance, execution tracking, reporting, and operational readiness.
* Hands\-on experience with Agile Scrum, SAFe, and blended delivery models, with strengths in work decomposition, sprint planning, backlog management, and delivery acceleration.
* Solid understanding of software engineering, system design, and architecture, with the ability to engage engineers on trade\-offs, scalability, and constraints.
* Proven ability to drive business and customer outcomes through technical execution, measured through metrics and results.
* Demonstrated strength in risk management, ambiguity handling, stakeholder influence, and executive communication.
* Experience building and leading TPM organizations, mentoring leaders, shaping practices, and influencing technology roadmaps.


**About The Role**
* Drive transformational change in end\-to\-end product delivery by applying technical program management and engineering best practices across agile and hybrid environments.
* Lead large enterprise technical programs and products from inception to delivery, operating autonomously in ambiguous problem spaces.
* Maintain a deep understanding of business domains, systems, and architectural decisions, translating complexity into clarity and execution.
* Provide thought leadership, drive problem decomposition, accelerate delivery, and ensure predictable outcomes under tight deadlines.
* Establish trusted partnerships with engineering, business, and executive stakeholders, influencing decisions and aligning execution.
* Build, lead, and mature a high\-performing TPM function, fostering strong delivery culture, empathy, and accountability.


 Major Accountabilities
   

  

* Own program and portfolio execution, optimizing processes, aligning teams and technologies, and ensuring efficient use of resources.
* Drive delivery from planning through production, proactively managing risks, dependencies, escalations, and blockers.
* Establish clear governance, metrics, and reporting to enable transparency, timely decisions, and continuous improvement.
* Foster cross\-team collaboration, accountability for results, and organizational learning.
* Act as the primary program representative, providing clear communication, accurate status, and stakeholder alignment.
* Stay current on technology trends, evaluate designs, and influence long\-term organizational and technical direction.


**Corporate Security Responsibility**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

88f2def5.title: Engineering Program Manager
88f2def5.description:
Are you ready to advance your career with Adobe? Join our world\-class team as an Engineering Program Manager in Noida. You will have the chance to create a significant impact by using AI proficiency to ensure flawless program management and globalization efforts.
   

  

 Must\-Have: AI Proficiency for Program Management Impact
   

  

* Everyday use of AI tools to improve program management practices, including project planning, risk analysis, and communication with collaborators.
* Ability to apply AI to boost efficiency and impact, including faster information synthesis, sharper risk identification, and higher\-quality communication.
* Judgment to determine where AI can improve speed, quality, or scope of impact and initiative to incorporate new AI capabilities into your workflow.
* Experience applying AI proficiency to globalization/localization workflows, such as AI\-assisted machine translation and automation.
* Familiarity with AI quality\-estimation and automated linguistic QA tools applied in release pipelines, along with the skill to identify when human review is essential.
* Curiosity and a proven track record of experimenting with new AI capabilities and converting them into measurable efficiency improvements.


 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Drive the globalization lifecycle of internationalization, localization, release, and marketing content across products.
* Develop project plans with key achievements, ensuring progress within time and budget constraints.
* Drive globalization platform agenda and exert ownership in realizing the state\-of\-the\-art vision
* Coordinate schedules, planning, and risk management across various teams and vendors.
* Define the approach for the product localization group and join product team meetings and global launch efforts.
* Identify and address gaps in product global\-readiness and drive continuous improvement.
* Communicate project status to Group Program Management and offer clear suggestions for addressing risks or issues.
* Educate product teams on world\-readiness and localization processes.
* Advocate for AI\-enabled tools and automation, building the argument for scaling successful pilots.
* Manage multiple complex projects simultaneously and support peers on globalization processes.
* Partner with senior management on group initiatives and contribute recommendations on projects outside direct ownership.
* Support cross\-product process improvements, including localization workflow/automation and AI\-tooling roadmaps.
* Contribute to Adobe\-wide vendor strategy and take part in vendor business reviews.
* Use analytics, including AI\-assisted analysis, to inform regional strategy and customer experience improvements.


**Required Qualifications**
* 5–8\+ years of program/project management experience with exposure to globalization, localization, or international product delivery.
* Verified, active involvement in using AI tools to refine program management techniques.
* Demonstrated ability to handle schedules, budgets, and collaborations with multiple departments and external partners.
* Excellent communication skills, capable of translating technical details into clear status updates and recommendations.
* Comfort with ambiguity and a proactive approach to problem\-solving.
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; PMP certification is a plus.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience at a global software company managing localization for a SaaS or desktop/mobile product portfolio.
* Familiarity with localization/TMS platforms, CAT tools, and AI/MT engine integration.
* Experience negotiating with and managing LSP or other outsourced vendor partners.
* Data\-savvy with the ability to create straightforward dashboards or employ AI\-powered analytics tools to aid decision\-making.


 Adobe is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome and encourage diversity in the workplace.
   

  

**About Adobe**
 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
   

  

 Our 30,000\+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**Let’s Adobe together**
 At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
   

  

 Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
   

  

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \+1 408\-536\-3015\.
   

  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
 Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
   

  

 At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

14c8f6f5.title: Technical Program Manager, Data Analytics and Insights
14c8f6f5.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience in program management.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* 2 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Experience with LLMs, prompt engineering, and the implementation of GenAI\-driven moderation frameworks to enhance operational scalability.
* Ability to utilize data analysis tool and drive focused insights and performance imprvoments.
* Proven track record in planning, organizing, and risk management for high\-stakes, cross\-functional programs.
* Strong capability to influence without authority across peer PgMs, engineering leads, and senior leadership.


**About The Job**
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 The Core team builds the technical foundation behind Google’s flagship products. We are owners and advocates for the underlying design elements, developer platforms, product components, and infrastructure at Google. These are the essential building blocks for excellent, safe, and coherent experiences for our users and drive the pace of innovation for every developer. We look across Google’s products to build central solutions, break down technical barriers and strengthen existing systems. As the Core team, we have a mandate and a unique opportunity to impact important technical decisions across the company.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with team members and stakeholders to understand or identify defined work problems and program goals, obtain prioritized deliverables, and discuss program impact.
* Prioritize program goals, understand and translate other stakeholders’ needs into program goals and prioritized deliverables with minimal assistance, and contribute to decisions on prioritizing goals and deliverables.
* Define the scope of projects and develop, execute, or manage project plans for supported program(s).
* Review key metrics pertaining to a program, monitor potential metric deviations, and define corrective actions for critical deviations.
* Identify, communicate, and collaborate with relevant stakeholders within one or more teams to drive impact and work toward mutual goals.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

67ef333c.title: Program Manager
67ef333c.description:
**An Amazing Career Opportunity for** 
**Program Manager, Mobile \& Cloud**
**Location: Chennai, India (Hybrid)**
**Job ID: 48312**
**About HID Global**
 HID Global powers the trusted identities of the world’s people, places and things. We make it possible for people to transact safely, work productively and travel freely. Our trusted identity solutions give people secure and convenient access to physical and digital places and connect things that can be accurately identified, verified and tracked digitally. Millions of people around the world use HID products and services to navigate their everyday lives, and over 2 billion things are connected through HID. We work with governments, educational institutions, hospitals, financial institutions, industrial businesses, and some of the most innovative companies on the planet. Headquartered in Austin, Texas, HID Global has over 4500 employees worldwide and operates international offices that support more than 100 countries. HID Global® is an ASSA ABLOY Group brand. HID Global has is the trusted source for secure identity solutions for millions of customers and users around the world. In India, we have two Engineering Centre (Bangalore and Chennai). Global Engineering Team is based in Chennai and one of the Business Unit Engineering team is based in Bangalore. Check us out: www.hidglobal.com and https://youtu.be/23km5H4K9Eo
   

  

 LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/hidglobal/mycompany/
   

  

**Physical Access Control Solutions (PACS):**
 HID Physical Access Control Solutions (PACS) is at the forefront of securing spaces with advanced, reliable access control solutions. From cutting\-edge readers, credentials and controllers to mobile and biometric technologies, HID PACS empowers organizations worldwide to protect their people, property and assets with scalable, high\-quality solutions. This is more than just a job – it’s your chance to join an industry leader to drive innovation in access control and make a real impact on global security solutions. Are you ready to make a difference? Join us and help shape the future of security.
   

  

**Are You Ready to Join the Team?**
 Our company is committed to finding the best and the brightest talent to help us reach the top. If you are a dynamic, highly skilled, experienced Cloud engineer and technology enthusiast, and you enjoy working in a rapid pace within a rapidly growing business environment, then you will want to consider this position. If you excel at communication, collaboration, and unrelenting innovation, we want to talk to you. And if you bring dedication, positive energy and integrity to the table, you just might be the right fit for our team.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.
   

  

* Certification in Program Management (PgMP) or Project Management (PMP).
* Experience in a technology\-driven environment.
* Knowledge of industry\-specific regulatory and compliance requirements.
+ Physical Access Control
+ Security
+ Biometrics


**Roles \& Responsibilities (Other Duties May Be Assigned)**
* Ensuring execution of specific NPI initiatives (epics) are adhering to agreed timelines and budgets.
* Coordinating the initiative from ideation to launch.
* Managing the coordination and communication of stakeholders involved, including internal ART dependencies, Quality Assurance, Manufacturing Engineering, NPI Supply Chain and external contract manufacturers when required.
* Contribute to program management best pracrices and agile processes improvements (LACE initiatives).
* Developing and implementing epic\-centric risk management strategies to minimize risks and ensure successful delivery.
* Active planning participation through PI planning and PI execution. Working with agile teams, ARTs and stakeholders to ensure alignment, expectations and successful program execution.
* Maintain alignment of epic centric schedule and facilitate epic centric planning meetings.
* Developing and maintaining epic dashboards and metrics to track epic progress, performance, and outcomes.
* Continuously identifying and implementing opportunities to improve epic delivery, ensuring maximum efficiency and effectiveness.
* Developing and implementing epic\-level communication plans to ensure effective communication and expectations across all stakeholders.
* Other duties may be assigned.


**Experience and/or Education Qualification:**
* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field / Master’s degree is preferred.
* 5\+ years of experience in program management, project management, or a related role, preferably in a technology\-driven environment.
* Proven track record of successfully delivering complex programs and projects on time and within budget.


**Computer Skills**
* Proficient in MS Office applications, such as Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.
* Familiar with operating systems, such as Windows, etc.
* Proficient in project planning software like Jira and Miro.


**Customer Expectations**
* Demonstrate strong leadership and communication skills to inspire teams and convey complex information clearly, ensuring alignment with customer goals.
* Exhibit excellent problem\-solving and adaptability to navigate changing priorities and resolve issues efficiently, maintaining a focus on delivering high\-quality outcomes.
* Foster collaboration and maintain technical acumen to build strong relationships across departments and translate business needs into effective technical solutions.


****Why apply?****
* Empowerment: You’ll work as part of a global team in a flexible work environment, learning and enhancing your expertise. We welcome an opportunity to meet you and learn about your unique talents, skills, and experiences. You don’t need to check all the boxes. If you have most of the skills and experience, we want you to apply.
* Innovation: You embrace challenges and want to drive change. We are open to ideas, including flexible work arrangements, job sharing or part\-time job seekers.
* Integrity: You are results\-orientated, reliable, and straightforward and value being treated accordingly. We want all our employees to be themselves to feel appreciated and accepted.


 This opportunity may be open to flexible working arrangements.
   

  

 HID is an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer – Minority/Female/Disability/Veteran/Gender Identity/Sexual Orientation.
   

  

**We make it easier for people to get where they want to go!**
 On an average day, think of how many times you tap, twist, tag, push or swipe to get access, find information, connect with others or track something. HID technology is behind billions of interactions, in more than 100 countries. We help you create a verified, trusted identity that can get you where you need to go – without having to think about it.
   

  

 When you join our HID team, you’ll also be part of the ASSA ABLOY Group, the global leader in access solutions. You’ll have 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally. As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

07c1d1e9.title: Technical Program Manager - 5G RAN Development
07c1d1e9.description:
**About us:** 




 L\&T Technology Services Limited (LTTS) is a global leader in Engineering and R\&D (ER\&D) services. With 816 patents filed for 57 of the Global Top 100 ER\&D spenders, LTTS lives and breathes engineering and technology. Our innovations speak for themselves – World’s 1st Autonomous Welding Robot, Solar ‘Connectivity’ Drone, and the Smartest Campus in the World, to name a few.
 



  





  





**Role Summary:** 




 We are looking for an experienced Technical Program Manager (TPM) to lead end\-to\-end delivery of LTE and 5G NR Radio Access Network (RAN) programs. The TPM will be responsible for planning, execution, cross\-functional coordination, risk management, and successful delivery of RAN software across Layer 1 (PHY), Layer 2 (MAC/RLC/PDCP), Layer 3 (RRC/NGAP/XnAP), OAM, and Test \& Validation teams. The ideal candidate combines strong technical knowledge with excellent program management and stakeholder management skills.
 



  





**Key Responsibility:** 



* Lead end\-to\-end planning and execution of 4G/5G RAN development programs.
* Manage cross\-functional teams across L1, L2, L3, OAM, Test \& Validation, Test Automation, System Engineering, and DevOps.
* Define program scope, milestones, schedules, dependencies, and release plans.
* Track deliverables, budgets, risks, issues, and resource utilization to ensure on\-time, high\-quality delivery.
* Drive technical reviews, architecture discussions, design reviews, and release readiness.
* Coordinate with customers, product management, architecture, engineering, QA, and operations teams.
* Monitor program KPIs, quality metrics, defect trends, and performance objectives.
* Ensure compliance with Agile/Scrum practices, SDLC processes, and engineering governance.
* Provide regular executive status updates, escalation management, and stakeholder communication



  





**Required Skills:** 



* Strong understanding of LTE and 5G NR RAN architecture, including PHY, MAC, RLC, PDCP, RRC, NGAP/XnAP, and OAM.
* Proven experience managing large\-scale telecom software development programs.
* Strong knowledge of 3GPP LTE and 5G NR standards and RAN development lifecycle.
* Experience with Agile/Scrum, release planning, risk management, and program governance.
* Excellent leadership, communication, stakeholder management, and decision\-making skills.
* Ability to manage distributed engineering teams and multiple concurrent workstreams



  





 Preferred Qualifications
 


* Experience delivering eNodeB (eNB) or gNodeB (gNB) software programs.
* Exposure to vRAN, Open RAN, Cloud RAN, virtualization, and Kubernetes\-based deployments.
* Experience working with global customers, product organizations, or telecom equipment vendors.
* PMP, PMI\-ACP, Scrum Master, SAFe, or equivalent certification is an advantage.



  





 \-\-
 



 Thanks
 



 Team HR

fb77ea1b.title: Presales/Solution Consulting Director – Oracle NetSuite Practice
fb77ea1b.description:
**What We're Looking For****ERP and Business Domain Expertise*** Strong, hands\-on ERP skillset with genuine business\-domain grounding — not purely technical pre\-sales experience.
* Ideally has direct experience implementing or consulting on ERP solutions across Finance, SCM, Manufacturing, or Services, in addition to pre\-sales.
* Working knowledge of NetSuite's platform layer — scripting, configuration, and integration — sufficient to guide a team and speak credibly with technical stakeholders.

**Leadership*** 5–8\+ years of experience building and leading high\-performing pre\-sales or solution consulting teams.
* Demonstrated ability to operate as a strategic partner to country/regional leadership, not just a deal\-support function.
* Confidence and standing to push back on sales strategy when needed, backed by credible alternatives.

**Customer\-Facing Leadership*** Executive presence, charisma, and conviction in front of senior customer stakeholders.
* A track record of resolving customer issues efficiently through team collaboration, rather than escalation alone.

**Candidate Profile**The successful candidate is a senior pre\-sales and ERP leader who can move fluidly between Mid\-Market velocity and Enterprise depth, is a credible strategic partner to India leadership, and leads from the front with a hands\-on, humble, and collaborative style — while holding the team and the business to a high, quantifiable bar.  

We are looking at 18\+ years of total experience in ERP/SaaS pre\-sales, solution consulting, or implementation, including 5–8 years in a solution consulting or pre\-sales leadership role.
  
As part of the Oracle sales team you will direct and manage pre\-sales resources throughout the sales cycle. Provides technical/functional leadership to the sales team in the development and implementation of customer applications and customer products. Participates in account planning and strategy development. May publishes technical information of specific applications and/or technical articles. Works with management to define new products. Serves as the company liaison on specific technical projects with customers.


**Key Responsibilities****1\. Segment\-Led Pre\-Sales Leadership*** Lead pre\-sales strategy differently by segment: drive velocity, repeatability, and speed\-to\-value in Mid\-Market pursuits, and deeper solution architecture, business\-case rigor, and value\-based selling in Enterprise pursuits.
* Partner with sales leadership to improve win rates, deal quality, customer engagement, and sales\-cycle velocity across both segments.

**2\. Strategic Partnership to India Leadership*** Act as a strategic partner to the India leadership team, contributing to sustainable, predictable revenue generation — not just deal\-by\-deal support.
* Contribute to strategic initiatives that strengthen the India business, including rolling out innovative solution packages, building an India industry play, improving upsell value within the existing customer base, and improving internal revenue\-related processes.

**3\. Team Management and Practice Building*** Build and lead a high\-performing team of solution consultants and principals, with 5–8 years of prior people\-leadership experience.
* Set clear goals, enablement plans, and career development paths, and actively manage IC performance across quantifiable KPIs, product knowledge, industry knowledge, soft skills (discovery, demo, and storytelling), and attitude.
* Build a culture that is hands\-on, humble, collaborative, and positive — one where the team takes initiative and stays open to learning.

**4\. Customer\-Facing Leadership*** Bring the charisma and conviction to engage CXOs, finance leaders, IT leaders, and business heads directly on the largest or most sensitive pursuits.
* Handle customer requirements and escalations efficiently, working closely with the team to drive timely, high\-quality resolution.
* Lead discovery on strategic opportunities and translate customer requirements into compelling, commercially sound solution strategies and executive narratives.

**5\. Solution Architecture and Value Selling*** Drive value\-based selling by tying NetSuite capabilities to measurable operational and financial outcomes.
* Work closely with implementation, delivery, and partner teams so that proposed solutions are grounded and deliverable post\-sale.

**6\. Cross\-Functional Collaboration*** Partner with regional and global pre\-sales leadership, sales, product, marketing, delivery, customer success, and alliance teams.
* Support webinars, customer events, executive briefings, and industry campaigns relevant to India's target industries.
* Share field insights to sharpen messaging, competitive positioning, and solution packaging for the India market.

fbeeacd9.title: Domain Architect
fbeeacd9.description:
The Architect is responsible for the integration and customisation of Nokia solutions and 3rd party platforms to meet customer requirements. Creates, deploys, and integrates; enables rating, charging and provisioning of new services based on the operator's processes on service integration and business management systems. This is a multi\-domain multi\-BG role which is typically not customer facing.


  
* Candidate will be responsible for managing team for one of Solution Area and bring thought leadership in customer engagement.
* Candidate will also be responsible for quality delivery and delivery project KPI tracking and adhering.
* Manages Nokia Internal Stake holder engagements with solution capabilities from multiple sources and technologies.
* Builds understanding and preference for Nokia products and solutions by influencing regional team decisions and strategic direction.
* Demonstrates significant operational as well as commercial knowledge of clients' business and uses this to build credibility as well as identify sales opportunities.
* Defines new \& innovative delivery model and package integrated solutions not only limited to Nokia Net's portfolio Leads training, development, and co\-ordination of activities of more junior consultants, and regularly leads project teams.
* System Integration Project and execution plan management.
* Provides delivery value proposition \& model.
* Ensuring competent resources on time every time.
* Working with other teams and ensuring high performance team across location.
* Presales support for portfolio.

  
You have:


* 12\+ years of experience in Packet core.
* Knowledge and Experience for Packet Core Equipment: MME, S/PGW, AMF, SMF, UPF
* Knowledge and experience for IMS solution design for NTAS, SBC, CFX
* Knowledge and Experience for Nokia Packet Core equipment: cMM, cMG, NRD
* Proficiency in reading, writing, and speaking both English

It would be nice if you also had:


* Capable of understanding Technical Notes, Protocol Specs, Method of Procedure
* Linux knowledge is an advantage
* Basic understanding of Project Management skill is an advantage
* Computer: MS Office, Teams

  
**Advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.**Nokia is a global leader in connectivity for the AI era. With expertise across fixed, mobile and transport networks, powered by the innovation of Nokia Bell Labs, we’re advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.


Learn more about life at Nokia .  

  

  

**Our recruitment process**

We act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Our employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.


If you’re interested in this role but don’t meet every listed requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences enrich our teams, and you may be just the right candidate for this or another opportunity.


The length of the recruitment process may vary depending on the specific role's requirements. We strive to ensure a smooth and inclusive experience for all candidates. Discover more about the recruitment process at Nokia .

4b2aab49.title: Presales role
4b2aab49.description:
* Own end\-to\-end presales, driving workshops, demos, AI solutions, and deals.
* Work on AI, GenAI \& Cloud solutions while solving real customer challenges.


**About Our Client**
 Our client is a fast\-growing technology consulting and product engineering organization that helps businesses accelerate digital transformation through innovative technology solutions. The company works closely with enterprise and mid\-market customers across areas such as Product Engineering, Cloud, Data \& Analytics, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Generative AI (GenAI), and Digital Transformation.
   

  

 With a strong focus on customer\-centric solutioning, the organization partners with clients to identify business challenges, design scalable technology strategies, and deliver measurable business outcomes. The culture promotes ownership, innovation, cross\-functional collaboration, and provides employees with significant exposure to customer\-facing engagements, solution consulting, and emerging technologies
   

  

**Job Description**
 Copilot said:Job DescriptionWe are looking for a customer\-focused Presales Consultant / Solution Consultant to act as a bridge between customers, sales teams, and engineering teams. The role requires a strong blend of solution consulting, technology understanding, stakeholder management, and business storytelling to help customers solve complex business challenges through innovative technology solutions.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Engage with prospects and existing customers to understand business challenges, objectives, and technology requirements.
* Conduct discovery workshops, requirement\-gathering sessions, and stakeholder discussions.
* Translate customer pain points into tailored technology solutions and business value propositions.
* Create compelling solution narratives, executive presentations, use cases, and proposal responses.
* Deliver impactful product demonstrations, solution walkthroughs, and Proof of Concepts (PoCs).
* Collaborate with Sales, Engineering, Product, and Delivery teams to design customized solutions.
* Support RFP, RFI, RFQ, SOW, and proposal development activities.
* Participate in customer meetings, solution discussions, and strategic deal pursuits.
* Identify cross\-sell and upsell opportunities within existing customer accounts.
* Stay updated on emerging trends across AI, GenAI, Cloud, Automation, Product Engineering, and Digital Transformation.


**Required Experience \& Skills**
* 3\-6 years of experience in Presales, Solution Consulting, Technical Consulting, Sales Engineering, or related roles.
* Strong experience in customer\-facing engagements and stakeholder management.
* Experience conducting discovery sessions, solution workshops, demos, and presentations.
* Hands\-on experience with proposal development, bid management, RFPs, RFIs, and solution documentation.
* Ability to communicate technical concepts effectively to both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Strong problem\-solving, storytelling, and consultative selling capabilities.
* Exposure to AI, GenAI, Cloud, SaaS, Product Engineering, Data \& Analytics, or Digital Transformation initiatives is preferred.


 Ideal Candidate
   

  

* Comfortable working directly with customers and senior stakeholders.
* Able to balance business discussions and technical conversations.
* Strong presenter with excellent communication and solutioning abilities.
* Proactive, detail\-oriented, and capable of managing multiple opportunities simultaneously.
* Passionate about technology, innovation, and helping customers achieve business outcomes through technology.


**The Successful Applicant**
* 3\-6 years of experience in Presales, Solution Consulting, Technical Consulting, Sales Engineering, or Solutioning roles within technology services, product engineering, SaaS, cloud, AI, or digital transformation environments.
* Proven experience in customer\-facing engagements, including discovery workshops, requirement\-gathering sessions, stakeholder discussions, and solution presentations.
* Strong expertise in solution design, storytelling, business value articulation, and consultative selling.
* Experience managing RFPs, RFIs, RFQs, proposals, SOWs, bid responses, and commercial discussions.
* Ability to conduct impactful product demonstrations, solution walkthroughs, and Proof of Concepts (PoCs).
* Comfortable interacting with both business stakeholders and technical teams, translating complex technical concepts into business outcomes.
* Exposure to technologies such as AI, Generative AI, Cloud, Data \& Analytics, Automation, APIs, SaaS, Product Engineering, or Digital Transformation.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence decision\-makers and build strong customer relationships.
* Self\-driven, detail\-oriented, and capable of managing multiple opportunities in a fast\-paced consulting environment.
* Prior experience working in mid\-sized technology consulting, product engineering, digital transformation, or SaaS organizations will be highly preferred.


**What's On Offer**
 Opportunity to play a highly visible, customer\-facing role at the intersection of AI, GenAI, Cloud, Product Engineering, and Digital Transformation.
   

  

 End\-to\-end ownership across discovery, solutioning, demos, proposals, workshops, and strategic deal support.
   

  

 Exposure to enterprise and mid\-market customers across multiple industries and business use cases.
   

  

 A collaborative environment where you'll work closely with leadership, sales teams, architects, and engineering stakeholders.
   

  

 Significant opportunities to build expertise in solution consulting, technology storytelling, customer engagement, and go\-to\-market strategy.
   

  

 Fast\-paced, high\-growth culture offering strong learning, ownership, and career progression opportunities.
   

  

 Chance to directly influence business growth by shaping customer solutions and driving successful deal outcomes.
   

  

 Competitive compensation and a platform to develop into a future leader in Presales, Solution Consulting, or Business Consulting.
   

  

**Contact**
**Quote job ref: JN\-072026\-7057838**
