**What are we looking for?** 
 To Collaborates extensively with internal teams, senior leadership, and external partners. Adapts to rotational shifts and manages multiple priorities in a fast\-paced, time\-sensitive setting while maintaining quality and compliance standards. Growth Opportunities Provides a platform for leadership in global supply chain transformation and NPI governance. Offers exposure to enterprise\-level initiatives, strategic delivery programs, and innovation projects. Ideal for professionals aspiring to senior leadership roles in operations, program management, and supply chain strategy. Additional Information
   

  

* This role may require rotational shifts to meet global project needs.
* Opportunities exist to interact with global teams and contribute to impactful supply chain initiatives. Analysis of Key Components Role Complexity Leads and oversees delivery operations for New Product Introduction (NPI) programs, ensuring flawless execution of material master data setup and compliance across multiple projects. Makes strategic decisions that influence timelines, cost efficiency, and overall program success. Acts as the escalation point for complex operational challenges and drives resolution with minimal supervision. Skill Set Possesses deep expertise in ERP systems, supply chain processes, and PMO methodologies. Strong proficiency in data visualization and analytics to monitor NPI performance metrics. Demonstrates exceptional leadership, stakeholder management, and cross\-functional collaboration skills. Strategic planning, process optimization, and risk management experience are critical for accelerating product readiness and ensuring operational excellence. Work Environment Operates in a global, high\-pressure supply chain environment with direct impact on critical product launches. Roles and Responsibilities:
* In this role you are required to identify and assess complex problems for area(s) of responsibility
* Interaction is with senior management levels at a client and/or within Accenture, involving negotiating or influencing on significant matters
* Individual manages large teams and/or work efforts (if in an individual contributor role) at a client or within Accenture
* Oversee planning and execution of NPI projects across multiple geographies.
* Engage with senior stakeholders to influence decisions on critical matters.
* Manage large cross\-functional teams and ensure timely delivery within cost and quality targets.
* Provide accurate project costing and financial oversight during quotation and justification phases.
* Conduct stage reviews and present progress to leadership.
* Implement lessons learned and continuous improvement initiatives. Core Skills
* PMP or PRINCE2 certification.
* Experience in supply chain or product lifecycle management.
* Proficiency in SAP or similar ERP systems. Soft Skills
* Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills.
* Expertise in project management methodologies and tools.
* Ability to manage large\-scale, complex projects.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work with cross\-functional teams.
* High attention to detail and a proactive problem\-solving mindset.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced FMCG environment., Master of Business Administration

87725254.title: Service Delivery Manager
87725254.description:
**Company:** 
 Citius Tech
   

  

**Website:** 
 Visit Website
   

  

**LinkedIn:** 
 Visit LinkedIn
   

  

**Business Type:** 
 Enterprise
   

  

**Company Type:** 
 Product
   

  

**Business Model:** 
 B2B
   

  

**Funding Stage:** 
 Private Equity
   

  

**Industry:** 
 Healthcare
   

  

**Salary Range:** 
 ₹ 35\-40 Lacs PA
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Title:** 
 Service Delivery Manager – EDI Platform
   

  

**Location:** 
 Preferred Pune / Hyderabad
   

  

**Reports To:** 
 Delivery Manager
   

  

**Role Overview**
 Lead and coordinate three critical streams:
   

  

* EDI Migration Project – Transition from legacy EDI platform (TrustedLink) to IBM Sterling B2B Integrator under a tight deadline.
* L2/L3 Support Team – Manage ongoing support for the legacy EDI platform during migration and stabilization.
* Azure Modernization Project – Collaborate with cloud engineering teams to plan cutover, handover, and transition of EDI workloads to Azure.


 Additionally, drive process maturity by improving SOPs, governance frameworks, KPIs, and reporting standards across all streams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Program Governance \& Planning
+ Develop integrated program plans covering migration, support, and Azure modernization.
+ Define milestones, dependencies, and risk mitigation strategies across all streams.

* Cutover \& Transition Management
+ Plan and execute cutover from legacy to Sterling and later to Azure.
+ Ensure smooth handover of systems and documentation to cloud operations teams.

* Process Improvement
+ Review and enhance existing SOPs for migration, support, and cloud transition.
+ Establish governance frameworks for decision\-making and escalation.
+ Define and implement KPIs for delivery performance, SLA adherence, and quality.
+ Standardize reporting templates and dashboards for leadership and client visibility.

* Team Leadership
+ Manage composite teams (employees \+ vendor resources) across development, QA, support, and cloud engineering.
+ Align resources and resolve conflicts across parallel projects.

* Stakeholder Communication
+ Provide consolidated status updates to senior leadership and client.
+ Prepare executive dashboards and transition readiness reports.

* Budget Oversight
+ Track program financials and performance against SOW.
+ Negotiate scope changes and manage invoicing approvals.

* Risk \& Issue Management
+ Maintain risk register for migration and cloud transition.
+ Implement contingency plans for cutover failures or delays.

* Compliance \& Security
+ Ensure HIPAA and data security compliance during migration and cloud onboarding.
+ Validate encryption and audit controls in Azure environment.


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
* Experience:
+ 10\+ years in IT program/project management with multi\-stream delivery experience.
+ Proven success in EDI migration projects, cloud transition programs, and process improvement initiatives.

* Technical Knowledge:
+ EDI standards (X12, EDIFACT), IBM Sterling B2B Integrator, legacy platforms (TrustedLink).
+ Familiarity with Azure cloud services (IaaS, PaaS, networking, security).

* Skills:
+ Strong vendor management and multi\-team coordination.
+ Expertise in cutover planning, transition governance, and managed services.
+ Ability to design and implement SOPs, governance models, KPIs, and reporting frameworks.
+ Proficiency in project management tools (MS Project, JIRA, ServiceNow).

* Certifications:
+ PMP or equivalent preferred.
+ ITIL Foundation for support governance.
+ Azure Fundamentals (preferred).


**Preferred Attributes**
* Experience in US Healthcare EDI (HIPAA compliance).
* Ability to manage tight deadlines and high\-pressure environments.
* Strong communication and negotiation skills.


**Performance Metrics**
* On\-time delivery of migration and Azure transition milestones.
* SLA adherence for legacy platform support.
* Successful cutover with zero critical incidents.
* Improved SOP compliance and governance maturity.
* KPI\-driven reporting accuracy and timeliness.

4aae99f2.title: OSS Technical Delivery Lead - PuneVOIS
4aae99f2.description:
**Who We Are**
 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture
   

  

**About This Role**
 We are seeking an experienced OSS Technical Delivery Lead to drive the aggregation, governance, and execution of OSS assurance demands across multiple markets. This role acts as the central demand “front door” for OSS assurance, ensuring alignment with digital portfolios, network operations, and local market needs while delivering against strategic 2025 transformation objectives.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Act as a single point of contact for Assurance SMEs for all demand and delivery requests across markets
* Manage OSS delivery projects aligned with transformation and integration of UK networks and local markets
* Own and track budgets (typically £250k–£1m), ensuring delivery within capex/opex forecasts
* Coordinate impact assessments, prioritisation, and demand mobilisation processes
* Maintain governance trackers including SCM approvals, mobilisation, and demand reviews
* Consolidate all OSS work packages into a rolling 18\-month delivery plan
* Manage demand intake, collaborating with digital, network, and OSS teams
* Lead OSS resource planning with internal teams and suppliers
* Publish KPI dashboards (e.g., Kanban boards) for demand and delivery transparency
* Identify and manage OSS risks in alignment with Technology Operations
* Oversee portfolio management for group business areas
* Track OSS budgets and supplier SOW approvals
* Manage external vendors and supplier coordination across OSS domains
* Drive cross\-market demand delivery and cross\-charging processes
* Utilise tools such as JIRA, PEGA, and Azure DevOps for workflow management


 Coordinate with geographically distributed teams, including European markets
   

  

**Who You Are**
* Extensive experience (10\+ years) in OSS and telecom domains
* Strong knowledge of software delivery lifecycle, particularly in Agile environments
* Proven expertise in demand and delivery management and governance
* Skilled in stakeholder and supplier management across global teams
* Proficient in tools such as Azure DevOps, PEGA, and JIRA
* Demonstrated ability to manage budgets and financial planning
* Experience working in multinational and geographically dispersed environments
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills
* Ability to navigate complex organisational structures and deliver outcomes collaboratively
* Professional certifications such as PMP or SAFe are desirable


**Not a perfect fit?**
 Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
* Opportunity to lead large\-scale OSS transformation initiatives across global markets
* Exposure to strategic programmes within Vodafone’s network and digital ecosystem
* Collaboration with cross\-functional teams, including technology, operations, and suppliers
* Development of leadership capabilities in a complex, multinational environment
* Involvement in high\-value budget management and decision\-making processes
* Access to a collaborative and innovation\-driven work culture


**What Skills You Will Learn**
* Advanced OSS demand and delivery governance
* Strategic portfolio and stakeholder management at a global level
* Financial planning and budget optimisation in telecom environments
* Vendor and supplier negotiation and management
* Agile delivery practices using enterprise tools (JIRA, PEGA, Azure DevOps)
* Cross\-market collaboration and international programme coordination


**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
   

  

 With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.
   

  

**Alert**
 Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
   

  

 \#JDEnhancedByTARA
   

  

**Follow us on social media**
* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/voisglobal
* Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/voisglobal/
* You can also chat with our employees to learn more about our projects: https://lnkd.in/dpkrcvR2

80fe36ba.title: Agile Delivery Manager
80fe36ba.description:
Why Choose Bottomline?
   

  

 Are you ready to transform the way businesses pay and get paid? Bottomline is a global leader in business payments and cash management, with over 35 years of experience and moving more than $16 trillion in payments annually. We're looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help drive impactful results for our customers. If you're dedicated to delighting customers and promoting growth and innovation \- we want you on our team!
   

  

**Agile Delivery Manager**
 The Agile Delivery Manager is responsible for driving predictable, high‑quality delivery across multiple Scrum teams within the Paymode platform. This role works closely with Product, Engineering, QA, Finance, and external vendors to ensure delivery excellence, release readiness, and strong operational discipline.
   

  

 They oversee multiple teams/pods, provide hands‑on delivery leadership when needed, and co\-own release management, metrics, vendor coordination, and cross‑functional alignment.
   

  

 This position is ideal for a senior delivery professional who combines servant leadership with strong operational rigor and can operate effectively at the team, release, and organizational levels.
   

  

 This position is based at our
 **Bangalore** 
 , India office.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Agile Team \& Pod Delivery Oversight**
* Oversee delivery health across multiple Scrum teams and pods, adjusting involvement based on team maturity.
* Coach Scrum Masters and Delivery Leads, including 1:1 support as needed.
* Serve as a mediator for friction, capacity constraints, and delivery risks.
* Maintain oversight of maintenance\-only and production\-support teams, ensuring scope discipline.
* Ensure capacity alignment with Product and Engineering leadership.


**Release Management \& Execution**
* Co\-own end\-to\-end release responsibilities including:
* Release planning, kickoff, and facilitation
* Release deck creation, updates, and stakeholder communication
* Release retrospectives and action tracking
* Participation in Release Command Center rotations
* Act as backup host for sprint reviews or release ceremonies.
* Enforce release best practices, communication, and escalation standards.


**Release Planning, Metrics \& Insights**
* Build and maintain release capacity plans for feature teams.
* Perform velocity analysis and identify delivery risks.
* Coordinate staffing, roster changes, and security component rotations.
* Track and analyze release progress using Jira and sprint analytics.
* Maintain historical release documentation and produce actionable insights.
* Support productivity and AI adoption tracking tied to cost and throughput.
* Contribute to release impact scoring and continuous improvement.


**Delivery Operations \& Administration**
* Own or support release\-related Confluence spaces, documentation, and future schedules.
* Maintain calendars and schedules considering global/regional constraints.
* Participate in delivery, pod, and product syncs with clear, concise updates.
* Enable cross\-pod coordination and consistent delivery standards.


**Vendor \& Partnership Management**
* Support strategic delivery partnerships (e.g., Global Logic) through reviews and scorecards.
* Facilitate recognition, feedback loops, onboarding, and offboarding.
* Ensure timely access provisioning/de\-provisioning.
* Act as escalation point for vendor delivery or access issues.


**Financial \& Capacity Governance**
* Support contractor/vendor financial processes including backfill approvals and coordination with Finance/HR.
* Review monthly invoices for accuracy and compliance.
* Maintain visibility into role changes, promotions, and rate adjustments.
* Track delivery resources for FP\&A, audits, and headcount planning.
* Ensure time\-tracking compliance and data integrity for capitalization.
* Partner with Finance on monthly/quarterly capitalization reports and audits.


**Cross** 
 ‑
 **Functional \& Special Project Support**
* Support cross\-functional delivery initiatives and platform\-level programs.
* Drive recurring syncs and remediation tracking.
* Maintain transparency and accountability across distributed/global teams.


**Required Skills**
* Proven experience supporting multiple Scrum teams and large\-scale releases.
* Strong understanding of Scrum, Kanban, and scaled delivery frameworks.
* Experience working with distributed teams and external vendors.
* Ability to operate across delivery execution, governance, and financial processes.
* Excellent facilitation, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* Proficiency with Jira, Confluence, Tempo, and release metrics/reporting tools.
* Excellent in Excel and Analytical Tools
* Knowledge on using AI tools like Copilot.


**Experience And Education**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
* 7\+ years of relevant experience in Agile delivery or program management roles.
* Certifications such as CSM, CSP, PMI‑ACP, SAFe, or equivalent (preferred but not required).


**About Bottomline**
 Bottomline Technologies provides collaborative payment, invoice and document automation solutions to corporations, financial institutions and banks around the world. The company's solutions are used to streamline, automate and manage processes involving payments, invoicing, global cash management, supply chain finance and transactional documents. Organizations trust these solutions to meet their needs for cost reduction, competitive differentiation and optimization of working capital.
   

  

 Serving industries such as financial services, insurance, health care, technology, communications, education, media, manufacturing and government, Bottomline provides products and services to approximately 80 of the Fortune 100 companies and 70 of the FTSE (Financial Times) 100 companies.
   

  

 Bottomline is a participating employer in the Employment Verification (E\-Verify) program EOE/AA/M/F/V/D/E\-Verify Employer
   

  

 Bottomline Technologies is an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer.
   

  

*Please Note: Bottomline Technologies does not accept resumes submitted by recruiting firms unless specifically requested by Human Resources. Unsolicited resumes will be ineligible for referral fees.*
 We welcome talent at all career stages and are dedicated to understanding and supporting additional needs. We're proud to be an equal opportunity employer, committed to creating an inclusive and open environment for everyone.

1e5c3d5e.title: Regional Marketing Specialist – Solutions & Regional Activation
1e5c3d5e.description:
The Regional Marketing Specialist serves as the in\-region expert for prioritized solutions and markets, translating global marketing strategy into impactful local execution. Acting as the bridge between Product Marketing, Global Marketing, Sales, and shared service teams, this role is responsible for driving regional demand generation activities, sales enablement, customer engagement, and event activations that accelerate business growth across Retail and Banking.


  
**Key Responsibilities**

**Solution \& Market Expertise**

* Serve as the regional subject matter expert (SME) for prioritized solutions, customer needs, market dynamics, and competitive trends.
* Partner with Product Marketing Managers (PMM) to provide regional insights that shape messaging, positioning, and go\-to\-market strategies.
* Ensure global priorities are effectively adapted to local market requirements and opportunities.
Provide ongoing market intelligence, customer insights, and competitive feedback to support campaign planning and product strategy.  
* 

**Regional Campaign Planning \& Execution**

* Own end\-to\-end planning, localization, and execution of regional marketing campaigns and activations.
* Influence campaign messaging, content development, channel selection, and audience targeting to maximize regional performance.
* Monitor campaign results, identify optimization opportunities, and provide feedback to Global Marketing Strategy and PMM teams.
Support Account\-Based Marketing (ABM) and opportunity\-based marketing initiatives for strategic accounts and priority opportunities.  
* 

**Sales Partnership \& Enablement**

* Support Regional Marketing Leads in managing relationships with Sales leadership across Retail and Banking.
* Identify sales enablement requirements and coordinate the creation, localization, and maintenance of collateral, tools, and customer\-facing assets.
Drive alignment between marketing activities and regional business objectives and pipeline priorities.  
* 

**Customer Engagement \& Experience Centers**

* Lead regional event, trade show, and Customer Experience Center (CEC) activation strategies.
* Coordinate planning, content development, customer journeys, nurture programs, and follow\-up activities for customer engagements.
Act as the regional solution lead for customer\-facing experiences, ensuring consistency of messaging and business impact.  
* 

**Cross\-Functional Coordination**

* Manage day\-to\-day collaboration with Digital Marketing, Marketing Operations, Product Marketing, Media Strategy, agencies, and external vendors to enable successful campaign execution.
* Coordinate regional asset production and ensure timely delivery against business priorities.
Proactively identify risks and implement mitigation plans to ensure effective execution.  
* 

**Continuous Improvement \& Collaboration**

* Collaborate with Regional Marketing Specialists across geographies to share best practices, insights, and lessons learned.
* Contribute to campaign performance reviews and regional marketing effectiveness initiatives.
Drive continuous improvement in processes, execution models, and market activation strategies.  
* 

**Success Measures**

* Regional pipeline contribution and demand generation performance.
* Campaign engagement, conversion, and ROI metrics.
* Sales satisfaction and enablement effectiveness.
* Event and CEC influence on customer engagement and revenue opportunities.
* Quality and speed of regional activation of global priorities.
* Cross\-functional collaboration and operational excellence.
* Account penetration and customer engagement within priority markets
* Marketing Influenced Opportunities
* Sales Accepted Leads (SALs)

  
**Required Qualifications**

* Bachelor's / Master's degree
* Minimum of 8 \-15 years of relevant experience or equivalent combination of education and experience in Marketing Management.
* Good business English skills (Written and spoken).

c66b27c3.title: Engagement Manager
c66b27c3.description:
**Job Description**
****About TaskUs:****
 TaskUs is a provider of outsourced digital services and next\-generation customer experience to fast\-growing technology companies, helping its clients represent, protect and grow their brands. Leveraging a cloud\-based infrastructure, TaskUs serves clients in the fastest\-growing sectors, including social media, e\-commerce, gaming, streaming media, food delivery, ride\-sharing, HiTech, FinTech, and HealthTech.
   

  

 The People First culture at TaskUs has enabled the company to expand its workforce to approximately 45,000 employees globally. Presently, we have a presence in twenty\-three locations across twelve countries, which include the Philippines, India, and the United States.
   

  

 It started with one ridiculously good idea to create a different breed of Business Processing Outsourcing (BPO)! We at TaskUs understand that achieving growth for our partners requires a culture of constant motion, exploring new technologies, being ready to handle any challenge at a moment's notice, and mastering consistency in an ever\-changing world.
   

  

****What We Offer:****
 At TaskUs, we prioritize our employees' well\-being by offering competitive industry salaries and comprehensive benefits packages. Our commitment to a People First culture is reflected in the various departments we have established, including Total Rewards, Wellness, HR, and Diversity. We take pride in our inclusive environment and positive impact on the community. Moreover, we actively encourage internal mobility and professional growth at all stages of an employee's career within TaskUs. Join our team today and experience firsthand our dedication to supporting People First.
   

  

****Responsibilities and Duties****
* Oversee engagement and team building
* End\-to\-end project management of events and employee engagement activities
* Corporate social responsibility activities \[Community service, community awareness, sponsorships, and fundraising events and fund collection (if applicable)]
* Overall five senses experience of the site
* Site's overall culture champion
* Overall management of clubs and communities
* Assist with developing strategies and initiatives to promote and achieve a culture of excellence and employee engagement.
* Overall lead of the development and delivery of the organization's calendar of activities.
* Communicate and consult with employees about the engagement concepts to ensure the organization is showing appreciation and recognition for its employees.
* Interact and collaborate effectively and positively with individuals of all levels of the organization.
* Customer Service Week activities
* Site wide communications, promotional materials, upcoming events and activities
* Assist with the development and delivery of the organization's calendar of activities.
* Assist Employee Engagement Head in collecting data to support continued employee engagement initiatives.
* Participate in professional growth activities
* Assume other duties and special projects as assigned
* Employee Appreciation Day
* Community service, community awareness, sponsorships, and fundraising events and fund collection
* Managing Site specific Social Media Account
* Calendar creation/maintenance


**Other Duties**
* Site\-level Engagement for 3 sites, budget management
* Direct cost control for 1 to 4 sites
* Visit management for 1 to 4 sites
* Floor walks and Site experience raised by TMs
* Maintenance of all Event plans with budget (Project Management files)
* 1x1s with Site VPs/head for collab, reporting, and help needed
* Responsible in liquidating expenses of site engagement activities


**Required Knowledge And Skills**
* Knowledge in Planning and Organizing various engagement initiatives.
* Has basic to advance knowledge in Digital Arts such as photography, videography and graphic design.
* Basic experience in production design.
* Must have a knowledge in financial management.
* Has the ability to quickly assess a given problem and quickly decide on a course of action.
* Can work and adapt to a fast\-paced working environment.
* Must be flexible and open for learning.
* Excellent organizational skills.
* Good analytical thinking and negotiation skills.
* Must be a good team player.
* At least 3 years of related working experience in customer experience operations and as a management specialist
* A good track record of meeting and delivering targets


****How We Partner To Protect You:****
 TaskUs will neither solicit money from you during your application process nor require any form of payment in order to proceed with your application. Kindly ensure that you are always in communication with only authorized recruiters of TaskUs.
   

  

****DEI:****
 In TaskUs we believe that innovation and higher performance are brought by people from all walks of life. We welcome applicants of different backgrounds, demographics, and circumstances. Inclusive and equitable practices are our responsibility as a business. TaskUs is committed to providing equal access to opportunities. If you need reasonable accommodations in any part of the hiring process, please let us know.
   

  

 We invite you to explore all TaskUs career opportunities and apply through the provided URL
 **https://www.taskus.com/careers/ .**
 TaskUs is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We celebrate and support diversity; we are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. TaskUs people first culture thrives on it for the benefit of our employees, our clients, our services, and our community.
   

  

 Req Id: R\_2606\_7521
   

  

 Posted At: Tue Jun 09 2026 00:00:00 GMT\+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)

b90a0fe0.title: Technical Account Manager
b90a0fe0.description:
**About Hightouch**
 Hightouch is an Agentic Marketing Platform powered by the industry\-leading Composable CDP. With complete brand context, customer data, and performance history in one place, every marketer finally has the power to build and ship end\-to\-end campaigns themselves. Teams move faster, stay on brand, and get AI marketing that actually works.
   

  

 Founded in 2019 and headquartered in San Francisco, Hightouch enables marketing teams to analyze performance, brainstorm ideas, and generate creative at a speed and quality that wasn't previously possible.
   

  

 Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms, Hightouch is trusted by leading enterprises like Domino's, Spotify, Aritzia, Cars.com, Ramp, and PetSmart.
   

  

 At Hightouch, our mission is to help our customers leverage data and AI to grow their businesses. The team is ambitious, impact\-driven, efficient — and we believe humility, kindness, and compassion are essential to our success. If you're energized by velocity, obsessed with raising the bar, and want to build alongside people who care deeply about each other and our customers, we'd love to meet you.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As our first Technical Account Manager hire in India, you will become the bridge between Hightouch and our largest customers based in the APJ region (Asia\-Pacific and Japan). You will oversee the entire customer journey starting from kick\-off to onboarding to continued customer success and finally, increased adoption. You are a product expert and will leverage your knowledge to ensure our Enterprise customers understand and utilize the Hightouch platform to its fullest extent and beyond.
   

  

 In this role, you strive to understand customer requirements and issues at the molecular level. No matter your background, you have a natural curiosity to uncover a customer’s use case and help navigate to the most elegant and efficient solution. Fundamentally, you are enamored with how a company can utilize data to its fullest extent. Utilizing this curiosity and knowledge, your goal is to guide the customer into their ideal future state as well as guide the innovation of the Hightouch platform as well.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* As a critical member of the Customer Success team you will be responsible for the retention and expansion our largest customers
* You will be part of a team that will work closely with Sales to strategize on how to increase the adoption of Hightouch within large organizations
* From a technical perspective, your primary responsibilities will be to deliver a timely and organized onboarding for customers through effective project management, ensure customers see the full value in Hightouch’s products, and advise on technical best practices
* Provide customers with clear proactive technical guidance and expertise across all our products
* Collaborate with Customer Support, Engineering, and other teams to assist with technical escalations
* Contribute towards the success of the Hightouch platform by surfacing use cases and problems to Engineering that push our product to the next level


 What We're Looking For
   

  

* 5\+ years of experience in a client facing and / or technology focused role where business experience and technical acumen was combined
* Experience managing and executing technical projects with a customer\-first attitude and a strong sense of empathy
* Excellent project management and communication skills
* Proven ability to quickly learn new technologies and understand complex systems (SQL, databases, APIs, reporting tools, etc.)
* Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills with a continuous desire to improve your technical acumen
* Ability to collaborate cross functionally with different teams and types of people
* Ability to work under pressure, deadlines and navigate unexpected roadblocks with ease


*We also offer meaningful equity compensation in the form of ISO options and offer early exercise and a 10\-year post\-termination exercise window.*
**E\-Verify Statement**
*Hightouch participates in E\-Verify. After you join the team, we'll verify your eligibility to work in the U.S. by submitting information from your Form I\-9 to the Social Security Administration and, if needed, the Department of Homeland Security. This process happens post\-hire only — we never use E\-Verify to pre\-screen applicants.*
*E\-Verify Notice*
*E\-Verify Notice (Spanish)*
*Right to Work Notice*
*Right to Work Notice (Spanish)*

b708eefc.title: Delivery Lead Manager
b708eefc.description:
**Skill required:** Tech for Operations \- Program Project Management  

**Designation:** Delivery Lead Manager  

**Qualifications:**Any Graduation
  

**Years of Experience:**13 to 18 years
  

**Language \- Ability:**English(International) \- Advanced
  

**About Accenture**  

Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 784,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
  

**What would you do?** • Operations Account technology Lead (OATL) acts as the single point of contact for the BPS account for technology related scope \& drive tech transformaiton. • They are accountable for ensuring high\-quality, issue free Technology delivery. • The OATL is also responsible for helping to expand the technology footprint on the account, working with the BPS/BT Lead to identify opportunities and proactively up\-sell and cross\-sell Technology services to increase efficiency. • Also perform client facing role as far as the deal is concerned on all questions/issues related to technology. • The OATL is also expected to position him/herself as a Technology expert with the BPO account, presenting the BPS Technology offerings/latest thinking to the Account Lead, and to bring the relevant Tech experts to the account as need be to drive automation. The Tech For Operations (TFO) team provides innovative and secure technologies to help clients build an intelligent operating model, driving exceptional results. Works closely with the sales, offering and delivery teams to identify and build innovative solutions.,Tech for Operations involves using technology to improve and streamline business operations. This role includes implementing software solutions, automating processes, and managing IT systems that support operational activities. It also involves analyzing data to optimize performance and ensure efficiency. The goal is to enhance productivity and operational effectiveness through the effective use of technology. Major sub deals include AHO(Application Hosting Operations), ISMT (Infrastructure Management), Intelligent Automation Relationships \& Collaboration: Client Account Lead, TGP Technology Account Lead, BPS Account Lead, TGPforBPO Factory leadership, BPS client Technical Experience: Program, Project and Service Management (PPSM), Delivery excellence et al Domain Knowledge (1\) – F\&A, HR, Procurement, Marketing, Supply Chain, Sales et al Technology Expertise (1\) –Infrastructure Management (Network \& Voice Technology) , Automation (RPA technologies), OCR/Workflow Technologies, Analytics, Cloud computing, Operations business process excellence, Block Chain technologies  

**What are we looking for?** •Negotiation skills •Risk management •Process\-orientation •Problem\-solving skills •Results orientation •Program/Transformation Management experience •Automation, GenAI, Agentic AI, or RPA exposure •Ability to drive productivity and technology\-led efficiencies across client accounts •
  

**Roles and Responsibilities:** • Single point of contact for the BPS account lead for all technology work and offerings. • Oversight for all technology delivery at a client account related to BPO services • Single point of contact for escalation and resolution of Technology delivery issues • Bring TGP experts to the account to showcase our capabilities and/or ensure the right solutions for the client • (Delivery center, offering, industry or solution architects). • Develop the connections for integrated account delivery management at the client (TAL, CAL, BPO Account Lead, etc.) identifying the synergies and ensuring clear accountabilities and no duplication of responsibilities • Work collaboratively with the BPS Account lead to identify and help efficiently originate new sales opportunities with our client senior executives across the C\-suite – focusing not only on improving the way we run IT, but also on how IT can help enable their business. • Responsible for efficiently driving TGP sales offerings to expand the Technology footprint at the account (up\-sell/cross\-sell). • Ensure a high\-performing, highly engaged technology team at the account. • Sustain Accenture’s culture and values; ensure these are visible to our people; set the tone at the top.


  

Any Graduation

d9aadefb.title: Technical Delivery Manager
d9aadefb.description: Role Overview We are looking for an experienced Technical Delivery Manager with 15\+ years of overall IT experience, including 10\+ years in Technical Delivery Management, to lead the successful delivery of large\-scale, complex technology programs. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in end\-to\-end project delivery, stakeholder management, engineering leadership, and hands\-on understanding of modern technology stacks including Azure Cloud, React, and .NET Core backend systems. This role requires a strong leader who can manage cross\-functional teams, drive technical program execution, ensure delivery excellence, and align business objectives with scalable technology solutions. Key Responsibilities • Lead the delivery of large, complex, and enterprise\-scale technology projects/programs from initiation through deployment and support. • Own end\-to\-end delivery management, including scope, schedule, cost, quality, risk, and resource planning. • Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, architects, and engineering teams to define delivery roadmaps and execution plans. • Manage distributed and cross\-functional teams including developers, QA, DevOps engineers, architects, and support teams. • Drive delivery of applications built on Azure Cloud, React, and .NET Core/backend technologies. • Ensure alignment of technical solutions with business requirements, enterprise architecture, and security standards. • Monitor project health through governance mechanisms, delivery dashboards, status reporting, and periodic reviews. • Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks, dependencies, and technical challenges proactively. • Manage client/stakeholder communication, escalations, and expectations throughout the delivery lifecycle. • Ensure adoption of Agile, Scrum, or hybrid delivery methodologies as appropriate.

c62c16de.title: RFP and InfoSec Program Manager
c62c16de.description:
**About SpotDraft**
-------------------


SpotDraft is on a mission to help legal and business teams move faster, together. Our AI\-powered contracting platform is redefining how companies manage contracts, and our story deserves to be told in creative, human, and memorable ways.


We're looking for an organized, detail\-oriented professional to own and scale our RFP (Request for Proposal) and Information Security (InfoSec) response program.


This role is ideal for someone who enjoys bringing order to complex processes, collaborating across teams, and writing clear, polished business content. You'll work closely with Sales, Solutions Engineering, Product, Engineering, Security, and Customer Success to ensure prospects and customers receive accurate, timely, and professional responses.

**What You'll Do**
------------------

### **Own the RFP Process**

* Coordinate responses for customer and prospect RFPs, RFIs, and security questionnaires.
* Manage timelines and ensure submissions are completed on schedule.
* Partner with Product, Engineering, Sales, Legal, Security, and other stakeholders to gather accurate responses.
* Produce polished, professional proposal documents.
* Maintain consistency, quality, and accuracy across all submissions.

### **Own the Information Security Response Program**

* Manage customer security questionnaires and vendor due diligence requests.
* Maintain a centralized knowledge base of approved security and compliance responses.
* Work with Engineering and Security teams to validate and update technical information.
* Help improve documentation and repeatability of the process.

### **Build and Improve the Program**

* Evaluate and implement tools that improve efficiency.
* Create scalable workflows and documentation.
* Identify opportunities for automation, AI, and self\-service.
* Measure turnaround times and continuously improve the process.
* Become the internal expert on how RFP and InfoSec responses are managed.

### **Grow into Solutions Engineering**

* As the RFP and InfoSec program becomes more efficient, your responsibilities will gradually expand into Solutions Engineering activities, including:
* Supporting customer discovery calls.
* Learning the product in depth.
* Assisting with technical demonstrations.
* Working alongside Solutions Engineers on customer engagements.
* Developing technical product expertise.

**What We're Looking For**
--------------------------

### **Required Qualifications**

* Exceptional written English and professional communication skills.
* Outstanding attention to detail.
* Strong organizational and project management abilities.
* Comfortable coordinating work across multiple teams.
* Ability to manage competing priorities and deadlines.
* Self\-motivated and comfortable working asynchronously.
* Curious, coachable, and eager to learn technical concepts.

### **Nice to Have**

* Experience with RFPs, RFIs, proposals, or technical questionnaires.
* Familiarity with Information Security concepts or security questionnaires.
* Experience working with SaaS companies.
* Technical aptitude or interest in software, APIs, cloud technologies, or cybersecurity.
* Experience with project management, documentation, or knowledge management tools.
* Experience using AI tools to improve workflows and content creation.

**Why SpotDraft?**
------------------

* Brilliant teammates—Work with some of the sharpest minds in legal tech.
* Expand your network—Interact with top founders, investors, and industry leaders.
* Real impact—Take ownership of projects and see your work in action.
* Big goals, bold moves—We trust you to deliver, innovate, and push boundaries.

  

**Our Core Values**
-------------------

* Our business is to delight Customers
* Be Transparent. Be Direct
* Be Audacious
* Outcomes over everything else
* Elevate each other
* Be Passionate. Take Ownership.
* Be 1% better every day

 **All candidates’ personal data shared during the recruitment process will be handled with utmost confidentiality and used solely for hiring purposes, in line with applicable data protection regulations.**

* SpotDraft is an equal\-opportunity employer. Candidates will not be discriminated against based on race, ethnicity, color, religion, caste, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, veteran, or disability status

fa4dfead.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
fa4dfead.description:
**Our Purpose**

*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*

**Title and Summary**


Senior Technical Program Manager
Technical Program Manager Role Overview  

Who is Mastercard?  

We work to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships, and passion, our innovations and solutions help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential.  

Our decency quotient, or DQ, drives our culture and everything we do inside and outside of our company. We cultivate a culture of inclusion for all employees that respects their individual strengths, views, and experiences. We believe our differences enable us to be a better team — one that makes better decisions, drives innovation, and delivers better business results.  

Technology at Mastercard  

What we create today will define tomorrow: revolutionary technologies that reshape the digital economy to be more connected and inclusive than ever before — safer, faster, and more sustainable.  

We need technologists who are energized by the challenges of a truly global network, with the talent and vision to create the critical systems and products that power global commerce and connect people everywhere to the vital goods and services they need every day.  

Working at Mastercard means being part of a unique culture that is inclusive, diverse, and built on collaboration. It is a place that celebrates your strengths, values your experiences, and offers the flexibility to shape a career across disciplines and continents — while working alongside experts and leaders at every level of the business to improve what exists and invent what’s next.  

All About You  

Are you a technical program manager who wants to work for a company that offers above\-and\-beyond benefits, including paid parental leave, flexible work hours, gift matching, and volunteer incentives?  

Do you want to work in an inclusive and nurturing culture that encourages your professional learning and development?  

The ideal candidate is passionate about the customer experience journey, highly motivated, intellectually curious, analytical, and possesses an entrepreneurial mindset.  

Knowledge / Experience  

* 8\+ years leading large\-scale, end\-to\-end technical programs across multiple teams with complex dependencies in enterprise environments.
* Strong expertise in portfolio\- and initiative\-level program management, including governance, execution tracking, reporting, and operational readiness.
* Hands\-on experience with Agile Scrum, SAFe, and blended delivery models, with strengths in work decomposition, sprint planning, backlog management, and delivery acceleration.
* Solid understanding of software engineering, system design, and architecture, with the ability to engage engineers on trade\-offs, scalability, and constraints.
* Proven ability to drive business and customer outcomes through technical execution, measured through metrics and results.
* Demonstrated strength in risk management, ambiguity handling, stakeholder influence, and executive communication.
* Experience building and leading TPM organizations, mentoring leaders, shaping practices, and influencing technology roadmaps.


About the Role  

* Drive transformational change in end\-to\-end product delivery by applying technical program management and engineering best practices across agile and hybrid environments.
* Lead large enterprise technical programs and products from inception to delivery, operating autonomously in ambiguous problem spaces.
* Maintain a deep understanding of business domains, systems, and architectural decisions, translating complexity into clarity and execution.
* Provide thought leadership, drive problem decomposition, accelerate delivery, and ensure predictable outcomes under tight deadlines.
* Establish trusted partnerships with engineering, business, and executive stakeholders, influencing decisions and aligning execution.
* Build, lead, and mature a high\-performing TPM function, fostering strong delivery culture, empathy, and accountability.


Major Accountabilities  

* Own program and portfolio execution, optimizing processes, aligning teams and technologies, and ensuring efficient use of resources.
* Drive delivery from planning through production, proactively managing risks, dependencies, escalations, and blockers.
* Establish clear governance, metrics, and reporting to enable transparency, timely decisions, and continuous improvement.
* Foster cross\-team collaboration, accountability for results, and organizational learning.
* Act as the primary program representative, providing clear communication, accurate status, and stakeholder alignment.
* Stay current on technology trends, evaluate designs, and influence long\-term organizational and technical direction.

**Corporate Security Responsibility**

  

All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

8f3f6864.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
8f3f6864.description:
**LiveRamp is the data collaboration platform of choice for the world’s most innovative companies. A groundbreaking leader in consumer privacy, data ethics, and foundational identity, LiveRamp is setting the new standard for building a connected customer view with unmatched clarity and context while protecting precious brand and consumer trust. LiveRamp offers complete flexibility to collaborate wherever data lives to support the widest range of data collaboration use cases—within organizations, between brands, and across its premier global network of top\-quality partners.**
**Hundreds of global innovators, from iconic consumer brands and tech giants to banks, retailers, and healthcare leaders turn to LiveRamp to build enduring brand and business value by deepening customer engagement and loyalty, activating new partnerships, and maximizing the value of their first\-party data while staying on the forefront of rapidly evolving compliance and privacy requirements.**
**You Will**
* Program Lifecycle Leadership: Own the end\-to\-end execution of multiple complex programs, from facilitating quarterly planning, to iterative changes, all the way through to successful commercial launches of multi\-quarter solutions and incremental feature deliverables.
* Strategic Alignment \& Prioritization: Partner with Executive Leadership across multiple solutions to prioritize across solutions, managing scope/timeline/capacity trade\-offs and reinforcing the prioritization framework when faced with new injections or displacements.
* Dependency \& Risk Management: Proactively identify, track, and resolve program\-level dependencies and technical complexities across teams to ensure seamless delivery while simultaneously mitigating risks and escalating blockers where appropriate.
* Growth Mindset \& Process Excellence: Active listening through retrospectives, to continuously implement and refine planning, development, and release techniques, ensuring teams maintain high Jira hygiene and utilize engineering metrics to improve team health, efficiency, and delivery quality.
* Operational Accountability: Own the "quality of the solution" by trusting and verifying technical estimates, ensuring rigorous testing/validation steps, and making sure every issue identified in syncs has a clear owner and resolution plan.


**Your Team Will**
 We are seeking a Senior Technical Program Manager to join our Identity and Data Foundational Solutions team. In this role, you will provide strategic oversight for a portfolio of complex programs, serving as the critical link between Product, Engineering, Design, Marketing/Go\-to\-Market, and Commercial teams. You will be responsible for translating our strategic vision into a successful execution strategy by fostering cross\-functional alignment and strengthening key stakeholder relationships. A proactive problem\-solver, you will identify and mitigate risks before they impact delivery, while continuously innovating processes to enhance program reporting and execution. Whether engaging in deep technical discussions with individual contributors or presenting high\-level strategy to C\-suite executives, you communicate with confidence, clarity, and purpose.
   

  

**About You**
* The Art of Influence: Skilled at guiding various cross functional teams toward decisions without relying solely on formal authority.
* Strategic Trade\-off Management: Skilled at facilitating objective go/no\-go decisions and scope adjustments based on timing, rationale, and business impact.
* Cross\-Functional Coordination: Proven ability to synchronize efforts across multiple disciplines (Product, Engineering, Design, Marketing, etc.) and hold them accountable to deliverables.
* Conflict Resolution \& Diplomacy: Ability to anticipate group dynamic issues and prevent conflict before it arises, fostering a collaborative "one\-team" environment.
* Proactive Risk Mitigation: A "forward\-looking" mindset that identifies and resolves difficulties before they impact the critical path.
* Effective Communication: Ability to distill complex program updates into clear, concise status reports and drive focused, agenda\-driven meetings.
* Resource Advocacy: Experience in managing "loaned/borrowed" developer resources to balance staffing needs with overall team health and project requirements.
* Extreme Ownership: A deep sense of accountability that extends beyond direct areas of responsibility to ensure the final product or service meets the highest quality standards.


**Preferred Skills**
* 3\+ years of experience in program management, technical program management, or product delivery roles \- preferably in high\-growth B2B SaaS or technology companies.
* Proven ability to drive initiatives from conception to commercialization. You thrive in fast\-evolving and ambiguous environments, effectively driving clarity and adapting to change through a strong bias for action, resourcefulness, and resilience.
* Strategic thinker with operational discipline \- you plan for scale, align execution to business goals, and never lose sight of customer and stakeholder outcomes.
* Strong Agile methodology expertise, both at the team and scaled program levels
* Highly effective communicator who can confidently navigate executive conversations, lead cross\-functional alignment, and influence decisions at all levels.
* AI\-curious and impact\-obsessed: You’re energized by the possibilities of AI to improve how people work, and you're ready to lead the charge from idea to execution.


**Benefits**
* Flexible paid time off, paid holidays, options for working from home, and paid parental leave.
* Comprehensive Benefits Package: LiveRamp offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to help you be your best self in your personal and professional lives. Our benefits package offers medical, dental, vision, accident, life and disability, an employee assistance program, voluntary benefits as well as perks programs for your healthy lifestyle, career growth, and more. Your medical benefits extend to your dependents including parents.


**More About Us**
*LiveRamp’s mission is to connect data in ways that matter, and doing so starts with our people. We know that inspired teams enlist people from a blend of backgrounds and experiences. And we know that individuals do their best when they not only bring their full selves to work but feel like they truly belong. Connecting LiveRampers to new ideas and one another is one of our guiding principles—one that informs how we hire, train, and grow our global team across nine countries and four continents. Click* 
*here* 
*to learn more about Diversity, Inclusion, \& Belonging (DIB) at LiveRamp.*
 We use automated decision systems (ADS) as part of our recruitment and hiring process. If you require an accommodation or believe that the use of an ADS may create a barrier to your application or participation in the hiring process due to a disability or other protected characteristic, please let us know. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations and ensuring an equitable hiring experience for all candidates.
   

  

**To all recruitment agencies** 
 : LiveRamp does not accept agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, LiveRamp employees or any other company location. LiveRamp is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.

71c31885.title: Technical Program Manager
71c31885.description:
**Introduction**
 Are you searching for an opportunity to play a key role in driving the dramatic growth of a highly successful software company?
   

  

 At Poppulo, we’re working on what’s next in communications and workplace technology. As a leader in this industry, we understand that meaningfully reaching every employee is hard. And so is managing office space in a hybrid world. And so is improving the customer and guest experience. We exist to make each of these things easier. We exist to bring harmony to our customers.
   

  

 And we do that at enterprise scale. Our omnichannel employee communications, customer communications, and workplace experience platform is trusted by over 6,000 organisations today, reaching more than 35M employees and delivering content to 500,000\+ digital signs.
   

  

 We know there’s no such thing as a “perfect" candidate \- we’re all a work in progress and are growing new skills and capabilities all the time. We encourage you to apply for a position with Poppulo even if you don’t meet 100% of the requirements. We believe in fostering an environment where there is a diversity of perspectives, in hopes that we can all succeed.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 As part of Poppulo’s recently established Technical Program Management team, this role offers the opportunity to help shape how we deliver strategic initiatives across Product and Technology.
   

  

 The Technical Program Manager will partner with Product, Engineering, Operations, and Business teams to enable scalable execution, operational excellence, and cross\-functional alignment. This role is responsible for delivering strategic programs, improving delivery practices, increasing portfolio visibility, and enabling successful business outcomes.
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced Technical Program Manager who excels in a dynamic SaaS environments, is comfortable working through ambiguity, and can independently drive complex initiatives from planning through delivery.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Manage the planning and delivery of complex cross\-functional programs from initiation through completion.
* Develop and maintain program plans, schedules, milestones, risks, and deliverables to ensure successful execution.
* Align stakeholders on program scope, objectives, priorities, and delivery outcomes.
* Enable program execution by proactively identifying risks, resolving issues, and maintaining momentum.
* Support operational readiness, change management, stakeholder communications, and adoption activities.
* Facilitate cross\-functional discussions to solve complex business and technical challenges.
* Create dashboards, status reports, and executive presentations to communicate program progress and key decisions.
* Promote continuous improvements in delivery processes, governance, and operational efficiency.


**Education And Experience**
* 8\+ years of professional experience, including 5\+ years in Technical Program Management, Program Management, or a similar role.
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, or related technical discipline.
* Experience delivering complex SaaS products or platforms in high\-growth software environments.
* Proven program management experience, including planning, execution, risk management, and dependency management.
* Proven ability to manage cross\-functional initiatives and influence stakeholders without direct authority.
* Experience partnering with Product, Engineering, Operations, and Business teams.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Excellent data\-informed, problem\-solving, and organisational skills, with the ability to make data\-driven decisions.
* Good understanding of Agile software development methodologies.
* Experience working across globally distributed teams and managing multiple priorities in a dynamic environment.
* Experience supporting transformation, integration, or operational improvement initiatives is an advantage.
* Experience delivering or supporting software solutions in cloud environments. Familiarity with Microsoft Azure is preferred; experience with AWS, Google Cloud Platform, or other major cloud platforms is also considered.
* Familiarity with AI\-enabled tools and workflows is desirable.


**Who We Are**
 We are a values\-driven organisation that encourages our employees to bring their authentic selves to work every day and empowers everyone to make a tangible impact on our products, clients, and culture. We offer a dynamic environment with driven, fun, and flexible individuals who thrive on challenge and responsibility. This is an opportunity to contribute to our culture and join a company that’s on the move.
   

  

 We live the Poppulo values each day, as they are key to everything we do.
   

  

* Bring Your Best Self We show up authentically, are self\-aware and always strive to be better.
* See it. Own it. Solve it. We proactively innovate and solve for our customers and each other. We set an example with high standards for our work. We foster a culture of learning, acknowledging our successes and our failures.
* Together We’re Better We value and celebrate our diversity. We learn from others, respecting their expertise, and focus on building trust. That's what makes us a team.


 Named a Great Place to Work in 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, and 2021, we are a fast\-growing global technology company, with offices in Ireland, the US, and the UK.
   

  

 Poppulo is an equal opportunity employer.
   

  

*We are committed to protecting your privacy. For details on how we collect, use, and protect your personal information, please refer to our Job Applicant Privacy Policy.*
