We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
   

  

**What would you do?** 
 Lead the end\-to\-end operational delivery of Marketing Operations services across CRM, Creative, Media Activation, and Media Operations teams. Manage multiple service streams to ensure delivery quality, operational excellence, stakeholder satisfaction, and adherence to agreed service levels. Act as the primary delivery owner for day\-to\-day operations, ensuring work is prioritized, resourced, and delivered within agreed timelines and quality standards. Drive collaboration across service lines to ensure seamless campaign execution and integrated marketing delivery. Lead team managers, team leads, and individual contributors across multiple functional areas while fostering a high\-performance, client\-centric culture. Support the Delivery Lead in achieving account objectives, operational targets, client satisfaction goals, and continuous improvement initiatives. Drive operational governance, workforce management, quality compliance, performance reporting, and risk mitigation across all service streams. Identify opportunities to enhance productivity, simplify processes, improve quality, and increase operational efficiency through automation and best practices
   

  

**What are we looking for?** 
 Bachelor s Degree plus Master’s Degree in Business Management. 12\- 15 years of experience in Marketing Operations, Campaign Operations, Agency Operations, Shared Services, or Delivery Management. Proven experience managing large cross\-functional teams and operational delivery environments. Experience working across multiple service streams such as CRM, Creative Production, Media Activation, and Media Operations. Strong stakeholder management and client\-facing experience. Experience managing operational KPIs, SLAs, governance reviews, and delivery reporting. Ability to manage multiple priorities while maintaining high standards of quality and operational performance. Demonstrated leadership experience in building, managing, and developing high\-performing teams. Willing to work primarily across Australia/APAC shift timings and flexible to work across different shifts if required. Must Have Skills: Delivery Management. Team Leadership and People Management. Stakeholder Management. Project and Program Management. Operational Governance and Service Delivery Management. Resource Planning and Capacity Management. Risk and Issue Management. Client Relationship Management. Performance Management and Reporting. Process Improvement and Operational Excellence. Strong understanding of Marketing Operations delivery including: \-CRM Operations \-Creative Services \-Media Activation \-Media Operations Strong communication, presentation, and leadership skills. Excellent analytical and problem\-solving capabilities. Ability to manage multiple teams, priorities, and deadlines in a fast\-paced environment. Good to Have Skills: Knowledge of CRM and Marketing Automation platforms such as SFMC, Braze, Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Campaign, or similar tools. Understanding of campaign operations, customer journeys, audience management, and marketing workflows. Experience with project management and workflow tools such as JIRA, Workfront, or ServiceNow. PMP, Agile, Scrum, Prince2, Lean Six Sigma, or equivalent certifications. Exposure to marketing performance analytics and operational reporting frameworks. Experience managing distributed and global delivery teams Support business continuity planning, workforce management, and operational readiness activities. Drive a culture of operational excellence, accountability, innovation, and continuous improvement.
   

  

**Roles and Responsibilities:** 
 Delivery \& Operations Management: Own day\-to\-day delivery across CRM, Creative, Media Activation, and Media Operations service streams. Ensure deliverables are completed within agreed timelines, quality standards, and operational SLAs. Manage workload distribution, prioritization, capacity planning, and resource allocation across teams. Monitor delivery performance and proactively address risks, bottlenecks, dependencies, and escalations. Drive execution discipline and accountability across all teams. Team Leadership \& People Management: Lead team leads and functional specialists across service streams. Support hiring, onboarding, capability development, mentoring, coaching, and succession planning activities. Drive performance management processes and build a culture of continuous improvement and accountability. Foster collaboration and knowledge sharing across teams. Stakeholder \& Client Management: Act as the primary operational contact for delivery\-related discussions and escalations. Build strong relationships with client stakeholders and internal leadership teams. Provide regular updates on delivery performance, resource utilization, quality metrics, risks, and mitigation plans. Manage stakeholder expectations and ensure alignment on priorities and delivery commitments. Governance \& Quality Management: Establish and maintain governance processes, operational controls, and quality standards. Ensure adherence to SOPs, DTPs, compliance requirements, and client\-specific processes. Track and report operational KPIs, SLAs, quality scores, productivity measures, and delivery performance metrics. Conduct regular operational reviews and identify improvement opportunities. Transformation \& Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities for automation, process optimization, and operational transformation. Support implementation of new tools, technologies, and delivery methodologies. Drive standardization of processes and best practices across service streams. Partner with the Delivery Lead on strategic initiatives and account growth opportunities. Work Orchestration \& Operational Excellence: Maintain visibility of delivery performance through dashboards, reporting frameworks, and governance forums. Ensure accurate tracking of campaign volumes, workloads, resource utilization, quality scores, and operational metrics. Monitor service delivery health and drive corrective actions where required. Maintain risk registers, issue logs, action trackers, and escalation mechanisms. Ensure compliance with governance standards, privacy requirements, and contractual obligations., Any Graduation

 Delivery Lead Senior Manager

 Any Graduation

 16 to 25 years
   

  

**About Accenture**
 Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. **What would you do?** 
 Enterprise Supply Chain Leader responsible for defining and executing the strategic roadmap for supply\-chain\-led New Product Introduction (NPI) delivery across a global portfolio of programs, markets, and business units. Accountable for portfolio governance, operational excellence, organizational capability building, and long\-term value realization while serving as a trusted advisor to executive leadership. Leads large\-scale cross\-functional teams to ensure supply readiness, deployment excellence, risk mitigation, and business continuity while driving transformational initiatives through digitalization, automation, advanced planning technologies, and data\-driven decision making. Shapes future operating models, strengthens enterprise\-wide governance frameworks, and delivers measurable business outcomes aligned to growth, customer service, cost, quality, compliance, and working capital objectives. Owns strategic client relationships and is accountable for expanding business impact through continuous innovation, operational efficiency, talent development, and sustainable value creation.
   

  

**What are we looking for?** 
 Experience Required
   

  

* 18–22\+ years of progressive Supply Chain, Operations, Program Management, and Transformation leadership experience with demonstrated expertise in leading global supply\-chain\-led NPI portfolios, enterprise\-scale transformations, complex multi\-market deployments and commercialization. Education

* Power BI, Tableau, MS Project, Planisware, AI\-enabled planning platforms, Advanced Analytics solutions
* Travel Requirement As per business requirement Industry Experience FMCG, FMCD, Manufacturing, Life Sciences, Consumer Goods, Industrial, Regulatory, or other complex global supply chain environments Financial \& Business Value Management
* Drive operational and financial performance improvements through strategic initiatives focused on productivity, cost optimization, service excellence, and risk reduction.
* Accountable for achieving measurable business impact and demonstrating value realization aligned with client and organizational objectives. Talent \& Organization Leadership
* Lead, mentor, and develop a high\-performing leadership team of managers and delivery leaders while creating clear succession and capability development plans.
* Build future\-ready organizational capabilities aligned with evolving supply chain skill requirements, digital transformation agendas, and business growth objectives.
* Drive strategic workforce planning, talent acquisition, retention, diversity initiatives, and leadership development programs.
* Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, continuous improvement, and employee engagement through the Lean\-Do\-Teach philosophy. Governance, Risk \& Compliance
* Ensure enterprise\-wide adherence to governance frameworks, operational controls, compliance requirements, quality standards, and master data integrity. Roles and Responsibilities:
* Strategic Leadership \& Portfolio Governance
* Own and lead the end\-to\-end Supply Chain NPI portfolio strategy across multiple regions, business units, and product categories, ensuring alignment with enterprise growth objectives and long\-term business priorities.
* Drive executive governance and decision\-making forums by providing strategic recommendations, scenario\-based insights, and risk mitigation plans to senior leadership and client executives.
* Establish portfolio prioritization frameworks and resource allocation strategies to maximize business value, execution effectiveness, and organizational agility.
* Act as the ultimate escalation point for complex supply chain, operational, and deployment risks, ensuring timely resolution and mitigation. Executive Stakeholder Management
* Build and maintain strong executive\-level relationships across Supply Chain, Manufacturing, Procurement, Commercial, Quality, Regulatory, Finance, and Technology organizations.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to senior client leadership by translating business objectives into actionable supply chain strategies and measurable outcomes.
* Influence and drive alignment across diverse stakeholder groups while managing competing priorities in a dynamic global environment. Operational Excellence \& Delivery Leadership
* Provide leadership oversight to multiple delivery managers and large operational teams, ensuring consistent execution excellence across the NPI portfolio.
* Ensure delivery of committed business outcomes against defined KPIs, SLAs, and financial targets, including OTIF, launch readiness, working capital, inventory optimization, cost\-to\-serve, quality, compliance, and service performance.

543b31b2.title: Sr Manager, Business Solutions
543b31b2.description:
JLL supports the Whole You, personally and professionally.
  
  

Our people at JLL are shaping the future of real estate for a better world by combining world class services, advisory and technology to our clients. We are committed to hiring the best, most talented people in our industry; and we support them through professional growth, flexibility, and personalized benefits to manage life in and outside of work. Whether you’ve got deep experience in commercial real estate, skilled trades, and technology, or you’re looking to apply your relevant experience to a new industry, we empower you to shape a brighter way forward so you can thrive professionally and personally.
  
  

**Location:** Bengaluru, India  Function: Business Development \& Sales  Business: Property Management Services (All Real Estate Asset Classes)
  
Role Purpose
  
Lead business growth for Property Management services by acquiring new clients, expanding existing relationships, and driving revenue across Commercial, Residential, Retail, Industrial \& Logistics, Healthcare, Hospitality, and Mixed\-Use assets. The role will focus on strategic sales, client engagement, solution development, and market expansion.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Drive new business acquisition and achieve annual revenue targets.
  
Develop and manage a robust pipeline of opportunities across target markets.
  
Build relationships with developers, occupiers, investors, REITs, corporates, and institutional owners.
  
Lead client presentations, commercial discussions, proposals, and contract negotiations.
  
Collaborate with operational teams to create compelling service solutions and value propositions.
  
Identify cross\-selling opportunities across integrated real estate service offerings.
  
Track market trends, competitor activities, and emerging business opportunities.
  
Maintain accurate sales forecasts and pipeline reporting.
  
Represent the organisation at industry events and client engagements.
  
Candidate Profile
  
10–15 years of experience in Business Development, Sales, or Account Management within Real Estate, Property Management, Facilities Management, Workplace Services, or B2B Services.
  
Strong network within the real estate ecosystem.
  
Proven track record of winning and managing large, complex service contracts.
  
Excellent stakeholder management, negotiation, and presentation skills.
  
Commercially astute with a consultative, solution\-selling approach.
  
Key Competencies
  
New Business Development
  
Strategic Sales \& Solution Selling
  
Client Relationship Management
  
Commercial Negotiation
  
Market Development
  
Account Growth \& Retention
  
Revenue Management
  
Executive Stakeholder Engagement
  
Success Measures
  
New business revenue and profitability achieved
  
Annual contract value (ACV) won
  
Pipeline growth and conversion rates
  
Strategic client acquisition and retention
  
Cross\-sell and upsell performance
  
Achievement of sales targets and market expansion goals
  
If this job description resonates with you, we encourage you to apply even if you don’t meet all of the requirements below. We’re interested in getting to know you and what you bring to the table!
  
  

Personalized benefits that support personal well\-being and growth:
  
  

JLL recognizes the impact that the workplace can have on your wellness, so we offer a supportive culture and comprehensive benefits package that prioritizes mental, physical and emotional health.
  
  

About JLL –
  
  

We’re JLL—a leading professional services and investment management firm specializing in real estate. We have operations in over 80 countries and a workforce of over 102,000 individuals around the world who help real estate owners, occupiers and investors achieve their business ambitions. As a global Fortune 500 company, we also have an inherent responsibility to drive sustainability and corporate social responsibility. That’s why we’re committed to our purpose to shape the future of real estate for a better world. We’re using the most advanced technology to create rewarding opportunities, amazing spaces and sustainable real estate solutions for our clients, our people, and our communities.
  
  

Our core values of teamwork, ethics and excellence are also fundamental to everything we do and we’re honored to be recognized with awards for our success by organizations both globally and locally.
  
  

Creating a diverse and inclusive culture where we all feel welcomed, valued and empowered to achieve our full potential is important to who we are today and where we’re headed in the future. And we know that unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives help us think bigger, spark innovation and succeed together.

11d87353.title: Technical Program Manager
11d87353.description:
**Overview**
 Microsoft is a company where passionate innovators come to collaborate, envision what can be and take their careers further. This is a world of more possibilities, more innovation, more openness, and the sky is the limit thinking in a cloud\-enabled world.
   

  

 Microsoft’s Azure Data engineering team is leading the transformation of analytics in the world of data with products like databases, data integration, big data analytics, messaging \& real\-time analytics, and business intelligence. The products our portfolio include Microsoft Fabric, Azure SQL DB, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure PostgreSQL, Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, and Power BI. Our mission is to build the data platform for the age of AI, powering a new class of data\-first applications and driving a data culture.
   

  

 Within Azure Data, the Azure Data Analytics team builds the core analytics experiences in Microsoft Fabric. We own the Data Warehouse, Data Engineering, Data Science, AI, and Power BI workloads, enabling customers to ingest, transform, analyze, and derive insights from structured, semi\-structured, and unstructured data at enterprise scale. Our team is at the center of Microsoft's strategy to deliver a seamless, end\-to\-end analytics experience in Fabric.
   

  

 We are Azure Data, a Microsoft team driving the future of data processing in the Microsoft Cloud. Our engineering and product teams build some of the most advanced, large\-scale data processing services in the world used daily by millions of developers and the world’s largest enterprises.
   

  

 Cosmos is Microsoft’s big data analytics SaaS service providing compute and storage capabilities to power mission critical workloads for businesses at Microsoft. It is the central repository where Microsoft teams ingest, store, process, query, and share structured and unstructured data at scale. Cosmos is only available to 1P customers and is run as a shared, multi\-tenant service optimized for big data analytics. Cosmos is not just a big data platform but a complete ecosystem of tools and solutions that have been developed by the customer community.
   

  

 Our team actively uses AI tools including Copilots, internal platforms, and data driven insights \- to accelerate product discovery, design, validation, and execution. We expect candidates to be comfortable using AI as a core part of how they work. As part of the product development cycle, you will collaborate with stakeholders, design new platform capabilities, validate them with customers iteratively, and help bring them to the world
   

  

 We do not just value differences or different perspectives. We seek them out and invite them in so we can tap into the collective power of everyone in the company. As a result, our customers are better served.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own end‑to‑end delivery of platform features for the Cosmos service, from problem definition through design, implementation and rollout.
* Drive the product strategy and roadmap for key areas of the Cosmos platform you own by leveraging AI.
* Translate customer business needs into well‑scoped program plans and engineering requirements.
* Drive capacity planning and Supply chain management for the Cosmos platform.
* Lead cross‑team execution by coordinating dependencies across engineering, operations, security, and other platform teams.
* Partner with engineering and live‑site teams to support operational readiness, reliability goals, and service health improvements.
* Manage the Incident and change management process for the Cosmos environment along with the DRI activities and define and monitor success metrics (e.g., reliability, performance, adoption, cost efficiency) for owned features.
* Communicate clearly with stakeholders on status, risks, decisions, and trade‑offs and contribute to a strong PM culture through documentation, design reviews, and knowledge sharing.


 Embody our culture and values
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Required/Minimum Qualifications
   

  

* Good experience in the software industry, with a degree in computer science or a related technical field OR equivalent experience 2\+ years of technical experience in product management role.
* Hands\-on experience with LLM APIs (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI) and tool use.


 Job Requirements: Other \& Additional
   

  

 Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings: Microsoft Cloud Background Check:
   

  

* This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.
* Preferred/Additional Qualifications
* Proven experience to drive complex initiatives from concept to delivery.
* Strong communication skills, but also technical skills, including the ability to explain complex technical concepts clearly and to be able to discuss complex technical issues with engineering for resolutions.
* Good knowledge of Supply chain management and capacity planning.
* Good understanding of SQL, Kusto, Power BI.
* Experience with cloud technologies (Paas, Saas, Analytics \& AI, DevOps and Networking).


 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances. If you
   

  

 need assistance and/or reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application or the recruiting process, please send a request via the Accommodation request form (Accessibility \| Microsoft Careers).
   

  

 Benefits/perks listed below may vary depending on the nature of your employment with Microsoft and the country where you work.
   

  

 \#azdat
   

  

 \#azuredata
   

  

 \#Cosmos , \#BigData \#Hyperscale
   

  

 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

76f18421.title: Principal Engineering Program Manager
76f18421.description:
Product Manager / Solution Designer – ServiceNow GRC / IRM
   

  

 Job Title
   

  

 Product Manager / Solution Designer – ServiceNow GRC / IRM
   

  

**Experience**
 10–16 Years
   

  

 Location
   

  

 Hyderabad (Hybrid)
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are looking for an experienced ServiceNow GRC / IRM Product Manager \& Solution Designer with strong expertise in Integrated Risk Management (IRM), Business Continuity Management (BCM), Third\-Party Risk Management (TPRM), and Business Analysis capabilities.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will lead enterprise governance, risk, and compliance transformation initiatives using the ServiceNow platform. The role involves solution architecture, product strategy, stakeholder management, requirement analysis, and implementation governance for enterprise\-wide GRC/IRM programs.
   

  

 The candidate should possess strong expertise in ServiceNow IRM/GRC modules, enterprise risk frameworks, compliance management, and business process analysis while collaborating with business, security, audit, compliance, and technology teams.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Lead architecture, design, and implementation of ServiceNow GRC / IRM solutions across enterprise environments.
   

  

 Define product vision, roadmap, and strategic direction for ServiceNow IRM capabilities.
   

  

**Design And Implement Solutions For**
 Integrated Risk Management (IRM)
   

  

 Business Continuity Management (BCM)
   

  

 Third\-Party Risk Management (TPRM)
   

  

 Policy \& Compliance Management
   

  

 Audit Management
   

  

 Risk \& Control Frameworks
   

  

 Conduct business analysis, requirement gathering, process assessment, and stakeholder workshops.
   

  

 Translate business and compliance requirements into scalable ServiceNow solutions.
   

  

 Drive enterprise governance and standardization for risk and compliance processes.
   

  

 Collaborate with security, audit, legal, vendor management, and business teams.
   

  

 Define governance models, workflows, KPIs, reporting, and operational dashboards.
   

  

 Provide consulting and thought leadership on risk management, resilience, and regulatory compliance.
   

  

 Ensure successful solution delivery through coordination with development and implementation teams.
   

  

 Support solution estimation, architecture reviews, and proposal creation.
   

  

**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
 Mandatory Skills
   

  

 10–16 years of overall IT experience.
   

  

 Strong expertise in ServiceNow GRC / IRM solution design and implementation.
   

  

**Hands\-on Experience With**
 IRM
   

  

 BCM
   

  

 TPRM
   

  

 Policy \& Compliance
   

  

 Risk Management
   

  

 Strong understanding of governance, risk, and compliance frameworks.
   

  

 Experience in business analysis, requirement gathering, and stakeholder management.
   

  

 Knowledge of enterprise risk management and regulatory compliance standards.
   

  

 Experience in creating solution architecture and product roadmaps.
   

  

 Excellent communication, presentation, and documentation skills.
   

  

**Preferred Qualifications**
 ServiceNow CIS\-IRM Certification
   

  

 ServiceNow CSA Certification
   

  

 ITIL Certification
   

  

**Risk Or Compliance Certifications Such As**
 CISA
   

  

 CRISC
   

  

 ISO 27001
   

  

 COBIT
   

  

 Experience in Agile / Scrum methodologies
   

  

 Exposure to cybersecurity and operational resilience programs
   

  

 Soft Skills
   

  

 Strong leadership and ownership mindset
   

  

 Excellent analytical and problem\-solving abilities
   

  

 Ability to engage with senior business and technology stakeholders
   

  

 Strong collaboration and communication skills
   

  

 Strategic thinking with execution focus
